We study this setting through multiplex flow networks with partial functionality, where a node can remain operational in some functionalities while failing in others. A heavy load on one functionality reduces the capacity available to the others, as quantified by cross-layer influence factors. When a node fails in one layer, its load is redistributed among surviving nodes in that layer, while the node may continue to operate in the others. Using mean-field analysis, we derive recursive equations for the final system sizes, namely the fraction of surviving nodes in each layer after the cascade stops. We validate the analysis through simulations for several load-capacity distributions. We then examine key features of the cascade dynamics, including non-monotone robustness curves, different cascade-outcome regimes, and their relation with cross-layer influence. We map the outcomes to distinct steady-state regimes, including single-layer survival phases absent in joint-functionality models, and show that partial functionality can increase robustness relative to the joint-functionality case. Finally, we study robustness maximization under a fixed total capacity budget by comparing several capacity allocation strategies. We propose a strategy that combines cross-layer influence with local neighborhood information on load and degree, and show that it gives the strongest robustness performance across the configurations considered.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多重流网络中节点部分失效的级联故障模型，提出跨层影响因子量化不同功能间的资源竞争，通过平均场分析推导出级联停止后的系统规模递归方程，并发现部分功能可提升系统鲁棒性，最后提出一种结合跨层影响与局部邻域信息的容量分配策略来实现鲁棒性最大化。
AI.motivation: 传统流网络模型假设节点要么完全失效要么完全正常运行，但现实中节点可能同时承载多种不同流，一种功能的失效并不意味着其他功能也失效。本文旨在研究这种节点部分功能失效场景下的级联故障动力学。
AI.method: 构建多重流网络部分功能模型，引入跨层影响因子量化功能间资源竞争；采用平均场分析推导级联停止后各层存活节点比例的递归方程；通过仿真验证不同负载-容量分布下的理论结果；提出结合跨层影响与局部邻域信息（负载和度）的容量分配策略。
AI.result: 发现非单调鲁棒性曲线、不同的级联结果区域及其与跨层影响的关系；将结果映射到不同稳态区域，包括在全功能模型中不存在的单层存活相；证明部分功能相比全功能模型能提升系统鲁棒性；提出的混合容量分配策略在多种配置下表现出最强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 部分功能机制是多层流网络中不可忽略的现实特性，它能改变级联故障的动力学行为并提升系统鲁棒性；提出的结合跨层影响与局部信息的容量分配策略能有效优化固定总容量预算下的鲁棒性。

title: A Pseudo Panel Difference-in-Differences (DiD) Analysis of Online Shopping Behavior in the Puget Sound Regional Council (PSRC) Region
summary: Online shopping is a growing trend, particularly following the COVID-19 lock-downs enacted by many cities. Understanding these trends requires robust panel dat methods. However, panel data (i.e., with repeated measurements of the same observational units) are often unavailable. In this study, we use a propensity score weighting (PSW) approach to adjust repeated cross-sectional travel diary surveys collected in the Puget Sound Regional Council (PSRC) region. The most common home delivery is packages (2.09 days per week in 2023), followed by food (0.36 days per week in 2023). We find that single-family detached and townhouse residents tend to receive more home deliveries than those living in apartments. We also find a difference in several patterns pre- and post-COVID pandemic. Vehicle deficient households did not exhibit the same increase in home delivery frequency as other households pre-COVID, but the pattern reversed in the post-COVID period - i.e., vehicle deficient households saw a relative increase in delivery frequency. Overall, this study demonstrates the pseudo-panel approach to causal inference by leveraging differences in PSW-weighted in delivery frequency across treatment groups.

AI.tldr: 本文利用倾向评分加权（PSW）方法，对普吉特海湾地区委员会（PSRC）的重复横断面旅行日记调查进行调整，分析了COVID-19前后家庭送货频率的变化。研究发现，独立住宅居民送货频率高于公寓居民；无车家庭在疫情前送货频率增长较慢，但疫情后反而增长更快。
AI.motivation: 面板数据通常难以获取，而重复横断面数据虽易得但难以进行因果推断。本文旨在利用PSW方法构建伪面板，以解决缺乏真实面板数据时，难以分析COVID-19前后家庭送货行为变化的难题。
AI.method: 采用倾向评分加权（PSW）方法，对PSRC区域的重复横断面旅行日记调查数据进行加权调整，模拟面板数据效果，进而比较不同住房类型、车辆拥有情况等群体在疫情前后的送货频率差异。
AI.result: 最常见的送货是包裹（2023年每周2.09天），其次是食品（0.36天/周）。独立住宅和联排别墅居民送货频率高于公寓居民。疫情前后模式存在差异：无车家庭在疫情前送货频率增长低于其他家庭，但疫情后反而相对增长更快。
AI.conclusion: 本研究展示了利用PSW伪面板方法进行因果推断的可行性，有效弥补了真实面板数据缺失的问题，并揭示了COVID-19对不同群体送货行为的差异性影响。

title: Optimality-Informed Neural Networks for Lunar Landing Trajectory Optimization
summary: This paper develops an Optimality-Informed Neural Network (OINN) approach for the energy-optimal, free-final-time powered descent of a lunar lander from any initial position, velocity, and mass within a bounded operating envelope to a fixed landing site with zero terminal velocity. Building on a recent framework that jointly embeds Pontryagin's minimum principle and the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation for general nonlinear optimal control, the proposed OINN approach specializes that idea to a lunar landing problem with free time of flight and fixed terminal state. Every boundary and transversality condition is hard-encoded into the network architecture by construction, the closed-form Pontryagin-optimal thrust magnitude and direction law is substituted directly rather than learned, and the remaining state, costate, and an auxiliary value-function output are trained against a physics-residual loss formed entirely from the necessary conditions of optimality, with no precomputed optimal trajectories required. A preliminary theoretical analysis is explored, establishing a stochastic-optimization stationarity guarantee for the offline training procedure, an explicit bound translating the achieved training residual into bounds on touchdown position, touchdown velocity, and flight-time error, and a fixed, input-independent onboard computational and memory cost suitable for real-time deployment. Numerical simulations evaluate the trained policy, with no retraining, against an independently solved indirect-method boundary-value problem at six representative initial states spanning the operating envelope and against eighty additional Monte Carlo simulation runs, demonstrating close agreement with the indirect-method solution and consistently small dynamics and transversality residuals throughout the envelope.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种最优性信息神经网络（OINN）方法，用于月球着陆器的能量最优、自由最终时间动力下降问题。该方法将Pontryagin最小原理和Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程嵌入网络架构，硬编码所有边界和横截条件，直接代入闭合形式的Pontryagin最优推力律，仅通过最优性必要条件形成的物理残差损失进行训练，无需预计算最优轨迹。理论分析提供了随机优化平稳性保证、训练残差到着陆误差的显式界，以及适用于实时部署的固定计算和存储成本。数值仿真验证了该方法与间接法求解结果的高度一致性。
AI.motivation: 针对月球着陆器在自由最终时间、固定终端状态约束下的能量最优动力下降问题，现有方法（如间接法、直接法、强化学习等）存在计算成本高、需要大量预计算轨迹、难以实时部署等局限性，因此需要一种既能保证最优性又适合实时应用的求解方法。
AI.method: 提出OINN方法：1) 在神经网络架构中硬编码Pontryagin最小原理和HJB方程的所有边界与横截条件；2) 直接用闭合形式的Pontryagin最优推力幅值和方向定律替代学习；3) 对剩余的状态、协态和辅助价值函数输出，仅使用最优性必要条件的物理残差损失进行训练；4) 提供离线训练的随机优化平稳性理论保证，以及训练残差到着陆误差的显式误差界。
AI.result: 在六个代表性初始状态和八十个蒙特卡洛仿真中，OINN策略与独立求解的间接法边值问题结果高度一致，在整个运行包络内动力学和横截残差始终很小，且具备固定的、与输入无关的机载计算与存储成本。
AI.conclusion: OINN方法成功将最优控制理论先验知识深度融合到神经网络架构中，在保证最优性的同时实现了实时部署能力，为自由最终时间、固定终端状态的最优控制问题提供了一种无需预计算轨迹、理论可解释的求解范式。

title: The Hidden Water Geography of U.S. Hyperscale Data Centers in the AI Era
summary: Water use by data centers is routinely reported as a single footprint, but water is consumed through two physically distinct pathways: at the site for cooling and in the power system that generates electricity. We mapped both pathways for 472 U.S. hyperscale facilities by linking facility locations to electricity regions, hydrologic basins, and water-stress data. Under baseline assumptions, operational water consumption totals approximately 300 GL yr^-1 (range 205-451 across scenarios), with electricity-related water contributing three-quarters of the total. The two pathways produce different hotspot geographies: direct cooling burdens concentrate in stressed western and south-central basins, whereas electricity-related burdens concentrate in a few eastern grid regions with fossil-heavy supply. Just 3 of 24 hosting balancing authorities account for 59% of electricity-related water. Separating pathways identifies which decisions matter where: cooling design and water sourcing locally, electricity planning and procurement regionally

AI.tldr: 数据中心的水资源消耗常被报告为一个单一数字，但实际通过现场冷却和电力系统发电两条物理途径消耗。本研究映射了美国472个超大规模设施，发现总运营水耗约300 GL/年，其中电力相关水耗占四分之三。两条途径产生不同的热点区域：直接冷却集中在西部和南中部的缺水盆地，而电力相关水耗集中在少数化石燃料密集的东部电网区域。分离这两条途径有助于确定不同层面的决策重点。
AI.motivation: 数据中心的水资源消耗通常被简化为一个总量指标，但忽略了水耗的两条不同物理路径（现场冷却和电力系统），导致无法精准识别问题区域和制定针对性策略。
AI.method: 将472个美国超大规模数据中心的位置与电力区域、水文流域和水资源压力数据关联，分别计算冷却用水和电力系统用水两条途径的水资源消耗。
AI.result: 总运营水耗约300 GL/年，电力相关水耗占总量的四分之三。冷却水耗集中在西部和南中部的缺水流域，电力相关水耗集中在少数化石燃料密集的东部电网区域，仅3个平衡管理机构就占电力相关水耗的59%。
AI.conclusion: 分离数据中心的直接冷却用水和电力系统用水两条途径，能够识别不同层面的关键决策点：冷却设计和水源选择是地方性问题，而电力规划和采购是区域性问题。

title: QuantFlow: A Federated Mamba-Based Post-Transformer Foundation Model for Time-Series Forecasting
summary: Time-series forecasting supports decisions in finance, en-ergy, transportation, public health, and industrial monitoring. Recent foundation models improve transfer across forecast-ing tasks, but many depend on centralized data and Trans-former attention, which restricts their use for long, high-di-mensional, and privacy-sensitive signals. This paper presents QuantFlow, a probabilistic forecasting framework that com-bines inverted sequence embedding, bidirectional Mamba state-space decoders, quantile regression, and federated learning. Each variable is embedded over the complete ob-servation window, processed in forward and reverse direc-tions, and projected to five conditional quantiles. TSMixup expands temporal diversity through Dirichlet-weighted inter-polation while preserving sequence structure. Experiments cover cryptocurrency, traffic, electricity, Electricity Trans-former Temperature, influenza, and weather data. QuantFlow obtains mean squared errors of 0.2834 on ETTm1 and 0.2218 on Weather, and a 20-client non-IID deployment retains use-ful accuracy after three communication rounds without cen-tralizing raw records. The results indicate that selective state-space modelling is a promising basis for scalable, uncer-tainty-aware, and privacy-conscious time-series prediction, while also revealing limitations on irregular epidemiological signals and long-horizon generalization.

AI.tldr: QuantFlow是一个结合倒置序列嵌入、双向Mamba状态空间解码器、分位数回归和联邦学习的概率预测框架，在多个时序数据集上取得良好效果，同时支持隐私保护和不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 现有时序预测基础模型多依赖中心化数据和Transformer注意力机制，难以处理长序列、高维度和隐私敏感的信号，需要一种可扩展、支持不确定性量化且保护隐私的预测框架。
AI.method: 提出QuantFlow框架，包含：(1)倒置序列嵌入，将每个变量在完整观测窗口上嵌入；(2)双向Mamba状态空间解码器，进行前向和反向处理；(3)分位数回归，预测五个条件分位数；(4)联邦学习，实现隐私保护；(5)TSMixup数据增强，通过Dirichlet加权插值扩展时序多样性。
AI.result: 在ETTm1上MSE为0.2834，Weather上MSE为0.2218；20客户非独立同分布部署中，三个通信轮次后仍保持有效精度，无需集中原始数据。
AI.conclusion: 选择性状态空间建模是构建可扩展、支持不确定性量化和隐私保护的时序预测的有前景的基础，但在不规则流行病信号和长时域泛化方面仍有局限。

title: ASK in the Dark: Uncertainty-Gated LLM Assistance under Partial Observability
comment: Accepted at the IJCAI-ECAI Joint Workshop on Planning for Complex Real-World Applications and Bridging the Gap Between AI Planning and (Reinforcement) Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning agents operating under partial observability must act on incomplete information, making them natural candidates for guidance from small language models (SLMs) that carry broad reasoning priors. Yet integrating SLM guidance into this setting has proven difficult: across all test environments, vanilla uncertainty-gated approaches achieve an overwrite rate at or near zero, meaning the SLM almost never contributes an independent action. We trace this failure to the bare egocentric prompt, which provides insufficient context for genuine reasoning, and identify it as a context problem rather than a capacity problem. We propose ASK+, which supplies the SLM with trajectory-aware context (a partially revealed map, visited positions, and action history) and structured chain-of-thought reasoning, converting it from a passive redundancy check into a more informative consultant that occasionally corrects the policy. We further establish that the predictive entropy signal used for selective querying measures action uncertainty rather than state uncertainty and remains informative in POMDPs, making uncertainty-gated assistance viable beyond fully observable settings. The stateful prompt drives substantial gains: on DoorKey, where vanilla ASK matches PPO (both 89%), ASK+ reaches 93% success; on FourRooms, success climbs from 53% to 70%; on HigherLower, accuracy reaches 73.7%, matching the SLM-only upper bound. Across all environments, Qwen3.5-2B matches or exceeds Qwen3.5-4B, confirming that prompt design and selective gating dominate the impact of model scale, enabling guidance without large models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASK+方法，通过为小语言模型提供轨迹感知上下文（部分地图、访问位置、行动历史）和结构化思维链推理，解决部分可观测环境下强化学习智能体难以有效利用SLM引导的问题。相比基线方法（vanilla ASK），ASK+在DoorKey（89%→93%）、FourRooms（53%→70%）、HigherLower（达73.7%匹配SLM上限）上显著提升，并证明提示设计和选择性门控比模型规模更重要。
AI.motivation: 部分可观测环境下强化学习智能体信息不完整，小语言模型携带广泛推理先验可提供引导，但现有不确定性门控方法覆盖率为零（SLM几乎从不贡献独立动作），原因是简单的自我中心提示（egocentric prompt）缺乏充分上下文，这本质上是上下文问题而非能力问题。
AI.method: 提出ASK+方法：1) 为SLM提供轨迹感知上下文（部分揭示的地图、已访问位置、行动历史）；2) 使用结构化思维链推理；3) 基于预测熵（测量行动不确定性而非状态不确定性）进行选择性查询，将SLM从被动冗余检查转化为信息性的顾问，偶尔纠正策略。
AI.result: DoorKey上ASK+达93%（基线ASK与PPO均为89%）；FourRooms从53%提升至70%；HigherLower达73.7%匹配SLM-only上限。Qwen3.5-2B匹配或超越Qwen3.5-4B，证明提示设计和选择性门控主导效果，模型规模影响较小。
AI.conclusion: 提示设计和选择性门控比模型规模更重要，通过精心设计的上下文和推理链，小模型即可实现有效引导，无需依赖大模型。

title: LuxSQA: Ask Me in Luxembourgish with TTS-Augmented Spoken Question Answering
summary: Spoken Question Answering (SQA) remains largely focused on high-resource languages and carefully recorded speech, limiting the reach of speech-LLM methods in low-resource settings. This paper investigates whether text-to-speech (TTS) can provide task-specific training data for Luxembourgish SQA without requiring a large human-recorded QA corpus. Starting from existing text-based QA resources, we translate questions into Luxembourgish, synthesize spoken questions with multiple TTS systems, and pair them with textual answers. We train a parameter-efficient SLAM-style architecture that connects a frozen Whisper encoder to frozen multilingual LLM backends through a learned projector and LoRA adapters. We compare MMS-TTS, Qwen3-TTS, and OmniVoice variants, including single-source corpora of about 48k questions and a 4TTS multi-source mix of approximately 230k questions. Evaluation on LLAMA-LB-Test with two real Luxembourgish speaker conditions shows that multi-source and voice-design-based synthetic training configurations yield the strongest SQA performance. The results also show that no-reference TTS quality scores do not monotonically predict downstream QA performance, indicating that synthetic speech must be evaluated as task-specific training data rather than only as natural-sounding audio.

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用TTS合成语音数据，为低资源语言卢森堡语构建口语问答系统，实验表明多源合成数据优于单源，且合成语音质量与下游任务表现并非单调相关。
AI.motivation: 现有口语问答研究集中于高资源语言和精心录制的语音，缺乏面向低资源语言的有效方法，因此探索是否可以用TTS生成任务特定训练数据来替代昂贵的人工录制。
AI.method: 从现有文本问答资源出发，将问题翻译成卢森堡语，用多种TTS系统（MMS-TTS、Qwen3-TTS、OmniVoice）合成语音，采用SLAM风格架构（冻结Whisper编码器+冻结多语言LLM后端+可学习投影器和LoRA适配器）进行参数高效训练。
AI.result: 多源混合（约230k问题，4种TTS）和基于语音设计的合成配置在真实卢森堡语说话人条件下SQA性能最佳；无参考TTS质量分数与下游QA性能并非单调相关。
AI.conclusion: TTS合成的语音作为任务特定训练数据是可行且有效的，但合成语音的质量评估不应仅看自然度，还需通过下游任务效果来验证。

title: Denoised Conformal Alignment for Reliable Selection of Conditional Average Treatment Effect Predictions
summary: In selective deployment, practitioners act only on a model-chosen subset of individuals based on predicted conditional average treatment effects, but marginal conformal guarantees need not control reliability on that selected subset. We study reliable selection for black-box CATE predictors: selecting candidates whose CATE errors are below a tolerance while controlling the false discovery rate (FDR). Since CATE errors are unobservable, we construct doubly robust proxy errors from pseudo-outcomes; however, naive proxies can lose power under heteroskedasticity because variance overwhelms the reliability signal. We propose Denoised Conformal Alignment, which subtracts an estimated conditional variance component and combines conformal calibration with Benjamini--Hochberg selection. Our analysis shows that validity is governed by stability of proxy/oracle threshold labels, rather than pointwise perfection of the variance estimator. Experiments show substantially improved power while maintaining FDR control across challenging settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Denoised Conformal Alignment方法，通过去噪代理误差和保形校准，在选择性部署中实现对CATE预测误差的可靠控制，同时维持FDR控制并提升统计功效。
AI.motivation: 在选择性部署中，基于CATE预测的模型子集选择缺乏可靠性保障，传统保形方法无法控制选定子集的误差。现有代理变量在高异方差场景下因方差过大而失效，亟需一种既控制FDR又保持统计功效的方法。
AI.method: 提出Denoised Conformal Alignment，核心思路是构造双重稳健代理误差后减去估计的条件方差成分进行去噪，再结合保形校准与Benjamini-Hochberg选择程序，实现可靠的选择性推断。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种挑战性场景下显著提升了统计功效，同时维持了FDR控制。理论分析证明，有效性主要取决于代理/真实阈值标签的稳定性，而非方差估计的点态精确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了异方差下CATE选择性部署的可靠性问题，放宽了对方差估计的严格要求，为黑盒CATE预测器的可靠选择提供了实用方案。

title: A Limit Order Market with Uncertain Informed Trading Participation
summary: We study a one period limit order market with informed traders, noise traders, and competitive liquidity suppliers, in which the number of informed traders is random. Liquidity suppliers know the distribution of the informed trader count, but not its realization, and therefore face uncertainty about both the presence and the intensity of informed trading. We characterize equilibrium by a fixed point integral equation for the marginal cost function and establish existence of equilibrium for bounded asset values. We then analyse large order asymptotics. For bounded asset values with power law endpoint behaviour, equilibrium price impact follows a power law whose exponent is determined jointly by the asset value tail and the full distribution of the informed trader count. In particular, this exponent is not determined by the expected number of informed traders alone. In the light endpoint regime, price impact is instead logarithmic. Finally, we solve the fixed point numerically across several asset value and informed trader count distributions. The numerical results are consistent with the theoretical asymptotics in the cases covered by the theory and provide comparative statics beyond them.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一期限价订单市场，其中知情交易者数量随机，流动性供给者面临知情交易存在性和强度的双重不确定性。通过固定点积分方程刻画均衡，分析了大规模交易的渐近行为，发现价格冲击遵循幂律或对数律，其指数由资产收益尾部和知情交易者数量分布共同决定，而非仅由期望数量决定。
AI.motivation: 现有市场微观结构模型通常假设知情交易者数量是确定的，但现实中知情交易者的参与数量具有随机性。本文旨在研究当流动性供给者面临知情交易者数量不确定性时，市场均衡如何形成，以及价格冲击如何随交易规模变化。
AI.method: 构建一期限价订单市场模型，包含知情交易者、噪声交易者和竞争性流动性供给者。通过固定点积分方程刻画边际成本函数，证明有界资产价值下均衡的存在性。利用大订单渐近分析，推导价格冲击的幂律和对数律行为，并进行数值求解验证。
AI.result: 对于有界资产价值且具有幂律尾部分布的情况，均衡价格冲击遵循幂律，其指数由资产价值尾部与知情交易者数量分布的完整信息共同决定，而非仅由知情交易者的期望数量决定。在轻尾端点情形下，价格冲击呈对数形式。数值结果与理论渐近结论一致。
AI.conclusion: 知情交易者数量的随机性显著影响市场均衡的价格冲击特征，其幂律指数由资产价值分布尾部与知情交易者数量分布联合决定，不能简化为均值信息。这为理解市场流动性、信息不对称和价格冲击提供了更丰富的理论视角。

title: Data-driven Kernel-based Predictive Control with Stability and Robustness Guarantees
summary: In this paper, we provide a theoretical analysis of the closed-loop properties of a data-driven kernel-based predictive control (DDKPC) scheme developed solely from input-output data. The proposed formulation integrates a robust data-driven predictive control framework with a multi-step predictor for nonlinear systems constructed via kernel-based methods. This predictor implicitly captures the system's nonlinear behavior using the representer theorem. For the nominal case with noise-free data, we prove that the DDKPC scheme guarantees recursive feasibility and closed-loop stability, provided that the prediction horizon is sufficiently long and the kernel representation error is sufficiently small. To facilitate real-time implementation, we introduce a penalty relaxation formulation to alleviate the computational burden inherently caused by nonconvex implicit constraints. Furthermore, the framework is robustified against measurement noise by aggregating the representation mismatch and the bounded noise into a unified uncertainty bound. Finally, we extend the DDKPC framework to slowly time-varying nonlinear systems by periodically reconstructing the kernel predictor from a fixed-budget online dictionary managed by the approximate linear dependency (ALD) criterion. Under suitable conditions on the rate of variation of the input-output evolution and the online prediction error, recursive feasibility and practical closed-loop stability are preserved. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is illustrated through numerical examples.

AI.tldr: 本文对基于数据驱动核方法的预测控制（DDKPC）进行了理论分析，证明了其在无噪声情况下的递归可行性与闭环稳定性，并通过松弛处理和鲁棒化扩展，使其适用于含噪声和缓慢时变非线性系统。
AI.motivation: 传统预测控制依赖精确数学模型，而实际非线性系统建模困难。本文旨在发展一种纯粹基于输入输出数据的非线性系统预测控制方法，并提供严格的理论保证。
AI.method: 1) 利用核方法和表示定理构建非线性系统的隐式多步预测器；2) 在名义无噪声情况下证明递归可行性与闭环稳定性；3) 引入惩罚松弛处理非凸隐式约束，降低计算负担；4) 将表示误差与有界噪声聚合为统一不确定界，实现鲁棒化；5) 通过近似线性依赖(ALD)准则管理在线字典，周期重构核预测器，扩展至慢时变系统。
AI.result: 无噪声情况下，在预测 horizon 足够长且核表示误差足够小时，DDKPC 保证递归可行性和闭环稳定性。在含噪声情况下，通过统一不确定界实现鲁棒性。对慢时变系统，在合适的时变速率和预测误差条件下，仍能保持递归可行性和实际闭环稳定性。数值实验验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为数据驱动核方法预测控制提供了完整的理论分析框架，填补了该方向在递归可行性和稳定性理论上的空白，并为实际应用中的计算效率和鲁棒性提供了可行方案。

title: Online Modeling and Sequential Convex Programming for Lunar Landing Trajectory Optimization
summary: This paper presents a guidance framework for lunar powered descent and landing that combines sequential convex programming (SCP) with real-time online model identification. A nonconvex energy-optimal landing problem is developed and then reformulated into a sequence of convex second-order cone programs (SOCPs) through a change of variables, successive linearization, and a lossless second-order cone relaxation of the thrust direction constraint. An online identification layer, built from a recursive least squares (RLS) filter with exponential forgetting and an exponential moving average (EMA) smoother, estimates unknown gravitational, thrust-scale, and mass-gauging perturbations from noisy navigation measurements and injects a corrected bias term into the dynamics constraint of each convex subproblem at every guidance cycle. Building on this architecture and my prior work in this area, a baseline SCP algorithm and a receding-horizon online SCP algorithm with model identification are developed. Also, I try to explore some theoretical foundations, establishing the losslessness of the convex relaxation, the mean-square stability and convergence of the identification filters, the guaranteed convergence of the SCP iteration, and explicit convergence radius and convergence rate results. Numerical simulations across four perturbation scenarios of increasing complexity are implemented in MATLAB using YALMIP and the ECOS solver. The results show that the proposed online algorithm consistently reduces landing position and velocity error and better tracks the true propellant consumption relative to an uncorrected nominal trajectory, while retaining the predictable convergence and real-time computational properties of convex optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合序列凸规划（SCP）与在线模型辨识的月球动力下降制导框架，通过递归最小二乘滤波和指数移动平均平滑器实时估计未知扰动，并注入修正偏差项，在数值仿真中验证了该方法能有效降低着陆误差并跟踪推进剂消耗。
AI.motivation: 月球动力下降与着陆面临重力扰动、推力尺度误差和质量测量偏差等未知扰动，传统开环标称轨迹难以应对这些不确定性，需要一种能够实时辨识模型偏差并在线优化的制导方法。
AI.method: 1) 建立非凸能量最优着陆问题，通过变量替换、逐次线性化和凸松弛转化为序列SOCP；2) 设计在线辨识层（RLS滤波+EMA平滑器）估计未知扰动；3) 开发基线SCP算法和带模型辨识的滚动时域在线SCP算法；4) 建立凸松弛无损性、滤波器均方稳定性和SCP收敛性的理论保证。
AI.result: 在四种复杂度递增的扰动场景下，MATLAB仿真表明在线算法显著降低着陆位置和速度误差，更好地跟踪真实推进剂消耗，同时保持凸优化的可预测收敛性和实时计算性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效融合了在线模型辨识与序列凸优化，既提升了制导精度和鲁棒性，又保留了凸优化的理论保证和实时性，适用于实际月球着陆任务。

title: The Foreign Policy AI Evaluation Gap
summary: We argue that AI systems used in conducting foreign policy tasks - broadly enacting 'statecraft' - should be a priority test case for technical AI governance research. In enacting foreign policy, we refer to the formulation and implementation of external objectives by political actors. Statecraft is a high-consequence deployment domain, with extreme downside risks and structural properties that standard evaluation practices handle poorly. These features include partial observability, unbounded action spaces, contested ground truth, and multidimensional objectives. This paper advocates for a literature-grounded research agenda. Our contribution is threefold: (i) a claim about the structural conditions of foreign policy that combine catastrophic tail risk with technical evaluation complexities, (ii) an ECOSYSTEM review that highlights the asymmetric focus on ASSESSMENT features over ACCESS, VERIFICATION, SECURITY, and OPERATIONALIZATION, and (iii) a demand-side evaluation framework that decomposes foreign-policy workflows into bounded, evaluable sub-tasks with human recombination. As AI systems are already being deployed in the conduct of war and peace, amid limited public evaluation infrastructure from the technical AI governance community, this agenda is an urgent priority.

AI.tldr: 本文主张将外交政策领域（即"治国术"）作为AI治理技术研究的优先测试案例，指出该领域具有高后果风险、部分可观测性、无界行动空间、争议性事实真相和多维目标等结构性特征，并提出一个三方面的研究议程：结构性条件分析、生态系统综述和需求侧评估框架。
AI.motivation: 外交政策（治国术）是高风险部署领域，存在极端下行风险和标准评估实践难以应对的结构性特征（部分可观测性、无界行动空间、争议性事实真相、多维目标）。AI系统已在实际应用于战争与和平事务，但技术AI治理社区缺乏公共评估基础设施，因此亟需将其作为优先测试案例。
AI.method: 论文采用三方面的方法论贡献：(i) 对外交政策结构性条件进行理论分析；(ii) 对现有AI治理生态系统进行综述，评估ASSESSMENT、ACCESS、VERIFICATION、SECURITY、OPERATIONALIZATION五个维度的关注分布；(iii) 提出需求侧评估框架，将外交政策工作流分解为有界、可评估的子任务，并辅以人类重新组合。
AI.result: 发现现有AI治理生态系统的关注点在ASSESSMENT（评估）特征上存在不对称集中，而对ACCESS（访问）、VERIFICATION（验证）、SECURITY（安全）和OPERATIONALIZATION（可操作化）方面的关注不足。同时提出了一种可将复杂外交政策任务分解为可评估子任务的需求侧框架。
AI.conclusion: 鉴于AI系统已在外交政策（战争与和平）中实际部署，而技术AI治理社区缺乏足够的评估基础设施，该研究议程具有紧迫性和优先性。呼吁技术AI治理研究应更多关注外交政策这一高后果领域。

title: GRAFT: Grafted Reference Audio for Fine-grained Pronunciation in Zero-shot Text-to-Speech
summary: We present GRAFT, a per-word pronunciation conditioning mechanism for text-to-speech neural codec language modeling. Existing systems reach high intelligibility and naturalness but inherit the ambiguity of text and mispronounce rare proper nouns, loanwords and technical terms. Even phoneme-conditioned models offer no direct acoustic handle for per-word pronunciation. GRAFT controls the pronunciation of a chosen word from a short spoken sample of it, encoded with the model's own speech tokenizer and bound to the word's position in the prompt. Voice conversion during training-data construction disentangles the hint speaker from the target speaker, so the hint may come from any voice while the output stays in the target voice. In a blind English listening study, human raters rank GRAFT first by a clear margin, judging its rendering of the difficult word closest to a reference recording of that word. On a five-language objective benchmark, GRAFT reduces target-word phoneme error rate by 22-39% over the identical text-only backbone and outperforms competitive open-source zero-shot systems, both phoneme- and text-conditioned, on target-word pronunciation, while preserving speaker similarity and naturalness.

AI.tldr: GRAFT是一种用于文本到语音神经编解码器语言模型的逐词发音调节机制，通过从短语音样本中提取单词发音并绑定到提示位置，显著改善罕见专有名词、借词和技术术语的发音准确性，在盲听测试和多语言客观评估中均优于现有系统。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到语音系统虽具有高可理解性和自然度，但继承了文本的歧义性，在罕见专有名词、借词和技术术语上容易发音错误。即使有声素条件模型也无法为逐词发音提供直接的声学控制手段。
AI.method: GRAFT通过以下方式实现：从短语音样本中提取目标单词的发音，使用模型自身的语音分词器编码并与提示中该单词位置绑定；在训练数据构建过程中使用语音转换技术，将提示说话人与目标说话人解耦，使得提示音可以来自任意声音而输出仍保持目标说话人音色。
AI.result: 在英语盲听测试中，GRAFT在困难单词的发音上以明显优势被人类评分者评为最接近参考录音。在五种语言的目标基准上，GRAFT将目标单词音素错误率降低了22-39%，同时在说话人相似性和自然度方面保持优势。
AI.conclusion: GRAFT提供了一种有效的逐词发音控制机制，能够在不牺牲说话人相似性和自然度的前提下，显著改善文本到语音系统中困难词汇的发音准确性，超越了现有文本条件和音素条件的零样本系统。

title: Automated Data Readiness for Scientific AI
summary: Leadership computing facilities steward large-scale scientific datasets that routinely require substantial transformation before serving as AI training data. However, no existing framework fully unifies automated transformation, readiness assessment, provenance tracking, and agent-native deployment. We present REDI, an open-source framework that addresses this gap through a unified five-stage pipeline (ingest, preprocess, transform, structure, and output) with per-stage instrumentation for reproducibility and deployment as an agent-callable skill; companion tool SetGo automates FAIR compliance and catalog publication. Evaluated across climate, proteomics, materials science, and nuclear fusion, REDI transforms all datasets from raw to AI-ready, with outputs validated against domain-expert references, and preliminary results show near-ideal parallel scaling to 100 nodes on Frontier for the climate case. Provenance-instrumented profiling reveals file I/O as the dominant pipeline cost, with format selection a first-order optimization lever. These results establish REDI as a cross-domain platform providing automated data readiness for scientific AI, transforming data preparation bottlenecks into reproducible, reusable community assets.

AI.tldr: REDI是一个开源框架，通过统一的五阶段流水线（摄取、预处理、转换、结构化、输出）实现科学数据集到AI训练数据的自动化转化，具备可重复性、FAIR合规性，并在气候、蛋白质组学、材料科学和核聚变领域验证了有效性，在Frontier超级计算机上实现了近理想的并行扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有框架无法完全统一自动化数据转换、就绪度评估、溯源追踪和智能体部署，导致大规模科学数据集在用于AI训练前需要大量人工处理。
AI.method: 提出REDI框架，包含五阶段流水线（摄取、预处理、转换、结构化、输出），每阶段都有可重复性仪器化；配套工具SetGo实现FAIR合规和目录发布；支持作为智能体可调用技能部署。
AI.result: 在气候、蛋白质组学、材料科学和核聚变四个领域成功将原始数据转化为AI就绪数据；在Frontier上气候案例实现近理想并行扩展到100节点；溯源分析揭示文件I/O是主要瓶颈，格式选择是关键优化杠杆。
AI.conclusion: REDI作为跨领域平台，将数据准备瓶颈转化为可重复、可复用的社区资产，为科学AI提供自动化数据就绪能力。

title: A Gabor--Epps uncertainty principle for traders
summary: We propose a Gabor--Epps uncertainty principle for practical trading. The key idea is that high-frequency correlation is not observed in clock time alone, but is resolved through market activity, order-flow overlap, and finite coupling response. This suggests six simple rules of thumb that may be useful to traders and trading programs operating at market-making frequencies, particularly those crossing books and markets below the average human response time. Throughout, the observation window is clock-dependent: in calendar time it is a physical interval, in trade time it is a trade-count interval, and in volume time it is a volume bucket. In summary: at event scales, the more precisely one localises market activity in time, the less well one can resolve stable cross-asset dependence. The more one resolves dependence, the more one has coarse-grained away the event-time structure that generated it. This can generate substantial clock risk.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于实际交易的Gabor-Epps不确定原理，指出高频相关性不能仅通过时钟时间来观测，而需通过市场活动、订单流重叠和有限耦合响应来解析。据此提出了六条对做市商频率交易者有帮助的经验法则。
AI.motivation: 传统的高频相关性分析仅依赖时钟时间，忽略了市场活动本身的时间结构（如交易时间、成交量时间），导致对跨资产依赖关系的误判和时钟风险。
AI.method: 借鉴Gabor-Epps不确定原理，将观测窗口分为日历时间（物理区间）、交易时间（交易计数区间）和成交量时间（成交量桶），分析在不同时间尺度下定位市场活动与解析跨资产依赖之间的权衡关系。
AI.result: 发现一个核心权衡：在事件尺度上，越精确地定位市场活动的时间位置，就越难稳定地解析跨资产依赖关系；反之，越精确地解析依赖关系，就越粗粒化地丢失了生成该依赖的事件时间结构，从而产生显著的时钟风险。
AI.conclusion: 提出了六条实用的经验法则，帮助做市商频率的交易者和交易程序在跨订单簿和跨市场操作中管理这种不确定性。

title: Gemma 4 Technical Report
summary: We introduce Gemma 4, a new generation of open-weight, natively multimodal language models in the Gemma model family. Designed to advance compute efficiency and reasoning, the Gemma 4 model suite features dense and Mixture-of-Experts architectures, ranging from 2.3B to 31B parameters. Alongside improved vision and audio encoders for all model sizes, we propose a unified, encoder-free architecture for our 12B model, which ingests raw audio and image patches. Furthermore, we integrate a thinking mode, enabling Gemma models to generate reasoning traces prior to responding. We improve inference speed, memory, and compute efficiency, as well as long-context abilities through critical design choices. Gemma 4 establishes a leap in performance across STEM, multimodal, and long-context benchmarks, and rivals larger, frontier open models in human-rated tasks.

AI.tldr: Gemma 4是新一代开放权重、原生多模态语言模型系列，涵盖密集和MoE架构（2.3B-31B参数），引入无编码器架构、思考模式及推理痕迹生成，在STEM、多模态和长上下文基准上性能显著提升，可媲美更大规模的前沿开放模型。
AI.motivation: 提升计算效率和推理能力，推动开放权重多模态语言模型的发展，使较小规模模型也能在复杂任务上媲美更大模型。
AI.method: 1) 采用密集和MoE（混合专家）架构（2.3B-31B参数）；2) 改进视觉和音频编码器，并为12B模型提出统一的无编码器架构，直接处理原始音频和图像块；3) 集成思考模式（thinking mode），在响应前生成推理痕迹；4) 优化推理速度、内存、计算效率及长上下文能力的关键设计。
AI.result: 在STEM、多模态和长上下文基准测试中性能实现跳跃式提升，在人类评估任务中可媲美更大规模的前沿开放模型。
AI.conclusion: Gemma 4通过架构创新（无编码器、思考模式）和效率优化，证明了较小规模的开放模型也能在多模态和复杂推理任务中达到领先水平。

title: A Hierarchy of Policy Learning Problems
summary: Policy learning has received substantial attention with the goal of learning policies from observational data for decision-making. A majority of work in this space has focused on developing algorithms for computing policies that minimize regret compared to the optimal policy. However, in many practical settings, there is insufficient data to obtain low regret. As a result, recent work has shifted attention to alternative objectives, most notably, studying whether it is possible to learn an improving policy that statistically significantly outperforms baseline policies. We argue that there is substantial merit in studying a broader range of policy learning problems. When there is insufficient data to learn an improving policy, there may still be useful questions that can be answered. To this end, we provide a mathematical framework for studying the relationships between policy learning problems. We formalize three problems within our framework: beyond the optimal policy problem and the improving policy problem, we also propose the policy existence problem, which aims to determine if an improving policy exists. Within our framework, we show that the policy existence problem reduces to the improving policy problem, which in turn reduces to the optimal policy problem; these reductions prove that each problem is at least as easy as the next one (in sample complexity). A key question remains: is this hardness strict? We provide partial answers. First, the gap between the optimal policy and improving policy problems is strict. For the improving policy and policy existence problems, we prove that a sublinear polynomial gap exists under natural conditions on improving policy learning algorithms. Thus, we may be able to answer questions about the existence of an improving policy even when we cannot find one. These results highlight the value in studying a broader range of policy learning problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于研究策略学习问题关系的数学框架，形式化了三个问题：最优策略问题、改进策略问题和策略存在性问题。通过归约证明，策略存在性 ≤ 改进策略 ≤ 最优策略（在样本复杂度意义上），并证明了最优策略与改进策略之间的差距是严格的，而改进策略与策略存在性之间存在次多项式差距，意味着即便无法找到改进策略，也可能判断其是否存在。
AI.motivation: 当数据不足以学习低遗憾策略时，传统最优策略学习目标难以实现。近期工作转向研究能否学习到显著优于基线的改进策略。作者认为应研究更广泛的策略学习问题，即在无法学习改进策略时，仍可能回答其他有用的问题。
AI.method: 建立一个统一的数学框架，形式化三个策略学习问题（最优策略、改进策略、策略存在性），并研究它们之间的归约关系与样本复杂度差异。通过理论分析证明问题之间的难度层级。
AI.result: 证明策略存在性问题可归约到改进策略问题，改进策略问题可归约到最优策略问题，即每个问题至少比下一个更容易（样本复杂度更低）。最优策略与改进策略之间的差距是严格的；改进策略与策略存在性之间存在次多项式差距。
AI.conclusion: 研究更广泛的策略学习问题具有重要价值——即便无法找到改进策略，仍可能回答是否存在改进策略的问题，这为数据有限场景下的决策分析提供了新的可能性。

title: Exact Closed-Form Feedforward Inversion for Dual-Bridge Series Resonant DC/DC Converter via State-Plane Analysis
summary: This paper derives exact closed-form feedforward inversion maps for the dual-bridge series resonant converter (DB SRC) using state-plane trajectory analysis. The converter employs four modulation variables: primary duty cycle $d$, secondary shorting time $s$, phase shift $β$, and switching frequency $ω$. While the established first harmonic approximation (FHA) provides frequency-independent inversion, the exact state-plane approach yields frequency-dependent inversion model that is proven algebraically identical to FHA at resonance frequency. For practical above-resonance operation, the exact inversions eliminate the 5--72\% commutation angle errors inherent in the FHA-based feedforward. The resulting controller architecture mirrors the parallel nonlinear compensation structure of the FHA-based design, with feedforward maps now operating on resonant-time quantities that naturally couple commutation and frequency control. All results are expressed in closed form suitable for real-time implementation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过状态平面轨迹分析，推导了双桥串联谐振变换器（DB SRC）的精确闭环前馈逆映射，解决了FHA在高于谐振频率运行时5-72%的换向角度误差，所有结果以闭式表达适用于实时实现。
AI.motivation: 现有FHA方法在高于谐振频率运行时存在较大的换向角度误差（5-72%），需要更精确的馈入控制模型来提高DB SRC的控制精度。
AI.method: 采用状态平面轨迹分析法，推导了考虑四个调制变量（占空比d、短路时间s、移相角β、开关频率ω）的精确闭环前馈逆映射，并与FHA方法在谐振频率处进行代数等价性证明。
AI.result: 精确状态平面方法得到的逆映射模型在谐振频率处与FHA代数等价，在高于谐振频率运行时消除了FHA固有的5-72%换向角度误差，且保持了与FHA相似的并联非线性补偿控制架构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持与FHA相似控制器架构的前提下，显著提高了高于谐振频率运行的DB SRC前馈控制精度，所有公式均为闭式，适合实时数字控制实现。

title: Remote Work: Driver or Deterrent of Digital Product Innovation
summary: As firms adopt divergent policies regarding work-from-home (WFH), the implications of remote work for collaborative and interdependent outcomes such as digital product innovation remain uncertain. This study examines how remote work adoption affects continuous digital product innovation using a panel dataset of mobile applications. We identify firm-level remote work adoption from job postings data and estimate its effects on app innovation using a staggered difference-in-differences design. We find that remote work significantly increases both major releases and new feature introductions per app, indicating enhanced digital product innovation performance. To assess whether these gains come at the expense of originality, we distinguish between novel and imitative feature introductions and show that remote work does not reduce the originality of digital product innovation. Moreover, improvements in digital product innovation translate into greater market success, as reflected in increased app downloads. The positive effects of remote work are stronger for app development teams with prior modular collaboration experience through open-source participation, suggesting that teams with greater experience coordinating modular work can better leverage remote work arrangements. We also find that remote work enables teams to expand their workforce and increase their collective skill capacity, both of which are associated with improved digital product innovation outcomes. In contrast, reductions in commuting time and app maturity do not explain the observed digital product innovation gains. Overall, our findings suggest that remote work can enhance continuous digital product innovation at the team level without compromising innovation novelty.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用移动应用面板数据，通过交错双重差分法发现，远程工作显著提升了数字产品创新绩效（增加主要版本发布和新功能引入），且不会降低创新原创性，并最终转化为更高的市场成功（应用下载量增加）。这种积极效应在具有模块化协作经验的团队中更强，且通过扩大团队规模和提升集体技能能力实现。
AI.motivation: 企业采用不同的远程工作政策，但远程工作对协作性和相互依赖的数字产品创新（如APP持续创新）的影响尚不确定，需要实证研究。
AI.method: 使用移动应用面板数据，从招聘数据识别企业级远程工作采用情况，采用交错双重差分法（staggered DiD）估计其对APP创新的因果效应。
AI.result: 远程工作显著增加了每个APP的主要版本发布和新功能引入数量，且不会降低创新原创性（未减少新颖功能比例）；创新提升转化为更高的应用下载量；效果在具有开源模块化协作经验的团队中更强；远程工作通过扩大团队规模和增加集体技能能力促进创新，而通勤时间减少和APP成熟度不能解释该效应。
AI.conclusion: 远程工作可以在团队层面增强持续的数字产品创新，且不会牺牲创新新颖性。

title: Singularities in Multi-Objective Optimization and their Crossing during Continuation
summary: Continuation methods help trace Pareto sets in multi-objective optimization but are inherently local: a single run traces a single connected branch, requiring multiple restarts to recover disconnected components of Pareto fronts. We show that, for unconstrained bi-objective problems under weighted-sum scalarization, these disconnects can be artifacts of singularities in the scalarization parameter, where the weight $λ$ diverges as the objective gradients become collinear. Recasting Pareto optimality as a nonlinear system, we apply pseudo-arclength continuation to follow the Pareto-critical set, and show that suitable singular reparameterizations allow crossing these singularities in systematically, recovering disconnected branches in a single run. A coordinate-wise projective compactification further provides a unified framework for parameter and decision-space variables. We demonstrate the approach on the ZDT3 benchmark and modifications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的连续方法，通过奇异重参数化和投影紧化，使得在单次运行中能够穿越加权和标量化中的奇异点，从而恢复双目标无约束优化问题中Pareto前沿的断连分支。
AI.motivation: 传统连续方法在追踪多目标优化的Pareto集时本质上是局部的——单次运行只能追踪一个连续分支，需要多次重启才能恢复Pareto前沿的断连分量，效率低下且不完整。
AI.method: 将Pareto最优性重新表述为非线性系统，应用伪弧长连续法追踪Pareto临界集；通过奇异重参数化允许系统性地穿越标量化参数中的奇异点（目标梯度共线导致权重λ发散处）；引入坐标式投影紧化统一处理参数空间和决策空间变量。
AI.result: 在ZDT3基准测试及其变体上验证了该方法，成功在单次运行中恢复了断连的Pareto前沿分支。
AI.conclusion: 证明了无约束双目标问题中Pareto前沿的断连可以是标量化参数奇异点的伪影，所提出的方法能在单次运行中系统地穿越这些奇点，恢复断连分支，无需多次重启。

title: A Scalable Approach to Evaluating Moral Sensitivity in LLMs
summary: Moral sensitivity is the ability to identify the morally relevant features of a decision situation and use them as the basis for action. It is the foundation of broader moral competence: any other moral reasoning capabilities will be irrelevant if an agent lacks sensitivity to the relevant facts. In this paper, we offer a new evaluation of LLM moral sensitivity and in doing so, we address and resolve a central problem in AI alignment research: how to scale behavioural evaluations beyond expensive and sometimes metaethically dubious comparisons with a human baseline, without adopting an LLM judge that must be assumed to have the very capability that you are attempting to evaluate. Our central question is this: can LLMs successfully identify the morally relevant features of noisy cases, in which various kinds of morally irrelevant information have been introduced to distract the respondent? To explore this, we introduce \textbf{MORPH-1K (MOral Robustness under Perturbed Hypotheticals)}, a procedurally-generated 1,000-case benchmark spanning 50 moral foundation-pole combinations across four social domains. MORPH-1K is paired with a suite of textual noise elements, along with a method for validating that the distractors do not change the morally salient content of the case. We apply MORPH-1K to eight contemporary LLMs, and show that while morally irrelevant perturbations often changed the number of features listed, the semantic content of those features remained stable across all noise conditions, with similarity scores above our calibrated floor threshold. More broadly, our invariance framework extends to evaluative domains where ground truth is difficult to specify but relevant and irrelevant features can be separated by design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MORPH-1K基准测试，通过引入道德无关的干扰信息来评估LLM的道德敏感性，发现虽然干扰会改变LLM列出的特征数量，但语义内容保持稳定。
AI.motivation: 解决AI对齐研究中行为评估的可扩展性问题：既不能依赖昂贵且有争议的人类基线比较，也不能采用本身就需评估该能力的LLM作为评判者。
AI.method: 构建MORPH-1K基准：包含50个道德基础-极性组合、1000个案例，覆盖4个社会领域。引入文本噪声干扰，并验证干扰不改变道德核心内容。对8个当代LLM进行测试。
AI.result: 道德无关的干扰虽改变了LLM列出的特征数量，但语义内容在所有噪声条件下保持稳定，相似度分数高于校准阈值。
AI.conclusion: LLM在识别道德相关特征方面具有稳健性；该不变性框架可推广到其他难以指定标准答案但可分离相关/无关特征的评估领域。

title: Federated Learning for Object Detection: Enabling Collaborative Drone Learning Without Centralizing Data
summary:
Object detection is a fundamental capability for AI-driven perception in safety-critical drone and edge-vision systems, including disaster response, operational security environments, infrastructure monitoring and defense applications. Robust model performance in such environments depends on large, continuously updated datasets. However, training high-performing detectors typically requires centralizing aerial imagery, which raises privacy, regulatory, storage, and bandwidth challenges. This is especially problematic in distributed drone deployments, where visual data is generated onboard and is often impractical or undesirable to transfer to a centralized infrastructure.
  In this work, we apply Federated Learning (FL) for object detection, enabling drones to improve a shared model while keeping image data local and private. We implement a federated object detection pipeline using the Sherpa.ai FL platform on the KIIT-MiTA dataset, and compare it with Single-drone and Centralized baselines using mean Average Precision (mAP) at IoU thresholds of 0.50 and 0.50-0.95. In our experiments, the proposed FL approach remains close to Centralized training while dramatically improving over Single-drone training, with the best lightweight model (YOLO26 nano), suitable for deployment even on very limited edge infrastructure, achieving relative gains of 52.89% and 67.80% in mAP@0.50 and mAP@0.50:0.95, respectively. These results show that FL enables scalable, high-performing, and privacy-preserving object detection across distributed drone fleets without data centralization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用联邦学习（FL）进行无人机目标检测，使无人机在无需集中图像数据的情况下协作训练共享模型，在KIIT-MiTA数据集上验证了其效果接近集中式训练，显著优于单机训练，轻量模型YOLOv5nano在mAP@0.50和mAP@0.50:0.95上分别提升52.89%和67.80%。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机目标检测需要集中存储大量航拍图像，带来隐私、法规、存储和带宽等多重挑战，尤其在分布式无人机部署场景中，将机载数据传输到集中式基础设施往往不现实或不可取。
AI.method: 基于Sherpa.ai联邦学习平台，在KIIT-MiTA数据集上实现联邦目标检测流程，采用YOLOv5nano等轻量模型，并与单机训练和集中式训练基线进行对比，使用平均精度均值（mAP）在IoU阈值0.50和0.50:0.95上评估。
AI.result: 联邦学习方法的性能接近集中式训练，显著优于单机训练；最佳轻量模型YOLOv5nano在mAP@0.50上相对提升52.89%，在mAP@0.50:0.95上相对提升67.80%。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习能够在无需数据集中化的情况下，实现分布式无人机集群的可扩展、高性能且隐私保护的目标检测。

title: SwarmResearch: Orchestrating Coding Agents for Open-Ended Discovery
summary: Long-running coding agents such as autoresearch can persistently discover optimizations for open-ended problems. However, they tend to converge onto a single high-level approach, then proceed with low-level edits while missing other superior approaches to the problem. We hypothesize two harness-level design choices contribute to this behavior: accumulating context in a single long-running agent and only exposing a single program state to edit. We introduce SwarmResearch, an orchestrator-subagent harness in which a Shepherd Agent uses global context to steer a population of Search Agents, each operating with local context in their respective git branch. On open-ended optimization tasks, SwarmResearch discovers better or comparable solutions to state-of-the-art LLM-guided evolution and multi-agent techniques on 13/15 tasks, driven by higher-level exploration. Compared with fixed scaling of serial and parallel agents, SwarmResearch's orchestrator-guided scaling discovers better-performing solutions by adapting parallelism at different search depths.

AI.tldr: SwarmResearch提出了一种编排器-子代理架构，通过使用全局上下文的Shepherd Agent引导多个拥有本地上下文的搜索代理在各自git分支上并行探索，解决了长期运行编码代理容易收敛到单一方法而错过更优方案的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有长期运行的编码代理会收敛到单一高级方法，仅进行低层级编辑而错过其他更优方案，作者假设两个设计选择导致该问题：单一长期运行代理中不断积累上下文，以及只暴露单一程序状态供编辑。
AI.method: 提出SwarmResearch架构，包含一个Shepherd Agent（使用全局上下文引导搜索方向）和多个Search Agent（各自拥有git分支和本地上下文），通过编排器引导的并行搜索在不同深度上自适应调整并行度。
AI.result: 在13/15个开放优化任务上，SwarmResearch发现了比现有最先进的LLM引导进化和多代理技术更好或相当的解，且通过更高级的探索驱动。与固定规模串行/并行代理相比，编排器引导的扩展能通过在不同搜索深度自适应并行度发现更优解。
AI.conclusion: SwarmResearch通过编排器-子代理架构有效解决了长期编码代理的探索-利用权衡问题，利用全局与局部上下文的协同显著提升了开放优化任务的搜索效果。

title: Seduced by the Narrative: Assessing Rule Adherence in Semi-Open Textual Sandboxes
summary: As LLMs are increasingly deployed as autonomous adjudicators in semi-open textual game environments, robust rule adherence becomes critical when user intent conflicts with system rules. However, these models are trained to be helpful and compliant, leaving them vulnerable to a class of attacks we term \textit{Rhetorical Injection}, where adversarial users exploit narrative framing techniques such as pseudo-logical reasoning and authoritative coercion to bypass adjudication logic. We present CoC-Seduce, a multi-agent adversarial benchmark built on Tabletop Role-Playing Game (TRPG) mechanics, an ideal instantiation of semi-open environments where rules are explicit for adjudication, yet interaction remains entirely in natural language. Three frontier models, i.e., GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.5 Flash, serve as adversarial generators producing 5,376 samples across 4 world settings and 16 skill categories. We then benchmark 20 target adjudicators against this corpus. Evaluation across 20 models reveals that neither model scale nor explicit reasoning mechanisms reliably confer adjudication robustness, with \textsc{Pseudo-Logic} emerging as the dominant attack vector and cross-cultural settings exposing systematic knowledge gaps across all evaluated families. Project page: https://github.com/answerrtx/CoC-Seduce

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoC-Seduce基准，用于评估LLM在文本游戏环境中面对修辞注入攻击的裁决鲁棒性。研究发现模型规模和推理机制无法保证裁决可靠性，伪逻辑是最有效的攻击方式，跨文化场景暴露系统性知识缺陷。
AI.motivation: LLM被部署为半开放文本游戏环境中的裁决者，但模型训练目标是"有用且顺从"，当用户意图与系统规则冲突时容易受到攻击。现有研究缺乏对这类场景中裁决鲁棒性的系统性评估。
AI.method: 基于TRPG机制构建CoC-Seduce多智能体对抗基准，使用GPT-5.4、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.5 Flash生成5376个对抗样本，涵盖4个世界设定和16个技能类别，对20个目标裁决模型进行基准测试。
AI.result: 20个模型的评估显示：模型规模和显式推理机制均不能可靠地保证裁决鲁棒性；"伪逻辑"是最主要的攻击向量；跨文化场景在所有模型家族中均暴露系统性知识鸿沟。
AI.conclusion: 现有的LLM裁决者在面对修辞注入攻击时存在显著脆弱性，特别是伪逻辑推理和跨文化知识缺口带来的挑战，需要进一步研究提升其规则遵守的鲁棒性。

title: Missing Data Imputation under Manifold Hypothesis
summary: The manifold hypothesis posits that high-dimensional data are concentrated near a low-dimensional embedded manifold. Recent advances in mixture variational autoencoders (VAEs) provide a powerful tool for extracting such underlying structure in a faithful manner. The resulting geometric structure naturally introduces local and global relationships among variables, thereby providing a systematic way of imputing missing data. We propose a model-based imputation method that enables sampling from \( p(\bm{x}_{\mathrm{mis}} \mid \bm{x}_{\mathrm{obs}}) \) via a sampling-importance-resampling (SIR) procedure, which can be further augmented with a joint diffusion model in the latent space. Our method imputes missing data while respecting the underlying geometry, achieves competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art procedures, quantifies uncertainty in the imputations, and is model-based, thereby enabling on-the-fly imputation without rerunning the entire procedure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合变分自编码器（VAE）和几何结构的模型驱动缺失数据插补方法，利用采样重要性重采样（SIR）和潜在空间联合扩散模型，在尊重数据底层流形几何的前提下实现高效、不确定性可量化的插补。
AI.motivation: 高维数据通常集中在低维嵌入流形附近，但现有插补方法往往忽略这一几何结构，导致插补结果不忠实于数据的内在分布。作者希望利用混合VAE提取的几何信息，系统性地处理缺失数据插补问题。
AI.method: 基于混合VAE建模数据流形结构，引入局部与全局变量关系；采用采样重要性重采样（SIR）从条件分布 p(x_mis | x_obs) 中采样；可进一步在潜在空间结合联合扩散模型增强插补质量。
AI.result: 与最先进方法相比，该方法在插补性能上具有竞争力，同时能够量化插补的不确定性，并且由于是模型驱动，可在不重新运行整个流程的情况下实现即时插补。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效利用数据流形几何进行缺失值插补，兼具性能、不确定量化与计算效率优势，是一种有前景的模型驱动插补框架。

title: Physics-Informed Neural State-Space Modeling of Battery-Electric Vehicle Dynamics for Closed-Loop Automated Parking Simulation
comment: 11 pages, 10 figures. Under review at IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Vehicles. Code and trained models: https://github.com/pansong/PyNSSM-Parking ; interactive simulator: https://github.com/pansong/auto-parking-sim
summary: This paper contributes to vehicle dynamics modeling by introducing a physics-informed neural state-space model tailored for the parking regime of a production battery-electric sedan, identified entirely from field-test maneuvers. At parking speeds the model captures what the kinematic idealization omits, including actuator lag, drivetrain creep, brake-hold transitions through standstill, and frequent reversals of the motion direction. A gear-conditioned velocity constraint is imposed during training, and the yaw rate is read out as a learned residual on a kinematic-bicycle prior, so that the network devotes its capacity to the deviation from physics rather than to its reproduction. These training-time physics make the customary inference-time state limiter redundant. The commanded-to-actual behavior of the drive, brake, and steering actuators is reproduced by dedicated submodels, for which signal fidelity proves an unreliable proxy for closed-loop value; tuning the brake on its velocity consequence rather than on its own signal reverses the verdict reached at the signal level. The model generalizes to held-out maneuvers in fully open-loop simulation, and, despite being identified from only 16 field tests, the assembled command-to-vehicle chain earns Good ratings on the vehicle states under the ISO/TS 18571 objective rating metric. Embedded as the real-time plant of an interactive simulator, it enables a production-representative planning stack to park the vehicle through the learned dynamics. This makes the model suitable for pre-calibrating an automated-parking planning and control stack in the virtual development phase without the manufacturer's proprietary chassis and actuator parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理信息驱动的神经状态空间模型，用于停车场工况下的车辆动力学建模。该模型从实车场地测试数据中学习，能捕捉低速场景下的传动延迟、蠕行、制动保持与频繁换向等动力学行为。通过齿轮条件速度约束和基于运动学自行车模型的横摆角速度残差学习，模型在训练中融入物理先验，无需推理时状态限制器。执行器行为由专用子模型再现，并发现信号保真度不能可靠预测闭环价值。仅用16次场地测试数据，模型在ISO/TS 18571指标上获得Good评级，可嵌入实时仿真器用于自动泊车规划与控制栈预标定。
AI.motivation: 现有运动学模型忽略了低速停车场景下的执行器延迟、蠕行、制动保持和频繁换向等非理想动力学行为，而传统方法需要制造商专有的底盘与执行器参数。本文旨在构建一个完全从场地测试数据中识别、无需专有参数且能准确建模这些行为的模型。
AI.method: 采用物理信息驱动的神经状态空间模型。通过齿轮条件速度约束在训练中融入物理先验；横摆角速度作为运动学自行车先验的残差学习；执行器行为由专用子模型再现，且基于速度效果而非信号保真度调优制动模型。
AI.result: 仅用16次场地测试数据，模型在开放循环仿真中泛化到未见过的机动；在ISO/TS 18571客观评级指标上，车辆状态获得Good评级；作为实时仿真器嵌入式模型，可使规划栈通过已学动力学完成自动泊车。
AI.conclusion: 该模型适用于在虚拟开发阶段预标定自动泊车规划与控制栈，无需制造商专有的底盘与执行器参数，且能可靠预测车辆在低速停车场景下的动力学行为。

title: Properties of the Conditional Likelihood Ratio Test under Discrete Approximation
summary: The conditional likelihood ratio (CLR) test is a valuable tool for inference under weak identification, with appealing theoretical properties in both linear and non-linear settings. Its implementation nevertheless requires minimizing a non-convex objective function, a difficulty long recognized even in the linear IV setting. While grid-based methods that provide a practical approximation may perform well in particular designs, such procedures do not guarantee that the resulting test preserves the theoretical properties of the CLR test uniformly across a class of data-generating processes. This paper examines the implementation challenges and their consequences for test size and power. In the linear IV settings, we contrast the grid-based method with the polynomial approach of Moreira, Newey, and Sharifvaghefi(2024), which guarantees global minimization and aligns computation with the theoretical properties of the CLR test.

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了条件似然比（CLR）检验在弱识别情况下的实施挑战，特别是在线性工具变量（IV）模型中。比较了基于网格的方法与Moreira等人（2024）提出的多项式方法，后者能保证全局最小化，从而保持CLR检验的理论性质。
AI.motivation: CLR检验在弱识别下具有优越的理论性质，但其实施需要最小化非凸目标函数，这一困难长期存在。网格方法虽然实用但不能保证统一保持理论性质，因此需要更可靠的实施方法。
AI.method: 本文在线性IV设定下，对比了两种实施CLR检验的方法：传统的网格方法和Moreira, Newey, and Sharifvaghefi (2024)提出的多项式方法。后者能够保证全局最小化。
AI.result: 网格方法虽然在某些设计中表现良好，但不能保证CLR检验的理论性质在数据生成过程类别中一致保持。多项式方法则通过全局最小化实现了与理论性质一致的计算。
AI.conclusion: 实施方法的选择对CLR检验的尺寸和功效有重要影响。多项式方法相比网格方法能更好地保持CLR检验的理论性质。

title: A Proximal Point Semismooth Newton Algorithm for Structural Composite Cardinality Optimization
summary: Many image-processing problems can be formulated as composite cardinality optimization (CCOP), whose objective is the sum of two convex terms and a cardinality function composed with a linear operator. The composite cardinality term creates major algorithmic challenges: the separability of the cardinality function is lost and convergence analysis often requires surjectivity-type assumptions on the linear operators. To overcome these challenges, we consider the stationary dual formulation of CCOP, which has more favorable structure consisting of two convex terms and a separable cardinality function. In this paper, we develop an efficient proximal point algorithm (PPA) to solve the stationary dual problem. The efficiency of our PPA stems from two aspects. Firstly, the key step of its subproblem solver minimizes a smooth convex function over a low-dimensional subspace by the classic semismooth Newton algorithm (SNA), which has global convergence and local superlinear rate under suitable conditions. Secondly, implementable inexact criteria are proposed for early termination of the SNA subroutine. These components form the basic framework of our inexact PPA. Under suitable conditions, it enjoys global convergence and local linear convergence rate. In particular, we provide examples in which the convergence assumptions are automatically satisfied. Finally, the SNA subroutine is incorporated into our inexact PPA to solve jump-sparse signal recovery and computed tomography (CT) image restoration. Numerical results demonstrate the time efficiency and solution accuracy of our proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本文针对复合基数优化问题，提出了一种基于不动点对偶形式的高效非精确邻近点算法，利用半光滑牛顿法作为子问题求解器，在低维子空间上实现快速收敛，并在跳稀疏信号恢复和CT图像重建中验证了其时间效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 复合基数优化问题中，基数项与线性算子的组合导致算法设计困难：基数函数的可分离性丧失，且收敛分析常需线性算子的满射性假设。为克服这些挑战，作者转而考虑结构更友好的不动点对偶形式。
AI.method: 提出非精确邻近点算法（PPA）求解不动点对偶问题；子问题求解器采用半光滑牛顿算法在低维子空间上最小化光滑凸函数，并设计可实现的非精确准则提前终止SNA子程序。
AI.result: 在跳稀疏信号恢复和CT图像重建中，所提方法在时间效率和求解精度上均优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 该非精确PPA在适当条件下具有全局收敛性和局部线性收敛速度，且文中给出了收敛假设自动满足的具体实例。

title: Analyzing the Difficulty of Programming Assignments with Interpretable Knowledge Component Metrics
summary: This research paper examines how Knowledge Components (KCs) - fine-grained concepts or skills required to solve programming tasks - can be used as interpretable signals for understanding assignment difficulty and student struggle in introductory programming courses. While prior work has focused on predictive models based on programming behavior, such models are often difficult to interpret and therefore hard to use for instructional decisions. We analyze KC-based metrics, including the number of KCs per assignment and changes in KC coverage between consecutive assignments. We examine correlations between the number of KCs and student performance on the assignment, and analyze changes in KCs across assignments to identify cases where performance declines without new concepts being introduced. Selected assignments are then qualitatively inspected to understand potential design issues. Our results on data from three introductory programming course datasets show that assignments involving more KCs are generally associated with lower performance, and that sudden shifts in required KCs can coincide with disruptions in learning progression. We also identify assignments where performance declines even though no new KCs are introduced, suggesting potential issues in task design or instruction, which could be examined with qualitative analysis. We propose an interpretable framework for analyzing programming assignments using KC-based metrics, with practical implications for instructors and course designers who want to better understand where and why students struggle, and how course materials might be improved. Our method can use KCs defined by an expert or extracted by an LLM, offering instructors an additional way to assess assignment quality beyond average correctness. It can be applied to any course with ordered assignments and measurable performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于知识组件（KCs）的可解释框架，通过分析每个作业涉及的KCs数量及作业间KC变化，来理解编程入门课程中作业难度与学生困难。实验表明，KCs越多学生表现越差，KC突变可能打断学习进程，且部分表现下降的作业并未引入新KC，提示作业设计存在潜在问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于编程行为的预测模型虽然有效，但往往难以解释，不利于教师做出教学决策。本文希望利用细粒度的知识组件（KCs）作为可解释信号，帮助教师理解学生在哪里、为什么遇到困难，以及如何改进课程材料。
AI.method: 在三个入门编程课程数据集上，分析基于KC的指标：每个作业的KC数量、连续作业间KC覆盖的变化。计算KC数量与学生表现的相关性，并识别表现下降但未引入新KC的作业，对这些选定的作业进行定性检查。
AI.result: 1）涉及更多KCs的作业通常与学生较低的表现相关；2）KC的突然变化可能与学习进程的中断相吻合；3）存在表现下降但未引入新KCs的作业，提示任务设计或教学存在问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种基于KC指标的可解释框架，可用于分析编程作业质量。该方法可使用专家定义的KCs或LLM提取的KCs，适用于任何具有有序作业和可衡量表现的课程，为教师提供了一种超越平均正确率的作业评估方式。

title: Post-Generation Curation of Synthetic Images via Homogeneous-Heterogeneous Splitting
summary: Recent generative models can produce high-quality synthetic images, offering scalable training training data for data-hungry models. Existing approaches to exploiting this potential typically involve 1) training or fine-tuning generators, or 2) using lightweight post-hoc adaptation like prompt engineering or inference-time guidance, making them generator-specific and expertise-intensive. We study a complementary question: given a fixed pool of generated images, can downstream utility be improved purely by selecting an informative subset? The answer is yes. We show that effective selection must counter a structural bias of modern generators: they tend to over-produce canonical modes of each class while underrepresenting intra-class variation. Building on this insight, we split each real class into a canonical Homogeneous (HO) subset and a non-redundant Heterogeneous (HE) subset, then score synthetic images by a fidelity-diversity criterion that rewards semantic alignment while penalizing canonical redundancy. The method is generator-agnostic and requires no retraining. Across multiple benchmarks, it consistently outperforms state-of-the-art data selection baselines and matches the real-data performance with up to 40% fewer synthetic samples. The same criterion remains effective when applied on top of stronger task-tuned generators, with gains on both classification and segmentation tasks. Post-generation selection is therefore not a substitute for better generators, but a complementary mechanism for improving the utility of synthetic data.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从固定生成图像池中通过子集选择提升下游任务效用，提出一种基于保真度-多样性准则的选择方法，无需重新训练生成器，可减少40%的合成样本并匹配真实数据性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖训练/微调生成器或轻量级后处理，具有生成器特异性且需专业知识。作者探索一个新问题：在固定生成图像池中，能否仅通过选择信息性子集来提升下游效用。
AI.method: 将每个真实类别分为规范同质子集和非冗余异质子集；基于保真度-多样性准则对合成图像评分：奖励语义对齐同时惩罚规范冗余。该方法与生成器无关，无需重新训练。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中持续优于现有数据选择方法；使用最多减少40%的合成样本即可匹配真实数据性能；在更强的任务调优生成器上仍有效，在分类和分割任务上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 后生成选择不是更好生成器的替代品，而是提升合成数据效用的互补机制。

title: Object-Centric Environment Modeling for Agentic Tasks
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents can improve through accumulated experience, but free-form textual memories become difficult to maintain, validate, and reuse as interactions grow. Recent symbolic approaches learn executable skills or programmatic world models, yet often store local procedures or assume simplified dynamics. We propose Object-Centric Environment Modeling (OCM), which organizes experience into an executable object-centric environment model. OCM maintains two connected code bases: object knowledge, which defines environment entities and mechanisms as Python classes, and procedure knowledge, which records reusable interaction patterns that must import and use the object model. OCM works in an online setting: after each episode, OCM reflects on the trajectory, updates both knowledge bases, and verifies that all procedures execute against the updated object model. During future interaction, the agent uses progressive knowledge disclosure to inspect compact code signatures first and read source code only when needed. Experiments show that OCM achieves the best average rank across benchmarks and reduces invalid actions, demonstrating that agents can benefit from building object-centric environment models.

AI.tldr: 提出OCM框架，将智能体经验组织为基于对象的可执行环境模型（包含对象知识和过程知识两个代码库），通过在线学习更新并在未来交互中渐进式知识披露，实验表明该方法效果最优。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体通过文本记忆积累经验难以维护和复用，符号化方法虽可学习技能但存储局部过程或假设简化动态，缺乏系统性的可执行环境建模。
AI.method: OCM维护两个代码库：对象知识（Python类定义环境实体与机制）和过程知识（可复用的交互模式）。在线学习中每轮结束后更新知识库并验证过程对对象模型的兼容性，未来交互时通过渐进式知识披露先检查代码签名再读源码。
AI.result: 在多个基准上取得最佳平均排名，有效减少了无效动作。
AI.conclusion: 智能体通过构建基于对象的环境模型能够获得性能提升，验证了可执行环境建模的有效性。

title: Jointly Improving Dialect Identification and ASR in Indian Languages using Multimodal Feature Fusion
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) and Dialect Identification (DID) are crucial for Indian languages, many of which are low-resource and exhibit significant dialectal differences. Existing methods often optimize ASR or DID individually, resulting in performance trade-offs. In this work, we propose a multimodal framework that jointly improves ASR and DID. Our method employs a Bottleneck Encoder to extract dialectal features from Conformer-based speech representations and a RoBERTa encoder to process ASR-generated CTC embeddings. A gating mechanism merges these features, followed by an attention encoder to refine the representations. The learned embeddings are concatenated with Conformer outputs to enhance ASR features. Evaluated on eight Indian languages with thirty-three dialects, our method achieves an average DID accuracy of 81.63% and average CER and WER of 4.65% and 17.73%, respectively. These results highlight the effectiveness of our method for joint ASR-DID modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多模态框架，通过瓶颈编码器提取方言特征、RoBERTa处理CTC嵌入、门控机制融合以及注意力编码优化，在8种印度语言33种方言上实现联合ASR和方言识别（DID准确率81.63%，CER 4.65%，WER 17.73%）。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常单独优化ASR或DID，导致性能折衷，而印度语言多为低资源语言且方言差异显著，需要一种能同时提升两者性能的联合建模方法。
AI.method: 采用多模态框架：1) 瓶颈编码器从Conformer语音表示中提取方言特征；2) RoBERTa编码器处理ASR生成的CTC嵌入；3) 门控机制融合两种特征；4) 注意力编码器进一步优化表示；5) 将学习到的嵌入与Conformer输出拼接以增强ASR特征。
AI.result: 在8种印度语言33种方言上，DID准确率81.63%，CER 4.65%，WER 17.73%，证明了联合ASR-DID建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多模态联合框架有效解决了ASR和DID之间的性能折衷问题，在低资源印度语言上取得了优异结果，为多任务语音处理提供了有效方案。

title: Sequential Correlations Change In-Context Learning: Effective Context Length and Architectural Mismatch
summary: Modern sequence models have a striking capacity for in-context learning (ICL); they can perform new tasks based only on examples given in the prompt. Understanding how this ability emerges requires theory that captures important properties of natural data. Linear regression has served as a useful sandbox for ICL theory, but existing work has largely focused on prompts with independent examples. In this work, we extend this setting to sequentially correlated data, a basic feature of real sequences. We present a solvable model based on linear attention and test our predictions on realistic transformer architectures. We identify two distinct effects: First, when the query token is independent of the context, within-context correlations induce an effective context length: correlated prompts behave like shorter i.i.d. prompts. Second, when the query is also correlated with its context, test error is reduced, particularly for softmax attention when compared to linear attention. These results suggest that correlated prompts alter not only the effective sample size of in-context learning, but also which attention architectures are best matched to the task.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了序列相关数据对上下文学习的影响，发现相关性会改变有效上下文长度，且当查询与上下文相关时，softmax注意力比线性注意力表现更好。
AI.motivation: 现有ICL理论大多假设prompt中的示例是独立的，但真实数据具有序列相关性。作者希望建立一个能捕捉这一基本特性的理论模型，以更真实地理解ICL能力的涌现机制。
AI.method: 基于线性注意力构建可解模型，并通过真实的Transformer架构进行验证。分别研究了查询独立于上下文和查询与上下文相关两种情形下的相关性效应。
AI.result: 发现两个不同的效应：1) 当查询独立于上下文时，上下文内的相关性会使有效上下文长度变短，相关prompt表现类似更短的i.i.d. prompt；2) 当查询与上下文相关时，测试误差降低，且softmax注意力相比线性注意力有更大优势。
AI.conclusion: 相关prompt不仅改变了上下文学习的有效样本量，还影响了不同注意力架构对任务的适配性，为理解真实序列数据下的ICL提供了理论基础。

title: Integrating Power Electronics-based Energy Storages to Power Systems: A Review on Dynamic Modeling, Analysis, and Future Challenges
comment: Accepted for publication in Renewable and Sustainable Energy Reviews
summary: The integration of power electronics-based energy storage systems (PEESs) into power systems introduces potential instabilities. This study reviews efforts in dynamic analysis of both AC and DC power systems integrated with PEESs, covering dynamic modeling, analysis methods, and potential instability risks. Major conclusions are drawn as: 1) Simplified models of PEESs have been widely used for dynamic analysis of power systems. However, it may cause "error aggregation" as the scale of PEESs increases, leading to mistakes in results, which induces significant concerns. 2) Traditional stability mechanism analysis methods remain effective for single grid-connected PEES and large-scale PEESs with parallel and series connections. However, they are inadequate for PEESs with distributed connections. To fill in this gap, an idea of mechanism analysis based on "dynamic reconstruction" is proposed. 3) Potential instability risks caused by PEESs integration may differ from those caused by renewable energy integration due to differences in functional controls and bidirectional power flow. However, comprehensive investigations in this regard are lacking and require significant attention. To ensure the stable operation of power systems with increasing integration of PEESs, significant challenges are summarized in the end, providing inspirations for future studies.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于电力电子的储能系统（PEESs）接入交直流电力系统的动态分析研究，指出简化模型在大规模接入时存在“误差累积”风险，传统稳定性分析方法对分布式连接场景失效并提出了“动态重构”分析思路，同时强调了PEESs与可再生能源在功能控制和双向功率流方面的差异可能导致不同的失稳风险，最后总结了未来研究面临的挑战。
AI.motivation: 电力电子储能系统（PEESs）在电力系统中大规模集成可能引入不稳定问题，但现有研究在动态建模、分析方法和失稳风险方面尚不系统，尤其缺乏对分布式连接场景下稳定性分析方法的探讨，以及PEESs与传统可再生能源在失稳机理上的差异认识。
AI.method: 采用综述研究的方法，系统梳理了PEESs接入交直流电力系统的动态建模、稳定性分析方法和潜在失稳风险，并通过归纳总结得出三条主要结论，最后指出未来研究的关键挑战。
AI.result: 1) 简化模型在大规模PEESs中会“误差累积”；2) 传统方法适用于单机与串并联大规模PEESs，但不适用于分布式连接，为此提出“动态重构”分析思路；3) PEESs的失稳风险可能不同于可再生能源，但相关研究不足。
AI.conclusion: 为保障高比例PEESs接入下电力系统的稳定运行，需关注建模精度、分布式场景下的新分析方法以及PEESs特有的失稳机理，这对未来研究具有重要启示。

title: IMF Programs and Growth: A Source-Informed Robustness Reanalysis
summary: This article reassesses the meta-analytic evidence on the effect of International Monetary Fund programs on economic growth. The point of departure is the influential meta-analysis by Balima and Sokolova, which assembles 994 estimates from 36 studies and reports a positive average effect with substantial heterogeneity. The reanalysis presented here imposes four stricter requirements. It treats the study, rather than the reported estimate, as the primary inferential unit; it uses a source-informed classification of causal credibility; it models within-study dependence through study aggregation, correlated-effects sensitivity, multilevel CR2 inference, and robust variance estimation; and it evaluates publication-bias sensitivity through Egger, PET, PEESE, WAAP-like top-precision analysis, p-curve diagnostics, trim-and-fill, and exploratory selection models. The central result is not that IMF programs reduce growth everywhere, nor that the true effect is exactly zero. The result is narrower and stronger: the positive average effect in the aggregate literature is not robust once dependence, publication selection, heterogeneity, and credibility of identification are treated as first-order concerns. In the most defensible specifications, the average effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero, while equivalence to a substantively negligible effect is only partially supported and depends on the chosen equivalence bound.

AI.tldr: 本文重新评估了IMF项目对经济增长影响的元分析证据，发现当考虑研究依赖性、发表偏倚、异质性和因果识别可信度后，原有报告的积极平均效应不再稳健，在最严格的规范下效应与零无统计差异。
AI.motivation: 对Balima和Sokolova有影响力的元分析进行再评估，该分析报告IMF项目对经济增长有积极平均效应但存在显著异质性，作者质疑这一结论的稳健性。
AI.method: 提出四项更严格的要求：以研究而非估计值为分析单位；基于来源信息对因果可信度进行分类；通过多种方法建模研究内依赖性；运用多种发表偏倚敏感性分析方法。
AI.result: 综合文献中的积极平均效应在处理依赖性、发表偏倚、异质性和识别可信度后不稳健；最可辩护的规范下平均效应与零无统计差异；对实质可忽略效应的等价性仅部分支持且依赖于所选等价界值。
AI.conclusion: 结论更窄且更强：并非IMF项目到处降低增长或真实效应恰好为零，而是在将关键问题作为首要关切后，原有积极效应不再成立。

title: Entropy Regularization Improves Policy Robustness in Continuous-Time Reinforcement Learning
summary: Entropy regularization is widely used in continuous-time reinforcement learning (RL) to reduce sensitivity to environmental perturbations, yet its robustness benefits lack a rigorous theoretical foundation. This paper establishes the first robustness guarantees for entropy-regularized continuous-time Markov decision processes. We show that maximizing an entropy-regularized objective yields a lower bound on a worst-case robust RL problem with joint reward and transition perturbations. We analytically characterize the induced robust sets and prove that they expand monotonically with the regularization strength, justifying the empirical observation that stronger entropy improves robustness. In contrast to prior discrete-time analyses, our results remove the intractable state-distribution entropy term and provide guarantees invariant to action frequency. Experiments on queueing network control and market making confirm our theory, showing that entropy-regularized policies outperform greedy and $ε$-greedy baselines under dynamics perturbations.

AI.tldr: 本文首次为连续时间强化学习中的熵正则化方法建立了鲁棒性理论保证，证明熵正则化目标函数等价于联合奖励和转移扰动的鲁棒优化下界，且鲁棒集随正则化强度单调扩张，实验验证了理论结果。
AI.motivation: 虽然熵正则化在连续时间强化学习中被广泛用于降低对环境扰动的敏感性，但其鲁棒性优势缺乏严格的理论基础。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明熵正则化目标函数最大化能给出联合奖励和转移扰动下的最坏情况鲁棒RL问题的下界；解析地表征诱导出的鲁棒集，并证明其随正则化强度单调扩张；与离散时间分析不同，去除了难以处理的状态分布熵项，并提供不受动作频率影响的保证。
AI.result: 在队列网络控制和做市实验中，熵正则化策略在动力学扰动下优于贪婪策略和ε-贪婪基线。
AI.conclusion: 熵正则化在连续时间RL中具有明确的鲁棒性理论保证，正则化强度越大，鲁棒性越强，且相比离散时间分析具有更好的可处理性和不变性。

title: AI Systems as Digital Public Goods -- Evidence and Recommendations from a Multi-Stakeholder Assessment
summary:
AI systems are increasingly being positioned as potential Digital Public Goods (DPGs) to accelerate progress towards the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). Yet, despite major global commitments, most notably the Global Digital Compact's call to "develop, disseminate and maintain safe and secure open-source software, open data, open artificial intelligence models and open standards that benefit society as a whole", very few AI systems currently meet the DPG Standard in practice. This report explains why, and what must change for "AI as Digital Public Goods" (AIDPGs) to become a credible, implementable pathway rather than an aspirational label.
  Commissioned by the Asian Development Bank (ADB) and produced by United Nations University (UNU) in partnership with UN Office of Digital and Emergent Technologies (UN ODET), this assessment combines: (i) a structured desk review of policy, legal, and technical frameworks on DPGs, openness, and AI governance; (ii) key informant interviews with cross sector experts spanning the UN system, governments, civil society, academia, and the private sector; and (iii) a global survey to test whether interview themes hold across a broader sample and to surface where perspectives diverge by region, sector, and AI readiness.

AI.tldr: 该报告分析了当前很少有AI系统能真正满足数字公共产品（DPG）标准的原因，并探讨如何将“AI作为数字公共产品”（AIDPGs）从理想标签转变为可行路径。
AI.motivation: 尽管全球有重大承诺（如《全球数字契约》要求开发开放源代码软件、开放数据、开放AI模型等），但实际上很少有AI系统能符合DPG标准。因此需要找出原因并提出改进方向。
AI.method: 受亚洲开发银行委托，由联合国大学与联合国数字与新兴技术办公室合作完成。方法包括：(i) 对DPG、开放性和AI治理的政策、法律和技术框架进行结构化案头审查；(ii) 对联合国系统、政府、公民社会、学术和私营部门的跨领域专家进行关键知情人访谈；(iii) 进行全球调查以验证访谈主题的广泛性和区域差异。
AI.result: 报告指出当前很少有AI系统能满足DPG标准，揭示了这一现状的根本原因，并提出了使AIDPGs成为可行路径所需的变化。
AI.conclusion: 需要改变当前现状，才能使“AI作为数字公共产品”从理想化的标签转变为可信、可落实的发展路径。

title: A Granularity-Aware EEG Feature Framework for Psychopathology Dimension Prediction
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) offers a noninvasive approach for examining neurophysiological correlates of dimensional psychopathology, yet systematic evidence across EEG paradigms and feature granularities remains limited. Here, we develop a granularity-aware EEG feature pipeline that organizes multi-scale descriptors into global, regional, and channel levels. Using the Healthy Brain Network (HBN) cohort, we evaluate the prediction of four psychopathology dimensions: p-factor, internalizing, externalizing, and attention problems, across four EEG paradigms. Given the heterogeneity of pediatric psychopathology and the moderate reliability of questionnaire-derived scores, this setting represents a challenging feasibility test rather than a clinical screening scenario. Tree-based models and granularity-balanced feature selection showed promising improvements over conventional approaches in selected conditions, although effect sizes remained modest. Visualization of selected markers revealed dimension-specific spatial and spectral patterns that were broadly aligned with existing neurophysiological knowledge. An exploratory cross-dataset sanity check on the independent PEARL cohort suggested that the proposed selection principle remains technically feasible under protocol shifts, without claiming cross-dataset generalizability. Overall, multi-scale EEG features contain weak but detectable signals related to dimensional psychopathology, and granularity-aware selection may serve as a useful feature-reduction strategy for future EEG-based phenotyping studies.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种粒度感知的EEG特征提取流程，从全局、区域和通道三个层面组织多尺度特征，在HBN队列上预测儿童精神病理维度（p因子、内化、外化、注意问题）。树模型和粒度平衡的特征选择在特定条件下相较于传统方法有所改进，但效应量有限。跨数据集验证表明该方法在协议变化下仍具技术可行性。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏系统性证据来评估不同EEG范式和特征粒度对维度精神病理学预测的影响，需要构建统一的、粒度感知的特征提取框架来探索EEG信号中与精神病理学相关的微弱信号。
AI.method: 构建了粒度感知的EEG特征流程，将多尺度描述符组织为全局、区域和通道三级；使用HBN队列，结合四种EEG范式预测四个精神病理维度；采用树模型和粒度平衡的特征选择策略。
AI.result: 树模型和粒度平衡特征选择在特定条件下优于传统方法，但效应量较小；所选标记显示出与现有神经生理学知识一致的维度特异性空间和频谱模式；在独立PEARL队列中验证了方法的跨数据集技术可行性。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度EEG特征中包含与维度精神病理学相关的微弱但可检测的信号，粒度感知的特征选择可作为未来基于EEG的表型研究的有效特征降维策略。

title: MedCalc-Pro: Solving Complex Medical Calculations with LLM Agents
summary: Current benchmarks for evaluating large language models (LLMs) in medical calculation are largely based on simplified settings, where each patient case corresponds to a single calculator and the required tool is explicitly specified in the query. However, real clinical scenarios often require multiple calculators for joint evaluation, nested-scale calculation, and fuzzy queries that do not directly specify the target calculator. To this end, we propose a new medical calculation benchmark, MedCalc-Pro, which covers three progressively challenging task settings: single-calculator, multi-calculator, and nested-calculator calculation settings. MedCalc-Pro contains 2,268 real-world clinical cases, covering 77 medical calculators across 14 clinical departments. Meanwhile, to address the limited performance of existing frameworks and methods in complex clinical scenarios, we further propose a more generalizable agent framework that supports multi-tool selection and nested-tool calling, while suppressing parameter error propagation through structured validation and evidence review. We conduct systematic comparisons across open-source, closed-source, and medical-specialized LLMs, and the results show that our framework achieves the best performance across all three task settings. This work provides a new benchmark and method for evaluating and applying LLMs in challenging medical calculation scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MedCalc-Pro基准，涵盖三种逐步复杂的医疗计算任务（单计算器、多计算器、嵌套计算器），包含2268个真实临床病例和77个计算器，并设计了一个支持多工具选择与嵌套调用的通用智能体框架，在多项LLM对比中取得最优表现。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗计算基准过于简化（单计算器、明确指定工具），无法反映真实临床场景中多计算器联合评估、嵌套计算及模糊查询的复杂需求。
AI.method: 构建MedCalc-Pro基准（2268例病例，77个计算器，14个科室，三种难度设置）；提出通用智能体框架，支持多工具选择与嵌套调用，通过结构化验证和证据审查抑制参数误差传播。
AI.result: 在开源、闭源及医学专业LLM的系统性对比中，提出的框架在所有三种任务设置下均取得最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为LLM在复杂医疗计算场景中的评估与应用提供了新的基准和方法。

title: PraMem: Practice-derived Experiential Memory for Long-horizon Behavior Prediction
summary: Long-horizon behavior prediction aims to infer a user's next action based on a lengthy historical sequence, playing a crucial role in artificial intelligence field. The rise of large language models (LLMs) offers a promising direction for sequential behavior prediction, yet LLMs struggle with latent behavioral pattern induction and model-intrinsic cognitive biases when tackling long-horizon behavior prediction. Prior memory management methods follow a context-compression paradigm that attempts to address this task by alleviating the historical sequence burden, yet fail to resolve the core challenges. In this paper, we advocate a paradigm shift that reframes the lengthy historical sequence from a burden into a valuable resource to be exploited, and accordingly propose PraMem, which conducts beforehand practice over the lengthy historical sequence to build an experiential memory, thereby serving as the assisted input for accurate long-horizon behavior prediction. Extensive experiments across diverse tasks demonstrate that PraMem achieves superior performance than prior methods, and more in-depth analyses provide valuable insights into the mechanism and evolution of the experiential memory. Code: https://github.com/icip-cas/PraMem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PraMem方法，将长历史序列从负担转变为有价值的资源，通过预先实践构建经验记忆，用于辅助大语言模型进行长时域行为预测，实验表明该方法优于现有技术。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在长时域行为预测中面临两个核心挑战：难以归纳潜在的行为模式以及模型固有的认知偏差。之前的记忆管理方法采用上下文压缩范式，仅试图减轻历史序列的负担，但未能解决上述根本问题。
AI.method: 提出PraMem方法，倡导一种范式转变，将长历史序列从负担重新定义为可开发的宝贵资源。该方法通过对长历史序列进行预先实践（beforehand practice），构建经验记忆（experiential memory），作为辅助输入来提升长时域行为预测的准确性。
AI.result: 在多种不同任务上的大量实验表明，PraMem在性能上优于现有方法。进一步的分析揭示了经验记忆的工作机制和演化过程。
AI.conclusion: 将长历史序列视为宝贵资源而非负担，通过构建经验记忆来辅助预测，是一种有效的范式转换，为长时域行为预测提供了新的解决思路。

title: Robust Bayes-Assisted Conformal Prediction
comment: Accepted to AISTATS 2026. 44 pages, 8 figures, 7 tables
summary: Bayes-assisted conformal prediction combines the strengths of Bayesian modelling with exact, distribution-free frequentist coverage guarantees. Although conformal validity is preserved even when the Bayesian working model (BWM) is misspecified, the size of the resulting prediction sets can degrade substantially when the prior is poorly aligned with the observed data. We address this limitation by introducing RoBAS (Robust Bayes-Assisted Shrinkage): a Bayes-assisted framework for constructing robust nonconformity scores, with two instantiations: one induced by a heavy-tailed BWM, and a closed-form empirical Bayes shrinkage score.
