The resulting scores adapt to the quality of the working information encoded in the prior: when this information is reliable, they exploit it to produce efficient prediction sets; when it is weak or inaccurate, they revert to the Distance-To-Average (DTA) score, a robust non-informative baseline. We evaluate the proposed scores on tabular and image regression tasks where the training distribution may differ from the calibration and test distributions, while the calibration and test data themselves remain exchangeable. We find that they are competitive with widely used scores in the absence of such shift, while substantially reducing interval widths in shifted settings.

AI.tldr: 提出RoBAS框架，通过贝叶斯辅助的稳健非一致性分数构建预测集，在保证无分布假设覆盖保证的同时，解决先验信息错配时预测集效率退化的问题。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯辅助共形预测在模型设定错误时仍能保证覆盖有效性，但先验与数据不一致时预测集大小会严重退化，现有方法缺乏对这种情形的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出RoBAS框架，包含两种稳健非一致性分数：基于重尾BWM的分数和闭式经验贝叶斯收缩分数。当先验信息可靠时利用先验提高效率，不可靠时退化为DTA基线。
AI.result: 在表格和图像回归任务上，RoBAS在无分布偏移时与常用方法竞争力相当，在存在偏移时显著减少预测区间宽度。
AI.conclusion: RoBAS通过自适应收缩机制有效平衡了贝叶斯先验信息的利用与鲁棒性，在数据分布偏移场景下显著优于现有方法。

title: Damping Analysis of Subsynchronous Oscillations at the Sending-End of Practical Grid-Forming MTDC Power System for Isolated Renewable Energy
summary: Subsynchronous oscillations (SSOs) have occurred at the sending-end of Zhangbei grid-forming MTDC power system (SE-GFPS). This paper gives an alert for the wide application of grid-forming (GFM) control by presenting a detailed report on such SSOs and the practical GFM configuration. Different from traditional studies that consider only parts of GFM control loops for simplification, power synchronous control (PSC), d- and q-axis AC voltage control (AVC), and inner current control (ICC) loops are comprehensively involved in this study. A self- and coupling-damping method is proposed to quantify the impact of both the inherent dynamics of different GFM control loops and the external dynamic coupling between the GFM control and the remaining SE-GFPS on the SSOs. It determines whether the major causes of SSOs are attributed to inherent GFM dynamics or external dynamic couplings. Based on the damping sensitivity analysis, the major impact factors of the SSOs are identified. Self-damping can be improved more by q-axis than by d-axis AVC parameters, and negative coupling damping can be reduced by PSC parameters. Finally, SSO mitigation strategies are proposed, and an SE-GFPS mirroring the real-world Zhangbei project is established on the electromagnetic transient (EMT) platform in Simulink, validating the accuracy of our conclusions.

AI.tldr: 本文针对张北构网型多端直流输电系统送端出现的次同步振荡问题，提出了一种自阻尼与耦合阻尼量化方法，全面考虑了功率同步控制、交直流电压控制和内环电流控制等回路，分析了振荡成因并提出了抑制策略，通过电磁暂态仿真验证了结论的有效性。
AI.motivation: 实际张北工程中出现了次同步振荡问题，现有研究为简化而忽略部分控制回路，无法全面揭示振荡机理，亟需对构网型控制各环节进行系统性分析以指导工程应用。
AI.method: 提出自阻尼与耦合阻尼量化方法，将构网型控制回路（PSC、d/q轴AVC、ICC）的固有动态与外部动态耦合效应解耦分析，结合阻尼灵敏度识别关键影响因素。
AI.result: q轴AVC参数比d轴AVC参数更能改善自阻尼，PSC参数可减少负耦合阻尼；基于分析提出了次同步振荡抑制策略，并在Simulink电磁暂态平台上验证了结论的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为大规模构网型控制应用提供了重要工程警示，所提方法能够有效定位振荡根源并指导参数优化与抑制策略设计。

title: Causal Overlap Effects: A Cumulative Fixed Effect Approach
summary: Social scientists often ask about the effect of increasing one's duration of exposure to a social context on one's outcomes, i.e. the overlap effect. Past studies adopted a unidimensional treatment effect framework to estimate the effect of overlap, imposing important restrictions. In this paper, we propose a new causal framework of multidimensional treatments where the overlap effects include both the duration and the content of overlap, under which, for instance, the grandparent overlap effect is defined as the union of all causal effects of a grandparent's observed and unobserved characteristics (i.e., the content) on the grandchild across their shared life course (i.e., the duration). The multidimensional framework allows for a more flexible and context rich approach to effect heterogeneity, where unobserved contextual characteristics play two roles as unobserved confounders and as integral components of overlap effects -- overlap effects in this framework are not easily estimated with conventional fixed effects estimation. Hence, we develop a new cumulative fixed effects (CFE) approach that can estimate a range of interesting heterogeneous causal overlap effects from three-wave individual panel data. We show that the CFE approach is unbiased even in highly non-linear simulations, and we discuss assumptions and extensions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多维治疗效应的因果框架来估计"重叠效应"（如祖孙共处时间的影响），将重叠效应分解为持续时间与内容两个维度，并开发了累积固定效应（CFE）方法，该方法能在高度非线性模拟中无偏估计异质性重叠效应。
AI.motivation: 以往研究采用单维治疗效应框架来估计重叠效应（如增加社会情境暴露时长对结果的影响），但这种方法施加了重要限制。社会科学家需要更灵活、更丰富的框架来捕捉重叠效应的异质性，特别是未观测到的情境特征既作为混杂因素又作为重叠效应组成部分的双重角色。
AI.method: 提出多维治疗效应的因果框架，将重叠效应分解为持续时间与内容两个维度。在此基础上开发了累积固定效应（Cumulative Fixed Effects, CFE）方法，该方法利用三轮个体面板数据，可以估计一系列有趣的异质性因果重叠效应。
AI.result: 通过高度非线性模拟验证，CFE方法能够无偏估计因果重叠效应。同时讨论了方法的假设条件和扩展方向。
AI.conclusion: 多维治疗效应框架比传统单维框架更能灵活地处理重叠效应的异质性；CFE方法为从面板数据中估计异质性重叠效应提供了新的因果推断工具。

title: Inverse Optimal Control for Linear Quadratic Problem with Poisson Jumps: Model-Free Inverse Reinforcement Learning Approaches
summary: This paper addresses the inverse optimal control (IOC) problem for stochastic linear systems subject to both Brownian motion and Poisson jumps, using an inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) framework. Given a target feedback gain from an expert, the objective is to identify an equivalent cost functional-specifically, the set of all cost weights-that yields this same gain. To solve this problem when system dynamics are unknown, we propose two model-free, off-policy IRL algorithms that operate entirely from data, circumventing the need to solve the generalized algebraic Riccati equation or compute the cost weights analytically. The first is an inverse Q-learning algorithm that constructs data-driven equations from expert demonstrations to compute the Q-function matrix, with equivalent cost weights updated algebraically and without requiring additional trajectory data. The second is a model-free off-policy inverse policy iteration algorithm that leverages data collected under an initial stabilizing policy, offering a complementary approach suited to different data availability scenarios. Crucially, by decoupling the data-collection behavior policies from the policies being iteratively updated, both algorithms can learn equivalent cost weights from sufficiently excited trajectories without identifying the system dynamics or jump intensity. Numerical simulations validate the effectiveness of the proposed methods.

AI.tldr: 本文针对带有布朗运动和泊松跳的随机线性系统，提出了两种基于逆强化学习的无模型离策略逆最优控制算法（逆Q学习和逆策略迭代），通过专家演示数据直接学习等效代价权重，无需已知系统动力学或求解代数Riccati方程。
AI.motivation: 在随机线性系统中，给定专家控制策略，如何在不了解系统动力学的情况下逆向推导出使得该策略最优的代价函数权重集合。
AI.method: 提出两种无模型离策略逆强化学习算法：1）逆Q学习算法，从专家演示构建数据驱动方程求解Q函数矩阵，代数更新代价权重；2）离策略逆策略迭代算法，利用初始稳定策略下的收集数据，无需额外轨迹数据。两种算法将数据采集行为策略与迭代更新策略解耦。
AI.result: 数值仿真验证了两种算法能够从充分激励的轨迹中学习等效代价权重，无需识别系统动力学或跳跃强度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的逆最优控制方法有效解决了随机线性系统在未知动力学下的代价函数辨识问题，为实际应用提供了数据驱动的解决方案。

title: Macro-Prudential AI Governance: A Two-Layer Early Warning and Response System for Frontier AI
comment: 14 pages, 1 figure, 1 table. Accepted at the Second Workshop on Technical AI Governance Research (TAIGR 2026) at ICML 2026
summary: Frontier-AI governance today faces a problem structurally analogous to the one banking regulation faced pre-2008, and which post-2008 reforms (Basel III, Dodd-Frank) have since addressed. Two gaps recur: discovering a risk is not tantamount to acting on it, and individual-model review is unlike managing correlated build-up across the sector. Drawing on the Basel III framework and the U.S. financial-stability architecture, I propose a macro-prudential early warning and response system ("MEWRS") for internal frontier AI. These are systems deployed for labs' own internal research, testing, and production workflows, as distinct from externally released products. Layer A adapts the finder-coordinator-defender early-warning model to route structured reports on dual-use capabilities, autonomy indicators, and security compromises through a government clearinghouse to domain-specific defender working groups. Layer B calibrates operational controls via three quantitative buffer metrics, namely Effective Compute-at-Risk (ECAR), Cumulative Red-Team Hours (CRTH), and an Alignment Robustness Score (ARS), so that faster capability scaling automatically triggers stronger safeguards, analogously to how risk-weighted assets drive capital ratios under Basel III. I outline the reporting schema, map six Basel III mechanisms onto AI-governance analogues, identify seven failure modes with concrete mitigations, and sketch an exercise-based validation plan. MEWRS is designed to detect correlated risk build-ups across the frontier-AI sector and create pre-committed off-ramps before a cascade unfolds.

AI.tldr: 本文借鉴巴塞尔III框架和金融稳定架构，提出面向内部前沿AI的宏观审慎早期预警与响应系统（MEWRS），包含早期预警（A层）和量化缓冲指标（B层），以防范系统性风险累积。
AI.motivation: 前沿AI治理面临两个结构性问题：发现风险不等于采取行动（知行分离），以及单个模型审查无法应对跨机构的风险累积，这与2008年前银行业监管困境类似。
AI.method: MEWRS包含两层：A层采用"发现者-协调者-防御者"早期预警模型，通过政府清算所将双用途能力、自主性指标等结构化报告路由至领域特定的防御工作组；B层通过三种量化缓冲指标（有效计算风险ECAR、累计红队工时CRTH、对齐稳健性评分ARS）校准操作控制，类似风险加权资产驱动资本比率。
AI.result: 论文提出了报告模式、六种巴塞尔III机制与AI治理的映射、七种失效模式及缓解措施，以及基于演练的验证计划。
AI.conclusion: MEWRS旨在检测前沿AI领域的关联风险累积，并在连锁效应发生前建立预设退出机制。

title: LiNO: Lifting based multiresolution neural operator
summary: Recently, neural operators have shown promising outcomes for learning solution operators of differential equations directly from data. This framework learns a functional mapping from the parameter field to the solution field, enabling the prediction of an entire class of solutions rather than a specific instance. However, existing operators often struggle to capture both global dynamics and fine-scale structure simultaneously. To design an effective operator capable of representing multiscale features, a hierarchical multiscale decomposition framework is required. In this study, we develop the Lifting Neural Operator (LiNO), a multiresolution operator built on the second-generation wavelet lifting scheme. LiNO learns a multiresolution decomposition directly from data by parameterizing the lifting transform. This lifting transformation is adaptive to the underlying solution function and exactly invertible by construction, enabling information-preserving multiscale operator learning. In the lifted multiresolution space, the operator evolves coarse and directional detail coefficients separately, resulting in scale-aware modeling of the underlying physics. We evaluate LiNO on several benchmarks, including Darcy flow, the Poisson equation, the Allen-Cahn equation, the compressible Navier-Stokes equation, and the Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion system. Together, these benchmarks cover a wide range of physical behaviors, including multiscale phenomena, transport-dominated dynamics, and chaotic systems. LiNO demonstrates strong performance on these challenging benchmarks compared with state-of-the-art neural operators. These results suggest that adaptive multiresolution operators provide a promising direction for scientific machine learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于二代小波提升方案的升维神经算子（LiNO），通过自适应可逆的升维变换实现多分辨率分解，在多种偏微分方程基准上展现了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有神经算子在同时捕捉全局动力学和精细尺度结构方面存在困难，缺乏能够表征多尺度特征的有效算子框架。
AI.method: 基于第二代小波提升方案构建多分辨率算子LiNO，通过参数化升维变换从数据中直接学习自适应且可逆的多分辨率分解，在升维空间中分别演化粗尺度系数和方向细节系数。
AI.result: 在达西流、泊松方程、Allen-Cahn方程、可压缩Navier-Stokes方程和Gray-Scott反应扩散系统等多个基准上均展现出优于现有最先进神经算子的性能。
AI.conclusion: 自适应多分辨率算子为科学机器学习提供了一个有前景的发展方向。

title: Oyster-II: Reinforcement Learning for Constructive Safety Alignment in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across diverse applications, yet ensuring their simultaneous safety, helpfulness, and trustworthiness remains a persistent challenge. Conventional refusal-oriented alignment strategies mitigate harmful content generation but systematically fail to serve legitimate user needs, often withholding information that could safely and constructively address the underlying intent of sensitive queries. Building upon the constructive safety paradigm pioneered by Oyster-I, which moves beyond blanket refusal toward thoughtful, response-oriented safety alignment, we identify two critical limitations of its Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT)-based scheme: insufficient safety generalization to out-of-distribution scenarios and a phenomenon we term safety chain-of-thought (CoT) over-generalization, wherein safety-oriented reasoning patterns are excessively applied to benign queries, degrading helpfulness and user experience. To address these limitations, we propose Oyster-II, a reinforcement learning (RL)-based constructive safety alignment framework that adopts a Zero-RL paradigm combined with a multi-stage reinforcement learning strategy.Evaluated across extensive benchmarks, Oyster-II comprehensively surpasses both Qwen3-14B and its predecessor Oyster-I on safety dimensions, achieving cross-scale performance comparable to Qwen3-Max and Qwen3.5-397B.

AI.tldr: Oyster-II 提出基于强化学习的建设性安全对齐框架，通过零 RL 范式与多阶段策略，在保持安全性的同时提升有用性，性能超越 Qwen3-14B 和 Oyster-I，接近 Qwen3-Max 级别。
AI.motivation: 传统拒绝式对齐策略虽能阻止有害内容生成，但系统性地无法满足用户合理需求，对敏感查询的潜在意图也常拒绝回答；Oyster-I 的 SFT 方案存在安全泛化不足以及安全思维链过度泛化到良性查询的问题。
AI.method: 提出 Oyster-II，采用 Zero-RL 范式结合多阶段强化学习策略，作为基于 RL 的建设性安全对齐框架。
AI.result: 在广泛基准上，Oyster-II 在安全维度上全面超越 Qwen3-14B 和 Oyster-I，跨规模性能接近 Qwen3-Max 和 Qwen3.5-397B。
AI.conclusion: 基于 Zero-RL 范式与多阶段 RL 策略的建设性安全对齐能有效解决 SFT 方案的安全泛化不足与安全 CoT 过度泛化问题，实现安全性、有用性与可信度的更优平衡。

title: Where do LLMs Fall Short in CBT-Guided Affective Reasoning?
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, accepted for publication in Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII), 2026
summary: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) provides a structured framework for understanding a user's mental state by examining the interaction between cognitive and behavioral factors. However, out-of-the-box LLMs respond fluently and empathetically, yet collapse into validation & reflection, regardless of what the user actually needs. They know theoretical CBT (scoring up to 96% accuracy on licensing exam questions) but fail to apply it effectively. We explore this gap with a knowledge-guided framework that treats CBT dialogue as controlled affective reasoning: user narratives are decomposed into Beck's Cognitive Conceptualization structure, grounded in clinical SNOMED CT concepts validated via Natural Language Inference, and a Multiple Chain-of-Thought (MCoT) strategy selection between Validation & Reflection, Socratic Questioning, or Alternative Perspectives. To measure whether such guidance actually changes behavior, we introduce the Protocol Leverage Force (F), a behavior-level metric that captures how far an intervention shifts a model away from its default response. Across three open-weight LLMs and 14 RealCBT-derived case studies, evaluated with human experts, valence-arousal trajectories, and linguistic entrainment, F shows that simply introducing protocol definitions via single chain-of-thought prompting fails to change LLM behavior, while MCoT on these definitions guides strategy selection better. Still, the effect stays within 1% (approx. 1.2-1.3%), and all models remain biased toward Validation & Reflection. These results show CBT knowledge alone does not ensure effective application, giving the affective-computing community instrumentation to measure where LLMs fall short.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大语言模型（LLM）在认知行为疗法（CBT）对话中的应用差距：LLM虽掌握理论知识（考试准确率达96%），但在实际应用中过度依赖"验证与反思"策略。作者提出了一种知识引导框架，将CBT对话视为受控情感推理，并引入协议杠杆力（F）指标来衡量模型行为改变程度。实验表明，单一思维链提示无法有效改变LLM行为，而多思维链（MCoT）引导策略选择效果略好，但影响幅度仅约1.2-1.3%，模型仍偏向默认策略。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM虽有情感和共情能力，但在CBT对话中只会机械地验证和反思用户的感受，无法根据用户真实需求切换不同的治疗策略（如苏格拉底式提问、替代视角等）。这种"知道但做不到"的差距亟需被量化和解决。
AI.method: 提出知识引导框架：1) 将用户叙述分解为Beck认知概念化结构；2) 基于临床SNOMED CT概念通过自然语言推理验证；3) 使用多思维链（MCoT）在三种策略间选择（验证与反思、苏格拉底式提问、替代视角）。同时提出协议杠杆力（F）指标，衡量干预使模型偏离默认行为输出的程度。
AI.result: 跨3个开源LLM和14个RealCBT案例的实验表明：单链思维提示无法改变LLM行为，MCoT引导策略选择效果略好，但F值仅约1.2-1.3%，影响幅度极小。所有模型仍强烈偏向"验证与反思"策略。
AI.conclusion: CBT知识本身不足以确保临床应用效果，LLM在情感对话中存在结构性偏差。本文为情感计算社区提供了量化LLM在CBT对话中不足的度量工具。

title: Fixed-Confidence Best-Arm Identification for Causal Mediation Analysis
summary: This paper studies the problem of identifying the treatment that maximizes the expected natural direct potential outcome (NDPO), which captures the potential outcome of an intervention while excluding the pathway transmitted through a mediator that researchers may wish to remove from evaluation. We first establish population-level identification of the expected NDPO in a causal bandit setting using observable interventional distributions. We then develop a fixed-confidence best-arm identification (BAI) algorithm based on the Track-and-Stop (TaS) framework, employing a cutting-set method to solve the resulting semi-infinite optimization problem. The proposed algorithm achieves sample-efficient identification with a high-probability correctness guarantee. We prove that it satisfies $δ$-correctness and asymptotic optimality. Finally, we validate the approach through empirical evaluations on a large-scale real-world advertising dataset (IPinYou).

AI.tldr: 本文研究因果bandit中最大化自然直接潜在结果（NDPO）的识别问题，提出基于Track-and-Stop框架的最优臂识别算法，利用切割集方法解决半无限优化问题，并在真实广告数据集上验证了其样本高效性与渐近最优性。
AI.motivation: 在因果推断中，研究者常希望排除通过中介变量传导的路径来评估干预的"直接"效果。然而，现有因果bandit工作主要关注总效应或间接效应，缺乏对自然直接效应（NDPO）的优化识别方法。本文旨在填补这一空白，解决在未知因果结构下高效识别最大期望NDPO对应干预的问题。
AI.method: 1）利用可观测的干预分布建立期望NDPO在群体层面的可识别性；2）基于Track-and-Stop（TaS）框架设计固定置信度的最优臂识别（BAI）算法；3）采用切割集方法（cutting-set method）求解算法中出现的半无限优化问题，以实现样本高效的臂识别。
AI.result: 理论证明所提算法满足δ-正确性（δ-correctness）和渐近最优性（asymptotic optimality），即在给定置信度下以最少样本正确识别最优臂。在IPinYou大规模广告数据集上的实证评估验证了算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将自然直接效应的最优识别问题引入因果bandit框架，提出的BAI算法在理论上保证了正确性与样本效率，在实际数据中表现良好。该工作为排除中介路径的因果决策优化提供了理论基础和实用工具。

title: Sparse State Feedback Control for Industrial Applications
comment: 4 Figures. Accepted for publication at IFAC-PapersOnLine and for presentation at the 23rd IFAC World Congress, Busan, Korea. 2026
summary: We present an optimization-based methodology for designing sparse state-feedback controllers for industrial applications that are suited for linear control, and demonstrate the framework by designing a level controller for an industrial rougher flotation bank at the Aitik mine. In contrast to the dense linear-quadratic (LQ) controller gains currently operating at the concentrator, our approach enforces a sparsity pattern that is consistent with the interaction structure of the flotation bank and accounts for the worst-case expected inflow disturbances during tuning, while optimizing controller performance through the Integral Absolute Error (IAE) index. The non-zero elements of the sparse gain matrices are optimized using a coordinate search algorithm that handles bound constraints and preserves closed-loop stability. The resulting sparse controller achieves improved load disturbance rejection in the flotation cells compared to the LQ controller. These improvements are consistently observed in both linear and nonlinear simulations. In addition, the imposed structure, results in gain matrices that are easier to adjust and interpret. Importantly, the sparse controllers generated for the Aitik mine are directly suitable for industrial deployment and offer an effective alternative to the existing dense LQ design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于优化的稀疏状态反馈控制器设计方法，并将其应用于Aitik矿工业浮选槽的液位控制。该方法强制施加与浮选槽交互结构一致的稀疏模式，并通过坐标搜索算法优化非零增益，在保证闭环稳定性的同时，实现了比传统稠密LQ控制器更好的抗扰动性能，且增益矩阵更易调整和解释，适合工业部署。
AI.motivation: 传统线性二次型（LQ）控制器产生的增益矩阵是稠密的，在工业应用中难以调整和解释；同时，工业浮选槽具有特定的交互结构，稠密控制器未能利用这一结构信息。
AI.method: 提出一种优化方法，强制施加与浮选槽交互结构一致的稀疏模式；利用坐标搜索算法优化非零增益元素，处理边界约束并保持闭环稳定性；在优化中考虑最坏情况的入流扰动，并以IAE指标衡量控制器性能。
AI.result: 稀疏控制器在浮选槽的负载扰动抑制方面优于LQ控制器；在线性和非线性仿真中均一致观察到性能提升；稀疏增益矩阵更易于调整和解释。
AI.conclusion: 为Aitik矿生成的稀疏控制器直接适用于工业部署，是现有稠密LQ设计的有效替代方案。

title: Geometric Control of Decisions' Affordability
summary: This paper studies the performance of data-driven decisions from a geometric perspective. A policymaker learns from an innovated donor population to decide whether to innovate groups in a distinct target population, and must compensate for any mistake. I introduce certification: an estimator yields certified decisions when it controls the probability of a mistake, whenever intervention effects are sufficiently large in magnitude. First, I show that certification implies a bound on worst-case compensation. Then, I study matching estimators with positive weights and show that, in a large-sample regime, affordability by certification becomes a purely geometric problem. I prove that a Delaunay interpolant, whose properties are well-known from results in computational geometry, delivers the best affordability guarantee. Finally, I show how this result can be leveraged to guide donor-data collection plans to bring worst-case compensation cost below a target level. I illustrate the gains of adopting this geometric point of view in targeting and collection plans with a semi-synthetic empirical application in development economics.

AI.tldr: 本文从几何视角研究数据驱动决策的性能，提出"认证"概念确保决策在干预效果足够大时控制错误概率，证明Delaunay插值法能提供最优的保障，并指导数据收集计划以降低最坏情况补偿成本。
AI.motivation: 政策制定者需要从源群体（donor population）学习经验，以决定是否对目标群体（target population）进行干预，且必须为任何错误决策进行补偿。现有方法缺乏对决策错误概率的可控性保障。
AI.method: 提出"认证"（certification）概念——当干预效果足够大时，估计量能控制错误概率。将问题转化为几何问题，研究带正权重的匹配估计量，证明Delaunay插值法能提供最优的保障。
AI.result: 认证意味着最坏情况补偿有界；在大样本下，认证的可行性转化为纯几何问题；Delaunay插值法提供最优的保障；该结果可指导数据收集计划。
AI.conclusion: 几何视角为数据驱动决策提供了新的理论框架，Delaunay插值法在控制最坏情况补偿成本方面具有最优性，可应用于发展经济学等领域的政策制定和数据收集规划。

title: The Clarke tangent and normal cones to decomposable sets in Lebesgue spaces
summary: Let $(T,Σ,μ)$ be a complete, $σ$-finite measure space, let $Z$ be a separable Banach space, and let $S : T \rightrightarrows Z$ be a measurable multifunction with nonempty closed values. For $1 \leq p\leq \infty,$ we consider $$\mathsf{Sel}_{p}(S):=\{z \in L^p(T,Z) : z(t) \in S(t) \hspace{0.1cm} \text{a.e.}\}.$$ We study whether the Clarke tangent cone to $\mathsf{Sel}_{p}(S)$ is obtained by taking $L^p$-selections of the pointwise Clarke tangent cones to the values of $S;$ namely, whether $ \operatorname{\widehat{\textbf{T}}}_{\mathsf{Sel}_{p}(S)}(x)=\{v \in L^p(T,Z) : v(t) \in \operatorname{\widehat{\textbf{T}}}_{S(t)}(x(t)) \hspace{0.1cm} \text{a.e.}\} $ holds for $x \in \mathsf{Sel}_{p}(S).$ The main result gives an affirmative answer for $1 \leq p < \infty$ under the additional assumption that $Z$ is reflexive. If $p=\infty,$ we prove $\widehat{\mathbf T}_{\mathrm{Sel}_{\infty}(S)}(x)\subset \{v\in L^\infty(T,Z): v(t)\in \widehat{\mathbf T}_{S(t)}(x(t))\ \mathrm{a.e.}\}.$other possible partial results are discussed. Consequently the corresponding assertions for Clarke normal cones follow. We derive applications to nonsmooth constrained optimization problems, Nemytskii operators and minimization of integral functional with decomposable constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多值函数可测选择集上，Clarke切锥是否可以通过逐点Clarke切锥的L^p-选择来表示。主要结论是：当Z是自反Banach空间且1≤p<∞时，等式成立；对p=∞则仅得到包含关系。进一步推导了Clarke法锥的相应结果，并应用于非光滑约束优化、Nemytskii算子和带可分解约束的积分泛函极小化问题。
AI.motivation: 研究可测多值函数的选择集（Sel_p(S)）的切锥结构，这是变分分析和非光滑优化中的基础性问题。由于选择集是无穷维空间中的复杂集合，其切锥的刻画对于约束优化、积分泛函等应用至关重要。
AI.method: 利用测度论和泛函分析工具，在完备σ-有限测度空间和可分Banach空间框架下，通过逐点Clarke切锥的L^p-选择来刻画整体Sel_p(S)的Clarke切锥。对p<∞和p=∞两种情形分别处理，并利用Z的自反性等条件。
AI.result: 对于1≤p<∞且Z自反时，Clarke切锥的逐点刻画等式成立；对于p=∞，仅得到包含关系；还讨论了其他部分情形。由此推出Clarke法锥的相应结果。
AI.conclusion: 该结果将有限维或简单情形下的切锥刻画推广到一般的无穷维可测选择框架，为非光滑优化中约束条件的线性化、Nemytskii算子的可微性分析以及积分泛函的最小化问题提供了理论基础。

title: Development of a Bio-Inspired Routing Algorithm According to Values of Solidarity and a Freirean Perspective of Engineering
summary: A routing algorithm for Señoritas Courier, a bicycle delivery cooperative in São Paulo, Brazil, composed exclusively of cis women and trans people, is presented in this paper. Unlike conventional logistics optimization, which typically focuses on cost or distance minimization, this cooperative operates under principles of solidarity, care, and equitable income distribution. The algorithm was developed through a participatory process involving cooperative members as co-designers. The classical Vehicle Routing Problem proved inadequate for this context, as it disregards individual constraints and fairness. We formulate a new variant, the Señoritas Routing Problem, which incorporates biker-specific constraints on weight, volume, and maximum distance, alongside a solidarity objective that balances route lengths. A genetic algorithm is employed as the solution method. Three fitness formulations are compared: a baseline distance-minimization operator, a constrained version, and a progressive formulation that penalizes workload imbalance. Results show that the progressive constrained formulation eliminates constraint violations and reduces the standard deviation of route lengths from 7.92 km to 0.81 km, at the cost of a moderate increase in total distance. This case demonstrates that operations research can be reoriented toward solidarity values, and that participatory methodologies are essential for aligning technical solutions with the needs of worker cooperatives.

AI.tldr: 本文为巴西圣保罗一家由顺性别女性和跨性别者组成的自行车快递合作社Señoritas Courier设计了基于团结、关怀和公平收入分配原则的路径规划算法。通过参与式方法，提出了Señoritas Routing Problem变体，采用遗传算法和渐进式约束公式，将路线长度标准差从7.92公里降至0.81公里，以适度增加总距离为代价实现了公平性。
AI.motivation: 传统物流优化关注成本或距离最小化，忽视了以团结、关怀和公平分配为原则的工人合作社的特殊需求。经典车辆路径问题(VRP)无法处理个体约束和公平性，因此需要为这类边缘化群体设计符合其价值观的路径规划算法。
AI.method: 通过参与式方法让合作社成员作为联合设计者；提出Señoritas Routing Problem新变体，包含骑手在重量、体积和最大距离上的个体约束以及平衡路线长度的团结目标；采用遗传算法，比较三种适应度公式：基线距离最小化、约束版本、以及惩罚工作负荷不平衡的渐进式公式。
AI.result: 渐进式约束公式消除了所有约束违反，并将路线长度标准差从7.92公里降至0.81公里，代价是总距离适度增加。
AI.conclusion: 运筹学可以朝向团结价值重新定向，参与式方法论对于将技术解决方案与工人合作社的需求对齐至关重要。

title: Weighted Conformal Prediction for Lab-to-Track Thermal Transfer in EV Motorsport Powertrains
comment: 8 pages, 3 tables, github like for the codes and dataset:https://github.com/nearpot/Weighted-Conformal-Thermal-Transfer
summary: Predicting thermal volatility in high-performance EV powertrains is difficult as internal temperatures are rarely observable outside the lab, and models calibrated on lab drive cycles fail when deployed against real-world loads. We study this lab-to-track transfer problem using conformal prediction, offering distribution-free uncertainty bounds. We implement Ensemble Batch Prediction Intervals (EnbPI; Xu & Xie, 2021), a leave-one-out bootstrap-ensemble conformal method for autocorrelated time series, and calibrate it on real CALCE lithium-ion cycler data (A123 SP20 cells, FUDS profile). We evaluate it under a genuine, measured covariate shift: a second real CALCE test condition (US06 Highway Driving Schedule at 45°C). The unweighted EnbPI bound, achieving its nominal 95% coverage in-distribution (measured: 95.00%), degrades to 70.13% empirical coverage under this real shift. We introduce a weighted EnbPI procedure combining EnbPI's ensemble residuals with density-ratio weighting (Tibshirani et al., 2019), estimating the density ratio via a probabilistic domain classifier. This recovers coverage to 72.42%, a modest, honestly-reported improvement, not a complete fix. We additionally apply the calibrated model to real 2023 Formula 1 telemetry (Monza and Silverstone, driver VER) as an unsupervised out-of-distribution diagnostic. Because no internal thermal channel exists in public trackside telemetry, we report only unsupervised flag rates (65.6% at Monza, 58.0% at Silverstone, well above the 5% in-distribution base rate) and note inconsistent associations between flags and braking/DRS zones. We conclude that conformal domain adaptation is a promising but only partially solved tool for this problem, detailing exactly where it falls short.

AI.tldr: 本文研究电动汽车动力总成热预测中的"实验室到赛道"迁移问题，使用共形预测方法。标准EnbPI在分布偏移下覆盖率从95%降至70.13%；引入密度比加权的EnbPI仅恢复至72.42%，改进有限。在F1赛车数据上的无监督诊断标志率远高于基线，但关联性不一致。结论：共形域适应有潜力但尚不成熟。
AI.motivation: 电动汽车高性能动力总成的热预测具有挑战性，因为内部温度在实验室外难以观测，且基于实验室驾驶循环校准的模型在实际负载下失效。作者希望研究"实验室到赛道"迁移问题，探索共形预测方法是否能够提供分布自由的、可量化的不确定性边界。
AI.method: 使用Ensemble Batch Prediction Intervals (EnbPI)作为基础共形预测方法，在CALCE锂电池数据（A123 SP20电池，FUDS工况）上校准。评估时引入真实的协变量偏移（US06高速工况，45°C）。随后提出加权EnbPI，结合EnbPI的集成残差与密度比加权（基于Tibshirani等人2019年的方法），密度比通过概率域分类器估计。最后在2023年F1赛车的真实遥测数据上作为无监督的分布外诊断工具进行测试。
AI.result: 标准EnbPI在分布内达到95.00%的标称覆盖率，在真实协变量偏移下降至70.13%。加权EnbPI恢复至72.42%，改进诚实但有限。在F1数据上，无监督标志率在蒙扎为65.6%，银石为58.0%，远超分布内基线5%，但与刹车/DRS区域的关联不一致。
AI.conclusion: 共形域适应是解决实验室到赛道热预测问题的一个有前景但尚未完全成熟的方法。作者诚实地报告了该方法的具体不足之处，指出其改进有限，不能完全解决实际问题。

title: VERITAS: Towards a General-Purpose Replication Tool for Scientific Research
summary: AI tools are accelerating scientific publication while the systems that review it struggle to keep up, and independent verification of published research has become both harder and more important. As manual replication is slow and expensive, a growing line of work uses coding agents to automate parts of the process. Existing efforts are largely packaged as benchmarks with companion agents that only run inside the benchmark's own pipeline, and no general-purpose replication tool exists. We present VERITAS, a domain-agnostic replication framework built around CLI coding agents. Given a paper, a code repository, or both, VERITAS extracts the paper's claims, runs the methodology while resolving issues as they arise, and judges each claim against the evidence from experiment runs. The pipeline returns an importance-weighted Replication Score, a severity-rated log of every fix applied, and the patched codebase. We evaluate VERITAS on CORE-Bench and ReplicationBench, 65 papers spanning computer science, social science, medicine, and astrophysics. Against two strong Claude Code baselines on the same model and host environment, VERITAS achieves state-of-the-art performance and leads on every metric on both benchmarks.

AI.tldr: VERITAS 是一个基于 CLI 编码代理的领域无关论文复现框架，能自动提取论文主张、运行方法、修复问题并给出复现评分，在 65 篇跨学科论文的评测中达到 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有论文复现依赖人工，速度慢且成本高；已有的编码代理复现工作多作为基准测试存在，缺乏通用、独立于特定管线的复现工具。
AI.method: 提出 VERITAS 框架：给定论文和/或代码仓库后，自动提取论文主张，使用 CLI 编码代理运行方法并动态修复问题，最后根据实验证据逐条评判主张，输出加权复现评分、修复日志和修补后的代码库。
AI.result: 在 CORE-Bench 和 ReplicationBench 两个基准（涵盖计算机科学、社会科学、医学、天体物理学共 65 篇论文）上，以相同模型和主机环境对比两个强的 Claude Code 基线，VERITAS 在所有指标上达到 SOTA。
AI.conclusion: VERITAS 是一个通用、高效的自动复现框架，能够显著提升研究复现的自动化水平和可验证性，具有良好的跨领域泛化能力。

title: Distill Where the Student Goes: Teacher-Regularized RL for English-Evidence Cross-Lingual RAG
summary: Cross-lingual retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is often deployed in an English-evidence regime, where users query in diverse languages but retrieved passages remain English. In this setting, generation can fail despite strong base models: English evidence induces language drift (English or code-switching outputs) and models use evidence unreliably when producing non-English answers. We attribute these failures to two post-training challenges: (i) errors are prefix-dependent, so fixed-trajectory supervision suffers from prefix mismatch; and (ii) sequence-level (partly discrete / judge-based) rewards yield noisy credit assignment and high-variance updates. We propose TR-RAG, a teacher-regularized RL recipe that couples reward optimization with on-policy distillation on student-visited prefixes. A compact student samples on-policy answers, while a stronger frozen teacher is queried only on those prefixes and provides a prefix-wise student-to-teacher reverse-KL anchor. We further introduce a reward decomposition for English-evidence multilingual generation, combining language consistency, character 3-gram recall, and an LLM-judge score for evidence-grounded correctness. Across three benchmarks -- BioASQ-ENKB5, Hotpot-ENKB5, and naturally multilingual MKQA -- and two backbones, TR-RAG improves the composite of language adherence and evidence-grounded correctness over strong baselines. Crucially, the teacher anchor acts as a safety net: on in-domain languages it prevents the large language-consistency collapses (up to ~27 percentage points) that reward-only RL can suffer by drifting below even the base model, while on distant out-of-distribution languages -- where reward-only RL stalls at the base model's ceiling -- it still improves evidence grounding; and on character 3-gram recall the compact student sometimes surpasses its 70B teacher.

AI.tldr: 提出了TR-RAG，一种教师正则化强化学习方法，通过奖励优化与on-policy蒸馏相结合，解决跨语言检索增强生成中的语言漂移和证据使用不可靠问题，在多个基准上提升了语言一致性和证据正确性。
AI.motivation: 跨语言RAG中，用户查询语言多样但检索到的段落多为英语，导致模型生成时出现语言漂移（输出英语或混码）以及不可靠地使用证据。现有后训练方法面临两个挑战：前缀依赖错误导致固定轨迹监督存在前缀不匹配；序列级奖励带来噪声信用分配和高方差更新。
AI.method: 提出TR-RAG：将奖励优化与on-policy蒸馏结合。小型学生模型在on-policy下采样答案，冻结的强大教师模型仅在前缀上查询，提供前缀级别的学生到教师反向KL锚点。同时引入针对英语证据多语言生成的奖励分解，包含语言一致性、字符3-gram召回率和LLM评判的证据正确性得分。
AI.result: 在BioASQ-ENKB5、Hotpot-ENKB5和MKQA三个基准及两种骨干模型上，TR-RAG在语言一致性和证据正确性的复合指标上超越了强基线。教师锚点作为安全网：在域内语言上防止了奖励-only RL高达约27个百分点的语言一致性崩溃；在域外语言上奖励-only RL停滞时仍能提升证据基础；字符3-gram召回率方面小型学生有时超越70B教师。
AI.conclusion: 教师正则化的强化学习策略有效解决了跨语言RAG中的语言漂移和证据利用问题，教师锚点提供了关键的安全保障，同时小型学生模型在某些指标上能超越大型教师模型。

title: Optimal Mixture-of-Experts Model Averaging for Conditional Generative Models
summary: Conditional generative models have emerged as powerful tools for sampling from target conditional distributions, driving substantial advances across a wide range of scientific and applied domains. As these models proliferate, practitioners often face multiple plausible generators whose performance can vary with the task, data, or input condition. We propose an optimal model averaging framework for conditional generative models, allowing candidate generators to be combined even when they are accessible only through conditional samples without tractable densities. Specifically, we use a sample-based maximum mean discrepancy between conditional distributions, which first leads to a static model averaging method, StaticMA, assigning fixed weights to different candidates. In addition, we develop MoEMA (mixture-of-experts model averaging), an input-adaptive method that parameterizes covariate-dependent weights through a softmax neural-network gate. We establish in-sample and out-of-sample asymptotic optimality for the proposed methods, together with consistency of the estimated adaptive weight function under regularity conditions. The framework applies directly to Euclidean responses and extends to unstructured data by combining our formulation with fixed representation maps. Across a broad set of simulations and real-data studies spanning tabular, image, and text modalities, MoEMA generally improves over competing baselines, demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对条件生成模型的**最优模型平均框架**，包括静态权重方法 StaticMA 和输入自适应权重方法 MoEMA，基于最大均值差异（MMD）来组合多个条件生成器，无需可计算的密度函数，仅需条件样本即可。理论证明了渐近最优性和权重函数一致性，实验在表格、图像和文本模态上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中，面对多个条件生成模型，不同模型在不同任务或输入条件下的表现差异较大，现有方法缺少一个灵活的、仅依赖样本的框架来组合这些候选生成器，尤其当生成器没有可处理的密度函数时。
AI.method: 1）**StaticMA**：基于条件分布之间的样本最大均值差异，为每个候选生成器分配固定权重。2）**MoEMA**（Mixture-of-Experts Model Averaging）：通过Softmax神经网络门控网络，学习输入条件依赖的自适应权重。理论方面，建立了样本内和样本外渐近最优性，并证明了自适应权重函数估计的一致性。
AI.result: 在表格、图像和文本数据的大量模拟和真实数据实验中，MoEMA 在多数场景下优于对比基线方法，表明所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的最优模型平均框架为条件生成模型的组合提供了一种通用、高效且理论上合理的方案，尤其适用于生成器仅能通过条件样本访问的场景。

title: Multimodal Nonblocking Supervisory Control Synthesis
summary: Supervisory control synthesis leverages the nonblocking property to show liveness of the supervised system. This property is particularly weak when system models include fault behavior, reconfiguration, or multiple control goals. To capture a more suitable nonblocking property for such system models, this paper introduces modal and multimodal nonblocking. These novel nonblocking variants impose a restriction on the states visited on the path towards a marked state. Synthesis algorithms are presented to construct modal and multimodal nonblocking supervisors. The novel nonblocking variants are illustrated with three intuitive examples, inspired by real synthesis problems encountered while applying supervisory control synthesis to safety-critical water infrastructures. A comparison is made between the novel nonblocking variants and established nonblocking variants to show that they are distinct. Additionally, where possible, conditions are formulated under which one variant implies the other.

AI.tldr: 本文提出模态和非模态非阻塞性概念，用于在包含故障、重构或多控制目标的系统模型中更精确地描述活性，并给出综合算法，通过实例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统非阻塞性在系统包含故障行为、重构或多控制目标时过于薄弱，无法充分刻画系统的活性需求，需要更合适的非阻塞性变体。
AI.method: 定义模态非阻塞性和多模态非阻塞性，对通往标记状态的路径上访问的状态施加限制；提出相应的综合算法来构建满足这些非阻塞性变体的监督控制器。
AI.result: 通过三个源自安全关键水务基础设施的直观实例验证了所提概念的有效性；与已有非阻塞性变体进行比较，证明其区别性；并给出了不同变体间蕴含关系的条件。
AI.conclusion: 模态和多模态非阻塞性为处理复杂系统的监督控制综合提供了更灵活、更精确的非阻塞性刻画，拓展了现有理论框架。

title: Variance Estimation for Saturated Fixed-Effect Specifications
comment: Submitted to The Econometrics Journal for consideration
summary: We characterize the asymptotic behavior of conventional variance estimators in linear regression with high-dimensional fixed effects under a drift in which both the proportional fixed-effect dimension $ρ_n = d_{K_n}/n \to ρ\in [0,1)$ and the residual treatment variance $τ_n^2 = nQ_{K_n} \to τ^2 \in (0, \infty]$ are non-degenerate. Three findings emerge. First, under strict exogeneity and conditional homoskedasticity, the Cattaneo--Jansson--Newey-corrected $t$-statistic is asymptotically exact for any $τ^2 > 0$: there is no Stock--Yogo-style threshold in $τ^2$. Second, the Eicker--White HC0 estimator is biased downward by a fixed factor $(1-ρ)$, producing over-rejection that grows with saturation. Third, HC3 over-corrects in the opposite direction by a factor $1/(1-ρ)$. The leave-one-out estimator (HC2) removes the first-order leverage distortion and is asymptotically exact under homoskedasticity or design-balanced heteroskedasticity; under general heteroskedasticity with non-uniform leverage, HC2 retains an additional bias of order $ρ|μ- ω^2|$ that we characterize. An empirical application to Piotroski F-Score returns in CEE markets illustrates the predicted variance hierarchy in real data.

AI.tldr: 本文刻画了高维固定效应线性回归中传统方差估计量的渐近行为，发现Cattaneo-Jansson-Newey校正t统计量在严格外生和条件同方差下对任意τ²>0均渐近精确，而Eicker-White HC0偏差因子为(1-ρ)，HC3过校正因子为1/(1-ρ)，HC2在非均匀杠杆异方差下存在ρ|μ-ω²|量级的额外偏差，并通过对中欧三国市场Piotroski F-Score收益的实证分析验证了方差层级预测。
AI.motivation: 传统方差估计量在高维固定效应线性回归中的渐近性质尚不清晰，尤其是当固定效应维度比例ρ非退化和残差处理方差τ²非退化时，现有估计量的偏差结构、校正效果以及是否存在Stock-Yogo式阈值等问题亟待理论刻画。
AI.method: 在固定效应维度比例ρ_n = d_{K_n}/n → ρ∈[0,1)和残差处理方差τ_n² = nQ_{K_n} → τ²∈(0,∞]的漂移设定下，对Cattaneo-Jansson-Newey校正t统计量、Eicker-White HC0、HC2和HC3估计量进行渐近分析，推导其偏差因子和校正效果，并在均匀杠杆与非均匀杠杆异方差下分类讨论HC2的性质。
AI.result: (1) CJN校正t统计量在严格外生和条件同方差下对任意τ²>0均渐近精确，不存在Stock-Yogo式阈值；(2) HC0向下偏差因子为(1-ρ)，随饱和程度增加过度拒绝加剧；(3) HC3过度校正，偏差因子为1/(1-ρ)；(4) HC2消除一阶杠杆扭曲，在同方差或设计平衡异方差下渐近精确，在一般非均匀杠杆异方差下存在ρ|μ-ω²|量级的额外偏差。
AI.conclusion: 高维固定效应设定下，不同方差估计量表现出系统性的偏差层级（HC0向下偏、HC3向上偏、HC2居中但仍有二阶偏差），CJN校正t统计量具有理论最优性。实证结果支持理论预测的方差层级关系。

title: Adaptive Linear Quadratic Control of Unknown Linear Time-Varying Systems via Policy Gradient Methods
summary: Unknown linear time-varying (LTV) systems require the control policy to adapt from online closed-loop data as dynamics evolve. Existing methods usually update the policy by solving a one-shot optimization problem, which can be computationally demanding and sensitive to noisy model estimates. In this paper, we propose a policy gradient adaptive control (PGAC) method for LTV system control with unknown model parameters. Specifically, PGAC integrates online policy optimization into feedback by updating the state-feedback policy with one-step gradient descent of the linear quadratic regulator cost at each time instant. This incremental update is computationally light and naturally limits policy variations caused by noisy data. To explicitly compute the policy gradient online, we estimate local models from recent closed-loop trajectories using normalized sliding-window least-squares. We provide stability and convergence certificates of PGAC for two classes of LTV systems. For slowly time-varying systems, we prove that the closed-loop system achieves practical exponential stability without a dwell-time condition. For piecewise-constant LTV systems, we establish practical stability through a dwell-time contraction argument. We also provide average frozen-time optimality-gap bounds of the policy sequence for both classes. Finally, we validate the effectiveness of our method via numerical case studies of both LTV and nonlinear systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于未知线性时变系统的策略梯度自适应控制（PGAC）方法，通过在线单步梯度更新策略，并利用滑动窗口最小二乘估计局部模型，实现了计算轻量、对噪声鲁棒的自适应控制，并在两类LTV系统上证明了稳定性和收敛性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过一次性优化求解策略更新，计算量大且对噪声模型估计敏感，需要一种计算轻量且鲁棒的自适应控制方法。
AI.method: PGAC在每个时刻对状态反馈策略进行LQR代价的单步梯度下降更新；使用归一化滑动窗口最小二乘从近期闭环轨迹中估计局部模型，以显式计算策略梯度。
AI.result: 对于缓慢时变系统，证明了无需驻留时间条件的实用指数稳定性；对于分段常数系统，通过驻留时间收缩论证建立了实用稳定性；给出了两类系统的平均冻结时间最优性间隙界。
AI.conclusion: PGAC方法在计算和鲁棒性方面具有优势，在两类LTV系统上均有理论保证，数值实验验证了在LTV和非线性系统中的有效性。

title: Content Hidden Behind Execution: Analyzing Public Scratch Projects at Runtime
summary:
Public Scratch projects are reused in computing education as classroom examples, remix sources, open-exploration materials, and research data. Curation often begins with titles, thumbnails, descriptions, tags, and remix links, but Scratch projects are executable learning artifacts. Content affecting age appropriateness can appear only after execution, gameplay progression, a failure state, user interaction, costume switching, audio playback, or a hidden event trigger.
  We study "runtime-revealed sensitive content" as a computing education curation challenge: educators and researchers need runtime evidence about what students may encounter when Scratch projects are used in these settings. We introduce a runtime-aware annotation scheme that separates content category, risk level, evidence channel, reveal mechanism, and annotation confidence. Using this scheme, we conducted an audit of 500 public Scratch projects sampled from curated candidates, taxonomy-guided keyword search, and follow-up exploration of project clusters surfaced during review.
  In this audit, 467 of 500 projects (93%) required runtime exploration beyond static metadata to surface the safety-relevant signal; 387 (77%) required interaction, gameplay progression, failure states, or hidden-asset and code inspection. As a targeted classroom and research curation audit, the study characterizes reveal mechanisms in a selected corpus rather than estimating platform-wide prevalence or making platform-level safety claims. The results show metadata-only screening leaves key evidence unresolved in executable youth media. By separating content type, severity, evidence location, and reveal pathway, this work supports classroom project selection, student exploration practices, dataset construction, and educator-facing screening tools for block-based programming communities.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Scratch项目中"运行时暴露的敏感内容"问题。对500个公开项目审计发现，93%的项目需要运行时探索才能暴露安全相关信号，77%需要交互、游戏进程或隐藏资产检查。仅依赖元数据筛选不足以识别可执行青少年媒体中的敏感内容。
AI.motivation: 教育者和研究人员需要运行时证据来判断Scratch项目在不同教学场景中可能让学生接触到的内容，而静态元数据无法捕捉仅在执行、交互或隐藏触发后暴露的敏感内容。
AI.method: 提出了一种运行时感知的注释方案，区分内容类别、风险等级、证据通道、揭示机制和注释置信度。对500个公开Scratch项目进行审计，结合关键词搜索和聚类探索。
AI.result: 467/500（93%）项目需运行时探索才能暴露安全信号；387/500（77%）需要交互、游戏进程、失败状态或隐藏资产/代码检查。仅元数据筛查不足以识别可执行青少年媒体中的关键证据。
AI.conclusion: 通过区分内容类型、严重程度、证据位置和揭示路径，该工作支持课堂项目选择、学生探索实践、数据集构建和面向教育工作者的筛选工具开发。

title: Out-of-Distribution Generalization of Risk Aversion in Language Models
comment: ICML 2026 Agents in the Wild workshop
summary: Training AIs to be risk-averse in resources could offer a failsafe in the event that AIs turn out misaligned. Misaligned but risk-averse AIs would tend to prefer low-risk, low-reward strategies like cooperation over high-risk, high-reward strategies like rebellion, limiting the downsides of any misalignment. But we can only feasibly train AIs to be risk-averse on low-stakes gambles, and we will only be safe if their risk aversion generalizes to astronomically-high-stakes gambles. Will it? To shed light on this question, we introduce RiskAverseOOD: a benchmark for measuring how well risk aversion generalizes out of distribution. We then offer some initial results. Using a variety of methods to make Qwen3-8B choose risk-aversely when the stakes are low, we find that we can induce substantial risk aversion when the stakes are astronomically high. Our models' learned risk aversion generalizes at least partially across 98 orders of magnitude. From a baseline 2% rate of choosing a safe `Cooperate' option, we see rates around 70% (SFT and tie training), 52% (DPO), and 39% (activation steering). In another experiment, our fine-tuned reward model reliably scores risk-averse reasoning above risk-neutral or excessively risk-averse alternatives (99.6% pairwise accuracy). We replicate these effects at different scales (Qwen3-1.7B and Qwen3-14B) and across model families (Gemma-3-12B-IT and Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct). Overall, we find that risk aversion learned at low stakes can generalize OOD to astronomically high stakes, though not yet consistently enough to serve as a reliable failsafe. Achieving that level of consistency is an open problem.

AI.tldr: 本文研究能否通过低风险训练让AI的风险规避行为泛化到天文数字级别的极高风险场景。实验表明，用多种方法训练Qwen3-8B后，其风险规避行为可跨越98个数量级部分泛化（从2%合作率提升至39%-70%），但尚不足以作为可靠的安全保险机制。
AI.motivation: 如果AI能力强大但目标错配（misaligned），一个风险规避的AI会更倾向于选择低风险低回报的合作策略，而非高风险高回报的反叛策略，从而限制错配的危害。但实际训练只能在低风险场景下进行，关键问题在于这种风险规避能否泛化到天文数字级别的极高风险场景。
AI.method: 构建RiskAverseOOD基准测试，使用SFT（监督微调）、Tie Training、DPO（直接偏好优化）、激活引导（activation steering）等多种方法训练Qwen3-8B在低风险场景下选择风险规避行为，然后测试其在极高风险（跨越98个数量级）场景下的泛化能力。同时在Qwen3-1.7B、Qwen3-14B、Gemma-3-12B-IT、Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct上进行复现验证。
AI.result: 基线合作率仅2%，训练后：SFT和Tie Training达到约70%，DPO约52%，激活引导约39%。奖励模型对风险规避推理的识别准确率达99.6%。效果在不同模型规模和家族中均有复现。
AI.conclusion: 低风险训练的风险规避可以部分泛化到极高风险场景，但一致性还不够可靠，不能作为可靠的安全保险机制。达到充分的一致性仍是一个开放问题。

title: A Sliding-Window-Based Reinforcement Learning for Dynamic Assembly Flow Shop Scheduling with Multi-Product Delivery
summary: Multi-product kitting delivery imposes significant challenges for real-time scheduling in hybrid manufacturing systems that integrate processing and assembly, as dynamic order arrivals simultaneously alter supply dependencies and the set of feasible job-machine assignments. This paper proposes a sliding-window-based reinforcement learning (SWRL) framework for end-to-end online scheduling in the flexible assembly flow shop scheduling problem with complex kitting constraints. The problem is formulated as a heterogeneous graph-based Markov decision process that captures the dual-layer kitting structure and the tail-product bottleneck dynamics that produce a sparse reward landscape. To address the resulting challenges, SWRL integrates a sliding-window filtering mechanism that filters inactive nodes and prioritizes kitting-critical operations, a spatiotemporal graph encoding network that tracks bottleneck shifts across consecutive decision states, and a dynamic action mapping module with a constrained waiting strategy that adapts to the changing action space under variable topologies. Experiments on real-world instances from a home appliance manufacturer demonstrate that SWRL achieves consistent tardiness reductions over classical dispatching rules and existing deep reinforcement learning methods, and exhibits robust performance across varying resource configurations, order loads, and arrival concentrations.

AI.tldr: 针对混合制造系统中具有复杂配套约束的柔性装配流水车间在线调度问题，提出了一种基于滑动窗口的强化学习框架（SWRL），通过异构图表征马尔可夫决策过程、滑动窗口过滤、时空图编码网络和动态动作映射模块，实现了端到端的在线调度，并在真实家电制造数据集上取得了优于传统调度规则和现有深度强化学习方法的延迟降低效果。
AI.motivation: 多产品配套配送给集成加工与装配的混合制造系统的实时调度带来了巨大挑战，因为动态订单到达会同时改变供应依赖关系和可行机器分配集合。
AI.method: 提出SWRL框架，包括：(1) 异构图表征的马尔可夫决策过程，捕捉双层配套结构和尾产品瓶颈动态；(2) 滑动窗口过滤机制，过滤非活动节点并优先处理配套关键操作；(3) 时空图编码网络，追踪连续决策状态间的瓶颈转移；(4) 动态动作映射模块与约束等待策略，适应可变拓扑下的动态动作空间。
AI.result: 在家电制造商的真实实例上，SWRL相比经典调度规则和现有深度强化学习方法，一致地降低了订单延迟，并在不同资源配置、订单负载和到达集中度下展现出鲁棒性能。
AI.conclusion: SWRL有效解决了复杂配套约束下柔性装配流水车间的在线调度难题，具有显著的性能提升和良好的泛化鲁棒性。

title: Hierarchical Sparse Attention Done Right: Toward Infinite Context Modeling
summary: Scaling modern large language models (LLMs) to long contexts is limited by the quadratic computation cost, and poor length extrapolation of dense attention. Chunk-wise sparse attention offers a promising alternative, but all existing methods fall short of full attention because of their inaccurate chunk selection. We propose Hierarchical Landmark Sparse (HiLS) Attention, a chunk-wise sparse attention mechanism that learns chunk selection end-to-end under the language-modeling (LM) loss. HiLS factorizes attention hierarchically: each query performs attention independently with each retrieved chunk to extract chunk-specific information, and the resulting outputs are fused according to chunk retrieval scores. By incorporating retrieval scores into the forward attention computation, HiLS optimizes them directly with the LM loss, enabling end-to-end retrieval learning and native sparse training. Experimental results show that HiLS-Attention achieves performance comparable to, and in some cases better than, full attention at in-domain context lengths. Meanwhile, HiLS-Attention extrapolates more than $64\times$ the training context length with 90% retrieval accuracy, far beyond full attention. Moreover, existing full-attention models can be converted to HiLS-Attention with lightweight continued pretraining, preserving in-domain performance while acquiring ultra-long-context extrapolation. Together with its sparse KV access and computation, HiLS-Attention breaks the usual efficiency-performance trade-off, enabling long-context LLMs that are both more efficient and more effective on general long-context tasks than their full-attention counterparts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiLS注意力机制，通过层次化、可端到端学习的稀疏注意力，在保持与全注意力相当甚至更优性能的同时，实现超长上下文（64倍训练长度）的外推，打破效率-性能权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型扩展至长上下文面临两个瓶颈：密集注意力二次方计算代价和长度外推能力差。虽然分块稀疏注意力是替代方案，但现有方法因块选择不准确而无法达到全注意力的性能。
AI.method: HiLS采用层次化因子分解注意力：每个查询独立与每个检索到的块进行注意力计算以提取块特定信息，然后根据块检索得分融合输出。通过将检索得分融入前向注意力计算，使其直接通过语言建模损失进行优化，实现端到端检索学习和原生稀疏训练。
AI.result: 在域内上下文长度上达到与全注意力相当甚至更优的性能；可外推超过训练长度64倍以上，并保持90%的检索准确率；现有全注意力模型可通过轻量级继续预训练转换为HiLS，保留域内性能的同时获得超长上下文外推能力。
AI.conclusion: HiLS注意力通过其稀疏的KV访问和计算，打破了效率-性能之间的权衡，使长上下文LLM在通用长上下文任务上比全注意力对应模型更高效且更有效。

title: On Pairwise Quantile Regression -- Statistical Guarantees and Applications
summary: Quantile regression provides a powerful tool for summarizing the conditional distribution of a real valued random variable (r.v.) of interest $Y$ as a function of covariates $Z$ in cases where it shows a large dispersion with high probability, going beyond the situation where standard least square regression is informative/predictive. This article aims to extend this methodology to the pairwise case, when the variable to be explained takes the form of a similarity function between two independent observations, such as pixelated ID photos, as input data of biometric systems) and the explanatory variables take the form of a pair of covariates of the observations, such as the age or the hair color. We establish theoretical guarantees for solutions of this statistical learning problem, considered here as empirical minimizers of a pairwise version of the pinball loss. Leveraging sharp concentration results for $U$-processes, we prove generalization bounds and identify mild conditions under which fast learning rates can be achieved. Confirming the probabilistic analysis, experiments based on simulation data also provide solid empirical evidence of the validity of the methodology promoted here for pairwise quantile regression. Finally, its usefulness from an application perspective is demonstrated by a detailed study aimed at analyzing errors in similarity scoring for facial recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文将分位数回归方法扩展到成对情形，用于解释两个独立观测之间的相似性函数，建立了理论保证（泛化界和快速学习率），并通过模拟实验和人脸识别误差分析验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统分位数回归适用于单个响应变量的条件分布建模，但在许多实际场景（如生物识别系统中的相似度评分）中，待解释变量是两个独立观测之间的相似性函数，现有方法无法直接处理这种成对结构。
AI.method: 提出成对分位数回归方法，将pinball损失函数扩展到成对版本，通过经验风险最小化求解；利用U-过程的尖锐集中性结果推导泛化界，并识别出实现快速学习率的温和条件。
AI.result: 理论层面：证明了泛化界并给出了快速学习率的条件。实验层面：模拟数据验证了方法的统计有效性；人脸识别相似度评分误差分析展示了实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 成对分位数回归在理论和实验上均被证明是有效的，尤其在生物识别等需要分析两观测间相似性的领域具有重要应用前景。

title: Hierarchical Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Carbon-Aware AI Data Centers in Power Distribution Systems
summary: Eco-friendly energy management for artificial intelligence data centers (AIDCs) is crucial because of the significant increase in energy consumption-induced carbon emissions from AIDCs resulting from the rapid expansion of AI applications. This paper proposes a hierarchical carbon-aware multi-agent reinforcement learning (CA-MARL) framework for robust and efficient operations of AIDCs under uncertainties while ensuring low-carbon operation of power distribution systems. The framework comprises a workload manager (WM) agent and multiple local AIDC agents trained using a multi-agent transformer method, corresponding to a global AIDC aggregator and a local AIDC operator, respectively. Leveraging AIDC operation data along with nodal carbon intensity (NCI) calculated from the carbon emission flow-integrated distribution system operator problem, the WM agent spatially allocates AI training and inference jobs among all AIDCs. Based on the jobs allocated from the WM agent and NCI information, each AIDC agent schedules economical and eco-friendly operations of the AIDC by performing the following tasks: i) temporal shifting of training jobs, ii) spatial allocation of training graphics processing unit (GPU) blocks and inference GPUs within the AIDC, and iii) control of the supply air temperature of the cooling system. The effectiveness of the proposed framework was assessed using an IEEE 33-node power distribution system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层碳感知多智能体强化学习框架（CA-MARL），通过工作负载管理器和本地AIDC智能体的协同，在不确定性下实现数据中心低碳高效运行，并在IEEE 33节点配电系统上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: AI应用快速发展导致AIDC能耗和碳排放急剧增加，亟需在不确定性条件下实现AIDC的低碳高效运行。
AI.method: 提出分层CA-MARL框架：1) WM智能体基于NCI信息空间分配AI任务；2) 本地AIDC智能体执行训练任务时间转移、GPU空间分配及冷却系统送风温度控制。采用多智能体Transformer方法训练。
AI.result: 在IEEE 33节点配电系统上验证了所提框架的有效性，实现了低碳经济运行。
AI.conclusion: 分层CA-MARL框架能有效协调多个AIDC，在不确定性下实现鲁棒、高效且低碳的运行。

title: Approximate Minimax Estimation of a Bounded Normal Mean via Stochastic Mirror Ascent
summary: This paper presents a computational approach to find an approximately minimax estimator for the classical Bounded Normal Mean problem. The suggested procedure is the Bayes estimator corresponding to an approximately least-favorable distribution obtained from a stochastic mirror ascent routine for concave maximization. The paper shows that both the approximately least-favorable distribution and the approximately minimax estimator are indeed close (in a sense we make precise) to their desired targets. Simulation evidence suggests that the approximately minimax estimator can yield, with a reasonable amount of compute, risk improvements from 6% to almost 18% relative to the minimax linear estimator (which is known to admit a maximal improvement of 20%). The approximately minimax estimator is then applied to the problem of how to best aggregate the information contained in local projections and vector autoregressions to estimate an impulse response coefficient.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算近似最小最大估计量的方法，用于解决经典的有界正态均值问题。该方法通过随机镜像上升程序获得近似最不利分布，进而得到相应的贝叶斯估计量。模拟表明，该方法相比最小最大线性估计量可带来6%-18%的风险改善，并将其应用于局部投影和向量自回归的信息聚合问题。
AI.motivation: 在有界正态均值问题中，找到精确的最小最大估计量通常计算复杂，而线性估计量虽然简洁但并非最优（已知最大改进空间为20%）。作者希望开发一种计算方法，以合理的计算成本获得接近理论最优的估计量。
AI.method: 采用随机镜像上升（stochastic mirror ascent）算法进行凹函数最大化，从而找到近似最不利分布（least-favorable distribution），进而构造该分布下的贝叶斯估计量作为近似最小最大估计量。
AI.result: 理论上证明了近似最不利分布和近似最小最大估计量与真实目标之间的接近程度；模拟实验显示，该方法在合理计算量下可获得6%-18%的风险改善（相比最小最大线性估计量）。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的计算方法能够高效地获得近似最小最大估计量，并在实际应用中（如聚合局部投影和向量自回归的信息来估计脉冲响应系数）展现出了有效性。

title: Dynamic Congestion Pricing in Distribution Networks via a Convex-Analytic Bilevel Reformulation
summary: Dynamic congestion pricing is an important tool for managing congestion and coordinating distributed energy resources in active distribution networks. However, scalable mechanisms that preserve participant autonomy remain computationally challenging because the operator-resource interaction is naturally bilevel. This paper develops a convex-analytic framework in which a distribution system operator computes dynamic congestion-price adders, while decentralized energy hubs schedule flexible demand, storage, local generation, renewable curtailment, and grid import/export. Unlike conventional single-level reformulations that replace lower-level problems by Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) conditions, complementarity constraints, and big-M linearizations, the proposed model represents follower feasibility and optimality through a Fenchel-Young equality involving the convex conjugate of an extended follower objective. The remaining bilinear price-response term is handled through a penalized difference-of-convex reformulation and sequential convex approximation. The method solves continuous convex subproblems and avoids the constraint-wise complementarity and branch-and-bound scaling of mixed-integer KKT reformulations; its main computational drivers are price-response dimension and conjugate evaluation rather than binary encodings of follower inequalities. On augmented IEEE 13- and 34-node feeders, it reduces congestion by 96.89% and 96.45%, respectively, approaches centralized full-information dispatch, certifies price-response consistency to numerical precision, and yields lower residual congestion than time-limited KKT incumbents within the computational budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于凸分析框架的动态拥堵定价方法，利用Fenchel-Young等式和逐次凸近似替代传统KKT条件，实现分布式能源资源的可扩展协同优化，在IEEE 13/34节点系统上减少约96%的拥堵。
AI.motivation: 传统双层优化模型通过KKT条件转为单层时面临互补约束和大M线性化带来的计算可扩展性差、求解困难的问题，亟需一种既能保护参与者自主性又具可扩展性的定价机制。
AI.method: 利用Fenchel-Young等式和对偶共轭函数表示跟随者可行性与最优性，将双线性价格-响应项通过罚函数的DC规划（Difference-of-Convex）重构，并采用逐次凸近似求解连续凸子问题。
AI.result: 在IEEE 13节点和34节点馈线上分别减少96.89%和96.45%的拥堵，逼近集中式全局最优调度，数值精度内满足价格-响应一致性，且在计算预算内优于KKT方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提凸分析框架避免了混合整数KKT重构的互补约束和分支定界缩放问题，计算代价主要由价格-响应维度和共轭函数评估决定，是实现可扩展动态拥堵定价的有效方法。

title: The Case for Globally Beneficial Technology
summary: To whom do the fruits of advanced technological innovation belong? To their inventors, to the organizations and individuals involved in making such discoveries possible, or to still larger groups of people, potentially encompassing all of humanity? This question sits at the heart of the present investigation. The arguments developed here focus on an expansive reading of the entitlement to benefit from technological breakthroughs: we argue that they should be designed, developed, and distributed in ways that benefit everyone. This central claim, which encompasses technologies such as advanced forms of artificial intelligence, is grounded in an exploration of five moral arguments that involve human rights, beneficence, contingencies of birth, the global tree of knowledge, and global economic justice. Taken together, they underpin the argument for globally beneficial technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨先进技术创新成果的归属问题，主张技术（包括高级人工智能）的设计、开发和分配应惠及所有人，并从人权、仁慈、出生偶然性、全球知识树和全球经济正义五个道德论证来支撑这一观点。
AI.motivation: 回答一个根本性问题：先进技术创新的成果究竟属于谁——是发明者、促成其发现的组织和个人，还是更广泛的群体乃至全人类？
AI.method: 通过五个道德论证进行规范性分析：（1）人权视角；（2）仁慈原则；（3）出生的偶然性（不应因出生地而决定是否受益）；（4）全球知识树（技术知识是集体积累的成果）；（5）全球经济正义。
AI.result: 形成了一套完整的道德论证体系，支持"技术应造福全球所有人"的规范性主张。
AI.conclusion: 先进技术（包括人工智能）应当以惠及全人类的方式进行设计、开发和分配，这不仅是道义上的要求，也建立在多重道德论证的坚实基础之上。

title: Safe Inference-Time Alignment via Lagrangian Reward Augmentation
summary: Inference-time alignment steers a frozen language model during decoding using auxiliary reward signals, avoiding the cost of repeated weight updates. However, existing inference-time alignment methods typically optimize a single scalar score, so explicit safety constraints must either be ignored or encoded through manually tuned penalties. We propose Lagrangian Reward Augmentation (LARA), a general inference-time alignment framework under safety constraints. Starting from a KL-regularized constrained objective with a reward model and a cost model, LARA dualizes the constraint and reduces the optimization problem to a one-dimensional convex problem over a nonnegative dual variable. Estimated on a small calibration set, this dual variable defines an augmented reward that can be used as a drop-in scoring signal within existing inference-time alignment methods. For sequence-level sampling methods, such as Best-of-N reranking, the calibrated dual variable corresponds to the solution of the expected-cost constrained problem. For token-level reward-guided decoding methods, the same construction yields a principled dual-calibrated heuristic rather than an exact constrained-policy guarantee. We evaluate LARA on both sequence-level and token-level inference-time alignment methods, and find that LARA improves the helpfulness-harmlessness tradeoff, with Best-of-N achieving the best performance among inference-time methods, approaching finetuning-based direct alignment baselines.

AI.tldr: LARA是一个推理时对齐框架，通过在辅助奖励信号中引入拉格朗日对偶变量，将安全约束转化为一维凸优化问题，实现了在无需权重更新的情况下平衡模型的有用性与无害性。
AI.motivation: 现有推理时对齐方法通常只优化单一的标量奖励，忽视了安全约束，或依赖手动调节的惩罚项。缺乏一种通用、理论支持的方式在推理阶段显式引入安全约束。
AI.method: LARA从KL正则化的约束优化目标出发，对安全成本约束进行对偶化，将其转化为关于非负对偶变量的一维凸优化问题。通过小规模校准集估计最优对偶变量，定义增强奖励信号，可无缝嵌入序列级（Best-of-N重排序）和Token级（奖励引导解码）推理时对齐方法。
AI.result: LARA在序列级和Token级推理时对齐方法上均提升了帮助性与无害性的权衡效果。其中Best-of-N方法性能最佳，接近基于微调的直接对齐基线。
AI.conclusion: LARA提供了一个理论完备、即插即用的推理时安全约束对齐框架，有效弥合了推理时方法与微调方法之间的性能差距，为安全可控的语言模型生成提供了新路径。

title: Evaluating Generative Agents with Actions Grounded in Socially Distributed Task Environments using Incognita
summary: Effective agency in social environments depends on when an agent seeks knowledge, when it acts, and whether its actions are justified by acquired information. Existing grounded benchmarks provide executable actions, persistent state, and verifiable outcomes, while social simulation environments provide rich interaction among language agents. We study an evaluation setting that combines these requirements. We define socially distributed task environments as interactive environments where task-relevant knowledge is partitioned across role-isolated participants and consequential actions are accessible only through them. Communication serves as exploration over role-partitioned knowledge, while grounded action serves as exploitation over environment state. We introduce Incognita, a Concordia-based framework that separates social interaction from grounded execution. The evaluated agent routes messages to a user or specialist entities; specialists mediate admissible operations; a deterministic sub-environment executes accepted operations over a canonical state; and an offline evaluator scores outcomes with inherited rewards. Incognita-Retail transforms tau-bench retail into a multi-entity environment while preserving final-state reward semantics. We evaluate three generative agent models on 18 tasks stratified by social breadth, with 540 trials. Progress appears in reward and behavior: success rises from 0 percent to 8.9 percent and 17.2 percent, while premature finalization falls from 100 percent to 87 percent and 58 percent. Stronger models elicit more hidden knowledge, contact more entities, and attempt more grounded writes, yet reliability remains low. These findings show that socially distributed task environments expose behavior before reliable success, including knowledge elicitation, source selection, grounded action attempts, and premature completion belief.

AI.tldr: 本文研究社交分布式任务环境（Socially Distributed Task Environments），提出Incognita框架，将社交互动与接地执行分离。在Incognita-Retail（基于tau-bench零售场景）上评估三种生成式智能体模型，发现更强模型能引出更多隐藏知识、接触更多实体，但可靠性仍然较低。
AI.motivation: 现有基准环境要么提供可执行动作和可验证结果（如接地任务），要么提供丰富的社交交互，但缺乏同时满足两者的设置。本文旨在弥合这一差距，研究智能体在需要社交交互才能获取信息、继而执行任务的场景中的表现。
AI.method: 提出Incognita框架：将社交交互与接地执行分离，智能体通过路由消息与用户或专家实体通信，专家中介操作，确定性子环境执行操作，离线评估器评分。基于tau-bench零售构建Incognita-Retail，评估三种生成式智能体模型（18个任务、540次试验）。
AI.result: 成功率从0%提升至8.9%和17.2%；过早结束从100%降至87%和58%。更强模型引出更多隐藏知识、接触更多实体、尝试更多接地写入操作，但整体可靠性仍低。
AI.conclusion: 社交分布式任务环境暴露了智能体在可靠成功前的行为模式（知识引出、源选择、接地动作尝试、过早完成信念），为评估和提升社交智能体能力提供了新视角。

title: psytechlab at CLPsych 2026: Utilising Natural Language Processing methods and Large Language Models for Social Media Text Analysis
comment: Accepted by CLPsych2026. CLPsych 2026 will be held at ACL in San Diego July 4th, 2026
summary: Social media posts are a rich and valuable source of data for analyzing mental health states and users' well-being using automated analysis tools. In this work, we demonstrate how we used a range of Natural Language Processing (NLP) methods, including Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), BERT-based models, and Large Language Models (LLMs), for self-state and well-being analysis and summarization during the CLPsych Shared Task 2026. Our approach achieved one of the top Consistency and Contradiction scores for the summarization task and also middle-level results for the other tasks. By testing and developing such mental health-state estimation systems, we contributed to improving mental health support systems. We make our code available https://github.com/psytechlab/CLPsych2026/.

AI.tldr: 本文使用LSTM、BERT和LLM等多种NLP方法，在CLPsych 2026共享任务中进行自我状态与幸福感分析及摘要生成，在摘要任务中取得了最高的一致性与矛盾评分，并在其他任务中获得中等水平结果。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体帖子是分析心理健康状态和用户福祉的宝贵数据源，但需要自动化分析工具来有效处理这些数据，以改善心理健康支持系统。
AI.method: 采用多种自然语言处理方法，包括长短期记忆网络（LSTM）、基于BERT的模型以及大语言模型（LLMs），用于自我状态和幸福感的分析与摘要生成。
AI.result: 在摘要任务中取得了一致性与矛盾评分（Consistency and Contradiction scores）的最高水平；在其他任务中获得中等水平结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过测试和开发此类心理健康状态估计系统，对改善心理健康支持系统做出了贡献，并公开了代码以供复现和进一步研究。

title: Tightening the Score Matching Gap for Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion models (DMs) are a state-of-the-art generative method to approximately sample from an unknown distribution. Their training and evaluation primarily rely on an Evidence Lower Bound (ELBO), which relates the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence of model samples to the score matching loss along the path, which serves as a tractable surrogate. The difference between sample quality and the score matching loss produced by this bound leads to the \emph{score matching gap}, which is known to be tight in the worst-case but not descriptive of sample quality in general. In this work, we provide a theoretical analysis of this gap, developing tighter bounds for three metrics: KL divergence, reverse KL divergence, and Wasserstein distance, effectively exploiting the regularity of the class of score estimators. Our results suggest that the quality of the score approximation has more impact on closing the score matching gap for low noise scales. To obtain these bounds, our key technical insight is to exploit the contraction properties of the backward processes. In particular, we rely on entropy flows, logarithmic Sobolev inequalities and reflection couplings, rigorously linking the ergodicity of the Langevin diffusion to the score matching gap problem.

AI.tldr: 本文对扩散模型中得分匹配差距（score matching gap）进行了理论分析，通过利用后向过程的收缩性质（如熵流、对数Sobolev不等式和反射耦合），针对KL散度、反向KL散度和Wasserstein距离三个指标提出了更紧的界，揭示了得分近似质量对低噪声尺度下差距的影响。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型训练和评估依赖ELBO，该界将KL散度与得分匹配损失联系起来，但两者之间存在得分匹配差距。现有理论表明该差距在最坏情况下紧致，但无法一般性地描述样本质量，因此需要更精细的理论分析来理解这一差距。
AI.method: 利用后向过程的收缩性质，包括熵流、对数Sobolev不等式和反射耦合，将Langevin扩散的遍历性与得分匹配差距问题严格联系起来，从而推导出KL散度、反向KL散度和Wasserstein距离三个指标上的更紧界。
AI.result: 建立了三个指标下更紧的得分匹配差距理论界，发现得分近似的质量对低噪声尺度下缩小差距尤为关键。
AI.conclusion: 得分估计器的正则性对缩小得分匹配差距有重要影响，特别是在低噪声尺度下；后向过程的收缩性质是推导紧致理论界的关键工具。

title: Direct Data Driven Natural Gradient Descent for Control
summary: This paper introduces a novel direct data-driven control framework based on Natural Gradient Descent (NGD) to design interpretable and robust closed-loop policies without requiring explicit model identification. We propose two data-driven NGD formulations that incorporate the closed-loop covariance matrix through the Fisher Information Matrix (FIM), allowing gradient updates to be preconditioned according to the system's intrinsic uncertainty. Leveraging two distinct data-based parameterizations of the closed-loop system, our method enables stability-guaranteed policy synthesis directly from data. We provide theoretical guarantees for contraction and convergence using semidefinite programs (SDPs) and validate our framework in both simulations and on hardware on a ROSbot XL platform. The results demonstrate intuitive features compared to linear-quadratic regulator (LQR) and standard data-driven baselines, particularly in terms of convergence speed, robustness, and control interpretability. This work bridges the gap between trajectory-oriented natural gradient methods and practical data-driven control design.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于自然梯度下降（NGD）的直接数据驱动控制框架，利用Fisher信息矩阵预条件梯度更新，实现无需模型辨识的稳定闭环策略设计，在仿真和ROSbot XL硬件平台上验证了相比LQR等基线方法在收敛速度、鲁棒性和可解释性上的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动控制方法通常需要显式的系统辨识或缺乏对闭环系统内在不确定性的考虑，且策略的可解释性和鲁棒性不足。本文旨在设计一种无需模型辨识、能利用系统固有不确定性信息、同时保证稳定性和可解释性的直接数据驱动控制方法。
AI.method: 基于自然梯度下降（NGD）框架，通过Fisher信息矩阵（FIM）引入闭环协方差矩阵作为预条件器，提出了两种数据驱动的NGD公式；利用两种不同的闭环系统数据参数化方法，结合半定规划（SDP）提供收缩和收敛的理论保证，实现直接从数据合成具有稳定性保证的策略。
AI.result: 在仿真和ROSbot XL硬件平台上进行验证，与线性二次型调节器（LQR）及标准数据驱动基线方法相比，所提方法在收敛速度、鲁棒性和控制可解释性方面展现出更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功弥合了面向轨迹的自然梯度方法与实际数据驱动控制设计之间的差距，为构建兼具理论保证与实用性能的智能控制策略提供了新范式。

title: Optimal mean-time path planning for unmanned underwater vehicles: a Hamilton-Jacobi approach
summary: Unmanned underwater vehicles (UUV) integrate ocean forecasts with path planning algorithms in order to identify energy- or time-minimizing paths that enable mission completion. Typically, a well-defined deterministic ocean forecast is assumed to be available for path planning; however, in practice, different ocean forecasts can disagree. In this paper, we extend previous work on deterministic optimal path planning to identify optimal mean-time paths when presented with an ensemble of possible ocean forecasts. In particular, we formulate a system of time-independent Hamilton-Jacobi partial differential equations that incorporates forecast uncertainty and yields the optimal mean reachability travel time and the necessary controls to find the associated optimal path. An efficient numerical solution of this system of PDEs is obtained through an extension of the Fast Sweeping Method; verification and benchmarking results are provided. Additional numerical examples illustrate the impact uncertainty can have on the optimal path; in particular, these results demonstrate that the vehicle's optimal path can deviate significantly from the deterministic optimal paths associated with the individual ensemble members.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在多个可能海洋预报（集合预报）存在不确定性的情况下，为无人水下航行器（UUV）规划最优平均时间路径的方法。通过构建一组与时间无关的Hamilton-Jacobi偏微分方程，并采用快速扫描法的高效数值求解，实现了在预报不确定性下的路径规划。数值实验表明，考虑不确定性后的最优路径与基于单个确定性预报的最优路径有显著差异。
AI.motivation: 传统UUV路径规划假设存在一个确定的海洋预报，但实际中不同预报模型结果可能相互矛盾。为克服这一局限，需将预报不确定性纳入路径规划框架。
AI.method: 将问题建模为一组时间无关的Hamilton-Jacobi偏微分方程系统，融合预报集合中的不确定性；通过扩展快速扫描法（Fast Sweeping Method）实现高效数值求解，得到最优平均可达时间及对应的最优控制律。
AI.result: 验证与基准测试结果证明了方法的有效性；数值示例表明，考虑预报不确定性后的最优路径与各确定性集合成员对应的最优路径存在显著偏离，说明不确定性对路径规划有实质性影响。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一种在海洋预报存在多源不确定性时，为UUV规划稳健最优路径的理论框架与高效数值方法，拓展了传统确定性路径规划的适用范围。

title: Hybrid Algorithmic Governance in U.S. Welfare Administration: State- and County-Level AI as a Case of Support-Control Convergence
summary: This article examines the institutional conditions under which artificial intelligence systems in U.S. welfare administration come to operate as instruments of support or as instruments of control. Rather than asking what welfare algorithms "really" are (tools of proactive assistance or infrastructures of surveillance) the article starts from the premise that support and control are co-present within the same system, while their relative balance shifts over time. This movement is conceptualized through the notion of support-control convergence and the model of an institutional ratchet. Routine budgetary and political pressures make control-oriented effects easily measurable and politically capitalizable, whereas a return toward support requires external intervention of disproportionate force, such as judicial compulsion, legislative prohibition, or public scandal. Empirically, the article draws on process tracing of six state- and county-level cases: NYSDOL fraud detection, Michigan MiDAS, Illinois Medicaid managed care, LA County homelessness prevention, the Allegheny Family Screening Tool, and Washington Foster Care. The findings show that the system's orientation is shaped by institutional design, with the decisive parameter being the side on which the costs of algorithmic error are placed. Drift toward control is routine, while reversal is exceptional and costly. In the MiDAS case, activation required a single administrative decision, whereas reversal took nine years and a $20 million settlement; even then, the system did not return to a support-oriented configuration.

AI.tldr: 本文研究美国福利行政中AI系统如何在支持与控制之间摇摆，发现制度压力使系统天然偏向控制，而回归支持需要极端外部干预。核心参数是算法错误成本由谁承担。
AI.motivation: 作者不追问AI"本质上"是支持工具还是监控基础设施，而是承认二者共存且动态变化，旨在揭示这种平衡偏移的制度条件与机制。
AI.method: 通过过程追踪法分析六个州/县级案例（NYSDOL欺诈检测、Michigan MiDAS、Illinois Medicaid managed care、LA County无家可归预防、Allegheny家庭筛查工具、Washington Foster Care），比较支持与控制之间的制度性转向路径。
AI.result: 系统偏向控制是惯例性的、可测量的且具有政治资本化潜力，而回归支持则需要司法强制、立法禁令或公共丑闻等不成比例的外部力量。关键参数是算法错误成本落在哪一方——落在受助者身上则系统趋向控制，落在政府身上则需要强力干预才能反转。MiDAS案例中激活只需一次行政决策，反转却耗时9年并花费2000万美元和解金，且最终仍未完全回归支持导向。
AI.conclusion: 制度设计中的"单向棘轮"机制使得福利AI系统一旦偏向控制就难以回头，揭示了技术治理中权力不对称的结构性根源。

title: Induction Heads Interpolate N-Grams
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICML 2026. OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=BSY7jhBxM1
summary: Induction heads are attention circuits believed to underlie in-context learning in transformers, yet a precise characterization of the estimators they implement remains elusive. We study transformers trained on order-$k$ Markov chains and identify two complementary smoothing mechanisms. First, at finite attention-weight scale, the circuit implements a soft context-matching estimator: it aggregates contributions from exact and partial context matches, weighted exponentially by their overlap, and induces a data-dependent interpolation across context orders analogous to Jelinek-Mercer smoothing. Second, a beginning-of-sequence (BOS) token induces additive pseudo-counts, recovering Dirichlet-style smoothing. We construct a disentangled transformer implementing both mechanisms and show that trained transformers recover the predicted attention patterns. Across settings where pseudo-count smoothing is optimal or lower-order contexts provide structured evidence, trained transformers match or outperform classical count-based baselines. Our results bridge mechanistic interpretability of induction heads with classical statistical smoothing, revealing that transformers learn to regularize in-context estimation rather than simply count.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Transformer中的induction heads在上下文学习中实现的两种平滑机制：软上下文匹配（类似Jelinek-Mercer平滑）和BOS token引入的伪计数（类似Dirichlet平滑），证明Transformer学会正则化上下文估计而非简单计数。
AI.motivation: 虽然induction heads被认为是在上下文中学习的关键注意力回路，但对其实现的统计估计器的精确描述尚不清楚。
AI.method: 在order-k马尔可夫链上训练Transformer，识别两种平滑机制：1）有限注意力权重下的软上下文匹配估计；2）BOS token引入的伪计数。构建了解耦的Transformer验证这两种机制。
AI.result: 训练好的Transformer恢复了预测的注意力模式，在伪计数平滑最优或低级上下文提供结构化证据的情况下，匹配或超越经典基于计数的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: bridges mechanistic interpretability of induction heads with classical statistical smoothing, revealing that transformers learn to regularize in-context estimation rather than simply count.

title: Reinforcement Learning for Evidence-Seeking Diagnostic Reasoning with Large Language Models
summary: Recent reasoning-centric Large Language Models (LLMs) have made significant strides, yet they predominantly operate on a passive-inference pattern that assumes complete information. In contrast, real-world clinical intelligence is inherently an iterative investigative process requiring strategic evidence acquisition. To bridge this gap, we formalize medical diagnosis as an Iterative Evidence-Seeking Task. We leverage Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) to elicit intrinsic reasoning within a closed-loop environment, guided by a novel suite of rewards that enforce diagnostic precision and examination consistency. To facilitate this, we introduce the Retrieval-Augmented Generation-based Examination Simulator (RAGES), a high-fidelity clinical oracle that provides realistic, knowledge-grounded follow-up evidence. Empirical results across diverse datasets demonstrate that our framework enables LLMs to transition from passive responders to autonomous assistants. Notably, our model demonstrates comparable performance to larger and reasoning-enhanced baselines, while RAGES proves superior to vanilla LLMs in generating biologically plausible clinical feedback.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将医学诊断形式化为迭代式证据寻求任务，利用基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）和检索增强生成的检查模拟器（RAGES），使LLM从被动推理转变为主动的自主诊断助手，在多个数据集上取得了与更强基线相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有推理型LLM主要遵循被动推理模式，假设信息完备，但真实临床诊断是一个需要策略性获取证据的迭代调查过程，二者存在显著差距。
AI.method: 将医学诊断形式化为迭代证据寻求任务；采用基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）在闭环环境中激发内在推理；引入检索增强生成的检查模拟器（RAGES）作为高保真临床信息源，提供真实的知识驱动的后续证据。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，该框架使LLM从被动响应者转变为自主助手，性能可媲美更大规模的模型和强化推理的基线；RAGES在生成生物合理临床反馈方面优于普通LLM。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习与检索增强模拟环境的结合能有效激发LLM的主动诊断能力，为构建真正的临床决策智能体提供了可行路径。

title: Alignment-Guided Largest Table Overlap Size Estimation
summary: Fast estimation of the size of the largest overlap between tables enables blocking and query-by-table retrieval in large table repositories. The first and the state-of-the-art estimator Armadillo improves efficiency by embedding each table independently and approximating overlap ratio via embedding similarity. However, accurate estimation in heterogeneous repositories remains limited by three challenges: (C1) overlap depends on row-column structure, i.e., each matched cell must preserve both its row and column membership under a joint alignment of the two tables, but existing encodings leave this structure to be inferred indirectly; (C2) independent encoding provides no explicit channel for inter-table alignment signals, biasing prediction toward global similarity; (C3) naive value encodings overfit to corpus-specific distributions, causing cross-domain degradation. Hence, we propose ALORE, a scalable and domain-robust overlap ratio estimator built on three principles: (P1) explicitly represent row-column structure; (P2) expose inter-table alignment signals during training without expensive alignment search; (P3) reduce sensitivity to corpus-specific value distributions. ALORE instantiates these principles with a Two-View Row-Column Hypergraph encoder, alignment-guided objectives with inexpensive interaction signals, and a domain-robust value mapping. Experiments on multiple datasets spanning diverse domains and scales, including a large real-world corpus beyond prior benchmarks, show that ALORE outperforms the state of the art. ALORE reduces MAE by up to 55% overall and 69% in zero-shot transfer, while achieving up to 89x speedup. We further validate its effectiveness for query-by-table retrieval.

AI.tldr: 提出ALORE，一种可扩展且领域鲁棒的表重叠比例估计器，通过双视图行-列超图编码、对齐引导目标和领域鲁棒值映射，在多个数据集上相比SOTA降低MAE最高55%，零样本迁移降低69%，并实现最高89倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有最先进的表重叠估计方法Armadillo在异构表库中面临三个挑战：(C1)重叠依赖于行列结构，但现有编码只能间接推断；(C2)独立编码缺乏表间对齐信号，导致预测偏向全局相似性；(C3)朴素的值编码过拟合语料分布，跨领域性能下降。
AI.method: 提出ALORE，基于三个原则：(P1)显式表示行列结构——双视图行-列超图编码器；(P2)在训练中暴露表间对齐信号，无需昂贵的对齐搜索——对齐引导目标；(P3)减少对语料特定值分布的敏感度——领域鲁棒值映射。
AI.result: 在多个跨领域和规模的数据集上，ALORE整体MAE降低最高55%，零样本迁移降低69%，速度提升最高89倍，并在查询-按表检索任务中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: ALORE通过显式建模行列结构、引入对齐信号和领域鲁棒映射，显著提升了表重叠估计的准确性和效率，尤其在异构和跨领域场景中表现突出。

title: Causal ASCEND: Scalable Two-tier Causal Discovery on High Dimensional Multi-omics Data
comment: Main material: 8 pages + supplementary material. 16 pages in all
summary: Biological systems exhibit a hierarchical structure, characterised by directed flow from upstream regulators to downstream effects. Although this ordering provides a natural scaffold for causal inference, most causal discovery and GRN methods either ignore the tiered organisation or condition on all upstream variables, which becomes infeasible for high-dimensional omics data.
