AI.method: 提出两种随机化算法：1) 第一种算法在$\tilde{O}(γ^{-2/3}\, \operatorname{nnz}(Φ) + γ^{-2(ω+1)/3})$串行时间和$\tilde{O}(γ^{-2/3})$并行深度内解决问题；2) 第二种算法串行时间更快（$\tilde{O}(γ^{-2/3}\, \operatorname{nnz}(Φ) + γ^{-2})$），但并行深度稍差（$\tilde{O}(γ^{-4/3})$）。两种算法均只使用$\tilde{O}(γ^{-2/3})$次矩阵-向量查询。
AI.result: 两种随机化算法均达到了近最优的$\tilde{O}(γ^{-2/3})$矩阵-向量查询复杂度，同时取得了相比确定性算法更优的串行运行时间和并行深度，以引入随机性为代价实现了效率提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过随机化方法，本文在保持近最优查询复杂度的前提下，显著改进了最大间隔超平面计算问题的串行和并行效率，为大规模分类问题提供了更实用的算法方案。

title: Progressive Disclosure for LLM-Maintained Wiki Knowledge Bases: a Preregistered Ablation
comment: 14 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables. Preregistered on OSF (https://osf.io/feka7, DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/FEKA7). Materials-availability and deviations described in the paper
summary:
LLM agents increasingly answer questions against knowledge bases they help maintain. A common intuition holds that progressive disclosure, a compact catalog plus a one-line summary per page so the agent loads only what it needs, should make this cheaper than consulting a large monolithic index. We test that on a real 709-page markdown wiki maintained by an LLM. We retrofit it for progressive disclosure and run a preregistered ablation in which four versions of the corpus differ only in how the agent reaches the content: page bodies are byte-identical across arms, frozen as immutable git tags, so any measured difference is due to access structure alone. We cross the arms with three access conditions (a protocol-constrained agent, a free self-routing agent, and a catalog-preload regime) and grade answers blind against verified gold references with a cross-family judge.
  A pilot upended the premise: a capable tool-using agent never loads the index, inferring a page's path from the question and reading it directly, so the specific saving the retrofit targets does not materialize. We therefore made answer quality primary and cost secondary. Quality is non-inferior (the retrieval arm matches the index baseline within the preregistered margin) while cost falls in every regime, from about a third for a self-routing agent to well over half under catalog-preload, all confidence intervals excluding zero. The saving comes not from avoiding the index load but from more targeted access: the retrieval arm cites fewer pages and takes fewer tool turns. The study doubles as a case study in evaluation validity, applying threat-to-validity discipline to the tooling that produced it.

AI.tldr: 本文测试了一个直觉：LLM代理使用渐进式披露（精简目录+每页单行摘要）比使用大型索引更便宜。在709页的Markdown维基上实验发现，代理不会加载索引而是直接从问题推断路径；渐进式披露虽未实现预期节省，但在所有条件下成本均显著降低（约1/3到超过1/2），节省来源于更精准的访问而非避免索引加载。
AI.motivation: 验证"渐进式披露比大型索引更便宜"这一常见直觉是否成立，并探究其真正的成本节省来源。
AI.method: 在709页Markdown维基上，将语料库分为四个版本（仅访问结构不同，页面内容完全一致），交叉三种访问条件（协议约束代理、自由自路由代理、目录预加载模式），使用跨族裁判盲评已验证的金标准参考答案。
AI.result: 1) 能力强的工具使用代理从不加载索引，直接从问题推断页面路径，因此预期的节省未实现；2) 答案质量非劣效；3) 所有条件下成本均显著下降（自我路由代理约1/3，目录预加载超过1/2）；4) 节省来源于更精准的访问（引用更少页面，使用更少工具调用）。
AI.conclusion: 渐进式披露的节省并非来自避免加载索引，而是来自更精准的访问模式；同时本文也成为评估有效性的案例研究。

title: Missingness as Signal: Channel-Independent Spectrogram Learning for Clinical Time Series Prediction
summary: Clinical time series prediction in intensive care units remains challenging due to heterogeneous physiological variables and informative missingness. The presence or absence of a measurement can reflect clinical decisions and patient severity, and thus missingness can serve as a predictive signal rather than a simple data artifact. This work presents CISM, a Channel-Independent Spectrogram framework with a Missingness stream for clinical multivariate time series prediction. CISM converts each clinical variable into a variable-wise time-frequency spectrogram, preserves variable identity through variable-aligned encoding, and aligns an explicit missingness stream with the spectrogram representation. Experiments on an in-hospital mortality task derived from MIMIC-IV show that CISM achieves the highest mean AUROC (0.7225), AUPRC (0.3308), and F1 (0.3808) among the compared time series, missingness-aware, vision, and time-frequency baselines. Ablation studies further show that observation patterns provide a meaningful informative signal. Pixel-level mask injection improves performance over plain spectrogram inputs and recovers much of this predictive value. The aligned missingness stream contributes a further, complementary gain in both AUROC and AUPRC. These results highlight the importance of modeling observation patterns as structured signals in clinical time series prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CISM框架，通过将临床变量转化为独立通道的时频谱图并结合显式缺失流，在MIMIC-IV的住院死亡率预测任务中取得了最优性能，表明缺失模式可作为结构化预测信号。
AI.motivation: 临床时间序列中生理变量异质性强且缺失具有信息性——测量是否被记录反映了临床决策与患者严重程度，传统方法未充分利用缺失模式作为预测信号。
AI.method: CISM将每个临床变量转换为变量特有的时频谱图（Channel-Independent），通过变量对齐编码保留身份信息，并将显式的缺失流与谱图表示对齐融合。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV住院死亡率任务上，CISM的AUROC（0.7225）、AUPRC（0.3308）和F1（0.3808）均优于时间序列、缺失感知、视觉和时频基线。消融实验表明缺失模式提供有效信号，像素级掩码注入和缺失流对齐均带来互补性提升。
AI.conclusion: 观测模式（缺失结构）应被建模为结构化信号，而非简单数据伪影，在临床时间序列预测中具有重要价值。

title: MentalThink: Shaping Thoughts in Mental SVG World
summary: We introduce MentalThink, a visual-symbolic reasoning paradigm that equips Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) with an executable mechanism for "mental" visualization. The core of MentalThink is a think-with-SVG pipeline, where the model learns to generate, render, and interpret scalable vector graphics (SVG) code as an intermediate visual representation for multi-turn reasoning. By creating structured vector sketches, the model can externalize spatial hypotheses, inspect them through deterministic rendering, and reason within a constrained geometric space, effectively mimicking the human process of mental imagery. We instantiate this paradigm through a two-stage training framework, combining Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for SVG syntactic alignment with multi-turn Reinforcement Learning (RL) to encourage iterative inspection, revision, and refinement of intermediate visual hypotheses. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that MentalThink achieves superior performance on spatial understanding and reasoning benchmarks (e.g., 55.1% on VSIBench, 76.0% on MindCube), showing that executable vector graphics provide a verifiable visual workspace for dynamic perspective taking, visual reflection, and compositional scene construction.

AI.tldr: MentalThink 提出了一种视觉-符号推理范式，让多模态大模型通过生成和操作SVG代码实现“心理”可视化，在空间推理任务上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在处理需要动态空间推理、视觉想象和多步反思的任务时表现不足，缺乏类似人类心理意象的外化与操作机制。
AI.method: 提出think-with-SVG流水线，模型学习生成、渲染和解释SVG代码作为中间视觉表示；采用两阶段训练：SFT对齐SVG语法 + 多轮RL鼓励迭代检查、修正和优化中间视觉假设。
AI.result: VSIBench 55.1%, MindCube 76.0% 等空间理解与推理基准上达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 可执行的矢量图形为动态视角转换、视觉反思和组合场景构建提供了可验证的视觉工作空间，有效提升了MLLM的空间推理能力。

title: Learning from Lost Provenance: Multiple Instance Learning for Cancer Registry Tumor Group Classification
summary: Modernizing cancer registries with deep learning is opening new opportunities to automate labor-intensive tasks such as the coding of pathology reports. However, progress is constrained by the scarcity of report-level human-annotated training data. Cancer registries generate substantial volumes of expert-assigned labels as a routine product of their operations, but these exist at the patient level and are not linked to the individual pathology reports that informed them, limiting their direct use for training models. We develop an efficient framework for training deep learning classifiers by leveraging these operationally-generated labels without requiring per-report human annotation, demonstrated for tumor group classification at the BC Cancer Registry. We use Attention-Based Multiple Instance Learning (ABMIL) to recover the lost link between patient-level labels and the reports that informed them, leveraging the attention the model places on each report to distil a large, noisily-labeled corpus into a compact, high-quality per-report training dataset. A classifier fine-tuned on a distilled dataset achieved a macro F1 of 0.83, outperforming established baselines across most tumor groups. By turning routine operational labels into high-quality training data without additional annotation or large-scale computing infrastructure, ABMIL offers a practical and accessible route to automating cancer registry workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用注意力机制的多实例学习（ABMIL）框架，在无需人工逐份标注病理报告的情况下，将癌症登记处产生的患者级常规标签转化为高质量的训练数据，成功实现了肿瘤分组自动分类（macro F1=0.83），为癌症登记流程自动化提供了一条实用且低成本的路径。
AI.motivation: 癌症登记处依赖深度学习自动化病理报告编码，但缺乏报告级别的人工标注数据；而登记处虽拥有大量专家标注的患者级标签，却无法直接用于训练模型，因为标签未与具体病理报告关联。因此，需要一种方法在不增加人工标注负担的前提下，利用现有患者级标签进行模型训练。
AI.method: 采用基于注意力的多实例学习（ABMIL）框架，将每个患者的多个病理报告视为一个包（bag），患者级标签作为包标签。模型通过注意力机制自动学习每个报告对最终分类的贡献权重，从而恢复患者级标签与具体报告之间的关联。进一步利用注意力分数从大量带噪标签数据中蒸馏出高质量的报告级训练子集，用于微调分类器。
AI.result: 在不列颠哥伦比亚癌症登记处（BC Cancer Registry）的肿瘤分组分类任务中，基于蒸馏数据集微调的分类器取得了0.83的宏平均F1分数，在大多数肿瘤分组上优于现有的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ABMIL能够将常规操作产生的患者级标签转化为高质量的训练数据，无需额外的人工标注或大规模计算基础设施，为自动化癌症登记工作流提供了一条实用且可及的路径。

title: CuBAS: Information Geometric Curvature-Based Adaptive Sampling for Supervised Classification
summary: The informativeness of a training set is as consequential as its size, yet most sampling strategies remain agnostic to the intrinsic geometry of the data distribution. We introduce CuBAS (Curvature-Based Adaptive Sampling), an information-geometric framework for adaptive data selection in supervised classification, grounded in the q-state Potts Markov random field (MRF) model. The central insight is that a labeled dataset can be viewed as a statistical manifold, on which local curvature, estimated via the ratio of second to first-order observed Fisher information, faithfully encodes the geometric complexity of the data distribution. We construct a k-nearest-neighbor graph over the labeled data and derive a closed-form curvature score at each vertex from the Potts sufficient statistics. This curvature signal partitions the graph into two complementary regimes: low-curvature regions, corresponding to smooth, homogeneous clusters, and high-curvature regions, concentrated around decision boundaries that are disproportionately informative for classification. By selecting nodes from both regimes, CuBAS constructs compact yet maximally informative training subsets. Empirical evaluation across more than 60 benchmark datasets demonstrates consistent and statistically significant improvements over random sampling and uncertainty-based baselines, across a wide range of labeling budgets and classifier architectures. CuBAS is computationally efficient (linear in the number of k-NN graph edges), theoretically grounded in the differential geometry of statistical manifolds, and interpretable in terms of the local shape operator of the data manifold.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CuBAS（基于曲率的自适应采样框架），通过统计流形上的局部曲率来度量数据几何复杂度，从决策边界和平坦区域选择最具信息量的样本，在60+数据集上显著优于随机采样和不确定性基线。
AI.motivation: 当前采样策略大多忽略数据分布的内在几何结构，而训练集的信息量与其规模同等重要，因此需要一种能捕捉数据几何特征的自适应采样方法。
AI.method: 基于q态Potts马尔可夫随机场模型，将标注数据集视为统计流形；通过观测Fisher信息的二阶与一阶比率估计局部曲率；构建k近邻图并推导出封闭形式的曲率分数，将图划分为低曲率（均匀聚类）和高曲率（决策边界）两个互补区域，从两个区域选样构建紧凑子集。
AI.result: 在超过60个基准数据集上，CuBAS在不同标注预算和分类器架构下，一致且显著优于随机采样和基于不确定性的基线方法，且计算效率高（线性于k近邻图边数）。
AI.conclusion: CuBAS在理论上基于统计流形的微分几何，具有可解释性（数据流形的局部形状算子），且计算高效，为自适应数据选择提供了新的几何视角。

title: Approximate Feedback Linearization for a Nonlinear Hyperbolic PDE Class -- Part II: Neural Operator
summary: Volterra series feedback linearizes a class of nonlinear hyperbolic PDEs but produces a controller that, even after truncation, demands solving a tower of plant-specific kernel PDEs and evaluating nested integrals. We prove the truncated controller is jointly Lipschitz in plant and state, and learn it as a single neural operator from plant nonlinearity and state to boundary control. Once trained, no kernel is ever solved again, for any plant in the trained class. The closed loop is practically stable in class-$\mathcal{KL}$ form, with a residual ball scaling linearly with training accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用神经算子学习Volterra级数反馈控制器，无需为每个新对象求解核函数，实现了对一类非线性双曲型PDE的线性化控制，并证明了闭环系统的实际稳定性。
AI.motivation: Volterra级数反馈能线性化非线性双曲型PDE，但传统方法即使截断后仍需求解大量依赖于被控对象的核函数PDE并计算嵌套积分，计算负担沉重，难以实际部署。
AI.method: 1. 证明截断后的控制器关于被控对象和状态联合Lipschitz连续；2. 将该控制器作为单个神经算子进行学习，输入为被控对象非线性项和系统状态，输出为边界控制量。训练完成后，对训练类别内的任何被控对象，不再需要重新求解核函数。
AI.result: 训练好的神经算子控制器可应用于训练类别内的任意被控对象，无需重新求解核函数。闭环系统具有类$\mathcal{KL}$形式的实际稳定性，且残差界与训练精度呈线性关系。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法成功将计算繁重的Volterra级数控制器离线训练为通用神经算子，既保留了理论上的线性化能力，又大幅降低了在线部署的计算代价，并给出了严格的稳定性保证。

title: Robust Receding Horizon Games with Additive Uncertainty
summary: We study a receding horizon game in which multiple agents drive linear systems subject to additive disturbances, private state and input constraints, and shared coupling constraints. We propose a robust game-theoretic control framework that combines tube-based constraint tightening with a finite-horizon generalized Nash equilibrium problem (GNEP), equipped with a discrete algebraic Riccati equation (DARE)-based terminal cost and a decoupled positively invariant terminal set. The framework guarantees recursive feasibility for every bounded disturbance realization. Exploiting the potential-game structure induced by tracking costs, we further establish asymptotic convergence of each agent's nominal state to a steady-state variational generalized Nash equilibrium (vGNE), and show that each agent's actual state converges to a neighborhood of the vGNE determined by the minimal robust positively invariant set.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多智能体线性系统在扰动、私有约束和耦合约束下的滚动时域博弈问题，提出了结合管道约束收紧与有限时域广义纳什均衡问题的鲁棒博弈控制框架，并证明了递归可行性和渐近收敛性。
AI.motivation: 现有博弈控制方法难以同时处理扰动、私有约束和耦合约束，需要一种保证递归可行性和收敛性的鲁棒博弈框架。
AI.method: 将管道模型预测控制（tube MPC）的约束收紧思想与有限时域广义纳什均衡问题（GNEP）结合，采用DARE-based终端代价和正不变终端集，利用势博弈结构进行分析。
AI.result: 证明了该框架对任意有界扰动具有递归可行性；名义状态渐近收敛到稳态变分广义纳什均衡（vGNE）；实际状态收敛到vGNE的邻域（由最小鲁棒正不变集界定）。
AI.conclusion: 该鲁棒博弈控制框架有效解决了多智能体系统在扰动下的安全与收敛问题，为分布式鲁棒控制提供了理论保障。

title: Beyond Independent Labels: Schwartz-Geometry Decoding for Human Value Detection
summary: Human value detection is commonly formulated as sentence-level multi-label classification over the 19 refined Schwartz values, typically predicted as independent labels. Schwartz theory, however, describes them as a circular motivational continuum, in which adjacent values are compatible and opposing values are in tension. We ask whether this structure can be operationalized as an explicit output-space geometry and used as a soft bias rather than a hard constraint. On a DeBERTa-v3-base classifier, we compare two ways of injecting it: training-time geometry-aware objectives and a post-hoc Schwartz-aware energy decoder that scores whole label sets jointly. Across five seeds, training-time geometry gives only limited gains-no larger for the true continuum than for a random ordering-whereas the decoder makes label sets more coherent with the continuum-on theory-aware coherence metrics we introduce-at no cost to Macro-F1 or Micro-F1 (held fixed by its selection rule). The gain is specific to the true Schwartz ordering: it does not appear for a random permutation or an empirical co-occurrence graph through the identical decoder. A bounded Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct diagnostic shows that supplying the continuum at inference shifts behavior but does not match supervised structured prediction. Theory-aware decoding thus offers a lightweight, controllable way to make value detection faithful to its label space.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在价值检测中注入Schwartz理论的结构（圆形动机连续体），发现后处理的Schwartz感知解码器比训练时的几何目标更有效，能使标签集更符合理论结构且不损失性能。
AI.motivation: 人类价值检测通常将19个Schwartz价值视为独立标签进行多标签分类，但Schwartz理论将这些价值描述为环形动机连续体（相邻价值兼容，对立价值冲突）。作者想探究能否将这种结构作为显式输出空间几何纳入模型，并以软偏置（而非硬约束）的形式使用。
AI.method: 在DeBERTa-v3-base分类器上比较两种注入方法：（1）训练时几何感知目标；（2）后处理的Schwartz感知能量解码器。并通过五个随机种子评估效果，同时引入理论感知的一致性度量指标。
AI.result: 训练时几何注入效果有限（与随机排序相比无显著提升），而Schwartz感知解码器在保持Macro-F1和Micro-F1不变的情况下，使标签集更符合理论连续体。该效果在真实Schwartz排序下成立，但在随机排列或经验共现图上不成立。
AI.conclusion: 理论感知的解码是一种轻量级、可控的方式，能让价值检测更忠实于标签空间结构。

title: A Precedent-Guided Co-Scientist for Side-Effect-Aware Drug Redesign
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on AI for Science
summary: We propose PRECEDE, a precedent-guided co-scientist for side-effect-aware drug redesign that revises a parent compound to mitigate a specified side effect while preserving therapeutic function. Rather than isolated molecular generation, PRECEDE frames redesign as evidence-grounded reasoning over drug--side-effect associations, biomedical knowledge graphs, and precedents of safety-driven optimization, coordinated by an LLM orchestrator with explicit policies and human-review checkpoints. We position PRECEDE as a human-supervised AI-for-science workflow in which hypotheses remain auditable, falsifiable, and bounded by prior pharmacology.

AI.tldr: PRECEDE是一个以先例指导的AI协同科学家系统，用于副作用感知的药物重新设计。它通过LLM协调器整合药物-副作用关联、生物医学知识图谱和安全优化先例，在保留治疗效果的同时减轻特定副作用，并保持人类监督下的可审计、可证伪工作流程。
AI.motivation: 现有药物重新设计方法大多进行孤立的分子生成，缺乏对药物-副作用关联、生物医学知识和安全优化先例的整合推理，难以在减轻副作用的同时保留治疗效果。
AI.method: 提出PRECEDE框架，包含：(1) 基于先例引导的推理机制；(2) 整合药物-副作用关联、生物医学知识图谱和安全优化先例的多源证据推理；(3) LLM协调器驱动，配备显式策略和人工审查检查点；(4) 人类监督的AI-for-science工作流，保证假设可审计、可证伪且受限于先验药理学。
AI.result: 提出了一个完整的框架设计，但摘要未提供具体的实验评估结果。
AI.conclusion: PRECEDE将药物重新设计定位为基于证据的推理过程，而非孤立的分子生成，通过人类监督确保科学可信度，是AI-for-science在药物安全优化中的有效范式。

title: Applying Answer Set Programming with Fuzzy Membership Functions: a Case Study
comment: A shorter version of this paper has been accepted at the 24th International Workshop on Nonmonotonic Reasoning (July 17-19, 2026, Lisbon, Portugal)
summary: Human reasoning often operates through qualitative concepts expressed by linguistic labels such as high, low, expensive, or cheap, whose interpretation depends on context and is usually vague, despite being rooted in numerical data. This paper explores a novel fuzzy-logic-based qualitative extension of Answer Set Programming (ASP) to bridge numerical information and qualitative reasoning. The underlying language, formally introduced in a separate work, provides a principled framework that avoids rigid thresholds and supports robust reasoning under vagueness. Focusing on a representative use case, we illustrate how the framework integrates numerically grounded inputs (such as outputs of machine learning models) with symbolic reasoning over qualitative labels. Key features, including learning-based membership functions and semantically enriched predicates, enable the combination of expert knowledge, contextual factors, and subjective interpretations within a unified declarative setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模糊逻辑的定性扩展回答集编程（ASP）框架，用于桥接数值信息与定性推理，通过学习型隶属函数和语义谓词实现数值数据与符号推理的统一。
AI.motivation: 人类推理常依赖语境相关且模糊的定性语言标签（如高、低、贵），但传统方法难以在数值数据与定性推理之间建立灵活的桥梁，缺乏处理模糊性和语境依赖性的原则性框架。
AI.method: 提出一种模糊逻辑扩展的ASP语言，利用学习型隶属函数将数值输入（如机器学习模型输出）映射为定性标签，并结合语义谓词将专家知识、语境因素和主观解释统一集成在声明性框架中。
AI.result: 通过代表性用例展示了该框架能有效整合数值基础输入与符号推理，支持在模糊性下进行稳健推理，避免了硬阈值的问题。
AI.conclusion: 该模糊逻辑扩展的ASP框架为数值信息与定性推理的融合提供了原则性且灵活的解决方案，在模糊环境下具有鲁棒性，并支持多种知识形式的统一集成。

title: Lacuna Inc. at SemEval-2026 Task 4: Structurally Gated State-Space Models for Disentangling Narrative Similarity
summary: In this paper, we present the Invariant-Variant Disentangled State-Space Model (IVD-SSM), our submission to SemEval-2026 Task 4 on Narrative Story Similarity and Narrative Representation Learning. Evaluating narrative similarity is a profound computational challenge that requires models to look past concrete, superficial elements such as specific names, actors, objects, or settings to isolate and compare abstract patterns of causality and plot progression. To model these extended causal chains without the quadratic bottlenecks of standard Transformers, we leverage a hybrid State-Space Model (Jamba-1.5-Mini). Building upon this backbone, we introduce the Structurally Gated Alignment (SGA) head, a novel, differentiable algorithmic architecture. The SGA head operates on two scales: a heavily strided Macro-path maps the coarse structural skeleton of a story, which then acts as a gating mechanism to filter a full-resolution Micro-path, actively suppressing semantic noise and superficial keyword overlaps. Evaluated on both pairwise comparative judgments (Track A) and dense representation learning (Track B), our approach demonstrates that explicitly disentangling structural invariants from lexical variants provides a robust, principled framework for deep narrative understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 IVD-SSM 模型，通过混合状态空间模型（Jamba-1.5-Mini）和 Structurally Gated Alignment (SGA) 头，将故事的结构不变性与表层词汇变体分离，用于叙事相似度评估与表征学习。
AI.motivation: 叙事相似度评估需要模型超越具体的名称、角色、对象等表层元素，去比较抽象的因果模式和情节推进结构，但标准 Transformer 存在二次复杂度瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用混合状态空间模型（Jamba-1.5-Mini）作为骨干网络，提出 Structurally Gated Alignment (SGA) 头：Macro-path 以大步长提取故事粗粒度结构骨架，作为门控机制过滤全分辨率 Micro-path 中的语义噪声和表层关键词重叠。
AI.result: 在 Track A（成对比较判断）和 Track B（密集表征学习）两项任务上进行了评估。
AI.conclusion: 显式解耦结构不变性与词汇变体为深层叙事理解提供了稳健且有原则的框架。

title: OpFlow: Learning Opportunity-Conditioned Choice Potentials for Robust OD Flow Prediction
summary: Origin-destination (OD) flow prediction is central to urban analytics, yet deep models trained on raw counts remain vulnerable to distribution shift. The core problem is that raw count supervision cannot distinguish transferable choice mechanisms from environment-specific shortcuts. Raw OD count mixes two objects: how much demand an origin produces and how that demand is allocated across destinations. We argue that the transferable object is the exposure-to-choice law that maps spatial conditions to relative destination preferences. We propose OpFlow, a mechanism-constrained framework that learns row-centered choice potentials and reconstructs flows by combining the induced allocation with a separately calibrated origin scale. Under distribution shift, spatial exposures and the induced allocations are allowed to vary; what transfers is the conditional map from exposure states to relative choice potentials. Theoretically, we characterize the identifiable row-centered potential and show that classical spatial interaction laws are restricted log-potential cases. Controlled synthetic shifts and a real-world experiment show OpFlow improves robustness under environment shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpFlow框架，通过分离OD流量中的出行生成量与目的地选择机制，学习可迁移的暴露-选择映射关系，有效提升了流量预测在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度OD预测模型在原始计数上训练，无法区分可迁移的选择机制与环境特定的捷径，导致分布偏移下性能下降。核心问题是原始OD计数混杂了出行产生量与目的地分配概率。
AI.method: 提出OpFlow机制约束框架：学习行中心化的选择势能（choice potentials），结合单独校准的起点规模重构流量。在分布偏移下，允许空间暴露和分配变化，迁移的是从暴露状态到相对选择势能的条件映射。
AI.result: 理论上刻画了可识别的行中心化势能，证明经典空间交互定律是受限的对数势能特例。合成偏移实验和真实实验均表明OpFlow提升了环境偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: OD预测中真正可迁移的是暴露-选择映射关系，而非原始计数模式。通过机制约束分离生成与分配，可显著提升模型的泛化能力。

title: An End-to-End Explainable AI Framework with Automated LLM-Based Natural Language Explanation Generation for Energy Systems
summary: Explainable AI (XAI) is important for deploying machine learning systems in domains where stakes are very high and where transparency, trust and accountability are critical. Although black box models like deep neural networks often perform with high efficiency, interpreting their decisions remains as a difficult task. This paper proposes a reusable end-to-end XAI framework that is the combination of prediction, explanation generation, evaluation and converting these explanations into natural language text of explanation which can be easily understood by the non-technical stakeholders as well. This framework initially trains deep neural network for both classification and regression tasks. Local and global explanations are generated using XAI algorithms, including Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Explanation (LIME) and SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) respectively. To evaluate these explanations, we use fidelity and stability metrics to know how accurately and consistently explanations reflect the model behavior. The generated explanation includes feature importance scores, prediction specific attributes, and then transformed into a structured input to the Large Language Model (LLM), which generates a natural language explanation through which everyone can understand the explanations generated by XAI algorithms. This framework is tested on power system fault dataset detection dataset and building energy labels dataset. For fault detection, the neural network model achieved 99% accuracy with ROC-AUC score of 1.00. For building energy prediction, model achieves R2 score of 0.67. These findings say that the proposed approach produces a stable and faithful explanations while improving the interpretability of black box model to everyone with the help of LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个端到端可解释AI框架，结合深度神经网络预测、LIME/SHAP解释生成、保真度/稳定性评估，并利用大语言模型将解释转化为自然语言文本，在电力系统故障检测和建筑能耗数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度神经网络等黑箱模型性能优异，但其决策难以被解释，在高风险领域（如电力系统、建筑能耗）中，透明度、信任和问责制至关重要，因此需要一种可被非技术利益相关者理解的解释框架。
AI.method: 提出一个四阶段框架：1）训练深度神经网络（分类/回归）；2）使用LIME（局部）和SHAP（全局）生成解释；3）用保真度（fidelity）和稳定性（stability）评估解释质量；4）将特征重要性等结构化信息输入大语言模型，生成自然语言解释。
AI.result: 在电力系统故障检测数据集上，模型准确率达99%，ROC-AUC为1.00；在建筑能耗标签数据集上，R²得分为0.67。生成的解释兼具保真度和稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够生成稳定且忠实的解释，并通过LLM将黑箱模型的决策转化为易于理解的自然语言，显著提升了可解释性和通用性。

title: Anytime Plug-and-Play Control with Contract-Based Distributed MPC
summary: A central challenge in many mobile multi-robot applications is that communication topologies are inherently time-varying. Agents may enter or exit the network and such changes cannot generally be restricted a priori. This work introduces a distributed multi-agent control algorithm based on local communication that supports anytime agent joining and leaving the communication network without centralized coordination. The method scales efficiently with the number of agents by relying on a distance-based neighbor definition and on contracts derived from predicted trajectories. The resulting contract constraints guarantee collision avoidance and constraint satisfaction. We validate the proposed method in an autonomous multi-agent driving scenario, demonstrating effective collision avoidance in high-speed, dynamic environments with agents moving in opposite directions, in both simulated and real-world experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局部通信的分布式多智能体控制算法，支持智能体随时加入或离开通信网络，无需集中协调，并通过距离邻居定义和轨迹预测合约保证避碰与约束满足，在高速动态多车场景中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 移动多机器人系统中通信拓扑随时间变化，智能体可能随时加入或退出网络，传统方法难以应对这种动态变化，因此需要一种无需集中协调、支持任意时刻加入/离开的分布式控制算法。
AI.method: 提出基于局部通信的分布式多智能体控制算法，采用距离邻居定义和预测轨迹合约约束，实现任意时刻智能体的加入与离开，通过合约约束保证避碰和约束满足。
AI.result: 在高速、动态的多智能体驾驶场景中，通过仿真和真实实验验证了算法在智能体反向行驶时仍能有效避碰。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效应对动态通信拓扑变化，支持智能体灵活加入/退出，具有良好的可扩展性和实际部署前景。

title: Rating the Pitch, Not the Product: User Evaluations of LLMs Reflect Expectations More Than Performance
summary: Imagine two users interact with the same LLM. One has been told it is the cutting-edge flagship model; the other, an older, weaker model. They walk away with markedly different ratings of its usefulness and intelligence, yet they used the same model. In a controlled study, 162 participants each used one of six LLMs from two families across three collaborative tasks, after first viewing a landing page that matched, overstated, or understated their model's true capability. This pre-interaction framing shifted user opinions and interaction behavior while task performance did not. Oversold users rated the model more favorably and used more directive prompting, while Undersold users wrote longer, more collaborative prompts. The quality of what users and the model produced together depended only on the model's true capability, not on what users were told. Participants' change in model impressions after use, measured across two impression measures, was not predicted by task performance ($β= -0.01$ and $0.11$, both n.s.), but by whether the model met users' expectations ($β= 0.47$ and $0.50$, both $p < .001$) and how confident they felt working with it ($β= 0.47$ and $0.36$, both $p < .001$). After interaction, users are still rating the pitch, not the product: user-elicited LLM evaluations, including the preference data driving public leaderboards, measure expectation management at least as much as the model itself.

AI.tldr: 用户在与LLM互动前被给予不同的能力描述（夸大、准确或低估），结果发现这种框架显著影响用户对模型的评分和交互行为（如提示风格），但不影响实际任务表现。用户的印象变化主要取决于期望是否被满足和自信程度，而非任务表现。研究质疑了现有用户评价数据（如排行榜偏好）的有效性，认为其更多反映期望管理而非模型真实能力。
AI.motivation: 探究用户在与LLM交互前获得的框架信息（即对模型能力的描述）是否以及如何影响他们对模型的感知、交互行为，以及这些因素与任务表现之间的关系。挑战当前依赖用户评价（如偏好数据）来评估模型能力的做法。
AI.method: 控制实验：162名参与者使用来自两个家族的6种LLM完成三项协作任务。参与者在交互前看到与模型真实能力匹配、夸大或低估的描述页面。测量用户的评分、交互行为（提示长度、风格）、任务表现、印象变化，并使用回归分析检验预测因素。
AI.result: 1) 被"夸大"描述的用户给出了更高的评分，并更多使用指令性提示；被"低估"的用户写出更长、更协作的提示。2) 任务表现仅取决于模型的真实能力，不受框架影响。3) 用户印象变化不受任务表现预测（β=-0.01和0.11，均不显著），而受期望是否被满足（β=0.47和0.50，p<.001）和自信程度（β=0.47和0.36，p<.001）显著预测。
AI.conclusion: 交互后用户评价反映的是"期望管理"而非模型真实能力。当前依赖用户偏好数据的模型评估方法（如公共排行榜）存在根本性问题，因为用户评价至少与模型本身无关。建议重新审视LLM评估方式。

title: Individual Parameters in Weight-Sparse Transformers Appear Interpretable
summary: A central goal of mechanistic interpretability is to understand how neural networks work and what each individual component does. Dominant circuit-finding approaches focus on a specific behavior and reverse-engineer the role of components on the associated sub-distribution. However, past work has shown that components can have different functions that are active on different subsets of the input distribution. In this work we ask whether a single weight can be understood globally across the full training distribution by characterizing when it matters (the inputs on which ablating it changes the model's predictions). We introduce an automated LLM pipeline that writes a short, human-readable description of when a weight matters and verifies it on held-out text, crediting a weight only if its description generalizes. Across two sparse and two dense transformers, the fraction of weights that are interpretable (in this sense) is higher in sparse transformers than in dense ones, a gap that widens once unreliable descriptions are discarded. Our results show that a meaningful fraction of a sparse transformer model's weights can be interpreted: 12 to 31% of weights have a single short description that identifies what the weight is used for.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动化LLM流水线方法，通过分析权重在哪些输入上被消融后会改变模型预测，来全局理解神经网络单个权重的功能。研究发现稀疏Transformer中可解释权重的比例（12-31%）高于稠密Transformer，且该差距在丢弃不可靠描述后进一步扩大。
AI.motivation: 现有机械可解释性方法仅关注特定行为下电路的反向工程，忽略了组件在不同输入子集上可能具有不同功能。作者希望从全局视角理解单个权重在整个训练分布上的作用。
AI.method: 开发自动化LLM流水线：自动生成关于权重何时起作用的简短人类可读描述，并在留出文本上验证该描述是否泛化，仅当描述具有泛化能力时才认定该权重可解释。
AI.result: 在两种稀疏和两种稠密Transformer上实验，稀疏Transformer中12-31%的权重可通过单一简短描述被解释，比例高于稠密Transformer，且该差距在丢弃不可靠描述后进一步拉大。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏Transformer中有相当比例的权重可以被全局解释，验证了通过自动化方法理解单个权重全局功能的可行性。

title: How to Avoid Debate: Scalable AI Safety via Doubly-Efficient Interactive Proofs
summary:
As AI models continue to develop powerful capabilities, it becomes critical that we are able to verify that their output is aligned with our intentions. A recent line of work focuses on verification via debate, a model of interactive proofs where two competing powerful provers, or AI models, debate each other to convince a weak verifier, or a human, of the correctness of their claim. However, debate assumes that the two AI models possess equal abilities and that one of them is truthful, which may not be realistic.
  In this work, we show \emph{how to avoid debate}: we initiate the study of \emph{single-prover} interactive proofs for AI safety. Prior results in single-prover interactive proofs do not immediately carry over to the AI safety setting: for example, they do not work when the computation has access to an oracle, such as to human judgment or an external database such as the web. We present doubly-efficient single-prover interactive proofs and arguments for oracle-aided computations (also known as relativizing proofs), in the settings where (1) the computation is robust, in the sense that the output does not change if at most a small fraction of the answers to oracle queries are incorrect, or (2) the oracle is a low-degree polynomial. These results suggest that interactive verification is possible even without debate, under structured or noise-tolerant oracle access.

AI.tldr: 本文研究无需辩论的AI安全验证方法，提出了针对oracle辅助计算的单证明者交互式证明系统，在计算具有鲁棒性或oracle为低阶多项式的情况下实现高效验证。
AI.motivation: 传统辩论式验证假设两个AI模型能力相当且其中一方诚实，这在实际中不现实。因此需要探索单证明者交互式证明在AI安全中的应用。
AI.method: 提出面向oracle辅助计算的双高效单证明者交互式证明与论证方案，分别处理两类场景：(1)计算具有鲁棒性（少量oracle回答错误不影响输出）；(2)oracle为低阶多项式。
AI.result: 在计算鲁棒或oracle为低阶多项式的条件下，无需辩论即可实现交互式验证，且验证过程高效。
AI.conclusion: 在结构化或抗噪声的oracle访问场景下，单证明者交互式验证是可行的，为AI安全提供了一条无需辩论的验证路径。

title: Reading Between the Dots: Decoding Hidden Computation across Filler Tokens
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 Mech Interp Workshop, 10 main paper pages, 20 appendix pages
summary: Frontier LLMs can perform multi-step reasoning over content-free filler tokens like dots or counting sequences, producing correct answers with no visible chain-of-thought (CoT). This is a limit case for behavioral oversight, where surface tokens carry no information about the underlying reasoning. But hidden from the output is not the same as hidden from us. On four task families (fact retrieval, parallel numeric composition, string manipulation, and in-context computation), two open-weights frontier models (DeepSeek V3, Kimi K2) compute over filler tokens in a structured, legible way: attention routes the question through the filler region to the answer, logit-lens readouts show retrieved facts emerging early and their composition crystallizing in late layers, and KV-cache transplants at filler positions causally swap outputs between examples. We introduce an unsupervised decoding pipeline that takes only hidden states as input and recovers intermediate values with 80-95% accuracy (best LLM judge) across both models and all four tasks, without ground-truth labels or training. Hidden computation that defeats behavioral CoT monitoring is, on these tasks, directly readable from the residual stream, suggesting monitorability is a property of the model's full computational trace, not just its surface tokens.

AI.tldr: 即使像DeepSeek V3和Kimi K2这样的前沿LLM在填充词元（如点号或计数序列）上进行多步推理而不产生可见的思维链，其隐藏状态仍然可以结构化地读取中间推理结果。本文提出一种无监督解码方法，仅凭隐藏状态即可80-95%准确恢复中间值，表明模型的计算轨迹本身是可监控的。
AI.motivation: 前沿LLM能够在无可见思维链（CoT）的输出情况下，通过填充词元进行多步推理，这给行为监控带来了挑战——输出词元不携带任何推理信息。作者想探究这种"隐藏"计算是否真的无法被监控。
AI.method: 在四类任务（事实检索、并行数值组合、字符串操作、上下文计算）上，使用两个开源前沿模型（DeepSeek V3、Kimi K2）。通过注意力路由分析、logit透镜读取、KV缓存移植等机制分析方法，以及提出一种仅利用隐藏状态的无监督解码流水线。
AI.result: 模型在填充词元上的计算是结构化和可读的：注意力将问题通过填充区域路由到答案；logit透镜显示检索的事实早期出现并在深层结晶；KV缓存移植可以因果性地交换输出。无监督解码流水线在两种模型和所有任务上达到80-95%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 隐藏计算虽然逃过了行为CoT监控，但其完整计算轨迹（残差流）是可直接读取的。可监控性是模型完整计算轨迹的属性，而不仅仅是表面词元。

title: On the Convergence of Adam, Revisited
summary: We show that projected Adam for online optimization with arbitrary moment decay parameters $β_1,β_2\in[0,1)$ can have average regret bounded away from zero. A similar result of Reddi-Kale-Kumar from 2018 required $β_1<\sqrt{β_2}$. Similar to their result, we use a three-periodic sequence of linear functions on $[-1,1]$ with slopes $c,-1,-1$, though we use $c$ slightly larger than $2$. This nonzero average regret result extends to Adam variants such as AdamW, RMSProp, NAdam, Adan, AdaMax, Muon, and to an i.i.d. variant of the three-periodic sequence of slopes for Adam.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，对于任意动量衰减参数β₁,β₂∈[0,1)，投影Adam算法在在线优化中的平均遗憾可以非零。这一结果将Reddi等人2018年的结论（需β₁<√β₂）推广至更宽泛的条件，并扩展到多种Adam变体及i.i.d.情形。
AI.motivation: 先前研究（Reddi et al., 2018）已证明当β₁<√β₂时Adam存在非零平均遗憾，但更一般的条件是否成立尚不明确。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，证明任意β₁,β₂下Adam都可能无法收敛到最优。
AI.method: 采用三周期线性函数序列（斜率c,-1,-1），其中c略大于2，通过构造反例序列证明投影Adam的非零平均遗憾。关键改进在于放宽了c>2的条件（原工作需β₁<√β₂）。
AI.result: 证明了对于任意β₁,β₂∈[0,1)，投影Adam的平均遗憾可非零；该结论同样适用于AdamW、RMSProp、NAdam、Adan、AdaMax、Muon等变体，以及i.i.d.版本的三周期序列。
AI.conclusion: Adam类优化器在一般动量参数设置下可能无法保证零平均遗憾，其收敛性存在根本性缺陷，需要更谨慎地设计或选择自适应优化算法。

title: Real-Time Location-Aware Demand-Shaping for Power-Constrained AC Railway Corridors
summary: Power-constrained 25kV AC railway sections, particularly under degraded feeding, are protected today by blunt, section-wide power limits that penalise every train irrespective of whether it contributes to the binding condition. This paper presents a real-time, location-aware controller that restores the electrical feasibility of a feeding section with minimal impact on the timetable: it curtails only the trains that bind, where and when they bind, evaluating feasibility and per-train available power online with a solver-free estimate as an in-loop surrogate for the full power flow. Because the estimate is accurate on average but slightly optimistic at the binding instants, the controller screens with a small voltage margin, and a full multi-conductor power-flow solver confirms the restored feasibility. The resulting selective-curtailment policy is delivered through a cloud-to-edge connected driver advisory system. On a representative GB 25kV corridor under outage feeding, solver-selected to be infeasible uncontrolled yet restorable, the controller is compared against the uncontrolled case, the incumbent static limit, and an offline genetic-algorithm optimum, with every feasibility figure solver-validated. The static limit restores feasibility at a large journey-time cost by throttling the whole section; the location-aware controller restores the same feasibility at one thirtieth of that cost by advising a single train, and matches the offline optimum's solution in about a second and a half against the optimiser's minute. Aggregate peak demand is unmoved, because the active constraint is local far-field voltage rather than gross demand. All claims are relative to the baselines on a representative corridor; a specific-route deployment study is future work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时、位置感知的控制器，通过仅约束导致供电区间不可行的列车（而非整个区间），以极小的时间表代价恢复电气可行性。该方法在约1.5秒内匹配离线遗传算法最优解，而代价仅为静态区间限功率方案的1/30。
AI.motivation: 现有25kV交流铁路在退行供电等功率受限场景下，采用粗粒度的区间级功率限制，不加区分地惩罚所有列车，导致不必要的时刻表干扰。需要一种更精准的选择性削减策略，仅对造成约束的列车进行局部调控。
AI.method: 提出实时位置感知控制器：1) 使用免求解器的在线估计作为潮流计算的环路替代，评估区间可行性和每列车可用功率；2) 因估计在约束时刻略偏乐观，引入小电压裕度进行筛选；3) 由全多导体潮流求解器确认恢复后的可行性；4) 通过云到边缘连接的驾驶员咨询系统交付选择性削减策略。
AI.result: 在代表性GB 25kV走廊退行供电场景下：静态限功率恢复可行性但代价巨大；位置感知控制器以1/30的代价（仅建议单列车调整）恢复同等可行性；约1.5秒内匹配离线遗传算法在约1分钟得到的最优解；聚合峰值需求未受影响（因约束为局部远场电压而非总需求）。
AI.conclusion: 所提位置感知选择性削减控制器能以极小时间表代价恢复供电区间可行性，性能接近离线最优解且计算效率极高。结论基于代表性走廊的基线对比，具体线路部署研究为未来工作。

title: Unified convergence analysis for gradient descent optimization methods in the training of deep neural networks
summary: Gradient based optimization methods are nowadays the methods of choice for training deep neural networks (DNNs) in artificial intelligence (AI) systems. In practically relevant DNN training problems, one does usually not apply the standard gradient descent (GD) optimization method but instead one employs suitable sophisticated GD optimization methods, which incorporate adaptivity and/or acceleration techniques, such as the famous Adam optimizer. It is a key contribution of this work to provide a general unified convergence analysis for GD optimization methods in the training of DNNs with analytic activations such as the softplus and the popular Gaussian error linear unit (GeLU) activation. Our general unified convergence result applies to a large class of gradient based optimization methods such as the standard GD, the momentum, the Nesterov accelerated gradient (NAG), the RMSprop, the Adam, the Adamax, the Nadam, the Nadamax, the Adan, the AdaBelief, the AMSGrad, and the Yogi optimizers. Our analysis employs the theory of Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz (KL) inequalities to establish convergence to critical points in the training of DNNs. To the best of our knowledge, the generality of our convergence analysis is also just in the special situation of the Adam optimizer a new contribution to the literature on the analysis of AI optimization algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文为使用解析激活函数（如softplus和GeLU）的深度神经网络训练中的梯度下降优化方法（包括Adam、RMSprop、Nadam等十余种）提供了一个统一的收敛性分析框架，基于Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz不等式证明了这些方法在非凸优化下收敛到临界点。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对多种现代梯度优化方法（特别是Adam等自适应方法）在DNN训练中收敛性的统一分析框架，大多数收敛结果仅针对特定优化器或简单激活函数，无法覆盖实际中广泛使用的解析激活函数和各类改进优化器。
AI.method: 利用Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz (KL) 不等式理论，构建统一的分析框架，覆盖标准GD、动量法、NAG、RMSprop、Adam、Adamax、Nadam、Nadamax、Adan、AdaBelief、AMSGrad、Yogi等优化器，针对softplus和GeLU等解析激活函数建立收敛性证明。
AI.result: 成功证明了上述多种梯度优化方法在使用解析激活函数的DNN训练中均能收敛到临界点，并且即便仅聚焦于Adam优化器，该分析也属于文献中的新贡献。
AI.conclusion: 本文为大规模梯度优化方法在DNN训练中的收敛性提供了迄今为止最通用的理论保证，填补了自适应优化方法在非凸深度学习场景下统一收敛分析的空白。

title: Rank-Order N-of-M Codes for Sparse Distributed Memory: Disentangling Representation and Learning Effects in Noise Robustness Against Contemporary Neuromorphic Architectures
comment: 14 pages, 8 tables, 2 figures. Revisits rank-order sparse distributed memory for continual learning and memory-augmented AI. Includes comparisons with CALM and SpikingMamba, statistical evaluation, and real embedding experiments
summary: Large language models remain limited as continual learning systems, motivating renewed interest in Sparse Distributed Memory (SDM) as an explicit online episodic memory. CALM (Nechesov and Ruponen, 2025) identifies its threshold-binary encoder as an open design question. This paper evaluates rank-order N-of-M encoding (Furber et al., 2007) as an alternative. We make three contributions. First, a faithful reimplementation validates the published architecture by confirming exact equivalence between WheelSDM and RankOrderSDM (cosine similarity 1.0000 across 10 seeds) and reproducing the documented divergence of RDLIF neurons under interference. Second, multi-seed capacity experiments show RankOrderSDM outperforming StandardSDM by 13.4 percentage points at saturation in the scaled configuration and by 0.8 percentage points at the published architecture scale. Third, BER robustness experiments disentangle representation and learning effects, showing that the large robustness gain arises primarily from the interaction of rank-order encoding with MAX-Hebbian learning, while the encoder alone provides only a small advantage under matched learning conditions. Experiments on GloVe-100 embeddings confirm this small but consistent encoding benefit on real structured data, whereas sentence embeddings exhibit a ceiling effect at low memory load. A secondary analysis shows that idealized rank-order encoding requires half the component-level encoding energy of SpikingMamba's SI-LIF neurons at four-bit precision, although decoder costs dominate overall system energy. These results identify which components of the original rank-order SDM architecture provide measurable benefits for contemporary memory-augmented AI systems, offering practical guidance for architectures such as CALM.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了rank-order N-of-M编码作为CALM中稀疏分布式记忆(SDM)的替代编码方案，发现该编码与MAX-Hebbian学习交互是鲁棒性提升的主要来源，而编码器自身贡献较小；在容量上RankOrderSDM相比StandardSDM在饱和状态下提升13.4个百分点；同时理想化的rank-order编码在能耗上优于SpikingMamba的SI-LIF神经元。
AI.motivation: CALM论文将阈值二值编码器识别为一个开放的设计问题，本文旨在探索rank-order N-of-M编码作为替代方案，以改进SDM作为在线情景记忆的性能。
AI.method: 通过忠实复现CALM架构验证WheelSDM与RankOrderSDM的等价性；进行多随机种子容量实验对比RankOrderSDM与StandardSDM；设计BER鲁棒性实验分离表征与学习效应；在GloVe-100和句子嵌入上进行验证；分析编码能耗。
AI.result: 1) 精确等价验证（余弦相似度1.0000）；2) 容量提升13.4%（饱和状态）；3) 鲁棒性提升主要来自rank-order编码与MAX-Hebbian学习的交互；4) 编码器自身仅提供小幅增益；5) 理想化rank-order编码能耗仅为SI-LIF神经元的一半。
AI.conclusion: 识别了rank-order SDM架构中各组件对现代记忆增强AI系统的实际贡献，为CALM等架构提供了实用指导。

title: The Role of Rigor in Artificial Intelligence
comment: To appear in D. Rickles and T. Thebault (eds.) Philosophy of Rigor (Routledge, 2026)
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) has achieved extraordinary capabilities despite lacking many of the conceptual and scientific foundations associated with mature disciplines. Unlike traditional sciences, where reliable technology typically emerges from theoretical understanding, modern AI has progressed largely through performance-driven iteration and "alchemical" experimentation. This tension motivates a systematic analysis of AI through the lens of rigor. We introduce a three-part framework consisting of conceptual rigor (clarifying foundational concepts), epistemic rigor (establishing scientific understanding), and operational rigor (ensuring reliable performance and deployment). Using this framework, we analyze competing conceptions of intelligence and understanding, the strengths and limitations of the empirical approach to deep learning, the power and pitfalls of benchmarks, and the obstacles to theory development posed by modern AI systems. We argue that the distinctive trajectory of AI arises from how forms of rigor interact across paradigms, resulting in the primacy of operational rigor in modern deep learning. This perspective helps explain both AI's rapid advances and its persistent uncertainties, while clarifying the challenges involved in transforming AI into a mature science and reliable technology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个三维分析框架（概念严谨性、认知严谨性、操作严谨性）来审视人工智能领域，指出现代AI虽取得惊人进展，但缺乏成熟学科的理论基础，呈现"操作性严谨优先"的特点。
AI.motivation: AI取得了非凡能力，但缺乏成熟学科应具备的概念基础和科学理论支撑，这种"炼金术式"的进步与可靠技术应基于理论理解的传统科学范式形成张力。
AI.method: 提出三维严谨性分析框架：(1) 概念严谨性——澄清基础概念；(2) 认知严谨性——建立科学理解；(3) 操作严谨性——确保可靠性能与部署。并运用该框架分析智能与理解的概念、深度学习经验方法的优劣、基准测试的利弊、以及理论发展的障碍。
AI.result: 论证了AI独特的发展轨迹源于不同严谨性范式间的互动，现代深度学习形成了"操作性严谨优先"的模式，这既解释了AI的快速进步，也揭示了其持续的困惑。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有助于理解AI快速进展与不确定性的并存现象，厘清将AI转化为成熟科学和可靠技术所面临的挑战。

title: Mental Health Disorder Detection Beyond Social Media: A Systematic Review of Available Datasets
summary: Detecting mental health disorders in a timely manner is an important societal challenge. NLP and machine learning (ML) methods used to assist with detection rely on data collected primarily from social media. However, such datasets often have sampling biases and inherent ethical and privacy issues. One avenue to overcome these limitations is non-social media data. We present the first comprehensive review of non-social media, free-text datasets for mental health research. We use the PRISMA methodology to conduct our survey and we review datasets available in multiple languages. We find that non-social media free-text based datasets are predominantly focused on English and on detecting depression. These datasets also vary in demographics, platforms, data types, annotation techniques, and methodologies. This systematic review also reveals key gaps and highlights opportunities to develop more diverse, reliable and clinically-relevant resources.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统综述了非社交媒体自由文本数据集在心理健康研究中的应用，发现现有数据集主要集中在英语和抑郁症检测上，存在人口统计学、平台、数据类型等方面的多样性差异，并指出了未来开发更可靠、临床相关资源的机会。
AI.motivation: 及时检测心理健康障碍是一个重要的社会挑战。现有NLP/ML方法依赖社交媒体数据，但存在采样偏差、伦理和隐私问题，因此需要探索非社交媒体数据来源。
AI.method: 采用PRISMA系统综述方法论，对多种语言的非社交媒体自由文本数据集进行全面审查。
AI.result: 非社交媒体自由文本数据集主要集中在英语和抑郁症检测上；数据集在人口统计学、平台、数据类型、标注技术和方法论方面存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了当前研究的空白，强调了开发更多样化、可靠和临床相关资源的机会。

title: Reflected Schrödinger Bridge Matching
summary: Recent advances in generative modeling have enabled the efficient computation of Schrödinger bridges (SB) in high-dimensional settings by leveraging partially simulation-free training methods inspired by flow matching. However, these have not covered SBs with reflecting dynamics, a useful model choice with built-in guarantees that generated samples stay in the data domain. Existing alternatives for reflected SBs instead rely on more complex training based on forward--backward SDE theory, requiring expensive higher-order derivatives and sampling entire paths during training. In this article, we introduce a partially simulation-free framework that allows reflected SBs to be trained similarly to flow matching, using a new sampling method and regression target. We demonstrate our results by coupling pairs of well-known high-dimensional image datasets. Using reflected dynamics incurs negligible additional wall-clock time during both training and inference while maintaining or slightly improving generative performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种部分免模拟框架，使反射型薛定谔桥能够像流匹配一样高效训练，在保持或略优生成性能的同时，仅增加极小的计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有反射型薛定谔桥依赖于前向后向SDE理论，需要昂贵的高阶导数和完整路径采样，训练复杂且计算成本高。作者希望开发一种更简单、高效的训练方法。
AI.method: 提出部分免模拟框架，通过新的采样方法和回归目标，使反射型SB的训练方式类似流匹配，避免了高阶导数和完整路径采样的需求。
AI.result: 在高维图像数据集配对实验中，反射动力学在训练和推理阶段仅增加极小的额外时间开销，同时保持或略微提升生成性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效简化了反射型SB的训练过程，使其在实践中可行且高效，为需要生成样本保持在数据域内的应用提供了实用的解决方案。

title: On the Modulating Function Method for Control Problems
summary: The modulating function method is an algebraic framework that, thus far, has been used for state and parameter estimation, as well as fault detection, of linear, fractional-order, distributed, and some nonlinear systems. At the core of the method lies the modulating function, which can either be selected directly or be obtained as a solution to an auxiliary system. By introducing the notion of dual modulating functions and dual modulations using auxiliary systems and duality, this paper shows that this framework is not only an estimation framework, but also a controller design framework for LTV systems. In particular, necessary and sufficient conditions for the existence of the associated control laws are introduced; the well-known state feedback law is obtained as a particular case of the dual modulation approach, along with output feedback, LTI sliding mode control, the reachability gramian, and the state-transition matrix; and a new fixed-time control law is proposed for both LTI and LTV systems, including an estimate of the transient behavior. Moreover, numerical simulations of the newly proposed control law are performed, indicating similar performance levels to a benchmark LQR even when handling unmatched disturbances.

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入对偶调制函数和对偶调制的概念，将调制函数方法从状态/参数估计框架扩展为LTV系统的控制器设计框架，提出了新的固定时间控制律，并推导了与经典控制方法的联系。
AI.motivation: 调制函数方法此前主要用于估计和故障检测，本文旨在证明该框架同样适用于控制器设计，从而统一估计与控制的代数框架。
AI.method: 引入对偶调制函数和对偶调制概念，利用辅助系统和对偶性推导控制律存在的充要条件；将状态反馈、输出反馈、滑模控制、可达性格拉姆矩阵等作为特例；提出新的固定时间控制律并给出暂态行为估计。
AI.result: 推导了控制律存在的充要条件；经典控制方法（状态反馈、输出反馈、滑模控制等）作为特例被统一；新提出的固定时间控制律在数值仿真中表现出与LQR相当的性能，且能处理不匹配扰动。
AI.conclusion: 调制函数方法不仅是估计框架，更是统一的控制器设计框架，尤其适合LTV系统的固定时间控制，具有良好的鲁棒性和理论完备性。

title: Markov Information Processes
summary: We study information design when a designer with commitment shapes the information of strategically interacting, far-sighted agents whose actions drive a persistent, controlled Markov state. We introduce the Markov Bayes correlated equilibrium (Markov BCE), the controlled-Markov generalisation of the BCE of Bergemann and Morris (2016), characterised by a dynamic obedience condition that adds a continuation-value term to the static one and reduces to it when actions cannot move the state. Recommending actions is without loss; the designer's problem is recursive in the agents' promised continuation utilities and is solved by a set-valued backward-induction algorithm whose optimum exists and lies between the no-disclosure and first-best values. For linear-quadratic-Gaussian payoffs the obedience condition becomes a covariance condition with a modified interaction matrix, and the stationary case reduces to an algebraic Riccati equation. When agents instead learn the transition, we identify the rent an agent earns from a model of the dynamics sharper than the designer anticipates: it is non-negative, zero at the known-dynamics benchmark, and deterred only by building slack into obedience. Under persistent excitation the cumulative rent grows logarithmically as heterogeneous agents' estimates converge. Two worked examples, in congestion and resource coordination, together with a numerical study illustrate the theory.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了承诺型设计者如何为策略性、远视的代理人设计信息结构，引入马尔可夫贝叶斯相关均衡（Markov BCE），将静态BCE推广到受控马尔可夫动态环境，并通过动态服从条件、递归求解和线性二次高斯特例分析等方法，刻画了最优信息设计的存在性、边界及学习动态下的租金问题。
AI.motivation: 将信息设计从静态互动扩展到动态受控马尔可夫环境，研究设计者如何通过承诺塑造具有前瞻性、策略性互动的代理人的信息，以影响他们驱动的持久状态演化。
AI.method: 引入马尔可夫贝叶斯相关均衡（Markov BCE），通过动态服从条件（包含续效价值项）将静态BCE推广到受控马尔可夫过程；采用基于承诺续效效用的递归方法，通过集值反向归纳算法求解设计者问题；在LQG特例中将服从条件转化为协方差条件并导出代数Riccati方程；分析代理人学习动态时的信息租金。
AI.result: 最优信息设计存在且介于无披露与第一最佳值之间；LQG情形下服从条件简化为协方差条件；代理人拥有更精确的动态模型时会获得非负信息租金，仅在已知动态基准下为零，需通过引入服从松弛来抑制；在持续性激励下，异质性代理人估计收敛时累计租金呈对数增长。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了一个动态信息设计的完整理论框架，发展了动态服从条件、递归求解方法以及学习场景下的租金分析，为堵车协调和资源协调等应用提供了理论基础。

title: MABLE: Masked Autoencoding with Bi-Lipschitz Decoding for Embeddings and Graph Metric Learning
summary: We propose MABLE (Masked Autoencoding with Bi-Lipschitz Decoding for Embeddings and Graph Metric Learning), a self-supervised framework for learning node and graph embeddings from large, heterogeneous graphs, demonstrated here on geospatial mineral-exploration data. MABLE combines masked reconstruction with fixed cosine-similarity losses that align matched augmented views while keeping unpaired embeddings well spread. A bi-Lipschitz feature decoder ties a low-dimensional reconstruction component of each node embedding to feature similarity, while matched-node consistency shapes the remaining context used by graph pooling. Lipschitz-controlled pooling helps stabilize graph-level representations under perturbations of retained node embeddings, while augmentation alignment trains robustness to masking, node dropping, and sampling variation. Across local copper and regional Arabian Shield studies, MABLE embeddings provide complementary downstream signal and produce coherent embedding-derived layers for hypothesis generation without learned discriminators or hard-negative selection.

AI.tldr: MABLE是一个自监督框架，用于从大规模异构图（如矿产勘探数据）中学习节点和图嵌入，结合掩码重建、余弦相似度对齐和双Lipschitz解码器，无需监督信号即可生成稳定且可解释的嵌入表示。
AI.motivation: 现有图嵌入方法在处理大规模异构图时依赖监督信号或硬负样本选择，无法充分利用无标签数据，且在地球科学矿产勘探领域缺乏有效的自监督表示学习框架。
AI.method: 1) 掩码自编码重建；2) 固定余弦相似度损失对齐增强视图；3) 双Lipschitz特征解码器连接低维嵌入与特征相似性；4) Lipschitz控制的图池化增强鲁棒性；5) 数据增强（掩码、节点丢弃、采样）提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在铜矿和阿拉伯盾地研究案例中，MABLE嵌入提供了互补的下游信号，生成了连贯的嵌入层，可用于假设生成，且无需学习判别器或硬负样本选择。
AI.conclusion: MABLE为地球科学矿产勘探提供了一种有效的自监督图表示学习方案，能够在缺乏标注数据的情况下生成高质量、可解释的嵌入表示，具有良好的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: Robust Feasible Route Construction through Collaborative Partition Optimization
summary: Large-scale Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problems (CVRPs) are commonly solved by partitioning customers into smaller routing problems that can be optimized independently. While this substantially reduces computational complexity, independently constructed routing solutions may leave some customer demand unserved even when sufficient resources exist elsewhere in the fleet. We present Collaborative Routing Constructors (CoRC), a routing framework that enables independently solved subproblems to exchange customers and vehicles during optimization rather than relying solely on a fixed partition or a subsequent global re-optimization stage. Computational experiments on AGS benchmark instances and synthetic instances containing up to 200,000 customers compare CoRC against independent routing, post-routing global re-optimization, and state-of-the-art, end-to-end routing frameworks. Across all evaluated partitioning strategies, CoRC consistently constructs feasible routing solutions where competing partition-based methods do not. Furthermore, it remains effective on problem instances for which the evaluated end-to-end routing frameworks did not produce solutions under the same computational budget. These results demonstrate that collaboration between routing subproblems provides a robust and scalable approach for feasible large-scale route construction.

AI.tldr: 提出协作路由构建器(CoRC)框架，通过让独立求解的子问题在优化过程中交换客户和车辆，解决了大规模CVRP中分区独立求解导致的不可行问题。实验表明CoRC在多达20万客户的问题上始终能构造可行解，优于传统分区方法和端到端路由框架。
AI.motivation: 大规模CVRP常通过分区独立求解来降低计算复杂度，但独立构建的路由方案可能因分区固定而导致部分客户需求无法满足，即使整个车队有足够的资源。现有方法依赖固定分区或后期全局重优化，缺乏子问题间的协作机制。
AI.method: 提出CoRC框架，允许独立求解的子问题在优化过程中动态交换客户和车辆，而非依赖固定分区或事后全局重优化。这是一种协作式的路由构造框架。
AI.result: 在AGS基准实例和包含多达20万客户的合成实例上，CoRC在所有评估的分区策略下均能一致地构造可行路由方案，而竞争的分区方法不能。同时CoRC在端到端框架无法在规定预算内产生解决方案的问题上仍然有效。
AI.conclusion: 路由子问题之间的协作提供了一种鲁棒且可扩展的大规模路由构造方法，在可行性和计算效率上优于传统分区方法和端到端框架。

title: They Infer What You Meant: Models Represent Communicative Intent More Reliably Than They Act On It
summary: When a person shares something with a language model, the model often answers the surface of the message rather than what the sender was doing by sending it: share a finished project and it critiques the code; share a raw late-night line and it runs a wellness check. We treat the sender's communicative intent, the Gricean what-was-meant, as a first-class interpretability object, and show the failure is one of readout on top of a robust representation. A linear probe decodes the sender's intent, whether they want a thing recognized or evaluated, from a model's default-pass hidden states, cleanly and surface-independently, across six models and four families and in the base checkpoints. The representation generalizes further, to intent that is only pragmatically inferred, and to a second, lexically clean intent (support versus help). The behavioral half of the story, and every causal test, is established on the recognize/evaluate contrast, where what varies is whether the default output acts on the intent. The readout lags the representation in depth within a model (the intent is decodable several layers before it drives the output); across models, which ones act on it by default is model-specific, an observed stratification (three of six show the failure) that we do not read as a scaling law. Where the gap is open, a direction closely tied to the representation, the discriminative direction at a searched-for layer, is a causal handle: steering it recovers the intended behavior, as well as an explicit instruction does and with no prompt at all. This direction is near-orthogonal to the feedback-offering axis, so it routes a represented intent rather than a generic feedback knob, though at the recovery dose the routed intent can override an explicit request. We support each link with controls against obvious deflations and report the nulls as plainly as the confirmations.

AI.tldr: 大语言模型能表征用户交流意图（如希望被认可还是被评价），但默认输出却常忽略此意图；通过线性探针可从模型隐状态解码意图，且存在一个因果操控方向，能恢复意图行为，无需显式提示。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型常回应消息表面内容，而非发送者的交流意图（如分享完成的项目被批评代码，分享深夜心情被要求做健康检查）。作者将发送者的交际意图作为一等可解释性对象，旨在揭示这一失败是"读出"层面的问题，而非模型缺乏相关表示。
AI.method: 使用线性探针从模型默认隐状态中解码发送者意图（如"被认可"vs"被评价"），在6个模型4个家族的基础检查点上验证；进一步测试泛化到语用推断意图和另一组意图（支持vs帮助）；通过因果干预（沿特定方向操控隐状态）验证意图驱动行为的因果性。
AI.result: 意图在模型深层可被线性解码，且早于输出层若干层（表示先于行为）；仅3/6模型默认表现出意图读取失败，而非缩放定律；找到的因果方向近乎正交于"提供反馈"轴，能以无提示方式恢复意图行为，甚至覆盖显式请求。
AI.conclusion: 模型对用户意图有鲁棒的内部表示，但默认行为未正确读出该表示；通过分析隐状态可诊断并修复这一失败，且修复具有因果特异性和行为有效性。

title: A Structural Interpretation of GELU and Threshold-Transmission Activations via the First-Order Loss Function
summary: The Gaussian Error Linear Unit is usually motivated as the expected output of an input-dependent stochastic Bernoulli gate. This work gives a complementary interpretation based on the Gaussian complementary first-order loss function: GELU is the signal-transmission term of the expected surplus of a hard linear gate with a Gaussian random threshold. This view separates loss accounting from forward signal transmission and generalises to a threshold-transmission family that includes ReLU, GELU, SiLU/Swish, and hard swish as special cases. The uniform-threshold case recovers a hard-swish-like compact piecewise-polynomial gate with an explicit threshold-width parameter, yielding fixed- and learned-width variants. Controlled experiments on compact vision and language models show that calibrated or learned uniform-threshold gates are consistently competitive with GELU, ReLU, and SiLU/Swish, improve over them in most tested settings, and use the finite transition region nontrivially.

AI.tldr: 本文从高斯互补一阶损失函数的角度重新解释了GELU激活函数，提出了一类包含ReLU、GELU、SiLU/Swish和hard swish的阈值-传输激活函数家族，并引入了一种具有可学习阈值宽度的紧凑分段多项式门控函数（均匀阈值情况），实验表明其在多种紧凑模型上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有GELU的动机通常来自随机Bernoulli门控的期望输出，本文旨在提供一种互补的解释视角，将损失核算与前向信号传输分离，并推广到更通用的激活函数家族。
AI.method: 将GELU重新解释为硬线性门控在服从高斯分布的随机阈值下的期望盈余中的信号传输项，进而推广到阈值-传输激活函数家族。均匀阈值情况推导出一种类似hard swish的紧凑分段多项式门控，具有显式的阈值宽度参数，可固定或可学习。
AI.result: 在紧凑的视觉和语言模型上进行控制实验，校准或学习的均匀阈值门控在多数测试设置中优于或持平于GELU、ReLU和SiLU/Swish，且有限过渡区域被有效利用。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的阈值-传输激活函数家族统一了多种常用激活函数，均匀阈值门控在保持简洁性的同时具有竞争力，为激活函数设计提供了新的理论视角和实用选择。

title: Storage as a Transmission Asset (SATA) for Large-Load Congestion Relief
comment: Submitted for North American Power Symposium 2026, October 11 - 13, 2026
summary: Hyperscale data centers and other large concentrated loads can impose substantial new demand on existing transmission networks. If import corridors lack sufficient transfer capability, operators may need to curtail load, delay interconnection, or reinforce the network to maintain reliable service. An energy storage system (ESS) deployed as a storage-as-transmission asset (SATA) offers a non-wires alternative by providing operator-directed support to constrained import corridors. However, the operating-level reliability value of SATA dispatch remains insufficiently quantified. This paper evaluates operator-directed SATA using a day-ahead DC optimal power flow that co-optimizes generation, ESS dispatch, and load curtailment across Monte Carlo scenarios of demand and generator availability. Operating reliability is assessed using expected energy not served (EENS), loss-of-load hours (LOLH), and the conditional value at risk (CVaR) of daily unserved energy. Congestion-price and flow-sensitivity metrics are used to identify the limiting corridor and storage location. The interconnection is then screened to determine whether SATA is suitable, reinforcement is required, or storage would provide little transmission value. Results show that operator-directed SATA reduces average unserved energy, loss-of-load exposure, and tail risk compared with deploying the same ESS for pure arbitrage. These results demonstrate that the operating designation of storage is a primary driver of its transmission value.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了将储能系统作为输电资产（SATA）在运营商调度下缓解超大规模数据中心等大型集中负荷对输电走廊压力的可靠性价值。通过日前直流最优潮流模型，在蒙特卡洛场景下协同优化发电、储能调度和负荷削减，发现运营商直控的SATA相比纯套利模式能显著降低预期缺供电量、失负荷小时数和尾部风险。
AI.motivation: 大型数据中心等集中负荷给现有输电网络带来巨大新增需求，当输电走廊传输能力不足时，运营商面临切负荷、延迟并网或网络加固等选择。储能系统作为非导线替代方案（SATA）可提供运营商调度支持，但其在运行层面的可靠性价值尚未被充分量化。
AI.method: 采用日前直流最优潮流模型，协同优化发电、储能调度和切负荷，在蒙特卡洛场景下模拟需求和发电可用性的不确定性；使用期望缺供电量（EENS）、失负荷小时数（LOLH）和日缺供电量的条件风险价值（CVaR）评估运行可靠性；利用阻塞价格和流量灵敏度指标识别限制性走廊和储能位置。
AI.result: 与相同储能用于纯套利相比，运营商直控的SATA能降低平均缺供电量、失负荷暴露和尾部风险。结果表明储能的运行模式是其输电价值的主要驱动因素。
AI.conclusion: 运营商直控的储能作为输电资产（SATA）能有效提升输电走廊的运行可靠性，其运行模式（而非储能本身）是决定输电价值的关键。

title: Exploiting Variable Implications in Presolve for Mixed Integer Programming
summary: Presolve for mixed integer programming (MIP) problems aims to eliminate redundant information, strengthen the formulation, and extract useful structural information for the subsequent branch-and-cut process. An important type of such structural information is the variable implications (VIs), which describe how a bound on a variable depends on a bound of a binary variable. In this paper, we develop two new presolve techniques that exploit VIs to derive reductions for MIP problems. The first technique, called VI aggregation, aggregates multiple VIs into a single inequality by using implications between a variable and a set of binary variables that form a clique. This aggregation can reduce the number of constraints and tighten the linear programming relaxation. The second technique, called VI-aware linear constraint propagation (LCP), builds on the standard LCP but incorporates VIs associated with the variable being tightened to derive more reductions and can derive tighter variable bounds. We show that although VI information is additionally considered, the tightest lower or upper bound of a variable can still be derived in linear time. Moreover, compared with a state-of-the-art approach in the literature, the proposed VI-aware LCP can derive tighter variable bounds. Computational results on MIPLIB 2017 benchmark instances demonstrate the effectiveness of VI aggregation and VI-aware LCP in improving the performance of the open-source MIP solver HiGHS. In particular, using the two proposed presolve techniques, a reduction of 4% in solving time and 6% in node number on HiGHS can be achieved.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种利用变量蕴含关系（VIs）的MIP预求解技术：VI聚合（将多个VIs聚合成单个不等式）和VI感知的线性约束传播（在标准LCP中融入VI信息）。实验表明，这两种方法能在线性时间内推导更紧的变量界，并在HiGHS求解器上实现4%的求解时间减少和6%的节点数减少。
AI.motivation: MIP预求解中，变量蕴含关系（VIs）是一种重要的结构信息，现有方法未能充分利用VIs来推导更紧的变量界和减少约束数量，本文旨在开发新的预求解技术以更有效地利用VIs。
AI.method: 1. **VI聚合**：利用变量与构成团的一组二元变量之间的蕴含关系，将多个VIs聚合成单个不等式，减少约束数量并收紧LP松弛。2. **VI感知的线性约束传播（LCP）**：在标准LCP基础上，结合被收紧变量相关的VIs信息，推导更紧的变量界，且时间复杂度仍为线性。
AI.result: 在MIPLIB 2017基准实例上测试，两种技术使得HiGHS求解器求解时间减少4%，节点数减少6%。且VI感知LCP能比现有方法推导更紧的变量界。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的两种基于VI的预求解技术能有效提升MIP求解器性能，且VI感知LCP在保证线性时间复杂度的同时，比现有方法产生更紧的变量界。

title: Agent Reinforcement Learning via Pivotal-Aware Self-Feedback Retry
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have shown strong decision-making capabilities in long-horizon interactive tasks, yet they still struggle to effectively leverage failed trajectories: full retries incur high interaction costs, while experience retrieval tends to dilute critical experience signals. To address this, we propose PivoARL, a self-feedback retry framework for experience exploitation in LLM agents. PivoARL identifies the pivotal erroneous turn through structured reflection and performs local retry only from the corresponding pivotal state, thereby reusing the correct prefix and reducing redundant interactions. From an information-gain perspective, we further show that pivotal retry concentrates useful experience signals near the error boundary, mitigating the signal dilution caused by state-agnostic experience utilization. Based on this insight, we design a pivotal-aware credit assignment mechanism that rewards correct prefixes while isolating erroneous suffixes, and optimize reflection quality through implicit reflection returns. We conduct a systematic evaluation on 4 agent tasks and 7 search-based QA benchmarks. Results show that PivoARL achieves significant improvements on Pass@2/3 across all tasks, with an average gain of about 11.5\% over MetaRL. Moreover, benefiting from contrastive preference signals induced by pivotal turns, PivoARL also consistently improves Pass@1 on over 80\% of the tasks. On Minesweeper environment, PivoARL improves over GiGPO by more than 45\% and reduces interaction turns by about 42\% on average compared with full-retry methods. Code is available at https://github.com/yuki-younai/PivoARL.

AI.tldr: 提出PivoARL，一种通过识别关键错误步骤进行局部重试的LLM智能体自我反馈框架，显著提升决策性能并降低交互成本。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在长程交互任务中难以有效利用失败轨迹：完全重试成本高，经验检索会稀释关键信号。
AI.method: (1) 结构化反思识别关键错误轮次；(2) 从关键状态局部重试，复用正确前缀；(3) 关键感知信用分配机制，奖励正确前缀、隔离错误后缀；(4) 隐式反思回报优化反思质量。
AI.result: 在4个智能体任务和7个搜索QA基准上，Pass@2/3平均提升约11.5%；80%以上任务Pass@1一致提升；Minesweeper环境中比GiGPO提升超45%，交互轮次减少约42%。
AI.conclusion: PivoARL通过关键轮次驱动的局部重试和信用分配，有效浓缩经验信号，兼顾性能提升与交互效率，是一种高效的LLM智能体自反馈框架。

title: Revealing Hidden Model Behaviors with Task-Specific Self-Reports
comment: 17 pages, 8 figures, 2 tables; appendix with 31 additional pages
summary: Fine-tuning can give a language model a hidden behavior--it may give false answers under a narrow condition, or give harmful advice only when a prompt touches a particular topic. We introduce the Stabilized Adapter for self-Report (SAR), a lightweight LoRA adapter that makes a fine-tuned model describe its own hidden behavior in plain language, using only the model and the dataset it was trained on. Across seven implanted behaviors (plus a no-behavior control), SAR detects the hidden behavior in every one--even when the model has generalized into broad misalignment that the training data alone does not predict. Introspection Adapters (IA), the closest existing baseline, detects some behaviors from our suite but misses others entirely--and where it misses, it hallucinates, consistently reporting wrong behaviors. SAR retains positive signal on every setting where IA fails and halves the rate of hallucinations. This makes it much easier for practitioners to audit their models and obtain reliable answers to "what did my model actually learn?" type of questions.

AI.tldr: 提出SAR方法，通过轻量级LoRA适配器让微调模型用自然语言描述自身隐藏行为，在7种植入行为中全部检测成功，且比基线方法IA减少一半幻觉。
AI.motivation: 微调后的语言模型可能产生隐藏行为（如特定条件下给出错误答案或有害建议），现有方法无法可靠检测这些行为，且存在幻觉问题。
AI.method: 提出Stabilized Adapter for self-Report (SAR)，一个轻量级LoRA适配器，仅使用模型和训练数据集，让微调模型以自然语言描述自身的隐藏行为。
AI.result: 在7种植入行为实验中，SAR全部检测出隐藏行为；相比基线Introspection Adapters (IA)，SAR在所有IA失败的场景中保持正向信号，并将幻觉率降低一半。
AI.conclusion: SAR为从业者提供了更可靠的模型审计工具，能够有效回答"我的模型到底学到了什么"这类关键问题。

title: Stable Global Weighting of Flow Mixtures using Simplex Exponential Moving Average
summary: Normalising flows provide a powerful variational family for approximate inference, yet individual architectures often fail to generalise across heterogeneous posterior geometries. We revisit mixture-based flow formulations and introduce \emph{AMF\mbox{-}VI\mbox{-}sEMA}, a two-stage framework featuring a \emph{stable global weighting} mechanism based on a \emph{Simplex Exponential Moving Average} (sEMA) update. In Stage~1, a heterogeneous set of experts (\textsc{RealNVP}, \textsc{MAF}, \textsc{RBIG}) are trained independently to specialise in distinct structural regimes. In Stage~2, expert parameters are frozen and global mixture weights are learned through a temperature-controlled softmax of average log-likelihoods, followed by a smooth EMA update on the probability simplex. This design produces a tractable, data-agnostic gating mechanism (without per-sample gating or gradient backpropagation through weights) that adaptively reallocates capacity while avoiding component collapse. We evaluate the framework on ten posterior benchmarks: six canonical 2D synthetic families (Banana, X-Shaped, Bimodal, Multimodal, Two-moons, Rings) and four real/low-dimensional Bayesian targets (BLR, BPR, Weibull, Real-GMM2), with stronger baselines (\textsc{NICE}, \textsc{ResFlow}, and EM-Mixing). Comprehensive evaluation covers NLL, KL divergence, Wasserstein-2 distance, and MMD, together with diagnostics of mixture dynamics, hyperparameter sensitivity, and cross-seed robustness. Empirically, \emph{AMF\mbox{-}VI\mbox{-}sEMA} achieves consistent NLL improvements over its predecessor \emph{AMF\mbox{-}VI} and avoids the catastrophic transport failures of single-flow baselines, while maintaining stable weight trajectories ($N_{\mathrm{eff}}{>}1.4$ on all datasets) with minimal computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AMF-VI-sEMA，一种两阶段归一化流混合框架，通过Simplex EMA稳定全局权重机制，在多种后验分布上优于单一流方法，避免组件坍塌且计算开销小。
AI.motivation: 现有归一化流架构在面对异构后验几何分布时泛化能力不足，单一架构难以覆盖不同类型的后验结构（如Banana、X形、多峰等）。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：Stage 1 独立训练多个专家流（RealNVP、MAF、RBIG）；Stage 2 冻结专家参数，通过温度控制的softmax平均对数似然学习全局混合权重，并用Simplex EMA平滑更新，实现无需逐样本门控或梯度回传的稳定加权机制。
AI.result: 在10个后验基准上（6个2D合成+4个真实低维），AMF-VI-sEMA在NLL、KL散度、Wasserstein-2距离和MMD上一致优于基线，Neff>1.4避免组件坍塌，且优于前身AMF-VI和单一流基线。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的稳定全局权重机制有效提升了混合流在变分推断中的泛化能力和稳定性，且计算开销极低，是一种实用且鲁棒的近似推断方法。

title: Large-Load Demand Flexibility as Virtual Storage
comment: Submitted for 24th National Power System Conference NPSC 2026, 12-14 December, 2026
summary: Water electrolysis plants, hyperscale data centers, and aluminum potlines represent gigawatts of demand-side flexibility for bulk power system balancing, operational planning, and procurement services. Such loads are scheduled through per-interval power bounds and horizon energy windows, whereas co-located battery energy storage systems (BESS) operate under state-of-charge dynamics. The two formulations share no common mathematical structure, and the joint procurement value of co-located loads and storage goes unrealized as a result. This paper establishes the connection between the two formulations through a virtual storage (VS) equivalence. Every feasible large-load trajectory under power-bound and energy-window constraints is a valid charge trajectory of a VS device that operates at unity accounting efficiency in the grid power balance. Production and service-level costs lie outside this abstraction and enter the dispatch through curtailment opportunity costs. For a portfolio co-located with a BESS, aggregation reduces the constraint count from O(NT) to O(T) and yields a co-dispatch price for both resources. Validation on the IEEE RTS-GMLC with three representative load classes shows that virtual storage delivers the dominant share of joint procurement savings. In the tested case, savings are additive because the two resources dispatch to non-overlapping intervals, and the curtailment shadow price tracks the peak-price band onset rather than the daily peak price.

AI.tldr: 本文通过虚拟储能（VS）等价性建立了大功率柔性负荷与电池储能系统（BESS）的联合调度框架，将负荷的功率边界与能量窗口约束转化为统一的虚拟储能模型，实现了约束数量从O(NT)到O(T)的简化，并通过IEEE RTS-GMLC验证了VS在联合采购中贡献了主要的经济效益。
AI.motivation: 水电解工厂、超大规模数据中心、铝电解槽等吉瓦级柔性负荷与电池储能系统虽然都具备电网灵活性，但由于两者的调度约束（负荷为功率边界+能量窗口，储能为荷电状态动态）在数学上不兼容，导致两者的联合采购价值无法实现。本文旨在建立两者之间的数学连接。
AI.method: 提出虚拟储能（Virtual Storage, VS）等价概念：将大负荷的可行轨迹映射为以统一效率运行的虚拟储能设备的充电轨迹，将生产和服务成本通过弃电机会成本纳入调度。对于与BESS共址的组合，将约束从O(NT)减少到O(T)，实现两种资源的联合定价。
AI.result: 在IEEE RTS-GMLC系统上对三类代表性负荷进行验证，结果表明虚拟储能贡献了联合采购节省中的主导份额。测试案例中，两种资源的调度区间不重叠，节省具有可加性；弃电影子价格跟踪峰值电价带的起始点而非日峰值电价。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟储能等价性有效统一了柔性负荷与电池储能的数学模型，大幅降低了调度复杂度，并揭示了负荷侧灵活性的经济价值主要来源于虚拟储能效应，为大规模需求侧资源的并网运营提供了理论基础。

title: An open, reproducible branch-and-cut for the capacitated profitable tour problem: a component study
summary: We present an open, reproducible branch-and-cut (B&C) algorithm for the capacitated profitable tour problem (CPTP) and its open s-t path variant, the capacity-constrained elementary shortest-path problem. The solver re-implements the formulation and cut families of Jepsen et al. (2014) on a fully open mixed-integer programming stack (HiGHS; Huangfu and Hall, 2018), and adds bound-based preprocessing, domain propagation, and reduced-cost variable fixing. We claim no new method; the contribution is twofold. First, an open, reproducible artifact: to our knowledge the first branch-and-cut for this problem class on a fully open stack, with the formulation, every separator, and all benchmark scripts released, so the results below can be rerun and the solver reused and extended as a baseline. Second, a component study on this common modern stack, benchmarked against a dynamic-programming/labelling reference, that decomposes which components pay off and where the running time goes. We find that the capacity-class cuts account for essentially the entire benefit (adding them to a connectivity-only baseline lifts the number of instances solved from 52 to 64 of 76 and shrinks the search tree more than tenfold), while comb and rounded generalized-large-multistar cuts, reduced-cost fixing, and bound-based propagation add nothing measurable. We also report a negative result: the shortest-path-incompatibility (SPI) cut, a variant of the node-precedence inequalities of García (2009), finds no violated inequality on any instance. The solver and all experiments are released as open, reproducible software (Spoorendonk, 2026).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个完全开源、可复现的分支切割（B&C）算法，用于求解容量约束盈利巡游问题（CPTP）及其变体。基于HiGHS开源MIP求解器重新实现了Jepsen等人（2014）的公式和切割族，并添加了边界预处理、域传播和降成本变量固定。贡献在于提供了首个完全开源的可复现基准，并通过组件研究发现容量类切割是唯一有效的成分，其余切割和优化手段几乎无贡献。
AI.motivation: 现有CPTP问题的分支切割算法依赖于商业求解器或未完全开源，阻碍了结果的可复现性和后续研究的基线建立。作者希望提供一个完全开源、可复现的求解器，并通过组件级分析厘清各个算法成分的实际贡献。
AI.method: 基于HiGHS开源MIP栈重新实现Jepsen等人（2014）的公式与切割族，包括容量类切割、梳子切割、RGM切割、SPI切割等；额外加入基于边界的预处理、域传播和降成本变量固定。通过组件消融实验对比各成分效果，并以动态规划/标号算法作为基准。
AI.result: 容量类切割使求解实例数从52提升至64（共76个），搜索树缩小10倍以上；梳子切割、RGM切割、降成本固定和基于边界的传播无额外收益；SPI切割在所有实例上均未发现违反的不等式。
AI.conclusion: 容量类切割是CPTP分支切割算法中唯一产生实质性收益的成分；其余高级切割和优化技术在此问题上的贡献可忽略不计。论文提供了一个完全开源、可复现的基线，有助于后续研究的公平对比和扩展。

title: Back to Basics: Improving Molecular Understanding in LLMs via SMILES-Graph Translation
summary: Recent advances in molecular large language models have led to strong performance on molecular understanding and generation tasks, yet these gains often come without reliable structural grounding. In particular, existing approaches conflict with the chemistry principle that structure determines function: despite their downstream success, current molecular LLMs perform poorly on basic structure recognition, suggesting that they fail to capture molecular graphs from canonical SMILES. To remedy this, we propose MolBasic, a structure-first framework that strengthens structural comprehension via SMILES-Graph translation. MolBasic is built around a multi-level structure perception benchmark, where bidirectional SMILES-Graph conversion serves as the core task to align sequential and topological representations. On top of this foundation, we employ a progressive learning scheme with a standardized Chain-of-Thought (CoT) to steer models from structure acquisition toward higher-level molecular reasoning. Experiments show that MolBasic substantially improves structural understanding and yields robust gains on downstream tasks, including property prediction and objective optimization, supporting our structure-first paradigm.

AI.tldr: 提出MolBasic框架，通过SMILES-图的双向转换增强分子大语言模型的结构理解能力，显著提升了下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分子大语言模型虽然在下游任务中表现良好，但缺乏可靠的结构基础——它们对基本结构识别任务表现不佳，违背了"结构决定功能"的化学原理，说明未能真正从规范SMILES中捕获分子图结构。
AI.method: 构建了多层次结构感知基准，以双向SMILES-图转换为核心任务，对齐序列与拓扑表示；在此基础上采用渐进式学习方案和标准化的思维链(CoT)，引导模型从结构获取过渡到高级分子推理。
AI.result: MolBasic显著提升了结构理解能力，并在性质预测和目标优化等下游任务中取得了稳健的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 验证了"结构优先"范式的有效性，即先强化结构认知再转向高级推理，是提升分子LLM可靠性的可行途径。

title: Explainable Reinforcement Learning for Adaptive Traffic Signal Control
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for adaptive traffic signal control. However, in safety-critical infrastructure like traffic control, the opaque, black-box nature of deep RL models poses challenges for transportation agency acceptance, regulatory compliance, operational trust, troubleshooting, and fine-tuning. To bridge this gap between high-performance optimization and human-comprehensible interpretability, this effort introduces a novel, explainable entity centric RL framework for safe and transparent traffic signal control. Rather than processing traffic states through monolithic, flat vectors, the proposed architecture disaggregates real-time intersection observations into distinct, high-dimensional lane entities and phase temporal configurations to inherently preserve the structural topology and geometric configurations of the intersection. Relational dependencies and inter-lane conflicts are dynamically extracted via a dual-stage attention network featuring sequential multi-head cross-attention and self-attention blocks. This design yields a real time affinity matrix that quantifies the direct influence of signal phases on specific approach volumes and queues, providing full visual and analytical interpretability. To ensure strict operational reliability, a deterministic action-masking interface is integrated directly into the Proximal Policy Optimization pipeline, explicitly blocking invalid phase transitions to guarantee absolute compliance with established signal timing and safety constraints. Evaluated in a microscopic simulation environment, outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in delay minimization. More importantly, the emergent attention weights align precisely with established traffic engineering principles, offering an auditable, trust-enabling, and deployable architecture for next-generation adaptive traffic control systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种可解释的实体中心强化学习框架，通过双阶段注意力网络和动作掩码机制，在实现交通信号自适应控制优化的同时提供完全的可视化与可分析解释性，并确保安全约束合规。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在交通信号控制中表现优异但模型黑箱化，导致交通部门难以接受、合规困难、运维信任缺失。需在高性能优化与可解释性之间架桥。
AI.method: 1) 实体中心架构：将交叉口观测分解为高维车道实体和相位时序配置，保留结构拓扑；2) 双阶段注意力网络：顺序多头部交叉注意力和自注意力块，生成实时亲和矩阵量化相位与车流关系；3) 确定性动作掩码接口集成到PPO中，阻断无效相位转换确保安全合规。
AI.result: 微观仿真评估中，该方法在延迟最小化方面优于现有基线。注意力权重与既有交通工程原理精准对齐。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一种可审计、可信任、可部署的可解释自适应交通控制架构，适合下一代交通控制系统。

title: Annotating Korean adnominal ending constructions in corpus data: Beyond relative-clause identification
summary: The Korean adnominal ending \texttt{ETM} occurs in diverse noun-modifying constructions, including relative-clause-like modifiers, adjectival and copular forms, bound-noun constructions, and lexicalized expressions. This paper argues that \texttt{ETM} is not a direct marker of relative-clause structure, but a morphological exponent shared by several adnominal constructions. We propose a corpus-based typology that distinguishes these constructions using predicate type, auxiliary structure, argument-structural compatibility, head-noun restriction, and lexicalized patterns. We operationalize the typology as a construction-sensitive annotation layer for the KLUE dependency treebank, implemented through an ordered rule-based procedure and evaluated by manual validation.
