Productive relative-clause-like uses account for 39.4\% of the analyzed instances; the remainder consists mainly of adjectival, copular, bound-nominal, modal, temporal, and collocational constructions. The findings show that Korean relative-clause-like modification cannot be identified from adnominal morphology alone.

AI.tldr: 本文研究韩语定语词尾ETM，发现它并非直接标记关系从句，而是多种定名结构的共享形态成分。通过对KLUE依存树库的标注和人工验证，提出基于语料库的构式类型学，其中真正的关系从句-like用法仅占39.4%。
AI.motivation: 韩语定语词尾ETM出现在多种名词修饰结构中，传统上常被直接视为关系从句标记。作者认为需要区分其在不同构式中的真实功能，避免形态误导。
AI.method: 提出基于语料库的构式类型学，从谓词类型、助动词结构、论元结构兼容性、中心名词限制和词汇化模式五个维度区分构式。将该类型学作为构式敏感标注层应用于KLUE依存树库，通过有序规则流程实现并经过人工验证。
AI.result: 产出的关系从句-like用法仅占39.4%，其余主要为形容词性、系词、束缚名词、情态、时间及搭配构式。
AI.conclusion: 韩语关系从句-like修饰不能仅凭定语形态判断，需要结合多重句法-语义标准进行构式层面的区分。

title: A Gradient Flow Perspective on Minimum MMD Estimation
summary: Minimum maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) estimation has emerged as a robust and likelihood-free alternative to maximum likelihood estimation for parameter estimation. Yet, despite its practical success, the associated optimization problem remains poorly understood, with theoretical guarantees for existing algorithms hinging on convexity assumptions that rarely hold in practice. We address this gap by proposing a preconditioned gradient descent (PGD) scheme, establishing its asymptotic \emph{global} convergence under explicit gradient-dominance and projection-residual conditions. Our approach is inspired by recent progress on MMD gradient flows, a nonparametric descent scheme on the space of probability measures. We provide extensive empirical evidence that our PGD scheme outperforms standard gradient descent across a range of challenging parameter estimation and composite hypothesis testing problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种预条件梯度下降（PGD）方案用于最小最大均值差异（MMD）估计，在梯度主导和投影残差条件下证明了其渐近全局收敛性，并在参数估计和复合假设检验中优于标准梯度下降。
AI.motivation: MMD估计虽在实践中成功，但其优化问题缺乏理论保证，现有算法依赖现实中很少成立的凸性假设。作者旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 提出预条件梯度下降（PGD）方案，受MMD梯度流启发，在梯度主导和投影残差条件下建立渐近全局收敛性理论保证。
AI.result: PGD方案在多个具有挑战性的参数估计和复合假设检验问题中，性能优于标准梯度下降。
AI.conclusion: PGD为MMD估计提供了首个非凸场景下的全局收敛保证，且实验验证了其实际有效性。

title: LLMs for Agentic Home Energy Management
summary: Home Energy Management Systems (HEMS) can reduce residential electricity costs and support demand response, but adoption is limited by the difficulty of translating household preferences into technical scheduling constraints. This paper evaluates whether large language model (LLM) agents can provide a practical natural-language interface for multi-appliance home energy scheduling. We present a tool-calling ReAct agent that uses live half-hourly Octopus Agile prices, weather forecasts, photovoltaic generation estimates, household usage data, and a retrieval-augmented knowledge base to schedule flexible loads against a mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) ground truth. Three commercial models, GPT-4o-mini, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and Claude Sonnet 4.6, are benchmarked across tariff days, constraint-conflict scenarios, weather-aware solar co-optimization, and week-long deployment. With native function calling, all models achieve 100% scheduling success and near-MILP optimality, while text-parsed action interfaces sharply reduce reliability. Constraint testing shows that cost-optimal and safety-optimal models differ: Claude is strongest under infeasibility and power-cap conflicts, while GPT-4o-mini is most efficient. Over a simulated week, agents capture 96.7-98.0% of oracle savings, projecting approximately GBP 1,270 annual savings over an off-peak timer baseline. Code and a live demonstration are available at https://github.com/sokistar24/ecohome-energy-agent and https://www.ecohomeagent.com/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于LLM Agent的工具调用系统，用于多设备家庭能源调度，通过ReAct框架结合MILP最优解，实现了接近最优的经济效益（96.7-98.0%），预计每年可节省约£1,270。
AI.motivation: 家庭能源管理系统（HEMS）虽能降低电费并支持需求响应，但用户难以将日常偏好转化为技术约束条件，导致采用率低。本文旨在探索LLM Agent能否作为自然语言接口解决这一问题。
AI.method: 构建了一个工具调用的ReAct Agent，使用实时Octopus Agile电价、天气预报、光伏发电估计、家庭用电数据及RAG知识库，以MILP为ground truth进行调度。在多种场景下（如电价日、约束冲突、天气感知太阳能协同优化、整周部署）对GPT-4o-mini、Gemini 2.5 Flash、Claude Sonnet 4.6进行基准测试。
AI.result: 所有模型在原生函数调用下均达到100%调度成功率且接近MILP最优；文本解析接口可靠性显著下降。约束测试中，Claude在不可行约束和功率上限冲突下表现最强，GPT-4o-mini效率最高。整周模拟中Agent捕获了96.7-98.0%的oracle收益。
AI.conclusion: LLM Agent可以作为HEMS的自然语言接口，替代传统MILP调度，在经济性和可靠性上表现优异，具备实际部署潜力。

title: Cooperation in Conic Programming with Applications to Control, Production, and Portfolio
summary: We introduce the class of cooperative conic games, a new family of transferable utility games whose characteristic function can be computed by solving a conic optimization problem. This framework unifies a broad range of optimization-based cooperative games within a common mathematical formulation, encompassing linear, second-order cone, semidefinite, and other convex nonlinear optimization problems admitting conic representations. Exploiting the structural properties of conic programs and conic duality theory, we derive general conditions ensuring the existence of core payoff allocations (or cost shares) and show how such allocations can be computed directly from optimal dual solutions. In particular, the proposed methodology replaces combinatorial verification procedures for core nonemptiness with tractable optimization-based criteria. The expressive power of the framework is illustrated through several representative applications. We show that it models cooperation in multi-agent optimal control, generalizes linear production games to nonlinear production settings such as Cobb--Douglas models, introduces cooperative formulations for portfolio selection under Markowitz, conditional value-at-risk, and entropic risk measures, and unifies a broad class of combinatorial optimization games through exact conic reformulations. These examples involve the most relevant cones in modern convex optimization, highlighting both the versatility of the proposed framework and its potential to strengthen the interaction between mathematical programming and cooperative game theory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了合作锥博弈（cooperative conic games）这一新框架，将基于优化的合作博弈统一为锥优化问题，利用锥对偶理论推导出核心分配存在的条件，并展示其在多智能体最优控制、非线性生产博弈、投资组合选择及组合优化博弈等领域的广泛应用。
AI.motivation: 现有基于优化的合作博弈（如线性生产博弈、组合优化博弈等）缺乏统一的数学框架，各领域独立发展导致理论和方法难以迁移。作者希望构建一个能够统一描述各类优化驱动合作博弈的通用理论，并利用锥优化的成熟理论简化核心非空性验证等关键问题。
AI.method: 将合作博弈的特征函数定义为锥优化问题的最优值；利用锥对偶理论（强对偶、互补松弛）推导核心分配存在的充分条件；证明核心分配可直接从最优对偶解中提取，从而将组合验证问题转化为可解的优化问题。
AI.result: 建立了核心非空性的通用优化判据，避免了传统的组合验证过程；通过多个代表性应用（多智能体最优控制、Cobb-Douglas生产博弈、Markowitz及CVaR投资组合博弈、组合优化博弈的锥重构）验证了框架的广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: 合作锥博弈为连接数学规划与合作博弈论提供了统一且强大的理论工具，有望促进两领域的深度融合，并为更多实际应用提供理论基础。

title: Do ECG Foundation Models Transfer to Rare Cardiac Diseases? Evidence from Brugada Syndrome Detection
summary: Background: Foundation models (FMs) trained on large-scale unlabeled physiological data have emerged as a promising paradigm for medical artificial intelligence. Their ability to capture clinically meaningful, transferable representations for rare diseases remains largely unproven. This study investigates whether FM pre-training provides genuine clinical generalization benefits beyond improved optimization for rare electrocardiographic (ECG) phenotypes. Methods: We systematically evaluated nine publicly available ECG FMs for Brugada syndrome detection on the BrSwiss cohort (294 patients, 87 cases) and the independent external HUCA cohort (363 patients, 76 cases), under three strategies (from-scratch training, linear probing, full fine-tuning) across several configurations, including a 3% data ablation and zero-shot cross-site transfers. Results: Pre-training was necessary for high-capacity architectures unable to converge from scratch (AUC gain up to 0.411, p < 0.05), but gave no significant gain for compact architectures already converged on labeled data alone. On full BrSwiss, the best fine-tuned FM (ECG-CPC, AUC = 0.962) only marginally exceeded the strongest supervised baseline (ECG-CPC from scratch, AUC = 0.932; p = 0.091). At matched training-set size, the data-efficiency advantage on BrSwiss-3% (AUC gain = 0.055, p < 0.01) did not replicate on HUCA. Under zero-shot cross-site transfer, FM-based pipelines did not generalize better than supervised baselines, all approaching chance-level performance. Conclusion: For Brugada syndrome detection, FM pre-training is mechanical rather than semantic, providing optimization stability rather than transferable clinical knowledge. These findings challenge the assumption that large-scale pre-training inherently encodes clinically meaningful representations, highlighting the central role of model architecture and data-domain alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了心电图基础模型在Brugada综合征检测中的表现，发现预训练并未带来显著的临床知识迁移，其主要作用在于改善高容量架构的优化稳定性，而非编码有意义的临床表征。
AI.motivation: 探究基础模型在大规模无标签生理数据上的预训练是否能真正为罕见疾病提供临床泛化优势，还是仅仅改善了优化过程。
AI.method: 在BrSwiss和HUCA两个队列上，对9个公开ECG基础模型采用三种训练策略（从头训练、线性探测、全微调）进行系统评估，包括3%数据消融和零样本跨站点迁移实验。
AI.result: 预训练对高容量架构必要（AUC提升0.411），但对紧凑架构无显著增益；最佳微调FM（AUC=0.962）仅略超最强监督基线（AUC=0.932, p=0.091）；数据效率优势在外部队列未复现；零样本迁移均接近随机水平。
AI.conclusion: 在Brugada综合征检测中，FM预训练提供的是优化稳定性而非可迁移的临床知识，挑战了大规模预训练能编码有意义临床表征的假设。

title: Can Conversational Temporal Dynamics Improve Depression Detection in Dyads? A Preliminary Investigation in Multi-Modality Perspectives
summary: Automatic depression detection from clinical interviews typically models the semantic content and acoustic characteristics of participant speech. However, the interactional timing between the clinician and participant remains comparatively under-modeled. We investigate conversational temporal dynamics, specifically dyadic turn-pair timing, as a primary modality fused with self-supervised encoders. Evaluated on the DAIC-WOZ dataset, we compare a compact 24-dimensional timing module against frozen WavLM-large and RoBERTa-large baseline detectors. This temporal module achieves the highest single-modality performance on the development set. Furthermore, a convex-weighted late fusion strategy improves overall performance to 0.804 and 0.669 macro-F1 on the development and test sets, respectively. The learned fusion effectively assigns zero weight to acoustics, demonstrating that conversational timing serves as a lightweight, interpretable complement for dyadic depression screening.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了临床访谈中对话轮次时序（dyadic turn-pair timing）在抑郁症自动检测中的作用，提出一个24维时序模块，并与WavLM-large和RoBERTa-large基线模型对比，通过凸加权融合策略在DAIC-WOZ数据集上达到0.804/0.669 macro-F1，且声学特征被赋予零权重，表明对话时序可作为轻量级、可解释的抑郁症筛查补充模态。
AI.motivation: 现有抑郁症自动检测方法通常建模语义内容和声学特征，但忽略了医患之间对话时序的交互动态，因此作者探索将对话轮次时序作为主要模态进行融合。
AI.method: 提出一个24维的对话轮次时序模块，提取医患双方说话轮次切换的时间特征；采用凸加权晚期融合策略，将该时序模块与WavLM-large（声学）和RoBERTa-large（语义）自监督编码器进行融合。
AI.result: 时序模块在开发集上达到最高单模态性能；融合后开发集macro-F1为0.804，测试集为0.669；融合权重显示声学特征被赋予零权重，时序模块贡献最大。
AI.conclusion: 对话轮次时序是轻量级、可解释且有效的抑郁症检测补充模态，可以与语义特征互补，替代或减少对声学特征的依赖。

title: Optimizing Large Language Models for Causality Assessment in Pharmacovigilance: Developing a Performance Metric as Objective for Bayesian Hyperparameter Optimization
summary: Background: Growing individual case safety report (ICSR) volumes have intensified demand for scalable automated causality assessment. Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise, yet performance on clinically demanding tasks remains suboptimal and inference-time hyperparameter optimization has not been investigated. Objective: To develop a Gaussian Process (GP)-compatible optimization objective and investigate whether temperature optimization improves LLM-expert agreement on Naranjo causality assessment of FAERS ICSRs. Methods: Expert causality assessments were performed on 723 stratified FAERS cases. OpenAI's GPT-5.2 was evaluated using chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting. Four composite metrics were developed: Weighted Cosine Similarity (WCS), Information-Weighted Agreement Score (IWAS), Entropy-Weighted Agreement and Cosine Similarity Score (EWACS), and Consensus-Weighted Cosine Similarity (CWCS) and Bayesian optimization using a GP surrogate with Probability of Improvement (PoI) acquisition was applied across temperature [0, 2]. Results: GPT-5.2 outperformed prior biomedical LLMs at baseline (T = 0), achieving 74.1% agreement on question 5 and 65.4% on question 10 of Naranjo algorithm. Entropy analysis identified these as the sole informative optimization targets. Temperature showed no systematic population-level effect (\b{eta} = 0.002, p = 0.959). EWACS-guided Bayesian optimization improved causality classification agreement from 45.0% to 72.0% (+27 pp), with the largest gain in Doubtful cases (+42.9 pp). Conclusion: EWACS was identified as the optimal GP-compatible metric. The absence of a universal temperature optimum indicates LLM performance is driven primarily by ICSR content, yet case-specific temperature selection produced meaningful improvements, supporting temperature optimization for LLM-assisted pharmacovigilance.

AI.tldr: 该研究探索了通过高斯过程贝叶斯优化GPT-5.2的温度参数，以提升其在纳兰乔因果关系评估中与专家的一致性。研究发现EWACS是最优优化指标，温度无全局最优值但个案级优化可提升分类一致性（最高提升27个百分点），表明温度优化对LLM辅助药物警戒具有价值。
AI.motivation: 随着个体病例安全报告（ICSR）数量持续增长，对可扩展的自动化因果关系评估需求日益迫切。大型语言模型（LLMs）虽有潜力，但在临床高要求任务上表现欠佳，且推理时的超参数优化（尤其是温度参数）尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 在723例分层FAERS病例上，由专家进行纳兰乔因果关系评估。使用GPT-5.2结合链式思维（CoT）提示进行推理。开发了四种复合评估指标（WCS、IWAS、EWACS、CWCS），并采用基于高斯过程（GP）代理模型与改进概率（PoI）采集函数的贝叶斯优化方法，在温度范围[0, 2]内进行优化。
AI.result: GPT-5.2在基线（T=0）表现优于先前生物医学LLM，在纳兰乔算法第5题和第10题上分别达到74.1%和65.4%的一致性。熵分析确定这两题为唯一有信息量的优化目标。温度无系统性总体效应（β=0.002, p=0.959）。EWACS引导的贝叶斯优化将因果关系分类一致性从45.0%提升至72.0%（+27 pp），其中Doubtful病例提升最大（+42.9 pp）。
AI.conclusion: EWACS被确定为最优GP兼容优化指标。不存在通用的最佳温度值，LLM性能主要由ICSR内容驱动；但个案级温度选择可带来有意义的改进，支持将温度优化纳入LLM辅助的药物警戒流程。

title: Telescope: Improving Zero Shot Detection of LLM Generated Content By Measuring Token Repetition Probability
summary: Distinguishing Large Language Model (LLM) generated text from human writing is a critical and difficult challenge. While LLMs are trained to write like humans, we hypothesize that this training leaves an indelible mark. LLMs develop a particularly strong aversion to token repetition very early in training. This bias persists as a ''Vestigial Heuristic'' (a developmental artifact) that is activated in LLM-generated text, separating LLM from human writing. To probe this phenomenon, we introduce Telescope Perplexity, a metric that evaluates the token repetition of the model, $P(s_i | s_{1:i})$ . Our empirical investigation reveals that the Telescope Perplexity signature emerges early in pre-training, and Telescope Perplexity empirically enables highly effective zero-shot LLM detection. We show state-of-the-art or competitive performance across diverse datasets (including modern evaluation sets we introduce), reference models, and perturbation schemes with greater efficiency than other methods.

AI.tldr: 本文发现LLM在训练早期就形成了对token重复的强烈厌恶，这种“退化启发式”偏差持续存在于LLM生成文本中。作者提出Telescope Perplexity指标来评估token重复模式，在零样本LLM检测任务上取得了SOTA或相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 区分LLM生成文本与人类写作是一个关键且困难的挑战，现有方法效率或泛化能力有限，需要更高效且有效的检测方法。
AI.method: 提出Telescope Perplexity指标，用于评估模型的token重复模式P(s_i|s_{1:i})，利用LLM在训练早期形成的对token重复的强烈厌恶偏差（称为“退化启发式”）来区分LLM文本与人类文本。
AI.result: Telescope Perplexity在不同数据集、参考模型和扰动方案上均取得了SOTA或具有竞争力的检测性能，且效率高于其他方法。该信号在预训练早期就已出现。
AI.conclusion: LLM的token重复厌恶偏差是一种训练早期的发育痕迹（退化启发式），可作为高效零样本检测的有效信号，Telescope Perplexity为此提供了实用的度量工具。

title: Short-Horizon Sparse Model Predictive Control for Precipitation Reduction Using Numerical Weather Prediction
summary: This study proposes a precipitation control framework integrating a realistic Numerical Weather Prediction (NWP) model with model predictive control (MPC). At each control instant in MPC, a finite-difference sensitivity matrix is constructed from the NWP model and used as a local linear model of how perturbations to the atmospheric state affect future precipitation. A sparse convex optimization problem is then solved to compute the control input, which is implemented as a perturbation to the atmospheric state. To reduce computational cost in sensitivity analysis, multiple grid points in the NWP model are treated collectively as a single block, and a uniform perturbation is applied to all points within each block. Moreover, a tailored convex optimization problem is introduced to effectively control the accumulated precipitation at the end of a weather event, using a prediction horizon much shorter than the entire event duration while promoting spatially sparse atmospheric perturbations. To evaluate the proposed MPC method, four control methods are compared: (i) initial-only open-loop optimal control (IO-OL), (ii) full-horizon open-loop optimal control (FH-OL), (iii) shrinking-horizon optimal control (SHOC) with a fixed terminal time, and (iv) single-move MPC with a fixed prediction-horizon length. Numerical experiments on a warm bubble benchmark demonstrate that MPC achieves precipitation reduction comparable to SHOC while reducing the total computational time relative to FH-OL and SHOC. Moreover, despite using a linear prediction model, MPC successfully achieves a challenging level of precipitation reduction, even when open-loop optimal control methods, namely, IO-OL and FH-OL, fail because of nonlinear atmospheric evolution. These findings suggest that MPC is a promising control framework for NWP-based precipitation reduction in complex weather events.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种将数值天气预报(NWP)模型与模型预测控制(MPC)相结合的降水控制框架。通过构建灵敏度矩阵和稀疏凸优化求解控制输入，MPC在计算效率上优于传统开环优化方法，并能在非线性大气演化下实现显著的降水削减效果。
AI.motivation: 现有降水控制方法在处理复杂天气事件时，面临非线性大气演化导致开环优化失败、计算成本过高等问题，亟需一种高效且鲁棒的控制框架。
AI.method: 1) 将NWP模型与MPC结合，在每一控制时刻构建有限差分灵敏度矩阵作为局部线性模型；2) 采用分块策略对多个网格点统一施加扰动以降低计算成本；3) 设计定制化凸优化问题，用较短预测时窗控制整个事件累积降水，并促进空间稀疏扰动。
AI.result: 在暖泡泡基准实验中，MPC实现了与SHOC相当的降水削减效果，同时总计算时间低于FH-OL和SHOC。此外，在IO-OL和FH-OL因非线性演化失败的情况下，MPC仍能成功实现挑战性的降水削减目标。
AI.conclusion: MPC是一种有前景的基于NWP的降水控制框架，尤其适用于复杂的非线性天气事件，兼顾了控制效果与计算效率。

title: Constrained Flow Matching via Lagrangian Dual Flows
summary: Flow matching is a powerful tool for generative modeling, but emerging applications in robotics, planning, and physics require inference-time constraints on generated outputs. Such constraints are often complex and highly nonlinear. As a result, methods designed for linear constraints like image inpainting are rarely sufficient, and projection or optimization-based alternatives can be prohibitively expensive. In this paper, we introduce Lagrangian Dual Flows, a new family of constrained generation techniques based on Lagrangian dual dynamics. By simply flowing a dual co-state alongside generated samples, we can guarantee nonlinear constraint satisfaction without expensive optimization subproblems, pseudoinverses, or projection steps during the denoising process. The resulting constrained generation algorithms are simple, effective, and open new theoretical connections between flow matching and primal-dual methods in numerical optimization.

AI.tldr: 提出 Lagrangian Dual Flows，通过在生成过程中引入对偶协态变量，在无需昂贵优化子问题或投影步骤的情况下，保证非线性约束满足。
AI.motivation: 机器人、规划、物理等新兴应用需要生成模型在推理时满足复杂非线性约束，现有方法（如线性约束的图像修复、投影或优化方法）成本过高或不适用。
AI.method: 将拉格朗日对偶动力学引入流匹配，在去噪过程中简单地让对偶协态随样本一同流动，从而保证非线性约束满足。
AI.result: 无需昂贵的优化子问题、伪逆或投影步骤，即可保证非线性约束满足，算法简单有效。
AI.conclusion: 建立了流匹配与数值优化中原-对偶方法之间的新理论联系，为约束生成提供了新范式。

title: Can Model Merging Improve Aggregation in DiLoCo?
summary: Model merging techniques, which aggregate independently finetuned models into one to combine their capabilities, have become a topic of significant interest in recent years, with a broad array of methods having been proposed to tackle this problem. Simultaneously, an emerging trend in distributed learning has been the use of methods such as local SGD and DiLoCo, which greatly reduce communication costs by periodically aggregating the independently trained local models. However, these communication-efficient methods have been shown to degrade in performance relative to the FLOP-matched data-parallel gold standard as the number of independent local models grows and as the number of local training steps before global communication is increased. In this work, we draw an explicit analogy between the pseudo-gradient aggregation step in local SGD/DiLoCo and task arithmetic-based model merging, establishing a straightforward way to utilize merging methods in the context of distributed optimization. We then evaluate multiple state-of-the-art model merging methods in this setting and identify one method in particular, Iso-C, as a promising approach for improving DiLoCo. We find that DiLoCo SGD with Iso-C aggregation outperforms not only simple pseudo-gradient averaging but even the momentum-based DiLoCo, despite lacking a momentum mechanism itself. Building on this finding, we propose IsoLoCo, which adapts Iso-C for distributed training by equipping it with Nesterov momentum. Our empirical evaluations on language model pre-training across varying numbers of local workers show that IsoLoCo significantly outperforms DiLoCo, with the gap between them widening as the number of workers increases. This advantage remains present across model sizes and inner step counts, confirming that merging-inspired aggregation is an effective strategy for low-communication distributed training.

AI.tldr: 本文借鉴任务算术中的模型合并方法（Iso-C），将其应用于分布式训练中本地SGD/DiLoCo的伪梯度聚合步骤，提出IsoLoCo算法。实验表明，IsoLoCo在语言模型预训练中显著优于DiLoCo，且随着worker数量增加优势扩大。
AI.motivation: 分布式训练中通信高效方法（如本地SGD、DiLoCo）随着本地模型数量和训练步数增加，性能相比FLOP匹配的数据并行基线会退化。作者希望找到更好的聚合策略来改善这一问题。
AI.method: 1) 建立本地SGD/DiLoCo的伪梯度聚合与任务算术模型合并之间的显式类比；2) 在分布式优化中评估多种SOTA模型合并方法，发现Iso-C效果最佳；3) 提出IsoLoCo，将Iso-C与Nesterov动量结合，适配分布式训练场景。
AI.result: IsoLoCo在语言模型预训练中显著优于DiLoCo，且随着worker数量增加优势扩大；该优势在不同模型大小和内步数下均保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 受模型合并启发的聚合策略是低通信分布式训练的有效方法，Iso-C/IsoLoCo能够在不引入动量机制的情况下超越基于动量的DiLoCo。

title: Bridging Interleaved Multi-Modal Reasoning as a Unified Decision Process
summary: Unified multi-modal models (UMMs) have shown promising interleaved text-image reasoning capabilities, yet effectively optimizing such multi-turn generation via reinforcement learning (RL) remains an open challenge. Existing approaches apply RL exclusively to text steps, relegating image generation to supervised surrogates, preventing policy gradients from propagating through the full interleaved trajectory across heterogeneous modalities. This leaves the potential of RL for UMMs largely untapped. In the paper, we introduce \textbf{BRAID} (\textbf{B}ridging inte\textbf{R}le\textbf{A}ved mult\textbf{I}-modal reasoning as a unified \textbf{D}ecision process), a simple framework that casts multi-turn text-image-text reasoning as a unified Markov decision process (MDP), enabling joint optimization of textual and visual generation via a single, principled RL objective. BRAID computes a shared trajectory-level advantage and propagates it coherently into both text tokens and image denoising paths, each optimized through its modality-native policy gradient mechanism. To further address long-horizon credit assignment, BRAID employs a vision-language model (VLM) judge that scores each intermediate image on its reasoning utility, supplying dense turn-level feedback to sharpen learning at critical visual branches. Experiments on spatial reasoning and visual perception benchmarks show that BRAID consistently outperforms various baselines, confirming that a unified MDP formulation with vision-thinking guidance is essential for effective multi-modal reasoning.

AI.tldr: BRAID将多轮文本-图像-文本推理统一建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），通过共享轨迹级优势传播和视觉-语言模型（VLM）裁判提供的密集回合级反馈，实现了对文本与图像生成的联合强化学习优化，在空间推理和视觉感知任务上显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型（UMMs）在多轮文本-图像生成中，强化学习仅应用于文本步骤，图像生成依赖监督代理，导致策略梯度无法跨异质模态传播，未能充分利用RL的潜力。
AI.method: 提出BRAID框架：1) 将多轮文本-图像-文本推理建模为统一MDP；2) 计算共享轨迹级优势，分别通过文本token和图像去噪路径的模态原生策略梯度机制传播；3) 引入VLM裁判为每张中间图像提供推理效用评分，提供密集回合级反馈以解决长时信用分配问题。
AI.result: 在空间推理和视觉感知基准上，BRAID一致优于多种基线方法，验证了统一MDP建模与视觉思维引导对多模态推理的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 统一MDP公式化与视觉-语言模型引导的密集反馈机制是实现高效多模态推理的关键，为UMMs的强化学习优化提供了新范式。

title: GRASP: Graph-Reasoning Aided Survey Planning for High-Fidelity Related Work Generation
comment: 23 pages, 3 figures. Published in Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026
summary: Writing a literature review requires a deep understanding of the relationships among cited papers: how they build on, challenge, or offer alternative perspectives to one another. We present Graph-Reasoning Aided Survey Planning (GRASP), a framework combining LLM planning for related work generation with graph algorithms to extract key relationships among cited papers. Our two-layer graph structure consists of a Graph of Thoughts and an Argument-Counterargument Planning Network, representing the cited papers at different levels of granularity, and we apply topology-aware pruning via a Steiner tree to identify the core inter-paper relationships captured in our graph. Our citation analysis-based evaluation shows that GRASP generates related work sections (RWS) that closely match human-written targets in terms of the discourse roles, intents, and grouping of citations.

AI.tldr: 提出GRASP框架，结合大模型规划与图算法，通过双层图结构和Steiner树剪枝生成高质量的相关工作章节。
AI.motivation: 撰写文献综述需要深入理解引用论文之间的关系（如继承、挑战或提供替代视角），现有方法难以自动捕捉这些复杂关系。
AI.method: 构建双层图结构：思维图（GoT）和论点-反论点规划网络（APN），分别表示论文在不同粒度上的关系；应用拓扑感知的Steiner树剪枝以提取核心论文间关系。
AI.result: 基于引文分析的评估表明，GRASP生成的相关工作章节在话语角色、意图和引文分组方面与人工撰写的目标高度匹配。
AI.conclusion: GRASP框架能有效生成高质量的相关工作章节，在多个维度上接近人工水平。

title: A Unified Framework for In-Context Learning with Causal and Masked Language Models
summary: In-context learning (ICL) has emerged as a central capability of pretrained language models, yet its theoretical analysis has focused primarily on causal language models trained by left-to-right autoregressive prediction, such as GPT-style models. Masked language models instead recover masked tokens from bidirectional context, and their role in ICL remains less understood. We develop a statistical learning framework that represents the context examples by their empirical measure and models prediction as a function of the context and the query. This formulation places autoregressive and masked pretraining objectives within a common excess-risk analysis. Under Wasserstein-type regularity conditions, we relate pretraining with T tasks and N samples per task to k-shot excess risk at inference, obtaining same-order upper bounds for masked and autoregressive objectives. We also study task-distribution shift, where pretraining tasks are sampled from P and inference tasks from Q; the resulting bound contains an additional term controlled by the lifted Wasserstein distance between P and Q. The bounds further imply an order-optimal allocation under a fixed pretraining data budget and refined rates under intrinsic low-dimensional structure. Experiments on controlled function-learning tasks show that the Masked Pair Encoder (MPE) can achieve performance comparable to GPT-2-style causal Transformers, suggesting that ICL behavior is not specific to causal language models.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了一个统计学习框架，统一分析掩码语言模型和自回归语言模型的上下文学习能力，证明了在Wasserstein正则性条件下两者具有相同量级的上界，并实验验证了掩码模型能达到与因果模型相当的ICL性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ICL理论分析主要聚焦于自回归因果语言模型（如GPT），而掩码语言模型在ICL中的作用尚不明确，缺乏统一的理论框架来比较两种预训练目标下的ICL能力。
AI.method: 提出统计学习框架：用经验测度表示上下文示例，建模预测为上下文和查询的函数；在Wasserstein型正则性条件下，将T个任务、每任务N样本的预训练与k-shot推理的过量风险关联；分析任务分布偏移下的边界；考虑低维内在结构下的优化分配。
AI.result: 掩码和自回归目标获得相同量级的上界；任务分布偏移下边界增加由提升Wasserstein距离控制的额外项；得到固定预训练数据预算下的阶最优分配方案；实验表明掩码对编码器（MPE）能达到与GPT-2风格因果Transformer相当的ICL性能。
AI.conclusion: ICL行为并非因果语言模型所特有，掩码语言模型同样具备强大的上下文学习能力，理论框架为统一理解两种模型的ICL提供了基础。

title: Cross-Scale Performance Analysis of Metaheuristic Algorithms for Simultaneous DG and DSTATCOM Placement in Radial Distribution Networks
summary: The problem of simultaneous placement of distributed generators and DSTATCOMs in radial distribution networks (RDNs) is a combinatorial mixed-integer optimization problem whose scalability with growing decision dimensionality has been insufficiently explored. A cross-scale analysis of seven metaheuristic algorithms, GWO, SCA, PSO, WOA, GA, HHO and SMA, is conducted on the IEEE 33-bus, 69-bus, and 136-bus systems at three problem dimensions \( d = 4, 8, 12 \), with 30 independent runs per configuration being validated through Wilcoxon and Friedman tests. Mean-performance statistics are extended with a Catastrophic Failure Rate (CFR) metric. The main result will be that dimensional scaling serves as a behavioral discriminator. The Friedman \( χ^2 \) rises with the dimensionality, reaching its maximum value of \( χ^2 = 143.79 \) in the 136-bus at \( d = 12 \) that corresponds to the progressive phase separation of the algorithms into two clusters of high and low performance. GA is the best performer in terms of the lowest rank in all the configurations. SCA has low variance but convergence to increasingly sub-optimal solutions. HHO exhibits catastrophic instability at all scales. Perhaps most strikingly, GA and PSO obtain a \( 3.3\% \) CFR on the 136-bus at \( d = 12 \) while the 33-bus at identical dimensionality has a \( 73\%-83\% \) CFR, showing that topology influences the reliability in a manner that is not captured by single-system measures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过7种元启发式算法在3种IEEE配电系统（33、69、136节点）及3种问题维度（d=4,8,12）上的交叉分析，发现维度扩展是算法行为的判别器。GA在所有配置中表现最优，SCA方差低但收敛于次优解，HHO存在灾难性不稳定。令人惊讶的是，相同维度下拓扑复杂度对算法可靠性有显著影响，而单系统指标无法捕捉这一现象。
AI.motivation: 分布式发电机和DSTATCOM在辐射状配电网中的联合选址是一个混合整数组合优化问题，现有研究对其在高维决策空间下的可扩展性探索不足。
AI.method: 在IEEE 33、69、136节点系统上，对GWO、SCA、PSO、WOA、GA、HHO和SMA七种元启发式算法在三种问题维度（d=4,8,12）下进行30次独立运行，采用Wilcoxon和Friedman统计检验，并引入灾难性失败率（CFR）指标进行性能评估。
AI.result: Friedman χ²随维度上升，在136节点d=12时达最大值143.79，算法分裂为高、低性能两簇。GA在所有配置中排名最低（最优）。SCA低方差但趋于次优。HHO在所有尺度上均表现出灾难性不稳定。GA和PSO在136节点d=12时CFR仅3.3%，而同维度33节点CFR高达73%-83%。
AI.conclusion: 维度扩展可作为算法行为的判别器；拓扑复杂度显著影响算法可靠性，且这种影响无法由单一系统指标捕获；GA是综合最优选择，HHO不适用于该问题。

title: Rockafellian relaxation and minimum-norm slack for the Walrasian equilibrium problem
summary: We propose a Rockafellian relaxation of the Walrasian equilibrium problem for an exchange economy that may not admit one. Market clearing is slackened by a non-negative variable $v$ whose norm is penalized; the relaxation is well posed throughout. As the penalty grows, the residual converges to a vector $v^*_\infty$ of minimum norm in the feasible range of excess demand, measuring the distance to the nearest equilibrium-admitting economy. A stressed Shapley--Shubik example recovers the analytical infeasibility floor to machine

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种Rockafellian松弛方法来解决可能不存在Walras均衡的交换经济问题。通过引入非负变量v来放松市场出清条件，并对v的范数进行惩罚，使得松弛问题适定。随着惩罚增加，残差收敛到超额需求可行范围内的最小范数向量v*∞，用于衡量与最近的均衡经济之间的距离。通过一个压力化的Shapley-Shubik例子，解析地恢复了不可行性下限。
AI.motivation: 传统Walras均衡问题在某些交换经济中可能无解，需要一种方法衡量经济与均衡状态之间的距离，并找到最近的均衡经济。
AI.method: 采用Rockafellian松弛方法，通过引入非负松弛变量v放松市场出清条件，并对v的范数进行惩罚，将原问题转化为适定的优化问题。
AI.result: 随着惩罚参数增大，松弛问题的残差收敛到超额需求可行范围内的最小范数向量v*∞，该向量度量了原经济与最近均衡经济之间的距离。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效处理无均衡经济的问题，并通过压力化的Shapley-Shubik例子验证了其解析可行性。

title: Out-of-distribution Neural Inference in Dynamical Ising Models
summary: Neural networks are increasingly used to infer hidden physical structure from dynamical observations, yet it remains unclear whether their out-of-distribution performance reflects transferable physical rule learning. We address this question in a controlled inverse problem: reconstructing interaction graphs of a kinetic Ising model from Glauber magnetization trajectories. Across convolutional, graph, Transformer, and hybrid architectures, we find that data-driven training produces distinct and reproducible statistical strategies under topology and temperature shifts. Edge-population diagnostics reveal that Transformer-based models tend to preserve the link density of the training ensemble, whereas convolutional models can collapse toward sparse- or no-link predictions that appear out-of-distribution stable by exploiting the majority no-link class. Thus, high in-distribution accuracy and apparent out-of-distribution robustness do not necessarily imply a learned dynamics-to-structure rule. Instead, neural reconstruction can be governed by architecture-dependent statistical priors. Our results identify a concrete failure mode of standard data-driven learning in physical inverse problems and motivate rule-guided principles for machine-learning-assisted scientific discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了神经网络在从动力学观测数据中推断隐藏物理结构时的分布外泛化能力。以动力学Ising模型的反问题为实验平台，发现不同架构（CNN、GNN、Transformer等）的数据驱动训练会产生不同的统计策略，高分布内精度和分布外鲁棒性并不代表学到了真正的物理规则，而是依赖于架构的统计先验。
AI.motivation: 探究神经网络在物理反问题中是否真正学到了可迁移的物理规则，还是依赖于统计先验，特别是当数据分布发生偏移时。
AI.method: 以动力学Ising模型（Glauber动力学）的交互图重建为受控反问题，对比卷积、图、Transformer及混合架构在不同拓扑和温度偏移下的表现，采用边群体诊断（edge-population diagnostics）分析各架构的统计策略。
AI.result: Transformer倾向于保持训练集的链接密度；卷积模型则趋向于预测稀疏或无链接（利用多数"无链接"类别实现分布外稳定）。高分布内精度和表面上的分布外鲁棒性并不等于学到了动力学到结构的真实规则。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的神经网络在物理反问题中存在架构依赖的统计先验这一失败模式，需引入规则引导原则来辅助科学发现。

title: Folding, Reasoning, and Scaling with Open-source Drug Discovery Engine
summary: Accurately modeling biomolecular interactions is a central bottleneck in biology and therapeutic discovery. Here, we introduce Open Drug Discovery Engine (OpenDDE), an open-source, all-atom biomolecular foundation model that uses co-folding as the entry point to a scalable AI-driven drug discovery engine. Rather than treating structure prediction as an isolated endpoint, OpenDDE is designed as a shared structural reasoning layer for modeling sequence-structure-function relationships across biomolecular complexes, enabling complex structure prediction today while providing a foundation for de novo design, affinity estimation, structure-conditioned optimization, and more. OpenDDE integrates advances in all-atom architecture, atomic latent reasoning, inference optimization, and large-scale data processing to achieve IsoDDE-level co-folding accuracy within a reproducible and openly accessible framework. We also identify two scaling-law directions for co-folding models, revealing practical routes for continued improvement through data, model, inference, and training scaling. By releasing training code, inference pipelines, checkpoints, and benchmarks, OpenDDE aims to democratize access to frontier biomolecular intelligence, accelerate global collaboration, and lay an open foundation for next-generation drug discovery systems that can move from predicting molecular structures toward designing, scoring, and optimizing therapeutic candidates for human health.

AI.tldr: OpenDDE是一个开源的全原子生物分子基础模型，以共折叠为入口，构建可扩展的AI驱动药物发现引擎，实现结构预测、从头设计、亲和力估计等功能，并通过开放框架推动药物发现民主化。
AI.motivation: 精确建模生物分子相互作用是生物学和治疗发现的核心瓶颈，现有方法将结构预测视为孤立终点，缺乏统一的可扩展框架。
AI.method: 采用全原子架构、原子潜在推理、推理优化和大规模数据处理，以共折叠作为共享结构推理层，建模序列-结构-功能关系。
AI.result: 达到IsoDDE级别的共折叠精度；识别出共折叠模型的两个缩放律方向（数据、模型、推理、训练缩放），为持续改进提供路线。
AI.conclusion: 通过开源训练代码、推理管线、检查点和基准测试，OpenDDE旨在民主化前沿生物分子智能，加速全球协作，为下一代药物发现系统奠定开放基础。

title: SelfMem: Self-Optimizing Memory for AI Agents
summary: While current AI agents support increasingly long context windows, tool use, and skill execution for long-horizon tasks, they still require memory systems to effectively leverage historical experience. Existing memory frameworks typically rely on fixed storage, retrieval, and summarization mechanisms, which can be rigid across different tasks and often require manual tuning. To address this limitation, we propose SelfMem, a self-optimizing memory framework. Inspired by prior work on self-improving AI, we follow the principle of "teaching an agent to fish rather than giving it a fish." Instead of forcing the model to follow a predefined memory strategy or format, SelfMem provides an environment with memory tools and feedback signals that allow the agent to explore, evaluate, and refine its own memory strategy. Our results show that SelfMem consistently outperforms retrieval, compression, and agent-memory baselines on BEAM across conversation scales from 100K to 1M tokens. Compared with the strongest baseline, SelfMem improves the official score by 48.7%, 40.8%, and 41.9% at 100K, 500K, and 1M, respectively. Further question-type analysis shows broad robustness across diverse memory demands, and our optimization study shows that model-guided strategy refinement further improves performance.

AI.tldr: SelfMem是一个自我优化的记忆框架，它不预设固定的记忆策略，而是让AI智能体通过环境反馈和记忆工具自主探索、评估和优化记忆策略。在BEAM基准测试上，SelfMem在100K到1M token的对话规模下，相比最强基线提升了40%以上。
AI.motivation: 现有AI智能体虽然支持长上下文、工具使用和长期任务执行，但仍需记忆系统来有效利用历史经验。然而，现有的记忆框架依赖固定的存储、检索和摘要机制，在不同任务下显得僵化，且需要手动调整参数。
AI.method: SelfMem遵循"授人以渔"原则，不为模型预设记忆策略或格式，而是提供一个包含记忆工具和反馈信号的环境，让智能体自主探索、评估和优化其记忆策略。记忆策略通过模型引导的策略优化来不断改进。
AI.result: 在BEAM基准上，SelfMem在100K、500K和1M token三种对话规模下均一致优于检索、压缩和智能体记忆基线。相比最强基线，官方得分分别提升48.7%、40.8%和41.9%。进一步的问题类型分析显示该方法对多样化记忆需求具有广泛的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SelfMem通过让智能体自主学习记忆策略而非使用固定规则，显著提升了长对话场景下的性能。模型引导的策略优化进一步改善了结果，证明了自我优化记忆策略的有效性。

title: Pathological Regimes of Closed-Loop Recommendation Systems over Social Networks
summary: This paper addresses the problem of designing recommendation systems for social networks and e-commerce platforms from a control-theoretic perspective. We formulate recommendation design as an infinite-horizon state-feedback optimal control problem whose performance index rewards alignment/engagement while penalizing polarization, large deviations from an uncontrolled baseline, recommendation mismatch, control effort, and exposure disagreement across neighboring users. We derive explicit spectral conditions under which the reduced quadratic stage cost is strictly positive-definite, and we show that the failure of these conditions makes the resulting recommendation design exhibit pathological behaviors, such as unstable free modes, non-attainment of the infimum, or failure of the stationary affine synthesis.

AI.tldr: 本文从控制理论视角将推荐系统设计建模为无限时域状态反馈最优控制问题，通过显式谱条件确保二次阶段成本正定，并揭示了条件失效时推荐系统可能出现的病态行为（如不稳定自由模态、下确界无法达到、稳态仿射合成失效）。
AI.motivation: 现有社交网络和电商平台的推荐系统设计缺乏控制理论视角的形式化分析，尤其在处理极化、用户分歧和推荐失配等复杂动态行为时存在理论盲区。
AI.method: 将推荐设计建模为无限时域状态反馈最优控制问题，构建包含对齐/参与度奖励及极化、基线偏差、推荐失配、控制代价、用户间暴露分歧等多维度惩罚的性能指标，并通过谱条件分析二次阶段成本的正定性。
AI.result: 推导了确保二次阶段成本严格正定的显式谱条件，揭示了条件失效会导致系统出现不稳定自由模态、下确界不可达及稳态仿射合成失效等病态行为。
AI.conclusion: 该控制理论框架为推荐系统的稳定性分析提供了形式化工具，谱条件可作为设计安全、非病理推荐系统的理论指导。

title: Risk Sensitive Filtering for Singular Systems subject to Round-Robin Protocol
summary: This paper develops a risk sensitive (RS) Kalman filtering framework for discrete-time linear stochastic singular systems operating under communication constraints imposed by a round-robin protocol. Due to limited network bandwidth, only a subset of the available measurements can be transmitted at each sampling instant, resulting in a periodically varying measurement structure. By employing the Weierstrass canonical form (WCF), the singular system is transformed into an equivalent augmented state space model, yielding a round-robin induced periodic system (RRIPS). A recursive risk sensitive Kalman filter (RSKF) is then developed for the RRIPS through a Bayesian formulation and the minimization of an exponential quadratic cost function, from which the recursive filtering equations are obtained for the original singular system. To enhance robustness against modeling uncertainties and disturbances, an adaptive RS mechanism is introduced in which the risk parameter is adjusted online according to the available covariance information. This adaptive strategy guarantees the positive definiteness of the predicted covariance matrix while adjusting the degree of risk sensitivity to the prevailing estimation uncertainty. Furthermore, sufficient conditions ensuring the filter stability are established using the observability and controllability concepts of periodic systems. The proposed framework reduces to the standard KF for singular systems when the RS parameter vanishes and recovers the standard RSKF when the singular matrix reduces to the identity matrix. Finally, numerical results are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness, robustness, and improved estimation performance of the proposed approach in comparison with the standard KF.

AI.tldr: 本文针对通信受限（round-robin协议）下的离散时间线性随机奇异系统，提出了一种风险敏感卡尔曼滤波框架。通过Weierstrass标准型变换和贝叶斯方法，推导出递归滤波方程，并引入自适应风险参数调整机制以增强鲁棒性，同时给出了滤波器稳定性的充分条件。
AI.motivation: 现有奇异系统的卡尔曼滤波研究较少考虑通信约束（尤其是round-robin协议）和风险敏感性的结合，而实际系统中网络带宽限制和模型不确定性普遍存在，亟需一种既能处理系统奇异性又能应对通信约束和不确定性的鲁棒滤波方法。
AI.method: 首先利用Weierstrass标准型将奇异系统转化为等价的增广状态空间模型，得到round-robin协议诱导的周期系统；然后通过贝叶斯框架和指数二次代价函数的最小化，推导出递归的风险敏感卡尔曼滤波器；进一步提出自适应机制，根据协方差信息在线调整风险参数，保证预测协方差的正定性；最后利用周期系统的能观性和能控性概念建立滤波器稳定性的充分条件。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，所提出的自适应风险敏感卡尔曼滤波器在估计性能和鲁棒性方面优于标准卡尔曼滤波器。当风险参数为零时退化为标准奇异系统KF，当奇异矩阵为单位矩阵时退化为标准RSKF。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功将风险敏感滤波框架拓展到受round-robin通信约束的奇异系统，自适应机制有效增强了模型不确定性和扰动下的鲁棒性，为网络化奇异系统的状态估计提供了理论依据和实用方案。

title: OmniFocus: Query-Guided Modality-Balanced Token Compression for Omni-Modal Large Language Models
summary: Omni modal large language models (OmniLLMs) have attracted wide attention for their ability to jointly process audio and video, but they generate large token sequences under audio-visual inputs, leading to substantial inference cost. Existing audio-visual token compression methods often rely on unimodal guidance, overlooking the temporal locality of query-relevant evidence in audio-visual inputs and implicitly assuming that the two modalities share a temporally aligned information density distribution. We propose \textbf{OmniFocus}, a training-free query-guided token compression method for OmniLLMs that performs independent importance estimation for video and audio, enabling a modality-symmetric compression design that preserves modality-specific salient evidence while maintaining audio-visual alignment, thereby mitigating the modality bias issue that can arise from unimodal-guided compression. Experiments on the Qwen2.5-Omni model family across four audio-visual benchmarks show that OmniFocus maintains strong compressed performance at low token retention ratios and outperforms existing baselines on several major benchmark scores at 25\% token retention. On DailyOmni with Qwen2.5-Omni-7B at 25\% token retention, OmniFocus maintains 59.40 accuracy while delivering up to 1.38$\times$ prefill speedup relative to the full-token baseline, highlighting a favorable practical accuracy-efficiency trade-off.

AI.tldr: 提出了OmniFocus，一种无需训练的查询引导令牌压缩方法，用于多模态大语言模型，在保持性能的同时实现最高1.38倍预填充加速。
AI.motivation: 现有的音频-视觉令牌压缩方法通常依赖单模态引导，忽略了查询相关证据在音频-视觉输入中的时间局部性，并隐含假设两种模态共享时间对齐的信息密度分布，导致模态偏差问题。
AI.method: 提出OmniFocus，一种训练无关的查询引导令牌压缩方法，对视频和音频进行独立重要性估计，实现模态对称的压缩设计，保留各自模态的显著证据同时保持音频-视觉对齐。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-Omni模型家族的四个音频-视觉基准上，OmniFocus在低令牌保留率下保持强压缩性能；在25%令牌保留率时，DailyOmni上达到59.40准确率，预填充速度提升1.38倍。
AI.conclusion: OmniFocus实现了良好的精度-效率权衡，优于现有基线方法。

title: Evaluating LLM Uncertainty in Long-Form Generation Using Deterministic Ground Truth
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). Code available at https://github.com/IdoAmit198/SALT
summary: As LLMs generate increasingly long outputs, effective uncertainty estimation must identify errors at fine-grained levels rather than discard entire responses. While such methods exist, evaluating uncertainty at any resolution (token to an entire generation) is challenging and highly sensitive to label imperfections, making zero-noise benchmarks essential; yet, long-form generation benchmarks tend to rely on fallible labels rather than deterministic ground truth. We introduce Single-answer Atomic Long-form Target (SALT), a benchmark of six procedurally generated tasks with single deterministic long textual ground truths, enabling unit-level evaluation of correctness, calibration, and ranking without external judges. Equipped with SALT, our analysis of 50+ LLMs reveals key insights: We identify which confidence functions dominate each uncertainty aspect and show that confidence ranking largely breaks at atomic resolution, even when clearer separability emerges at coarser line-level units. SALT further enables controlled atom-level interventions throughout generation, revealing two separable drivers of future errors: propagation from corrupted prefixes, dominated by global context correctness, and bounded degradation from increasing answer-context length. Finally, we demonstrate that reasoning, via Chain-of-Thought prompting or internalized through training, introduces a trade-off, improving accuracy while degrading confidence ranking. These findings directly impact risk-critical applications requiring reliable error identification and mitigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SALT基准，包含六个程序化生成的长文本任务，每个任务具有确定性的单一真实答案，用于评估LLM在原子级（token/句级）不确定性估计中的准确性、校准和排序能力。实验分析了50多个LLM，揭示了置信度函数在不同粒度下的表现差异，并通过原子级干预实验分离出两种未来错误驱动因素：前缀污染和上下文长度增长。此外，推理（CoT或内部化）会带来准确率与置信度排序之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有长文本生成的不确定性评估缺乏零噪声基准，因为通常依赖有缺陷的人工标注或外部评判。作者希望构建一个具有确定性真实答案的基准，以在细粒度（原子级）上可靠地评估LLM的置信度估计。
AI.method: 设计了SALT基准，包含六个程序化生成的任务，每个任务有确定性的长文本真实答案。在此基础上，评估50多个LLM的多种置信度函数，并在原子级（token/句）和行级进行校准与排序分析。通过原子级干预实验，研究前缀污染和上下文长度对错误的影响。
AI.result: 发现了置信度函数在不同粒度下的主导特性差异；置信度排序在原子级上失效，但在行级有更好的分离性；前缀污染导致的错误由全局上下文正确性主导，而上下文长度增加导致有限退化；推理（CoT或内化）在提升准确率的同时降低了置信度排序质量。
AI.conclusion: SALT为长文本生成的不确定性估计提供了可靠的零噪声评估框架，揭示了细粒度置信度估计的挑战，并指出了推理能力与置信度排序之间的权衡，对风险关键应用具有指导意义。

title: ProACT: Towards Breakdown-Aware Proactive Agent in Multi-User Collaboration
summary: Conversational agents are increasingly embedded in human collaborative work, yet they remain fundamentally passive and reactive: they respond to explicit user requests rather than proactively recognizing moments when a team would benefit from timely intervention as human collaborators often do. This reactive design substantially limits the use of agents as active participants in multi-user collaboration, where disagreements, ambiguous goals, forgotten constraints, underspecified plans, discussion loops, and imbalanced participation can gradually undermine group progress. To move agents from passive assistants toward active participants in multi-user collaboration, we introduce ProACT, a breakdown-aware agent framework grounded in theories of common ground, collaborative planning, and coordination work. ProACT observes the speaker-attributed conversation history, determines whether the current turn contains a collaboration breakdown requiring intervention, decides whether the agent should stay silent or speak, and, when speaking is needed, routes the case to a targeted collaboration skill. We further introduce the first multi-user collaboration benchmark for evaluating proactive agents across project planning, product design, research collaboration, logistics, education, and resource-constrained decision making. Across 3,244 turn-level examples and five LLM backbones, ProACT consistently improves collaborative appropriateness, non-interruptiveness, conciseness, and judged intervention quality over direct chat.

AI.tldr: ProACT是一个基于共同基础、协作规划和协调工作理论的breakdown感知代理框架，通过观察对话历史、检测协作中断、决定是否干预并路由到相应技能，将被动反应式对话代理转变为多用户协作中的主动参与者。在3,244轮对话示例和五种LLM上的评估显示，ProACT在协作适当性、非干扰性、简洁性和干预质量上均优于直接对话。
AI.motivation: 现有对话代理在多用户协作中是被动且反应式的，只会响应明确的用户请求，而无法像人类协作者那样主动识别需要及时干预的时刻（如分歧、目标模糊、约束遗忘、讨论循环、参与不均等），这限制了代理作为协作中的活跃参与者的价值。
AI.method: ProACT框架包含四个核心步骤：(1) 观察带说话人归属的对话历史；(2) 判断当前轮次是否存在需要干预的协作中断；(3) 决定保持沉默还是发言；(4) 当需要发言时，将案例路由到相应的协作技能。框架建立在共同基础、协作规划和协调工作三大理论基础之上。
AI.result: 在3,244个轮次级别的示例上，使用五种不同的LLM骨干模型进行评估，ProACT在协作适当性、非干扰性、简洁性和干预质量四个指标上均优于直接对话基线。
AI.conclusion: ProACT框架成功地将被动反应式代理转变为多用户协作中的主动参与者，为构建更智能的协作代理提供了有效的理论基础和实现方案。同时也引入了首个用于评估主动式代理的多用户协作基准测试。

title: CausalGame: Benchmarking Causal Thinking of LLM Agents in Games
comment: Zhenhao, Yongqiang, and Chenxi contributed equally to the project. A short version is accepted at the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026 as an Oral presentation. Project website https://causalgame.github.io/
summary: Building AI Scientist agents with Large Language Models (LLMs) has recently attracted growing attention. Since scientific discovery fundamentally relies on uncovering causal relationships from observations, the capability of causal thinking, i.e., distinguishing causation from correlation and recognizing hidden biases, is essential to LLM agents. Although a number of benchmarks exist for AI Scientists, none explicitly incorporate challenges from selection bias, measurement error, and hidden confounders that widely exist in real-world scientific discovery. To this end, we present CausalGame, a benchmark that evaluates the causal thinking capabilities of LLM agents through interactive games. CausalGame asks LLM agents to actively design experimental protocols, collect observation data, and derive a final solution with an explanation report. To emulate realistic scientific discovery challenges, we design 14 scenarios that incorporate selection bias, measurement error, and hidden confounders. Across 30 LLM agents, none demonstrates reliable causal thinking: the best model reaches only 68.0% survival against analytical optima of 78-85%, and merely 5-7% of sessions receive credits on the causal-reasoning rubrics. CausalGame provides a scalable and controlled testbed for evaluating the causal thinking of AI Scientist agents.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了CausalGame，一个通过交互式游戏评估LLM智能体因果思维能力的基准测试。包含14个融入选择偏差、测量误差和隐藏混杂因素的科学发现场景。测试了30个LLM智能体，最佳模型仅达到68.0%的生存率（对比分析最优78-85%），仅5-7%的会话在因果推理评分中获得分数，表明LLM智能体在因果思维方面仍不可靠。
AI.motivation: 科学发现本质上依赖于从观测中识别因果关系，而现有AI科学家基准测试未包含真实科学发现中普遍存在的选择偏差、测量误差和隐藏混杂因素等挑战。现有基准缺乏对LLM智能体因果思维能力的专门评估。
AI.method: 设计了CausalGame基准，通过14个交互游戏场景要求LLM智能体主动设计实验方案、收集观测数据并生成最终解决方案及解释报告。场景系统性地融入了选择偏差、测量误差和隐藏混杂因素三种真实科学发现中的因果推理挑战。
AI.result: 评估了30个LLM智能体，最佳模型生存率仅68.0%（分析最优78-85%），仅5-7%的会话获得因果推理评分。所有模型均未展现出可靠的因果思维能力。
AI.conclusion: CausalGame为评估AI科学家智能体的因果思维提供了一个可扩展且可控的测试平台，揭示了现有LLM智能体在因果推理方面的严重不足，为未来改进方向提供了重要参考。

title: Weighted Phase Volume Method in Stability Analysis: Integral Criteria and Ellipsoidal Reachable Sets
summary: A method for analysing the stability of dynamical systems is proposed, based on the introduction of a weighted phase volume and time rescaling by a positive function. The advantage of the method is the ability to set the contraction properties of the phase volume by choosing the weighting function and the scaling factor, while preserving the topology of the phase portrait. Integral dissipativity conditions are derived, leading to new definitions of integral stability, asymptotic stability, and exponential stability. For quadratic weighting functions, covering and inner ellipsoids are constructed, providing geometric estimates of reachable sets. The connection between the proposed approach and classical Lyapunov stability is established. The efficiency of the method is demonstrated through numerical examples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于加权相体积和时间重缩放的动力系统稳定性分析方法，通过选择加权函数和缩放因子来设定相体积的收缩特性，同时保持相肖像拓扑。推导了积分耗散条件，给出了新的积分稳定性、渐近稳定性和指数稳定性定义，并通过二次加权函数构建覆盖和内椭球实现可达集的几何估计。建立了与经典Lyapunov稳定性的联系，数值示例验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统Lyapunov方法在处理某些复杂动力系统时存在局限性，需要一种更灵活的方法来设定相体积的收缩特性，同时保持相肖像拓扑不变，从而更有效地分析系统稳定性。
AI.method: 引入加权相体积和时间重缩放（通过正函数），通过选择加权函数和缩放因子控制相体积收缩特性；推导积分耗散条件得到新的稳定性定义；对二次加权函数构造覆盖和内椭球进行可达集几何估计。
AI.result: 提出了积分耗散条件，给出了积分稳定性、渐近稳定性和指数稳定性的新定义；构建了覆盖和内椭球以几何估计可达集；建立了与经典Lyapunov稳定性的联系；数值示例验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持相肖像拓扑的前提下，通过灵活选择加权函数和缩放因子实现了更通用的稳定性分析，拓展了经典Lyapunov理论框架。

title: Mixed precision Newton's method for optimization
summary: Second-order optimization methods, such as Newton's algorithm, achieve fast local convergence and high accuracy, but their practical use is often limited by high computational costs. To mitigate this issue, variants such as inexact and quasi-Newton methods are widely used. A complementary and promising approach to improve the efficiency of the method is to employ mixed precision arithmetic, using different floating-point precisions for different operations, based on their impact on the convergence and accuracy of the method. In this work, we perform an error analysis of Newton's method accounting for different sources of inexactness, including approximations and rounding errors. We present a convergence analysis for the generated sequence, establishing bounds on the convergence rate and attainable accuracy. This theoretical framework covers quasi-Newton and inexact Newton methods, and is leveraged to propose mixed precision algorithms. We present a wide set of numerical experiments to illustrate our theoretical results and the behavior of Newton's method and its approximate variants in mixed precision floating-point arithmetic.

AI.tldr: 本文对牛顿法及其近似变体（拟牛顿法、不精确牛顿法）进行了误差分析，建立了收敛速率和可达精度的理论界限，并基于此提出了混合精度算法。大量数值实验验证了理论结果及混合精度浮点运算下的算法行为。
AI.motivation: 二阶优化方法（如牛顿法）收敛快、精度高，但计算成本高。为降低计算开销，研究者提出了不精确牛顿法、拟牛顿法等变体。本文旨在通过混合精度算术进一步提升效率，方法是从误差分析角度系统理解不同不精确性来源（近似误差和舍入误差）对收敛的影响，从而指导混合精度算法的设计。
AI.method: 本文对牛顿法进行了全面的误差分析，考虑了近似误差和舍入误差等多种不精确来源。建立了收敛序列的收敛率与可达精度界限，该理论框架覆盖了拟牛顿法和不精确牛顿法，并基于理论结果设计了混合精度算法。
AI.result: 建立了牛顿法在不精确条件下（含近似和舍入误差）的收敛速率与可达精度界限；理论框架统一涵盖拟牛顿法和不精确牛顿法；提出了基于误差分析的混合精度算法；通过广泛数值实验验证了理论结果及混合精度浮点运算下的算法行为。
AI.conclusion: 混合精度算术是一种有效降低牛顿法及其变体计算成本的方法，本文建立的误差分析理论为设计高效混合精度二阶优化算法提供了坚实的理论基础与实用指导。

title: SHiPPO: Recurrent Memory with Transported Polynomial Projections
summary: HiPPO gives recurrent states memory semantics as coefficients of online polynomial projections, but in fixed channel coordinates. Modern selective SSMs, by contrast, rely on token-dependent control and channel interaction. We introduce SHiPPO (Sylvester HiPPO), a transported projection-memory prior that lifts HiPPO coefficient memories into a moving channel frame. For any fixed or realized right-transport path, SHiPPO transports the approximation family and channel metric together; conditional on that path, the state is ordinary HiPPO in a tied moving frame and follows Sylvester coefficient dynamics, preserving the left online-memory operator while adding right-action transport. For selective-SSM execution, we derive a restricted group-local realization with controller-compatible right actions, exponential-adjusted updates, exact block-affine scan, and recurrent decoding. We also give a simultaneous-reducibility criterion identifying when right transports collapse to static mixing plus independent scalar or blockwise banks. Controlled diagnostics show that larger current-token write rank improves ordinary prediction error but cannot recover order-sensitive changes to already-written memory; transported-memory variants recover this signal, which disappears when the transport pathway is removed. A finite-field associative-recall diagnostic with interleaved bindings, operations, and queries provides complementary autoregressive evidence while leaving the preferred right-action realization open. Taken together, these results support SHiPPO as a mechanistically grounded transported-memory prior, with evidence focused on memory mechanisms rather than broad sequence-modeling dominance.

AI.tldr: SHiPPO通过将HiPPO的投影记忆系数沿移动通道框架进行传输，引入了Sylvester系数动力学，使得状态空间模型能够处理与token相关的控制和通道交互，并提供了精确的块仿射扫描和循环解码算法。
AI.motivation: HiPPO在固定通道坐标系中为循环状态赋予记忆语义（多项式投影系数），但现代选择性状态空间模型（SSM）需要token相关的控制和通道交互。作者希望将HiPPO的记忆先验扩展到移动通道框架中，使记忆表示能够随输入动态传输。
AI.method: 提出SHiPPO（Sylvester HiPPO），通过右传输路径将HiPPO系数记忆移动到移动通道框架，使得状态遵循Sylvester系数动力学。推导了受限群局部实现，包含兼容控制器的右作用、指数调整更新、精确块仿射扫描和循环解码。还给出了同时可约性判据。
AI.result: 更大当前token写入秩改善普通预测误差，但无法恢复已写入记忆的顺序敏感变化；传输记忆变体能恢复此信号。有限域联想记忆诊断提供自回归证据，验证了传输记忆机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SHiPPO是一种有机制基础的可传输记忆先验，实验证据集中在记忆机制而非广泛的序列建模优势上，为选择性SSM提供了新的记忆框架。

title: Harness-Aware Self-Evolving: Co-Evolving Model Weights, Harness, and Task Solutions
summary: Self-evolving frameworks usually optimize task solutions while treating the surrounding harness as fixed. We introduce Harness-Aware Self-Evolving (HASE), an agentic reinforcement-learning framework in which a single model can generate task solutions or edit selected harness components in a multi-turn action space. HASE enables a single Qwen3-8B model to match the text-classification performance of a GPT-OSS-120B model that uses Claude Code as the harness proposer. In alpha factor mining, HASE outperforms the reported GPT-OSS-120B baseline. HASE also repairs imperfect evaluation components and converges to state-of-the-art performance in circle-packing algorithm discovery. These results show that HASE improves the harness and the solution through one unified agentic process.

AI.tldr: HASE是一个让单一模型既能改进解决方案又能改进评估框架的统一智能体强化学习框架，在文本分类、因子挖掘和圆填充算法发现任务上取得了超越大型模型和基线方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自进化框架通常只优化任务解决方案，而将周围的评估框架视为固定不变，限制了模型的进化潜力。
AI.method: 提出Harness-Aware Self-Evolving (HASE)框架，通过多轮动作空间让单一模型既能生成任务解决方案，也能编辑选定的评估框架组件，实现方案和框架的统一进化。
AI.result: 单Qwen3-8B模型在文本分类上匹配GPT-OSS-120B+Claude Code的性能；在因子挖掘中超越GPT-OSS-120B基线；在圆填充算法发现中修复不完善的评估组件并达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: HASE通过统一的智能体流程同时改进框架和解决方案，证明了自进化框架中"框架感知"的重要性。

title: Beyond Static Rules: Automated Discovery of Latent Vulnerabilities in Text-to-SQL
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in Text-to-SQL tasks, their deployment in real-world environments is hindered by latent reliability issues. Identifying these latent weaknesses is critical for building trustworthy database interfaces, yet current diagnostic approaches rely heavily on static, expert-defined rules, which lack the capability for systematic and automated exploration. To bridge this gap, we propose SAGE (Systematic Automated Guided Exploration), a novel framework designed to autonomously uncover latent failure patterns in LLM-based Text-to-SQL generation. Specifically, SAGE generates vulnerability hypotheses for given samples and references a continuously evolving Vulnerability Codex to design targeted perturbations, thereby iteratively verifying and documenting potential defects. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art open-source LLMs demonstrate that SAGE uncovers a substantial number of failure cases, highlighting the significant fragility of current models. Furthermore, our analysis reveals that the Vulnerability Codex exhibits strong cross-model transferability, indicating that the discovered patterns represent generalized structural weaknesses. Finally, we explore SAGE's potential for remediation. Although preliminary, lightweight fine-tuning on the generated samples yields promising improvements, suggesting a scalable pathway for closing the reliability loop in future work.

AI.tldr: 提出SAGE框架，自动探索LLM在Text-to-SQL任务中的潜在失败模式，通过生成漏洞假设、利用持续演化的漏洞法典设计扰动来迭代验证缺陷。实验表明该方法能发现大量失败案例，漏洞法典具有跨模型迁移性，且基于生成样本的轻量微调可提升模型可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL诊断方法依赖静态、专家定义的规则，缺乏系统化和自动化探索能力，无法有效发现LLM部署中的潜在可靠性问题。
AI.method: 提出SAGE框架：1) 针对样本生成漏洞假设；2) 参考持续演化的Vulnerability Codex设计目标扰动；3) 迭代验证并记录潜在缺陷。
AI.result: 在开源LLM上发现大量失败案例，揭示当前模型的脆弱性；Vulnerability Codex展现强跨模型迁移性，表明发现的模式是通用结构弱点。
AI.conclusion: SAGE能自动发现Text-to-SQL的潜在缺陷，漏洞模式具有泛化性，且初步的轻量微调可提升性能，为构建可信数据库接口提供了可扩展的可靠性闭环路径。

title: Knowledge-Informed Local Causal Discovery of Optimal Adjustment Sets
summary: Local causal discovery is a scalable alternative to global structure learning. However, it can struggle to identify valid adjustment sets in data-scarce settings because of finite-sample uncertainty, incomplete local neighborhoods, and unresolved Markov equivalence. Although many application domains provide structured background knowledge, its integration into local causal discovery remains limited. We propose b-LOAD, a knowledge-informed extension of the LOAD algorithm for local discovery of optimal adjustment sets. b-LOAD incorporates prior edge constraints directly into the local structure-learning procedure and uses Meek's rules to expand the discovery frontier dynamically, yielding a knowledge-constrained partially directed graph over the relevant local subgraph. This strategy helps prevent structurally relevant nodes introduced by prior knowledge from being excluded by local search. We prove that, under sound background knowledge, the procedure monotonically refines the admissible equivalence class and can enlarge the set of identifiable causal queries, enabling recovery of optimal adjustment sets that are not identifiable from observational conditional-independence information alone. Empirically, b-LOAD improves downstream causal effect estimation relative to purely data-driven and standard knowledge-augmented baselines, particularly in data-scarce and structurally complex regimes. Results on real-world biological networks show that locally targeted prior knowledge provides the largest gains and remains beneficial under moderate structural noise. These findings position b-LOAD as a scalable approach for converting fragmented domain knowledge into more reliable causal-effect estimation.

AI.tldr: b-LOAD 是一种知识增强的局部因果发现算法，通过将先验边约束直接融入局部结构学习过程，并利用Meek规则动态扩展发现边界，能够在数据稀疏场景下识别出仅靠观测数据无法识别的最优调整集，提升因果效应估计的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 局部因果发现虽可扩展，但在数据稀缺场景下因有限样本不确定性、局部邻域不完整和马尔可夫等价类未解决而难以识别有效的调整集；尽管许多领域提供结构化背景知识，但其与局部因果发现的整合仍有限。
AI.method: 提出b-LOAD算法，在LOAD算法基础上融入先验边约束，直接嵌入局部结构学习过程；使用Meek规则动态扩展发现边界，得到知识约束下的局部子图部分有向图；在合理的先验知识下单调精化可容许等价类，扩大可识别因果查询集合。
AI.result: b-LOAD在数据稀缺和结构复杂场景下，相对于纯数据驱动和标准知识增强基线，显著改进了下游因果效应估计；在真实生物网络上，局部定向先验知识带来最大增益，且在中等结构噪声下依然有效。
AI.conclusion: b-LOAD是一种可扩展的方法，能将零散的领域知识转化为更可靠的因果效应估计，在数据稀缺场景下尤为有效。

title: Double interior-point regularization for large-scale capacity expansion
summary: Capacity expansion is a key tool for planning future energy systems. However, weather-dependent generation and long-duration storage result in problem sizes that exceed the computational limits of conventional interior-point solvers, making it impossible to plan renewable systems that are cost-efficient and reliable across a wide range of weather conditions. To tackle such large problems, this paper introduces the double interior-point regularization (DIP-set) for Benders Decomposition, combining the advantages of traversing the interior of the solution space while remaining close to a reference solution. We benchmark the method on a power-sector problem and an energy-system problem, varying problem size and the level of foresight during operations. Results demonstrate that DIP-set outperforms competing regularizations in all test cases. The speed-up increases with size, reaching 30-50% for the largest problems, which are the most critical for planning renewable systems and are too large for state-of-the-art methods. The key benefit of DIP-set is its ability to mitigate the sharp decrease in convergence as BD approaches the optimal solution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双重内点正则化（DIP-set）方法用于Benders分解，解决了大规模可再生能源系统规划中因天气依赖发电和长时储能导致的计算瓶颈问题。该方法在电力系统和能源系统问题上均优于现有方法，最大问题规模下提速30-50%，尤其改善了Benders分解在接近最优解时收敛性急剧下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理包含天气依赖发电和长时储能的能源系统容量扩展问题时，问题规模超出传统内点求解器的计算极限，导致无法在多样天气条件下规划出既经济又可靠的可再生能源系统。
AI.method: 提出了双重内点正则化（DIP-set）用于Benders分解，结合了遍历解空间内部和保持接近参考解的双重优势。
AI.result: DIP-set在所有测试案例中均优于其他正则化方法，加速效果随问题规模增大而提升，最大问题下达到30-50%的提速，这些问题是关键的可再生能源规划问题且现有方法无法处理。
AI.conclusion: DIP-set的关键优势在于缓解了Benders分解在接近最优解时收敛性急剧下降的问题，为大规模可再生能源系统规划提供了可行的计算方案。

title: Exploring polynomial models in the Search Step of Direct Multisearch
summary:
Direct Multisearch (DMS) is a class of direct-search algorithms designed for multiobjective derivative-free optimization. Its framework consists of an optional search step and a poll step, the latter ensuring the corresponding theoretical convergence properties. Recently, a search strategy based on the minimization of quadratic polynomial models, constructed from previously evaluated points, was proposed to improve the numerical efficiency of the method. While the construction of these surrogate models has been investigated, considerably less attention has been devoted to how they should be jointly minimized, with min-max scalarization typically being adopted.
  This work investigates how different model-minimization strategies influence the performance of DMS. To this end, alternative strategies for exploring the quadratic polynomial models within the search step of DMS are proposed and numerically assessed, including one based on the recently proposed Improved Front Steepest Descent algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多目标无导数优化中直接多重搜索（DMS）方法的搜索策略，提出并评估了多种基于二次多项式模型的替代最小化方法（包括改进的前沿最速下降算法），以提升数值效率。
AI.motivation: 现有DMS方法中，基于二次多项式替代模型的搜索策略虽被提出，但模型如何联合最小化的问题缺乏系统研究，通常仅采用min-max标量化方法。本文旨在探索不同模型最小化策略对DMS性能的影响。
AI.method: 在DMS的搜索步骤中，提出了多种替代的二次多项式模型最小化策略，包括采用改进的前沿最速下降（Improved Front Steepest Descent）算法，并进行数值评估。
AI.result: 通过数值实验比较了不同模型最小化策略对DMS算法性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 不同的模型最小化策略会显著影响DMS的数值效率，其中基于改进前沿最速下降的方法表现出潜力。

title: LACE-SVD: Loss-Aware SVD with Cumulative Error Correction for LLM Compression
summary: The rapid growth in the parameter scale of large language models (LLMs) has created a strong demand for efficient compression techniques. As a hardware-agnostic and highly compatible approach, low-rank compression has been widely adopted to reduce both memory footprint and computational cost. However, existing SVD-based methods are still largely driven by local reconstruction objectives, overlooking two critical limitations: rank budgets are often allocated without explicitly considering layer-wise loss sensitivity, and local approximation errors can propagate and accumulate through the residual stream, leading to amplified global deviations from the original model. To address these issues, we propose LACE-SVD, a Loss-Aware SVD framework with Cumulative Error correction for LLM compression. LACE-SVD first estimates the calibration negative-log-likelihood increase induced by candidate layer-wise compression ratios and solves a budget-constrained allocation problem to assign rank budgets. It then refines the compressed model with closed-form local updates and introduces a propagation-aware correction for residual-stream output modules, reducing layer-output discrepancy as a proxy for cumulative error propagation. Experimental results demonstrate that at a high compression ratio (0.6), the WikiText-2 PPL of our method on LLaMA-7B (32.57) is significantly better than that of Dobi-SVD (46.18).

AI.tldr: 提出LACE-SVD框架，通过损失感知的秩分配和累积误差校正，在保持LLM压缩率的同时显著降低困惑度（LLaMA-7B在0.6压缩率下WikiText-2 PPL从46.18降至32.57）。
AI.motivation: 现有SVD压缩方法存在两个关键局限：秩预算分配未考虑层间损失敏感性，且局部近似误差会在残差流中累积传播，导致全局偏差放大。
AI.method: 1）通过校准NLL增量估计层间压缩敏感性，求解预算约束分配问题；2）用闭式局部更新优化压缩模型；3）对残差流输出模块引入传播感知校正，以层输出差异作为累积误差传播的代理指标。
AI.result: 在LLaMA-7B上，0.6压缩率下WikiText-2困惑度（32.57）显著优于Dobi-SVD（46.18）。
AI.conclusion: 损失感知的秩分配与累积误差校正能有效缓解SVD压缩中的全局性能退化问题。

title: Online Linear Programming for Multi-Objective Routing in LLM Serving
summary: We study the online routing problem in large language model serving, where requests arrive sequentially and must be dispatched to parallel decode workers under tight batch-size and KV-cache constraints. Unlike widely used routing heuristics that are not tied to explicit service-level objectives (SLOs) and offer limited control over latency-throughput trade-offs, we introduce a multi-objective optimization framework that formulates routing as an online linear programming with interpretable decision rewards. We apply an efficient bid-price control policy based on the online linear programming that admits requests when their SLO-weighted benefit exceeds their shadow prices. To meet millisecond decision requirements, we develop a warm-started, projected first-order updates that track the evolving dual shadow prices online with predictable runtime. We integrate our router into the Vidur simulator and demonstrate substantial improvements over standard baselines across multiple SLO regimes, including end-to-end latency, time-to-first-token, throughput, and tail performance. A big picture from our result: a science-based approach outperforms others based on heuristics.

AI.tldr: 本文针对大语言模型在线服务中的请求路由问题，提出了一种基于在线线性规划的出价控制策略，通过影子价格机制和暖启动投影一阶更新算法，在毫秒级决策约束下实现多目标SLO优化，实验结果显著优于传统启发式方法。
AI.motivation: 现有路由启发式算法缺乏与服务级目标（SLO）的显式关联，难以有效控制延迟-吞吐量权衡，需要一种科学可解释的多目标优化方法。
AI.method: 将路由问题建模为在线线性规划，设计基于影子价格的出价控制策略（请求的SLO加权收益超过影子价格时准入），并开发暖启动投影一阶更新算法实时追踪对偶影子价格，满足毫秒级决策需求。
AI.result: 在Vidur模拟器上的实验表明，该方法在端到端延迟、首次令牌时间、吞吐量和尾延迟等多个SLO指标上均显著优于标准基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于科学的优化方法在路由性能上全面超越传统启发式方法，为LLM在线服务提供了可解释且高效的调度框架。

title: Rethinking Scientific Discovery in an Agentic Era
summary: Artificial intelligence has advanced scientific discovery, but most AI4Science systems remain fragmented tools that rely on humans to coordinate problem formulation, literature grounding, model use, simulation, validation, and knowledge reuse. This paper presents \textbf{SCION (Scientific Collaborative Innovation with Agentic Organizational Nexus)}, an agentic scientific operating system that acts as an \textbf{organizational nexus}. Through a Science Agent serving as a \textbf{Meta-Harness}, SCION connects scientific tasks, tools, agents, artifacts, and memory, transforming research into an executable, auditable, and reusable operational process. At its core is the \textbf{Research Execution Plan (REP)}, which compiles high-level scientific intent into staged objectives, dependencies, verification checkpoints, tool requirements, expected artifacts, and fallback conditions. SCION further integrates hierarchical multi-agent execution, profile-driven specialization, selective context construction, governed delegation, and layered epistemic memory to support long-horizon scientific work. We formulate discovery under SCION as \textbf{Target-conditioned Inverse Search} and extend it to hidden-target settings through batch active search under finite experimental budgets. Applications in materials analysis, molecule design, and protein or antibody screening, together with experiments on scientific reading, idea generation, molecule generation, and antibody screening, show that SCION outperforms existing autonomous research-agent baselines, especially in decomposition, verification, refinement, and memory reuse. Overall, SCION shifts AI from isolated tools toward a coordinated operational layer for traceable and reusable scientific innovation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCION，一个基于多智能体协作的科学操作系统，通过Research Execution Plan (REP)将科学意图转化为可执行、可审计、可复用的操作流程，在材料分析、分子设计、蛋白质/抗体筛选等任务上超越现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有AI4Science系统多为碎片化工具，依赖人工协调问题定义、文献理解、模型使用、模拟、验证和知识复用等环节，缺乏统一的组织化操作层。
AI.method: SCION作为组织化中枢（organizational nexus），通过Science Agent（Meta-Harness）连接任务、工具、智能体、制品和记忆；核心为Research Execution Plan (REP)将高层科学意图编译为阶段性目标、依赖关系、验证检查点、工具需求和回退条件；集成层次化多智能体执行、画像驱动专业化、选择性上下文构建、受控委派和分层认知记忆；将科学发现形式化为Target-conditioned Inverse Search，并扩展到隐藏目标设置下的批量主动搜索。
AI.result: 在材料分析、分子设计、蛋白质/抗体筛选等应用以及科学阅读、想法生成、分子生成、抗体筛选实验中，SCION在任务分解、验证、优化和记忆复用方面优于现有自主研究智能体基线。
AI.conclusion: SCION将AI从孤立工具转变为协调的操作层，实现了可追溯、可复用的科学创新流程。

title: ManifoldFlow: SPD-Relaxed Stiefel Layers with Learnable Singular Spectrum
summary: Orthogonal and Stiefel layers give neural weights exact spectral control, but they also impose a strong modeling constraint: all represented singular values are fixed at one. Many settings that benefit from an orthonormal basis still need direction-dependent attenuation or amplification. We introduce ManifoldFlow, a minimal relaxation of a fixed-spectrum Stiefel layer that keeps the basis on the Stiefel manifold while learning a bounded positive spectrum through W = Q S^{1/2}, with Q^T Q = I and S positive definite. Since W^T W = S, the eigenvalues of S are exactly the squared singular values of the realized weight, making eigenvalue clipping a direct singular-value control mechanism. Across paired sequence, tabular, and image experiments, the learnable SPD spectrum improves the fixed-spectrum Stiefel counterpart in the reported settings where the Stiefel prior is useful, with the largest gains in recurrent language-model projections. Boundary cases in convolutional classifier heads clarify the intended scope: ManifoldFlow is not a universal dense-layer replacement, but a spectrum-learnable Stiefel relaxation for settings where an orthonormal basis is a useful prior. When the basis should be orthonormal, its spectrum need not be frozen. Code available at https://github.com/Hik289/manifold_flow

AI.tldr: 本文提出 ManifoldFlow，一种对固定谱 Stiefel 层的松弛方法，在保持基在 Stiefel 流形上的同时，通过 W = Q S^{1/2} 学习有界正谱，允许方向依赖的衰减或放大，实验表明可学习谱优于固定谱 Stiefel 基线。
AI.motivation: 正交和 Stiefel 层虽然能精确控制神经网络的谱，但其所有奇异值固定为 1，无法实现方向依赖的衰减或放大，限制了表达能力。
AI.method: 通过分解 W = Q S^{1/2}，其中 Q^T Q = I（保持在 Stiefel 流形上），S 为正定矩阵，使得 W^T W = S，从而实现奇异值的可学习控制。
AI.result: 在序列、表格和图像等配对实验中，可学习的 SPD 谱在 Stiefel 先验有用的场景中优于固定谱 Stiefel 基线，在循环语言模型投影中提升最大。
AI.conclusion: ManifoldFlow 并非通用的全连接层替代方案，而是一种面向特定场景的谱可学习 Stiefel 松弛方法——当基需要正交时，其谱不必是冻结的。

title: Surrogate-based prioritization of sub-problems for Benders decomposition in energy planning
summary:
Benders decomposition solves optimization problems by separating the first-stage master problem from one or more second-stage sub-problems. While the standard Benders decomposition solves all sub-problems in each iteration, solving only selected sub-problems still guarantees convergence and can reduce solution time, but raises the question of how to select.
  In this work, we introduce surrogate-based prioritization of sub-problems. The method leverages surrogates to estimate the sub-problems' objectives, assess the current error of the cutting-plane estimator, and then prioritize the sub-problem with the largest error. We implement surrogate-based prioritization within sequential and asynchronous Benders decomposition. Both these algorithms also leverage the surrogate to trigger convergence checks and implement regularization.
  Benchmarks for an energy planning problem with a few large sub-problems show that the applied prioritization strategy works. The reduction in solution time correlates with the surrogate's accuracy. In our case, geometric interpolation-based surrogates are more accurate than machine learning methods. As a result, prioritization consistently and significantly outperforms the standard algorithm in sequential Benders decomposition. The speed-up increases with the number of scenarios, reaching 33\% with four scenarios and 55% with ten scenarios. In the case of asynchronous parallelization, the impact on performance is less clear, and the average speed-up from prioritization is 19%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于替代模型（surrogate）的子问题优先级排序方法，用于加速Benders分解。在序列Benders分解中，该方法在含10个场景的能源规划问题上实现了55%的加速，异步并行下平均加速19%。
AI.motivation: 标准Benders分解每轮迭代求解所有子问题，但仅选择部分子问题求解仍能保证收敛。问题在于如何智能选择子问题以进一步减少求解时间。
AI.method: 利用替代模型（如几何插值、机器学习）估计子问题目标函数值，评估当前切割平面估计器的误差，优先求解误差最大的子问题。该方法应用于序列与异步两种Benders分解变体，替代模型还用于触发收敛检查和正则化。
AI.result: 在能源规划问题上，几何插值替代模型优于机器学习方法。序列Benders分解中，4个场景加速33%，10个场景加速55%。异步并行中平均加速19%，效果不如序列显著。
AI.conclusion: 基于替代模型的优先级排序策略在序列Benders分解中效果显著，加速比随问题规模增加而提升；但在异步并行中收益有限，需进一步研究。

title: Multi Impulse Low Earth Orbit Maneuver Synthesis Through Thrust Measure Primer Vector Conditions and Piecewise Multiple Shooting
summary: This work sets out to apply primer vector theory to optimal impulse maneuvers in Low Earth Orbit (LEO) and adapt it to the types of perturbations encountered in this environment, which is not readily available in the literature. A review of the theory of optimal control and orbital maneuvering is made and in particular, primer vector theory is laid out in detail based on the extension of the thrust control to a measure, including its generalization to conservative and non-conservative perturbation models. An impulsive multiple shooting optimization scheme in Cartesian coordinates is presented, through a piecewise approach to the problem. Then, some maneuver scenarios with known solutions under the Keplerian model are solved under perturbed orbital dynamics with the help of the primer vector, and the resulting trajectories are compared. The perturbation models include a J2 model, representing the class of conservative perturbations by modeling Earth's nonspherical gravity field, and a J2+Drag model, representing the class of non-conservative perturbations by including the effects of atmospheric drag in LEO\@. For each model, some valid methods of primer vector calculation have been tried and validated between each other, and the primer vector is proven to be a useful tool in reducing the cost of orbital maneuvers.

AI.tldr: 本文将原始矢量理论应用于低地球轨道（LEO）最优脉冲机动，并针对J2摄动和大气阻力等保守/非保守摄动模型进行了推广。通过笛卡尔坐标系下的脉冲多靶点优化方案求解机动问题，验证了原始矢量在降低轨道机动成本方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有文献缺乏将原始矢量理论应用于LEO环境摄动模型（如J2和大气阻力）下的最优脉冲机动研究，作者旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 1. 回顾最优控制与轨道机动理论，详细推导原始矢量理论，将推力控制扩展为测度形式，推广至保守和非保守摄动模型；2. 提出笛卡尔坐标系下的脉冲多靶点优化方案（分段逼近）；3. 在开普勒模型已知解的基础上，引入J2模型（保守摄动）和J2+Drag模型（非保守摄动），计算并验证原始矢量。
AI.result: 多种原始矢量计算方法在J2和J2+Drag模型下得到相互验证，证明原始矢量是降低轨道机动成本的有效工具。
AI.conclusion: 原始矢量理论成功推广至LEO摄动环境，可有效优化脉冲机动轨迹并降低成本。

title: Spectral Rewiring for Exploration, Purification, and Model Merging
summary: Reinforcement learning has become a standard post-training recipe for large language models, but dense full-parameter updates create two deployment-relevant bottlenecks: suppressed reasoning performance, often reflected by premature saturation of test-time scaling, and interference when consolidating multiple capabilities through multi-domain training or model merging. We show that the reasoning-effective component of these updates is largely concentrated in the base model's spectral space, motivating Subspace-Aligned Rewiring (SAR), a post-hoc editing method that retains this spectral core while removing orthogonal components. SAR therefore preserves reasoning gains and filters residual update directions that suppress performance or amplify cross-domain interference. Across several model families and scales, SAR extracts compact reasoning cores using as little as approximately 0.58% of total parameters: it preserves over 99% of post-training performance and improves high-k exploration in mathematical reasoning, and generalizes to agentic coding by improving six of seven open benchmarks on an in-house model. SAR also purifies mixed-domain training updates by releasing suppressed coding capability while maintaining math reasoning and instruction following. It further enables model merging across experts, yielding cross-domain generalization that surpasses previous merging baselines and even the best single-domain experts. Overall, SAR shows that extracting reasoning-effective updates from parameter geometry can serve as a training-free mechanism to improve reasoning and multi-domain performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出子空间对齐重连（SAR），一种事后编辑方法，通过保留基模型谱空间中与推理相关的核心更新、去除正交干扰成分，仅用约0.58%的参数即可保留99%以上的后训练性能，并在数学推理、智能体编码、多领域模型合并等任务中取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 针对大语言模型全参数微调带来的两个部署瓶颈：抑制推理性能（测试时扩展过早饱和）以及多领域训练或模型合并时的能力干扰。
AI.method: 发现推理有效的更新集中在基模型的谱空间中，提出子空间对齐重连（SAR），一种事后编辑方法，保留谱核心成分，移除正交方向上的干扰更新。
AI.result: 仅用约0.58%参数保留99%以上后训练性能；提升数学推理的高k探索；在7个智能体编码基准上改进6个；净化混合域训练更新，释放被抑制的编码能力；实现跨专家模型合并，超越此前合并基线甚至最佳单域专家。
AI.conclusion: 从参数几何中提取推理有效更新可以作为一种无训练的机制，同时提升推理能力和多领域性能。

title: Consistent but Miscalibrated: Evaluating LLM Limitations for Risk Communication in Natural Language
summary: LLMs are increasingly deployed as post-hoc explainers of AI-generated outputs, yet it remains unclear whether they can reliably communicate probabilistic information in natural language. For this role to be viable, models must produce identical verbal descriptions for identical inputs, and select descriptions that accurately reflect the magnitude of the underlying numerical quantities. We evaluate whether nine LLMs meet these requirements within a two-stage prediction pipeline, in which an upstream model has produced probabilistic outputs characterized by their likelihood and uncertainty, and LLMs are tasked with selecting an appropriate verbal descriptor for each. We simulate predictions from an upstream model by taking samples from a Beta distribution parameterized by its mode and prior sample size. We then prompt LLMs to explain these predictions under six domain contexts and with ten temperature settings, and repeating each experiment ten times. We find that LLMs are generally consistent but miscalibrated, with substantially weaker performance on uncertainty than on likelihood tasks. Providing models with precomputed summary statistics (mode and prior sample size) reduced sensitivity to contextual framing but did not resolve the underlying miscalibration, suggesting that the bottleneck resides in the verbalization step itself. These findings indicate that current LLMs do not yet constitute reliable zero-shot standalone risk communication tools for probabilistic predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了9个LLM在将概率预测（似然和不确定性）转化为自然语言描述时的表现，发现LLM虽然一致性较好，但存在系统性校准偏差，尤其在不确定性描述上表现更差，说明当前LLM不适合直接作为风险沟通工具。
AI.motivation: LLM越来越多地被用作AI输出的后验解释器，但尚不清楚它们能否可靠地用自然语言传达概率信息，因此需要系统评估LLM在概率沟通中的可靠性。
AI.method: 采用两阶段预测流水线：上游模型通过Beta分布生成概率输出（由模式和先验样本量参数化），然后让9种LLM在6个领域上下文和10种温度设置下为每个输出选择合适的语言描述符，每个实验重复10次。
AI.result: LLM整体表现一致但校准偏差明显，不确定性的描述表现显著弱于似然的描述。提供预计算的统计量（模式和先验样本量）降低了上下文框架的敏感性，但未解决校准偏差问题。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM不能作为可靠的零样本独立风险沟通工具用于概率预测，校准瓶颈存在于语言化（verbalization）步骤本身。
