title: Score Distributions, Not Cells: Evaluating Single-Cell Perturbations Under Class Overlap
summary:
Most classification problems assume the classes are roughly separable, so that an individual sample can usually be assigned to one class. Single-cell perturbation data violates this assumption: two perturbations can produce different populations of cells while overlapping so much that an individual cell could belong to either. Per-cell accuracy then measures this overlap rather than model quality. We see this on Tahoe-100M and the Virtual Cell Challenge, where a linear classifier, an MLP, and a Transformer all plateau near macro-F1 0.2-0.3 even though almost every pair of perturbations is statistically distinguishable.
  The fix is to score perturbations across the whole population rather than cell by cell. We average a classifier's per-cell probability vectors over all cells of a perturbation to form a population profile, then rank candidate perturbations by this profile; we call the resulting score the Classifier Discrimination Score (CDS). Taking the top-ranked class recovers the winning perturbation. It needs no retraining, costs linear time in the number of cells, and recovers near-perfect identification from the same weak models. CDS differs from the pseudobulk-based Perturbation Discrimination Score (PDS) used in recent benchmarks only in where the average is taken, raw gene expression for PDS versus a learned discriminative space for CDS, and identifies the true perturbation more reliably on both datasets, with the gap widening as cells grow scarce. Because a metric that misranks the ground truth will misrank the models scored against it, per-cell accuracy and raw-pseudobulk scores should be used with caution when comparing perturbation models.

AI.tldr: 单细胞扰动数据中，由于扰动间高度重叠，传统逐细胞分类准确率无效（仅0.2-0.3 macro-F1）。本文提出Classifier Discrimination Score (CDS)，通过平均每个扰动所有细胞的概率向量形成群体轮廓来评分，无需重新训练，线性时间复杂度，显著提升识别性能，且优于PDS方法。
AI.motivation: 单细胞扰动数据违反传统分类假设（类别可分离），扰动产生的细胞群体高度重叠，导致逐细胞准确率无法反映模型质量，需要新的评估指标。
AI.method: 提出Classifier Discrimination Score (CDS)：对每个扰动，将所有细胞的分类器概率向量平均得到群体轮廓，然后根据此轮廓对候选扰动排序。与PDS的区别在于平均位置（CDS在判别空间平均，PDS在原始基因表达空间平均）。
AI.result: 在Tahoe-100M和Virtual Cell Challenge上，线性分类器、MLP、Transformer的macro-F1仅0.2-0.3；CDS从相同弱模型恢复出近乎完美的识别性能；CDS在两个数据集上均比PDS更可靠地识别真实扰动，且细胞越少优势越明显。
AI.conclusion: 逐细胞准确率和原始伪批量评分在比较扰动模型时应谨慎使用；CDS无需重新训练、线性时间复杂度，是更可靠的评估指标。

title: Model-Guided Local Bayesian Optimization for Tuning of Interpretable Controllers in Injection Molding
comment: Accepted for oral presentation at CCTA 2026 in Vancouver, Canada
summary: Advanced control methods have proven effective for controlling cavity pressure, a key determinant of part-quality attributes, in the plastics injection molding process. However, the abstract nature of the resulting control laws makes them difficult to interpret in a production environment, thereby limiting adoption in industrial applications. Additionally, controller optimization poses a severe challenge due to the diversity of mold geometries and materials. We propose a method to automatically optimize interpretable controllers during manufacturing while being cycle-efficient and risk-aware. The approach uses a Physics-Inspired Neural Mixture-of-Local-Experts model of the injection molding dynamics and augments its simulated closed-loop costs with a residual Gaussian Process, enabling Local Bayesian Optimization of controller parameters. We benchmark the algorithm against Vanilla Bayesian Optimization (BO) in simulation, using three controllers with parameter counts ranging from 1 to 30. Using the local method, we identify controller parameters that yield costs comparable to or lower than those of global BO over 20 optimization iterations, while mitigating high-cost excursions during tuning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种在注射成型过程中自动优化可解释控制器的方法，该方法结合物理启发式神经混合局部专家模型和高斯过程残差，通过局部贝叶斯优化实现风险感知和循环高效的控制器参数调优。
AI.motivation: 先进控制方法虽能有效控制型腔压力，但控制律难以解释，限制了工业应用；同时，模具几何形状和材料的多样性使控制器优化极具挑战。
AI.method: 构建物理启发式神经混合局部专家模型模拟注射成型动态，用残差高斯过程增强模拟闭环成本，实现局部贝叶斯优化来自动调优控制器参数。
AI.result: 在仿真中与全局贝叶斯优化对比，所提方法在20轮优化迭代中找到了成本相当或更低的控制器参数，同时减少了调优过程中的高成本波动。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能高效、安全地在实际生产中自动优化可解释控制器，有望推动先进控制方法在注射成型工业中的应用。

title: An augmented Lagrangian method with exact multipliers for non-separable composite $\ell_0$-$\ell_2$ regularization
summary: This paper studies a non-separable composite $\ell_0$-$\ell_2$ regularization model that simultaneously enforces sparsity and smoothness for inverse problems. The $\ell_0$ norm induces inherent nonconvexity and nonsmoothness, while linear transformations further introduce nonseparability, making the problem computationally challenging to solve. The existing inexact augmented Lagrangian method suffers from high computational complexity and unstable convergence. To overcome these difficulties, we develop two novel augmented Lagrangian algorithms with exact multipliers, designed respectively for the full row-rank case and the general matrix case, where all subproblems are globally optimized via closed-form solutions. Furthermore, we prove linear convergence of the proposed method when the transformation matrix is full row rank. In the general setting, all accumulation points of the generated sequence are KKT points for the original problem. Numerical experiments on synthetic data, trend filtering, and image smoothing demonstrate the superior efficiency and accuracy of the proposed methods over the existing method, confirming our theoretical analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文针对非可分复合ℓ₀-ℓ₂正则化模型，提出了两种基于精确乘子的增广拉格朗日算法，分别适用于满行秩和一般矩阵情形，所有子问题均有闭式解，理论证明了线性收敛性（满行秩）和KKT点收敛性（一般情形），实验验证了其在效率与精度上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有非精确增广拉格朗日方法计算复杂度高且收敛不稳定，亟需设计高效且收敛性有保障的算法来解决非凸、非光滑、非可分的ℓ₀-ℓ₂正则化逆问题。
AI.method: 提出两种基于精确乘子的增广拉格朗日算法：（1）满行秩情形下利用闭式解全局优化子问题并证明线性收敛；（2）一般矩阵情形下同样通过闭式解求解子问题，证明所有聚点为原问题的KKT点。
AI.result: 在合成数据、趋势滤波和图像平滑上的数值实验表明，所提方法在效率和精度上均显著优于现有方法，验证了理论分析的正确性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的精确乘子增广拉格朗日算法有效克服了现有方法的计算复杂度和收敛不稳定问题，为ℓ₀-ℓ₂正则化逆问题提供了高效、可收敛的求解方案。

title: Robustness Meets Uncertainty: Evidential Adversarial Training for Robust Selective Classification
summary: Safety-critical applications require classifiers that are both robust and reliable. Adversarial training is a widely adopted defense for improving robustness in deep neural networks; however, its effect on the reliability of predictive uncertainty remains underexplored. We investigate this gap through the lens of selective classification, which has rarely been systematically analyzed alongside adversarial robustness. We introduce a unified benchmark for the robustness-uncertainty trade-off. It standardizes architectures, augmentations, threat models, and evaluation metrics across clean, adversarial, and common-corruption settings. Across a wide range of state-of-the-art adversarial training methods, we uncover a recurring failure mode: several approaches improve robust accuracy while degrading uncertainty ranking, leading to poorer selective behavior. To address this, we propose Evidential Adversarial Training (EV-AT), which models uncertainty through a Dirichlet distribution and combines (i) an evidence-based loss promoting clean accuracy and reliable uncertainty with (ii) a robust evidence-alignment loss matching clean and adversarial predictions in log Dirichlet-parameter space. Extensive experiments show that EV-AT shifts the Pareto frontier of robustness-uncertainty trade-offs beyond prior state-of-the-art adversarial training methods. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/NicolasSournac/Robustness_Meets_Uncertainty.EV-AT.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了对抗训练对预测不确定性可靠性的影响，发现很多对抗训练方法在提升鲁棒精度的同时会破坏不确定性排序。为此提出Evidential Adversarial Training (EV-AT)，通过狄利克雷分布建模不确定性，结合基于证据的损失和鲁棒证据对齐损失，在鲁棒性与不确定性之间实现了更优的帕累托前沿。
AI.motivation: 安全关键应用需要同时具备鲁棒性和可靠不确定性的分类器，但对抗训练对预测不确定性可靠性的影响尚未被充分探索，且选择性分类与对抗鲁棒性的系统分析很少。
AI.method: 提出Evidential Adversarial Training (EV-AT)，通过狄利克雷分布建模不确定性，结合两种损失：(i) 基于证据的损失提升干净准确率和可靠不确定性，(ii) 鲁棒证据对齐损失在log狄利克雷参数空间中匹配干净与对抗预测。
AI.result: EV-AT在鲁棒性与不确定性权衡的帕累托前沿上超越了现有对抗训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练可能提升鲁棒精度但损害不确定性排序，而EV-AT能有效缓解该问题，实现更好的鲁棒性-不确定性权衡。

title: What is Left for Us? Second Scholarship Against the Degradation of Research by AI
summary: We argue that generative AI can degrade research by eroding the very practices through which scholarly judgement is formed and academic trust is built. As constitutive conditions for the production and validation of knowledge, these practices cannot be reduced to the final outputs of research, which is what AI so effectively simulate. Accordingly, when researchers delegate central tasks of inquiry to systems like Large Language Models, they may stop enacting these practices and, with them, lose access to the formation they provide. An individual research output generated by AI may even appear improved but the researcher behind it fails to develop. Against this risk, merely keeping humans in the loop as prompters or quality checkers of AI outputs is insufficient to preserve research as a site of intellectual formation. What is needed instead is a renewed commitment to research as a lived practice in which judgement is formed gradually, often through frictions, and participation in a scholarly community. We defend it because it rests on four sources and warrants of research that cannot be automated: tacit knowledge, personal commitment, socialisation, and deep reading. This practice enacts what we call second scholarship, by which we understand the reappropriation of scholarly craft, chosen out of a critical experience of what generative AI can and cannot do. What cannot and should not be delegated becomes what research communities must value and answer for. This is what is left for us.

AI.tldr: 本文认为生成式AI会侵蚀学术判断形成和学术信任建立的实践过程，这些实践作为知识生产和验证的构成性条件，无法被简化为AI能有效模拟的研究最终输出。研究者将核心任务委托给AI时，可能停止践行这些实践，从而失去它们所提供的形成性作用。为此，需要重申研究作为一种生活实践，其中判断是在摩擦中逐渐形成的，并参与学术共同体。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI（如大语言模型）在学术研究中的应用日益广泛，但现有讨论多聚焦于AI产出的质量和效率，忽视了AI对研究者自身学术判断力形成和学术信任建立的根本性侵蚀。作者指出，让人类作为提示者或质量检查者不足以保护研究作为智力形成的场所。
AI.method: 通过哲学论证和概念分析，辨识出四种无法自动化的研究源泉与保证：隐性知识、个人承诺、社会化、深度阅读。在此基础上提出"第二学术"（second scholarship）概念，即对学术技艺的重新占有，源于对生成式AI能与不能做的批判性体验。
AI.result: 论证了AI辅助研究可能带来的根本性风险不是产出质量下降，而是研究者自身无法发展；提出了"第二学术"作为应对方案，强调学术共同体需要珍视和负责那些不能也不应被委托给AI的部分。
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI的威胁不在于它做错了什么，而在于它做得太"好"——它模拟了研究产出，却让研究者失去了形成判断力的实践过程。保护研究作为智力形成场所，需要从"人在回路中"转向对学术实践本身的重新承诺。

title: Probe, Don't Prompt: A Hidden-State Probe for Metadata Filtering in Multi-Meta-RAG
summary: Multi-Meta-RAG improves retrieval for multi-hop question answering by filtering a vector store on metadata (the news source) that it extracts from each query by prompting gpt-3.5-turbo. We show this proprietary, free-form extractor can be replaced by a local, deterministic probe trained on the hidden states of a small open-source language model. On all 2556 MultiHop-RAG queries the probe reaches 90.9% set-exact accuracy against 88.0% for a model-free substring baseline and 80.9% for GPT-3.5, a margin that comes entirely from null queries, on which GPT-3.5 never abstains; on non-null queries all three stay within about a point. Because the probe's output space is exactly the fixed 49-source vocabulary, it cannot drift outside the allow-list as the prompted model does. Three design choices make it work: selecting a shallow layer, mean pooling, and class-imbalance-aware multi-label training over the long tail of sources. A 135M-parameter model lands within ~1.5 points of a 1.5B one, so the filter is cheap to output: a partial forward pass through the first few layers plus one linear head, with no API. The code is available at https://github.com/mxpoliakov/Multi-Meta-RAG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用基于小开源LM隐状态的确定性探针替代GPT-3.5的元数据提取器，在MultiHop-RAG任务中以90.9%的集合精确度超越GPT-3.5（80.9%），且输出空间固定为49个源，不会漂移，仅需135M参数模型即可接近1.5B模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Multi-Meta-RAG使用GPT-3.5进行自由格式的元数据提取，存在API依赖、输出可能超出允许列表、对空查询不 abstain 等问题，因此希望用本地、确定性的方法替代。
AI.method: 训练一个探针（probe）在小开源LM（135M/1.5B）的隐藏状态上，采用浅层选择、均值池化、长尾多标签训练（考虑类别不平衡），将输出空间固定为49个新闻源。
AI.result: 在2556个MultiHop-RAG查询上，探针达90.9%集合精确度，优于子串基线（88.0%）和GPT-3.5（80.9%）；优势完全来自空查询（GPT-3.5从不 abstain）；非空查询三者差距约1个点；135M模型与1.5B模型差距仅~1.5点。
AI.conclusion: 局部确定性探针可有效替代专有API提取器，更便宜、更可控、输出不越界，适合资源受限场景下的RAG元数据过滤。

title: Minimum Block Width for Universal Approximation by Residual Neural Networks with Inner Width One
summary: In this paper, we study the universal approximation property of residual neural networks, and obtain some new results. For input and output dimensions $d_x$ and $d_y$, and LeakyReLU, ReLU, ReLU-like activation functions, the upper and lower bounds of the block width are established. To achieve $L^p$ approximation $(1\leq p <+\infty)$ on any compact domain, we show that the exact minimum block width is $\max\{d_x,d_y\}$ when the inner width is 1. Furthermore, we show that residual neural networks with block width $\min\{d_x+d_y, \max\{2d_x+1,d_y\}\}$ can achieve uniform approximation on any compact domain under the constraint that each residual branch has inner width 1. Besides, for any activation function family, we prove that residual neural networks with block width less than $\max\{d_x, d_y\}$ cannot approximate all target functions, both in the $L^p$ sense and the uniform sense, regardless of inner width.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了残差神经网络的通用逼近性质，建立了块宽度的上下界，证明了最小块宽度为max{dx, dy}（内宽为1时Lp逼近），以及块宽度min{dx+dy, max{2dx+1, dy}}可实现一致逼近（残差分支内宽为1），并证明块宽度小于max{dx, dy}时无法逼近所有目标函数。
AI.motivation: 探究残差神经网络在通用逼近性质中的最小块宽度需求，特别是不同激活函数和逼近方式下的理论界限。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，针对LeakyReLU、ReLU等激活函数，分别研究Lp逼近和一致逼近下的块宽度上下界，并考虑内宽为1的约束条件。
AI.result: Lp逼近下最小块宽度为max{dx, dy}（内宽=1）；一致逼近下块宽度为min{dx+dy, max{2dx+1, dy}}（残差分支内宽=1）；块宽度小于max{dx, dy}时无法逼近所有目标函数。
AI.conclusion: 残差神经网络的块宽度存在理论下界，且在不同逼近意义下给出了精确或紧的宽度界限，为网络架构设计提供了理论指导。

title: Shadow Pricing of Static Voltage Stability Services within Unit Commitment for Inverter-Dominated Power Systems
summary: Modern power systems are increasingly dominated by Inverter-Based Resources (IBR), most of which work in Grid-following (GFL) mode. This implies that they do not directly control their terminal voltage, so the static voltage stability at these buses may be compromised, especially under constant-power-factor operation that lacks voltage-adaptive reactive support. In addition, weather-driven IBR are often installed in electrically remote areas with low Short-Circuit Ratio (SCR), further exacerbating voltage issues. To address this challenge, grid-forming control can be utilized to enhance low-SCR buses, while GFL-IBR could be explicitly required to provide voltage support through grid codes. As an alternative, a market mechanism could be devised that incentivizes relevant generators to proactively adjust their operating points as a service to maintain voltage stability, while the theoretical framework for such a market has not been developed. To fill this gap, this work adopts a second-order cone-based static voltage stability constraint for GFL-IBR buses within a unit commitment problem, and proposes a mechanism to assign shadow prices to this ancillary service. To determine appropriate price values under non-convex conditions, different pricing schemes are assessed. Using a modified IEEE 30-bus system, we demonstrate that both the dispatchable and restricted pricing methods can yield revenue-adequate service prices, though the former may deliver less efficient price signals and the latter may require well-defined uplift payments. This implies that, given differentiated pricing mechanisms and price signals, operators need to select a suitable pricing method in accordance with actual system conditions and market rules.

AI.tldr: 本文针对逆变器资源（IBR）主导的电力系统中，电网跟随（GFL）模式下静态电压稳定性不足的问题，提出了一种基于二阶锥规划的静态电压稳定约束纳入机组组合问题，并设计了为电压稳定辅助服务定价的市场机制。通过改进IEEE 30节点系统验证，比较了可调度定价和受限定价两种方案的效果。
AI.motivation: 在高比例逆变器资源（特别是电网跟随模式）的现代电力系统中，GFL-IBR不直接控制端电压，在低短路比（SCR）区域和恒功率因数运行下静态电压稳定性严重受损，而现有市场机制缺乏激励相关发电商主动调整运行点以维持电压稳定的理论框架。
AI.method: 采用二阶锥（SOC）约束建立GFL-IBR节点的静态电压稳定约束，将其嵌入机组组合（UC）问题中；提出市场机制为电压稳定辅助服务分配影子价格，并在非凸条件下评估可调度定价和受限定价两种方案。
AI.result: 在改进IEEE 30节点系统上，可调度定价和受限定价两种方法均能产生收入充足的辅助服务价格，但可调度定价可能产生效率较低的信号，受限定价则需要定义良好的补偿支付（uplift payments）。
AI.conclusion: 不同定价机制和价格信号各有利弊，运营商需根据实际系统条件和市场规则选择适当的定价方法。

title: Adaptive direct search algorithms with relaxable and quantifiable constraints
summary: This work introduces ADS-PB, an extension of the Adaptive Direct Search (ADS) framework for solving constrained blackbox optimization problems. With ADS, iterates progress without relying on mesh structures or sufficient decrease conditions on the objective function value. Unlike the extreme barrier approach used in ADS, where only unrelaxable constraints are considered, the proposed method also handles quantifiable and relaxable constraints using a Progressive Barrier (PB) mechanism that exploits both constraint and objective function values. A convergence analysis of the proposed framework under mild assumptions is presented. The performance of the proposed method is assessed using sets of analytical and simulation-based constrained test problems and is compared with state-of-the-art blackbox optimization solvers, including the PB approach within the Mesh Adaptive Direct Search (MADS) framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADS-PB，将自适应直接搜索（ADS）扩展至约束黑箱优化问题，通过渐进式屏障（PB）机制同时处理可量化与可松弛约束，在无网格结构依赖下实现收敛性分析与实证验证。
AI.motivation: 现有ADS框架仅处理不可松弛约束（极端屏障法），未涉及可量化与可松弛约束，限制了其在黑箱优化中的应用范围。
AI.method: 在ADS基础上引入PB机制，同时利用约束值与目标函数值，处理可量化、可松弛及不可松弛约束，无需网格结构和充分下降条件。
AI.result: 在解析与仿真约束测试问题上，ADS-PB性能优于包括MADS-PB在内的主流黑箱优化求解器。
AI.conclusion: ADS-PB在温和假设下具有收敛性保障，是处理约束黑箱优化问题的有效新框架。

title: STELLA: Efficient Sensor-to-LLM Translation for On-Device Human Activity Recognition
summary: HAR is increasingly expected to run continuously on edge devices, yet recent LLM-based methods remain hard to deploy: raw sensor prompts are long, cloud inference adds latency and privacy risk, and fine-tuned LLM pipelines turn general-purpose models into task-specific classifiers. We present STELLA, an efficient sensor-to-LLM translation framework for on-device HAR that shifts the burden from LLM adaptation to sensor tokenization. A lightweight hierarchical tokenizer compresses an entire multi-channel inertial window into a fixed set of compact latent sensor tokens, which are projected into the embedding space of a frozen pretrained LLM and combined with a natural-language prompt for label scoring. This preserves activity-relevant temporal and cross-channel structure while keeping LLM-side computation predictable across sensor configurations. STELLA also supports on-device personalization, adapting only the lightweight tokenizer on small amounts of user-specific labelled data and augmenting inference with a local retrieval context, keeping the LLM, user data, and retrieval on device. Across seven public HAR datasets and eight benchmark settings, STELLA achieves new state-of-the-art performance, improving over prior methods by up to 11.83% F1; on-device personalization yields up to a further 21.91% F1 as user data accumulates after deployment. STELLA also outperforms representative time-series tokenizers under the same LLM pipeline and achieves real-time inference under practical mobile and edge budgets, showing that efficient sensor tokenization is a practical path toward accurate, private, and personalized LLM-based HAR on edge devices.

AI.tldr: STELLA提出了一种高效的传感器到LLM的翻译框架，通过轻量级层次化分词器将多通道惯性传感器数据压缩为紧凑的潜在传感器令牌，结合冻结的预训练LLM实现边端设备上的实时、准确、隐私保护且可个性化的人体活动识别。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的HAR方法难以部署在边缘设备上：原始传感器提示过长、云端推理带来延迟和隐私风险、微调LLM管道将通用模型转化为特定任务分类器。需要一种既能利用LLM能力又适合边缘部署的高效方案。
AI.method: 提出STELLA框架，核心是轻量级层次化分词器（hierarchical tokenizer），将多通道惯性窗口压缩为固定数量的紧凑潜在传感器令牌，投影到冻结的预训练LLM嵌入空间，结合自然语言提示进行标签评分。支持边端个性化，仅适配轻量分词器，使用本地检索增强推理。
AI.result: 在7个公开HAR数据集和8个基准设置中达到SOTA，相比先前方法F1最高提升11.83%；边端个性化在部署后用户数据积累时可进一步提升F1达21.91%；在移动和边缘预算下实现实时推理。
AI.conclusion: 高效传感器分词是实现基于LLM的边端HAR的实用路径，能够同时满足准确性、隐私保护和个性化需求。

title: PLACEMEM: Toward a Compute-Aware Memory Plane for Lifelong Agents
summary: Lifelong agents need more than larger context windows and better retrieval. They need memories that can persist, evolve, and be corrected without forcing the serving stack to recompute the same history on every turn or silently reuse stale runtime state. We present PLACEMEM as a systems position on lifelong-agent memory, instantiated by an executable control-plane prototype. The central claim is that agent memory should be represented as versioned capsules that unify semantics, provenance, validity, and reusable runtime state under one correction-aware identity. In the current prototype, capsules drive prompt-level text retrieval, KV-aware routing, and cascading invalidation over live streamed backends; prospective layer-frontier replay is intentionally framed as a deeper integration agenda rather than a claimed engine feature. We describe a vLLM-first prototype with persistent capsule state, concurrency-safe invalidation, an OpenAI-compatible routing sidecar, a typed metadata contract, and a benchmark harness that measures live first-token latency, reuse, and post-correction behavior. The result is both an executable artifact that demonstrates correction-aware control-plane behavior today and a concrete roadmap for replay-aware serving integration in future lifelong-agent systems.

AI.tldr: PLACEMEM是一个面向终身智能体记忆的系统方案，提出将记忆表示为版本化的胶囊（capsules），统一语义、来源、有效性和可重用运行时状态，并实现了一个基于vLLM的可执行控制平面原型。
AI.motivation: 现有终身智能体依赖更大的上下文窗口或更好的检索机制，但缺乏能持久化、可进化、可纠正的记忆系统，且无法避免每次交互时重新计算历史或静默使用过时的运行时状态。
AI.method: 提出版本化胶囊（versioned capsules）作为记忆表示，统一语义、来源、有效性和可重用状态；实现控制平面原型，包含提示级文本检索、KV感知路由、级联失效机制；构建vLLM优先的原型，包含持久化胶囊状态、并发安全的失效机制、OpenAI兼容路由sidecar、类型化元数据契约和基准测试工具。
AI.result: 实现了可执行的控制平面原型，展示了修正感知行为，并提供了面向未来重放感知服务集成的具体路线图。
AI.conclusion: PLACEMEM提出了终身智能体记忆的系统定位，当前原型已展示修正感知控制平面能力，并将层前沿重放作为深度集成议程而非已实现特性，为未来终身智能体系统指明了方向。

title: Can Dialects Be Steered Like Languages? Sparse Neurons and Distributed Directions in Arabic LLMs
summary: A key challenge in Arabic NLP is the scarcity of dialectal data relative to Modern Standard Arabic (MSA), causing LLMs to overproduce MSA and struggle with dialectally accurate generation. From an interpretability perspective, this raises a fundamental question: where and how are dialectal features encoded within model internals, and can these representations be leveraged to improve dialect generation without fine-tuning? This study investigates two complementary inference-time approaches that serve simultaneously as interpretability probes and control mechanisms. First, we conduct a neuron-level analysis, identifying sparse neuron populations that encode dialect-specific features and showing that amplifying or suppressing these neurons can steer model outputs toward target dialects. Second, motivated by the entanglement of dialectal features at the single-neuron level, we apply a vector-steering approach that extracts dialect-specific activation directions and injects them during inference. Together, these methods illuminate the geometry of dialectal knowledge in Arabic LLMs and offer a principled, interpretability-grounded framework for dialect control without requiring dialect-specific fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了阿拉伯语大语言模型中方言特征的编码机制，提出两种无需微调的推理时控制方法：神经元级分析和向量引导，既能作为可解释性探针，又能实现方言生成控制。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语NLP面临方言数据稀缺问题，LLMs倾向于生成标准阿拉伯语（MSA），缺乏方言准确性。现有方法依赖微调，代价高昂。因此，需要从可解释性角度理解模型内部方言特征的编码方式，并探索无需微调的方言控制方法。
AI.method: 提出两种互补的推理时方法：(1) 神经元级分析——识别编码方言特征的稀疏神经元群体，通过放大或抑制这些神经元来引导输出；(2) 向量引导方法——提取方言特定的激活方向，在推理时注入这些方向向量，以解决单神经元层面方言特征纠缠的问题。
AI.result: 两种方法均能有效地将模型输出导向目标方言，揭示了阿拉伯语LLM中方言知识的几何结构，验证了无需微调的方言控制可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一个基于可解释性的方言控制框架，既揭示了方言特征在模型内部的表征方式，又实现了无需方言微调的高效方言生成控制。

title: Multi-Turn On-Policy Distillation with Prefix Replay
summary: We study on-policy distillation (OPD) for agentic tasks, where an LLM agent interacts with an environment over multiple turns and a student imitates a teacher over these multi-turn interaction histories. Fully online OPD is costly because each update requires fresh student rollouts through the environment and teacher queries at visited histories. We propose Replayed-Prefix On-Policy Distillation (ReOPD), an off-environment alternative that reuses pre-collected teacher trajectories as replayed prefixes: the student acts at selected steps, while the teacher provides dense per-step supervision without executing new environment interactions. We show that multi-turn OPD introduces a prefix trap: making histories more student-on-policy improves relevance to the student, but can query the teacher on histories where its target is unreliable. This creates a two-sided distribution shift between student occupancy and teacher reliability. ReOPD addresses this by treating multi-turn OPD as a reliability-aware prefix distribution design and implements it with a simple step-decaying sampling schedule that emphasizes early, lower-shift prefixes. Across mathematical reasoning with Python and search environments over multiple teacher and student model scales, ReOPD preserves or improves OPD-level accuracy, uses zero tool calls during student training, and is at least 4$\times$ faster per training step than OPD. ReOPD therefore turns expensive agent-environment interaction into a reusable offline resource, enabling scalable distillation across tools, tasks, and environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReOPD，一种离线策略蒸馏方法，通过复用预收集的教师轨迹作为重放前缀，避免在线学生-环境交互，在保持或提升精度的同时实现至少4倍加速。
AI.motivation: 在线策略蒸馏（OPD）在智能体任务中成本高昂，因为每次更新都需要新的学生轨迹和环境交互，以及教师查询。作者希望找到一种更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出ReOPD，复用预收集的教师轨迹作为重放前缀，学生仅在选定步骤执行动作，教师提供密集的逐步监督。通过步长衰减采样策略（step-decaying sampling）设计可靠性感知的前缀分布，解决"前缀陷阱"（prefix trap）——即学生策略轨迹与教师可靠性之间的双面分布偏移问题。
AI.result: 在数学推理（Python）和搜索环境中，跨多种教师/学生模型规模，ReOPD保持或提升了OPD级别的准确率，训练过程中零工具调用，且每训练步至少快4倍。
AI.conclusion: ReOPD将昂贵的智能体-环境交互转化为可重用的离线资源，实现了跨工具、任务和环境的可扩展蒸馏。

title: An Analytical Newsvendor Framework for Risk-Averse Energy Storage Capacity Reservation under Non-Normal Uncertainty
summary: Energy storage operators often reserve usable capacity before uncertain market opportunities are realized, for example when a day-ahead operator commits capacity for an evening peak-spread or ancillary-service window. Price spikes, renewable forecast errors, activation calls and imbalance penalties can make the decision-relevant opportunity distribution asymmetric and heavy-tailed rather than Gaussian. This paper develops a tri-objective storage-newsvendor framework for this capacity-reservation decision. The model jointly maximizes expected profit, minimizes CVaR tail loss and minimizes maximum regret over candidate non-normal distributions. We derive a critical-fractile expected-profit solution and a finite-scenario convex scalarization that solves the three objectives together. In stylized log-NMVM experiments with matched mean and variance, a moment-matched normal policy over-reserves capacity by up to 1.337 units. In a lognormal policy comparison, the CVaR and maximum-regret policies reduce tail loss and candidate-set regret at the cost of lower expected profit.

AI.tldr: 本文针对储能运营商在不确定市场机会下的容量预留问题，提出了一个三目标存储-报童模型框架，联合优化预期利润、CVaR尾部损失和最大遗憾值，实验表明忽视非正态分布特性的策略会导致过度预留容量。
AI.motivation: 储能运营商常在市场机会不确定时预留容量（如日前市场为晚间峰谷价差或辅助服务预留），而价格尖峰、可再生能源预测误差、激活调用和不平衡惩罚等因素使得决策相关的机会分布呈现非对称和重尾特征，而非高斯分布。现有方法可能因忽视这些分布特性而导致次优决策。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个三目标存储-报童（storage-newsvendor）框架：1) 最大化期望利润；2) 最小化CVaR尾部损失；3) 最小化候选非正态分布下的最大遗憾值。推导了临界分位数期望利润解，并提出了有限场景下的凸标量化方法以实现三目标联合求解。
AI.result: 在对数NMVM实验（匹配均值和方差）中，使用矩匹配正态策略会导致过度预留容量达1.337单位。在对数正态策略对比中，CVaR策略和最大遗憾策略降低了尾部损失和候选集遗憾值，但以牺牲期望利润为代价。
AI.conclusion: 储能容量预留决策中，忽视收益机会分布的非对称和重尾特性会导致显著偏差。三目标框架能够在期望利润、尾部风险控制和分布鲁棒性之间实现有效权衡。

title: Stacked LoRA for Subject-Adaptive EEG Foundation Models in Motor Imagery Decoding
comment: 10 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Accepted at the 2026 IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence (WCCI 2026), Maastricht, Netherlands
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) decoding for brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) faces a major challenge: substantial inter-subject variability limits effective cross-subject generalization. Consequently, practical systems still rely largely on subject-specific models trained from scratch and requiring individual recalibration. EEG foundation models have recently emerged as a promising alternative; however, even large pretrained models cannot simply be used as fixed feature extractors and still require additional adaptation before they can be reliably applied to downstream tasks. In this work, we address this challenge through targeted adaptation strategies. Building on recent EEG foundation models such as REVE, LaBraM, and LUNA, we examine the impact of different low-rank adaptation strategies on motor imagery classification. We propose a framework that structurally decouples subject-invariant knowledge from subject-specific neural signatures: the low-rank update at each adapted layer is split into a Global adapter, trained jointly across all subjects, and Subject-Specific adapters, each absorbing individual variability. To assess the contribution of each path, we compare three adaptation strategies: (i) subject-specific LoRA (ii) global LoRA and (iii) stacked LoRA, combining both Global and Subject Specific adapters. Experiments on BCI Competition IV-2a, PhysioNet Motor Imagery, and the clinical Zuo2025 benchmark show that Stacked LoRA effectively mitigates inter-subject variability, achieving the best accuracy in the large majority of backbone and dataset combinations. Our analysis further reveals that the optimal balance between the global and subject-specific paths depends on the target population: a shared adapter is sufficient for large, diverse cohorts, whereas subject-specific adaptation is decisive under the high inter-session variability of clinical recordings.

AI.tldr: 针对EEG跨被试泛化难题，提出Stacked LoRA框架：将低秩适配器分解为共享的全局适配器和个体化被试特定适配器，在多个数据集上显著优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: EEG解码面临被试间差异大的核心挑战，现有脑电基础模型即使预训练后仍需额外适配才能用于下游任务，亟需更高效的适配策略。
AI.method: 提出Stacked LoRA框架，结构化解耦被试不变知识与被试特定神经特征：每层低秩更新拆分为全局适配器（跨被试联合训练）和被试特定适配器（吸收个体差异），并与仅有被试特定LoRA、仅有全局LoRA两种策略对比。
AI.result: 在BCI Competition IV-2a、PhysioNet Motor Imagery和Zuo2025临床基准上，Stacked LoRA在大多数骨干网络与数据集组合中取得最佳精度，且最优全局-被试路径平衡取决于目标人群特性。
AI.conclusion: Stacked LoRA有效缓解了跨被试变异；大而多样本群体下全局适配器足够，临床高跨会话变异场景下被试特定适配起决定性作用。

title: Forethought: Verifiable Reasoning from Neurosymbolic Primitive Programming
summary: Current agentic workflows usually involve decomposing user requests into sequences of tool calls with correctly resolved parameters, the results of which are processed through reasoning traces in the language model's context window. The prevailing route to improve such reasoning is test-time scaling, which trains models to search over long chains of thought; but the resulting capability is entangled in model weights, is not verifiable step-by-step, and is costly at inference. We present Forethought, a neurosymbolic reasoning system that instead treats reasoning as an explicit, verifiable program, that builds from a library of symbolic and neural primitives which are composed through a domain-specific language. The result are reasoning programs, which are concrete representations of the model's work, and as such can be inspected and modified before deployment. Instantiated as a tool-calling execution kernel and evaluated across five benchmarks, Forethought improves base-model accuracy by about 30% relative and outperforms vanilla prompting, reinforcement learning scaffolds, and prompt-evolution methods, enabling small models to match or exceed frontier models capabilities. In a direct comparison, a non-reasoning model augmented with Forethought competes with a dedicated reasoning model while requiring roughly three orders of magnitude less post-training investment, and remains model-agnostic and auditable.

AI.tldr: Forethought 是一种神经符号推理系统，将推理过程转化为显式、可验证的程序，通过组合符号和神经原语来执行工具调用，在五个基准测试上使基础模型准确率提升约30%，让小型模型无需大量后训练即可匹敌前沿推理模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基于语言模型的智能体工作流依赖测试时扩展来提升推理能力，但这会将能力纠缠在模型权重中，无法逐步验证，且推理成本高昂。作者希望设计一种可审计、可验证、模型无关的推理系统，替代隐式的链式思维推理。
AI.method: 提出 Forethought，一个神经符号推理系统。核心是将推理视为显式、可验证的程序，通过领域特定语言（DSL）组合符号原语和神经原语，构建具体的推理程序。这些程序可被检查、修改和部署，以工具调用执行内核的形式运行。
AI.result: 在五个基准测试上，Forethought 使基础模型准确率相对提升约30%，优于普通提示、强化学习框架和提示进化方法。非推理模型借助 Forethought 即可与专用推理模型竞争，而后训练投入减少约三个数量级，且保持模型无关和可审计性。
AI.conclusion: Forethought 通过将推理显式化为可验证程序，有效弥合了小型模型与大型推理模型之间的差距，同时大幅降低后训练成本，并提供了可审计、可修改的透明推理路径。

title: The Remarkable Effectiveness of Providing AI Agents with Natural Language Tools: A Replication Study Validating NLT Performance Across 14 Models
comment: 28 pages, 6 figures, replication study, replication of arXiv:2510.14453 findings
summary: This study independently replicates and extends the Natural Language Tools (NLT) framework of Johnson et al.~(2025), which questions the use of structured tool calling in large language model (LLM) agentic systems. We evaluated NLT across 14 models and 8,560 trials, adding newer frontier, reasoning, and open-weight models to the original set. The results confirm the core findings and add detail. NLT improves tool-calling accuracy by 14.9 percentage points overall (62.3\% versus 47.4\% structured) and reduces critical errors by 93\% (51 versus 755 errors). The gains depend on model capability: models without native tool calling, reasoning models, and smaller models gain substantially (+24.0pp to +43.1pp), while heavily optimized frontier models (GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro) show smaller or reversed advantages. This matches recent analyses of reinforcement-learning-optimized tool use (Martinez, 2025). NLT also cuts token usage by 25.2\%. The reliability and efficiency advantages compound in recursive agentic workflows, where agents chain many tool calls across sub-agents: a structured failure triggers retries, fallback routing, and coordination overhead, while NLT avoids most of that cost at the source. This work makes three contributions: (1) the first independent validation of NLT using open-source tooling, (2) evidence that model capability moderates NLT's advantages (Chen et al., 2025; Zhang et al., 2025), and (3) a measurement of NLT's reliability benefit (93\% fewer errors), its most deployment-relevant property given the known fragility of structured tool calling. NLT is a practical alternative to structured tool calling, especially for production systems that value reliability over parseability.

AI.tldr: 本研究独立复现并扩展了Johnson等人(2025)的NLT框架，在14个模型和8560次试验中验证了自然语言工具调用优于结构化工具调用：准确率提升14.9个百分点（62.3% vs 47.4%），关键错误减少93%（51 vs 755），token使用量降低25.2%。收益因模型能力而异，优化较弱的小模型获益更大，而前沿模型优势较小或逆转。
AI.motivation: 质疑LLM智能体系统中结构化工具调用的必要性，验证自然语言工具调用（NLT）是否是一种更可靠、更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 独立复现NLT框架，在14个模型（包括前沿模型、推理模型、开源模型）上进行8560次试验的对比评估，并与结构化工具调用进行性能比较。
AI.result: NLT在总体上将工具调用准确率提升14.9个百分点（62.3% vs 47.4%），关键错误减少93%（51 vs 755），token使用量降低25.2%。收益受模型能力调节：无原生工具调用能力的模型、推理模型和小模型获益显著（+24.0pp至+43.1pp），而GPT-5、Gemini 2.5 Pro等前沿模型优势较小或反转。
AI.conclusion: NLT是结构化工具调用的实用替代方案，尤其在重视可靠性而非可解析性的生产系统中优势明显。其可靠性优势在递归智能体工作流中会进一步放大。

title: Probably Correct Optimal Stable Matching under Two-Sided Uncertainty
summary: We study a sequential learning problem for stable matchings in two-sided markets where preferences on both sides are initially unknown. We focus on a centralized setting where an algorithm matches agents at each time step and receives noisy rewards that reflect the preferences of the matched agents, following a semi-bandit feedback structure. We adopt a pure exploration perspective, aiming to efficiently identify the optimal stable matching with high probability. Our work extends prior results by handling \emph{two-sided uncertainty} and by exploiting \emph{partial preference} information. A central ingredient is the notion of \textbf{pervasive stable matching}, which enables the identification of optimal stable matchings under partial preferences. We propose elimination-based algorithms whose stopping criteria exploit the structure of the learned partial preferences, and provide a refined sample-complexity analysis. Beyond pure exploration, we extend our approach to regret minimization and establish regret bounds with respect to the \emph{optimal} stable matching that avoid dependence on the minimum reward gap $Δ_{\min}$.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了两侧市场（双边匹配）中稳定匹配的序贯学习问题，提出利用“普遍稳定匹配”概念在部分偏好信息下高效识别最优稳定匹配的消除算法，并扩展至遗憾最小化场景。
AI.motivation: 现有稳定匹配学习工作大多假设一侧偏好已知或仅考虑单侧不确定性，本文旨在处理双边偏好均未知且仅能获取含噪反馈的实际场景，同时利用部分偏好信息提升效率。
AI.method: 提出“普遍稳定匹配”概念作为核心工具，设计基于消除（elimination-based）的算法，利用学习到的部分偏好结构设计停止准则，并进行精细的样本复杂度分析。
AI.result: 在纯探索场景下实现了高效的样本复杂度；在遗憾最小化场景下，建立了与最优稳定匹配相关的遗憾界，且不依赖最小奖励间隔Δ_min。
AI.conclusion: 本文为双边不确定偏好下的稳定匹配学习提供了理论保证，提出的方法在纯探索和遗憾最小化两方面均优于现有结果，尤其消除了对最小奖励间隔的依赖。

title: Heterogeneous Graph Condensation via Role-Aware Clustering
summary: Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks (HGNNs) have exhibited remarkable efficacy in modeling complex systems with multiple types of nodes and relations, yet their training on large-scale heterogeneous graphs remains computationally prohibitive. Although graph condensation methods can effectively improve learning efficiency on large-scale graphs, existing condensation processes are mainly designed for homogeneous graphs and typically rely on computationally expensive gradient matching or bilevel optimization paradigms, rendering them impractical for heterogeneous settings. To address these limitations, we propose HGC-RC, a simple yet effective role-aware heterogeneous graph condensation framework. Specifically, HGC-RC first extracts semantically enhanced node embeddings via lightweight propagation. It then introduces a role-aware hybrid clustering strategy consisting of class-partitioned clustering for labeled target nodes to preserve class distributions and unsupervised type-wise clustering for non-target nodes to retain critical cross-type connectivity. Finally, a compact heterogeneous graph is efficiently reconstructed based on the resulting cluster assignments. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HGC-RC outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, offering a practical pathway to accelerate HGNN training on large-scale heterogeneous graphs without sacrificing task performance

AI.tldr: 提出HGC-RC框架，通过角色感知混合聚类策略高效压缩大规模异构图，在加速HGNN训练的同时保持任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有异构图神经网络在大规模图上训练计算成本高，而图压缩方法主要针对同构图且依赖昂贵的梯度匹配或双层优化，不适用于异构图场景。
AI.method: 先通过轻量传播提取语义增强的节点嵌入，再提出角色感知混合聚类策略（对标记目标节点进行类分区聚类以保持类分布，对非目标节点进行无监督类型级聚类以保留跨类型连接），最后基于聚类结果高效重构紧凑异构图。
AI.result: 实验表明HGC-RC优于现有基线方法，能够在不牺牲任务性能的前提下加速HGNN在大规模异构图上的训练。
AI.conclusion: HGC-RC为加速大规模异构图上的HGNN训练提供了一种有效的实用路径。

title: Language models guide symbolic equation discovery by controlling search
summary: Scientific equation discovery must combine broad domain priors with strict numerical testing. Symbolic regression supplies numerical grounding but faces a combinatorial search space, whereas many language-model systems ask the model to propose or select formulas directly. We test a different division of labour. We compare role specifications in which the language model acts as equation author, candidate decider or search controller, alongside end-to-end language-model and purely numerical baselines. In the controller setting we propose here, implemented as LLM-PySR, language models specify variables, operators, transformations and search depth; symbolic regression enumerates and fits expressions; and deterministic metrics govern retention. Across 74 AI-Feynman equations and seven complex formula-recovery tasks, search control achieved the strongest observed balance of accuracy, complexity, stability and cost. On an independent battery dataset, LLM-PySR identified a compact piecewise-linear relation between early voltage-curve displacement and cycle life. The results suggest that language models should shape hypothesis exploration rather than decide which equations survive.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM-PySR框架，将语言模型用于控制搜索策略（变量、算子、变换等），而符号回归负责枚举和拟合方程，数值指标决定保留。在多个基准测试中，这种分工方式在准确率、复杂度、稳定性和成本之间取得了最佳平衡，并在电池数据集上发现了分段线性关系。
AI.motivation: 符号回归面临组合爆炸搜索空间，而基于语言模型的系统直接生成或选择公式缺乏严格的数值验证。如何将领域先验知识与严格数值测试有效结合，是科学方程发现的核心挑战。
AI.method: 对比了语言模型作为方程作者、候选决策者、搜索控制器（LLM-PySR）三种角色分工，以及端到端语言模型和纯数值基线。在控制器设置中，LLM指定变量、算子、变换和搜索深度，符号回归负责枚举和拟合，确定性指标控制保留。
AI.result: 在74个AI-Feynman方程和7个复杂公式恢复任务中，搜索控制方法在准确率、复杂度、稳定性和成本之间取得最佳平衡。在电池数据集上，LLM-PySR发现了早期电压曲线位移与循环寿命之间的紧凑分段线性关系。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型应当用于塑造假设探索的方向，而不是决定哪些方程最终存活——严格的数值验证应交由确定性算法完成。

title: NormWorlds-CF: Solver-Verified Counterfactual Normative Reasoning with Metamorphic-Relation GRPO
summary: Language models can reach the right normative verdict for the wrong reason. We introduce NormWorlds-CF, a solver-verified environment for counterfactual normative reasoning in executable rule worlds. Its deterministic solver produces final answers, proof and falsification certificates, argument statuses, support sets, and paired-world change labels, enabling supervision and evaluation without LLM judges. The benchmark contains staged SFT diagnostics and a compact paired-world task with 270 root families and 1080 canonical-to-variant pairs. The SFT diagnostics show that final-answer supervision is an unsafe proxy: answer-only SFT reaches perfect accuracy on answer tasks but scores zero on falsification, while proof-plus-falsification training with targeted replay reaches strong all-task accuracy. For the structured-change task, we introduce metamorphic-relation GRPO (MR-GRPO), a class-conditioned reward for GRPO that gives partial credit for relation families and solver-visible change fields. In matched 1.7B continuation experiments, MR-GRPO improves held-out relation accuracy and relation-family correctness, and reduces wrong-family error, compared to sparse and answer-only GRPO. In Qwen3-4B three-seed validation, answer-only reward improves answer-change fields but weakens relation-family structure, sparse reward preserves coarse relation labels best, and MR-GRPO delivers the strongest balanced performance across answer-change, support-change, status-change, and soft root-level metamorphic-relation metrics. These results show that verified counterfactual structure can shape post-training beyond final answers, while exact full change-record generation, invariant subtype recognition, and out-of-distribution (OOD) transfer remain open problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NormWorlds-CF，一个基于可执行规则世界的反事实规范推理验证环境，并引入MR-GRPO方法进行结构化变更任务训练，实验表明基于反事实结构的训练优于仅关注最终答案的监督方式。
AI.motivation: 语言模型可能出于错误原因得出正确规范结论（"right for the wrong reason"），仅监督最终答案不可靠，需要可验证的反事实推理环境来确保模型真正理解规范推理过程。
AI.method: 构建NormWorlds-CF环境，包含确定性求解器（可产生答案、证明、证伪证书等）；设计SFT诊断任务（答案监督 vs 证明+证伪训练）和结构化变更任务；提出MR-GRPO，一种基于类条件奖励的GRPO变体，对关系族和求解器可见的变更字段给予部分奖励。
AI.result: 答案-only SFT在答题任务上达完美准确率但在证伪任务上得零分；证明+证伪训练+定向回放实现强全能准确率；MR-GRPO相比稀疏奖励和答案-only GRPO提升了关系准确率和关系族正确性，减少了错误族；在Qwen3-4B三种子验证中，MR-GRPO在答案变更、支持变更、状态变更和元关系度量上表现最均衡。
AI.conclusion: 可验证的反事实结构能够超越最终答案来塑造后训练过程，但精确的全变更记录生成、不变子类型识别和OOD迁移仍是开放问题。

title: Active Learning on Adversarially Corrupted Graphs
summary: Motivated by real-world scenarios where malicious entities tamper with existing networks, we define a model where an adversary seeks to hide a set of \emph{corrupted vertices} inside a graph $G^*$. To this end, the adversary can add edges between the corrupted vertices, as well as edges between the corrupted vertices and $G^*$, and its power is then measured by the size of the \emph{neighborhood} of the corrupted vertices in $G^*$. Our goal is to design an active learning algorithm that efficiently finds the subset of corrupted vertices using a small number of label queries. We devise an efficient algorithm that approximately recovers the corrupted vertices with a query complexity that depends polynomially on both the power of the adversary and the \emph{vertex expansion} of $G^*$, a fundamental measure of graph connectivity. At the heart of this result is a polynomial-time algorithm, obtained by carefully adapting sum-of-squares algorithms for approximating minimum expansion, that finds a set with small vertex expansion subject to cardinality constraints. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that the vertex expansion is shown to play a key role in determining the query complexity of active learning algorithms robust to structural adversarial attacks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究对抗性环境下主动学习检测图中被篡改顶点的问题，提出了基于顶点扩张度的多项式时间算法，能以少量标签查询近似恢复被污染顶点集。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中恶意实体可能通过添加边来篡改网络并隐藏被污染顶点，现有工作缺乏对此类结构性对抗攻击下主动学习查询复杂度的理论分析。
AI.method: 将问题建模为对抗者通过顶点邻域大小衡量其能力的图模型；利用平方和（sum-of-squares）方法近似求解带基数约束的最小顶点扩张问题，设计高效恢复算法。
AI.result: 查询复杂度与对抗者能力及图$G^*$的顶点扩张度呈多项式关系；首次证明顶点扩张度在结构性对抗攻击下主动学习查询复杂度中起关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 本文为对抗性图结构攻击下的主动学习提供了理论保证，展示了顶点扩张度作为关键连通性指标的价值，并给出了可多项式时间求解的算法。

title: Observable- and Positional-Encoding-Dependent Symmetry Readout from Neural Network Weights
summary: Post-hoc analysis of trained neural network weights often seeks to recover geometric structure directly from the parameters. We show that, for positional-encoding-equipped neural fields, the symmetry visible from weights is not the true symmetry group itself, but an observable symmetry set determined by the trained parameters, the positional encoding (PE), and readout observable. We formulate this dependence through an exact observability hierarchy, $G_{\mathrm{obs}}^{\mathrm{exact}} \subseteq G_{\mathrm{lift}}^{\mathrm{exact}}(φ) \cap G_{\mathrm{true}}$, where $G_{\mathrm{lift}}^{\mathrm{exact}}(φ)$ is the set of input transformations that the PE can exactly lift to the feature space. The hierarchy implies that even when a target function has a geometric symmetry, that symmetry may be structurally invisible to weight-level observables if the PE does not represent the corresponding transformation. We test this prediction using MLPs trained on two-dimensional signed distance functions with multiple shape symmetry groups, positional encodings, and Gram-based observables. The results show a consistent PE-dependent pattern: DyadicAxisPE supports $D_4$-sensitive readout but structurally suppresses $D_3$ rotations, TriAxisPE yields lower $D_3$ / $D_6$ readout scores under the tested Gram observables by replacing coordinate axes with three 120-degree-separated axes, and random Fourier features mainly exhibit a $π$-rotation response under these readouts. These findings show that PE design affects not only approximation behavior but also which structures are accessible to post-hoc weight-level readouts. This provides a basis for a principled observable-dependent symmetry readout.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了神经场中位置编码对权重层面几何对称性可观测性的影响，提出了一个精确的可观测性层次结构，并通过实验验证了不同位置编码对对称性读出的结构性抑制或支持作用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过分析训练后神经网络的权重来恢复几何结构，但忽略了位置编码在对称性读出中的作用。作者发现权重中可见的对称性并非真实对称群本身，而是由训练参数、位置编码和可观测变量共同决定的"可观测对称集"，因此需要厘清这种依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出精确可观测性层次结构 $G_{\mathrm{obs}}^{\mathrm{exact}} \subseteq G_{\mathrm{lift}}^{\mathrm{exact}}(φ) \cap G_{\mathrm{true}}$，其中 $G_{\mathrm{lift}}^{\mathrm{exact}}(φ)$ 是位置编码能够精确提升到特征空间的输入变换集合。实验训练MLP预测二维符号距离函数，测试不同形状对称群、多种位置编码（DyadicAxisPE、TriAxisPE、随机傅里叶特征）和基于Gram矩阵的可观测变量。
AI.result: DyadicAxisPE支持D4敏感读出但结构性抑制D3旋转；TriAxisPE通过将坐标轴替换为三个120度分离的轴，在Gram可观测变量下降低了D3/D6读出分数；随机傅里叶特征主要表现出π旋转响应。结果一致显示出位置编码依赖的模式。
AI.conclusion: 位置编码设计不仅影响近似行为，还决定了哪些结构可以通过后验权重层面读取得以访问。这为基于可观测变量的原则性对称性读出提供了理论基础。

title: A Clustering-Based Framework for Identifying Suspicious Trading Patterns in Capital Market
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE 2nd International Conference on Quantum Photonics, Artificial Intelligence & Networking (QPAIN), 2026. This is the authors preprint version. The final version is available via IEEE Xplore
summary: Market manipulation is the dubious practice of manipulating stock prices in order to make a quick profit, which truly degrades confidence on trading platforms. We implemented an unsupervised fraud-detection toolkit that begins with K-Means++ clustering to address this issue. A dataset of roughly one million financial transactions from 2012 to 2024 is used. In order to identify fraudulent trades and categorize them using market practice heuristic thresholds, the study suggests a clustering-based pipeline. The method highlights 2.02% of trades as suspicious where 51.10% clearly indicate spoofing, 0.10% indicate pump and dump, 0.55% indicate insider trading, 1.43% indicate a fake breakout, and 46.83% are unclassified. Despite the lack of ground truth, the model's performance is confirmed by a Silhouette Score of 0.561.

AI.tldr: 本文针对金融市场操纵行为，提出了一种基于K-Means++聚类的无监督欺诈检测工具包。使用2012-2024年约100万条交易数据，通过聚类流水线和市场实践启发式阈值，识别出2.02%的可疑交易，其中51.10%为虚假报价(spoofing)，0.10%为拉高出货(pump and dump)，0.55%为内幕交易，1.43%为假突破，46.83%未分类。无真实标签情况下，轮廓系数0.561验证模型性能。
AI.motivation: 市场操纵行为严重破坏交易平台的信任度，现有方法难以有效检测复杂、隐蔽的操纵模式，因此需要开发无监督的自动化检测工具。
AI.method: 采用K-Means++聚类算法构建无监督检测流水线，结合市场实践启发式阈值对聚类结果进行分类，识别不同类型的市场操纵行为。
AI.result: 从约100万条交易中识别出2.02%的可疑交易：虚假报价占51.10%，拉高出货占0.10%，内幕交易占0.55%，假突破占1.43%，另有46.83%无法分类。轮廓系数0.561，表明聚类效果中等偏上。
AI.conclusion: 该无监督方法能有效识别多种市场操纵模式，在缺乏标注数据的情况下具有实用价值；但仍有近半数可疑交易无法归类，提示未来需引入更多特征或改进分类策略。

title: TRACER: Early Failure Detection for Task-Oriented Dialogue
summary: Task-oriented dialogue systems often fail before the final breakdown is obvious, but most evaluation only measures failure after the conversation has already gone wrong. We present TRACER, a method for early failure detection in task-oriented dialogue. TRACER predicts from a partial dialogue whether the full conversation will eventually fail by combining simple trajectory signals from belief-state changes with text representations of the evolving dialogue state. We evaluate the method in both oracle and generated belief-state settings, and test how well it works when only 25%, 50%, 75%, or 100% of the dialogue is visible. Across these settings, TRACER detects useful failure signals well before the end of the conversation and outperforms heuristic, classical, and single-stream baselines. These results suggest that early failure detection can provide a practical warning signal for dialogue systems before the interaction fully breaks down.

AI.tldr: TRACER是一种在任务型对话中早期检测失败的方法，通过结合信念状态变化信号和对话状态文本表示，在对话仅进行25%-75%时即可预测最终失败，优于多种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有评估大多在对话已经失败后才进行度量，缺乏在对话完全崩溃前提供早期预警信号的方法。
AI.method: TRACER将部分对话中的信念状态变化轨迹信号与对话状态文本表示相结合，预测完整对话是否最终会失败。
AI.result: 在oracle和生成的信念状态设定下，仅使用25%、50%、75%的对话即可有效检测失败信号，且在全部设定下均优于启发式、经典以及单流基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 早期失败检测能够在对话系统完全崩溃之前提供实用的预警信号，有助于提升任务型对话系统的鲁棒性。

title: Geometry-Aware Bayesian Quantification via Compositional Data Analysis
summary: Accurately estimating the unknown target label distribution is the critical first step for adapting to label shift. This task, widely known as quantification or class prevalence estimation, has recently seen significant advances through continuous KDE-based methods which model the density of multiclass classifier posteriors. Posterior vectors might be regarded as compositional data, since they lie on the probability simplex. However, existing KDE-based quantifiers typically rely on Euclidean Gaussian kernels, which ignore simplex geometry and incorrectly assign probability mass outside its boundaries. We introduce a geometry-aware KDE model for multiclass quantification based on log-ratio representations and Aitchison geometry, together with a shrinkage regularization that improves robustness near the simplex boundary. Combined with a maximum-likelihood interpretation of KDE-based quantification, we derive both point-estimation and Bayesian inference procedures for class prevalences. Experiments on 42 datasets across tabular, text, and image domains show that the proposed method is competitive with state-of-the-art quantifiers, often improving over standard KDE-based baselines, while also yielding strong results among Bayesian quantification methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Aitchison几何与log-ratio表示的几何感知KDE模型，用于多类标签偏移下的类别比例估计，在42个数据集上达到SOTA水平。
AI.motivation: 现有基于KDE的量化方法使用欧几里得高斯核，忽略了后验向量位于概率单纯形上的几何特性，导致概率质量泄漏到单纯形边界之外。
AI.method: 采用log-ratio表示和Aitchison几何构建几何感知的KDE模型，并结合收缩正则化提高单纯形边界附近的鲁棒性；基于最大似然解释推导了点估计和贝叶斯推断两种程序。
AI.result: 在42个数据集（涵盖表格、文本、图像领域）上，该方法与SOTA量化器竞争力相当，常优于标准KDE基线，同时在贝叶斯量化方法中也表现强劲。
AI.conclusion: 考虑单纯形几何结构的KDE方法能有效提升多类量化性能，几何感知和收缩正则化是关键改进点。

title: LLM-Guided Transportation Hub Capacity Planning with Textual Business Inputs
summary: While traditional hub capacity planning models optimize effectively for quantitative inputs, they often fail to digest qualitative business context. We propose a novel framework where a large language model (LLM) agent iteratively proposes hub capacity decisions guided by natural-language business context descriptions. The key mechanism is a chain-of-thought reasoning protocol: the LLM constructs a structured decision table that maps each contextual item to specific capacity adjustments based on the implied direction and magnitude of changes. The new capacity decision is then validated through a feedback loop with an optimization model, which provides routing-based performance metrics to guide the agent's selection. On a real-world 13-hub freight network in the southeastern US, our framework achieves a 2.8% optimality gap relative to the hidden ground-truth, a significant improvement over the 11.0% gap produced by the traditional optimization model without textual business inputs. This demonstrates that LLMs can serve as a contextual bridge, integrating qualitative business insights into Operations Research workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合大语言模型（LLM）与优化模型的混合框架，通过链式思维推理将定性业务上下文转化为枢纽容量决策，在13枢纽货运网络中实现了2.8%的最优性差距，显著优于传统优化模型的11.0%。
AI.motivation: 传统枢纽容量规划模型虽能高效处理定量输入，但无法消化定性的业务上下文（如商业策略、市场趋势等文本信息），导致决策与真实业务需求脱节。
AI.method: 提出LLM智能体框架：（1）LLM通过链式思维推理，将自然语言业务上下文映射为结构化决策表，将每条上下文转换为具体容量调整方向与幅度；（2）容量决策经优化模型反馈验证，以路由性能指标指导LLM迭代选择最优方案。
AI.result: 在美国东南部13枢纽货运网络真实场景中，该方法实现2.8%的最优性差距（vs 传统优化模型的11.0%），显著提升。
AI.conclusion: LLM可作为定性业务洞察与运筹优化工作流之间的"上下文桥梁"，有效融合文本信息与数学模型，拓展了运筹学决策支持的新范式。

title: Integrating Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Safe Reinforcement Learning in a 1-DoF Helicopter System
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) offers powerful control for industrial cyber-physical systems (ICPSs), but its "black-box" exploration risks violating strict hardware safety limits. Typically, these constraints are managed through complex reward shaping. In this work-in-progress paper, we embed a differentiable physics model directly into the proximal policy optimization (PPO) actor loss function. By simulating short-horizon future trajectories during training, the policy is penalized for anticipated safety violations independent of the task-reward signal. Evaluated on a simulated 1-degree-of-freedom helicopter testbed with strict pitch constraints, our physics-informed soft regularizations substantially reduce constraint violations while maintaining reliable target tracking.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将可微物理模型嵌入PPO演员损失函数，通过短视未来轨迹模拟惩罚预期安全违规，在直升机模拟平台上实现了约束违规减少与目标跟踪保持。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在工业信息物理系统应用中存在"黑箱"探索导致硬件安全约束违规的风险，传统通过复杂奖励塑形来管理约束的方式存在局限。
AI.method: 将可微物理模型直接嵌入近端策略优化（PPO）的演员损失函数中，在训练时模拟短时域未来轨迹，对预期安全违规施加惩罚，形成物理信息软正则化。
AI.result: 在模拟的1自由度直升机测试平台上，该方法在严格遵守俯仰角约束的同时，保持了可靠的目标跟踪性能，显著减少了约束违规次数。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息软正则化能有效替代复杂奖励塑形，在保障ICPS硬件安全的前提下实现有效的DRL控制，值得进一步研究。

title: Agentic IoT: Architectures, Applications, and Challenges Toward the Internet of Agents
comment: 14 pages, 2 figures, Author's preprint version. The manuscript may be revised based on peer-review feedback and publication requirements
summary: The integration of AI into Internet of Things (AIoT) systems has gradually transformed them from passive data collection infrastructures into intelligent systems capable of anomaly detection, predictive maintenance, classification, forecasting, and optimization. However, most existing solutions still rely on task-specific models that infer from sensor data; thus, system-wide capabilities such as real-time reasoning, adaptive planning, autonomous coordination, learning, tool use, and contextual decision-making remain limited. This paper examines Agentic IoT as a next-generation cognitive IoT paradigm that integrates the perception, reasoning, planning, learning, and action capabilities of autonomous AI agents with cyber-physical systems. Agentic IoT aims to transform IoT from data-centric sensing and inference infrastructures into distributed cognitive agent ecosystems operating across the device/edge-fog-cloud continuum. The paper first grounds this transition as a paradigm shift and positions Agentic IoT in relation to AIoT, edge intelligence, multi-agent systems, and the Internet of Agents. It then systematically reviews current studies, presents a holistic architectural framework, discusses domain-specific application potential, and identifies key technical, operational, and research challenges together with future research directions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic IoT（代理型物联网）作为下一代认知物联网范式，将自主AI代理的感知、推理、规划、学习和行动能力与网络物理系统集成，使物联网从数据驱动的感知基础设施转变为分布式认知代理生态系统，并系统综述了相关研究、架构框架、应用潜力及挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有AIoT系统仍依赖任务特定模型进行推理，缺乏实时推理、自适应规划、自主协调、学习、工具使用和上下文决策等系统级认知能力，亟需向更智能的代理型范式演进。
AI.method: 首先将Agentic IoT定位为AIoT、边缘智能、多智能体系统和物联网代理之间的范式转变，然后系统综述现有研究，提出整体架构框架，讨论领域特定应用潜力。
AI.result: 提出了Agentic IoT的概念框架，明确了其在设备-边缘-雾-云连续体上构建分布式认知代理生态系统的架构，并梳理了关键技术、运营和研究挑战。
AI.conclusion: Agentic IoT代表物联网向认知化、自主化演进的重要方向，但面临技术、运营和研究层面的多重挑战，值得进一步探索。

title: BanglaMemeEvidence: A Multimodal Benchmark Dataset for Explanatory Evidence Detection in Bengali Memes
comment: Accepted at 6th International Conference on Innovations in Computational Intelligence and Computer Vision (ICICV 2026)
summary: Memes have become influential communication tools on social media, combining viral visuals with concise messaging to convey impactful ideas. While substantial research has examined the affective dimensions of memes, key challenges such as detecting harmful content, identifying cyberbullying, and performing accurate sentiment analysis remain critical, largely due to the need for deeper contextual understanding. In this paper, we introduce MemeEvidenceDetect, a hybrid task aimed at analyzing a meme and its contextual information to identify specific sentences that explain or elucidate its meaning and humor. To support this task, we present BanglaMemeEvidence, a curated dataset of 2,917 Bengali memes, emphasizing its significance as a resource for the Bangla language. Each meme is annotated with natural language explanations, including Meme OCR, Meme Context, and Evidence Sentences, alongside relevance scores that reflect the relationship between a meme and its corresponding annotations. To address the gap in dynamically inferring a meme's context, we propose BengaliMemeEvidenceNet, a hybrid multimodal framework that integrates textual and visual features for comprehensive meme representation. Our experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of BengaliMemeEvidenceNet, achieving an F1 score of 0.74. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to focus on evidence detection in Bengali memes, marking a notable step forward in the analysis of memes in low-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemeEvidenceDetect任务（分析模因及其上下文以识别解释性句子），构建了BanglaMemeEvidence数据集（2,917个孟加拉语模因），并开发了 BengaliMemeEvidenceNet 多模态框架，在证据检测任务上达到0.74 F1分数，是首个针对孟加拉语模因证据检测的研究。
AI.motivation: 现有模因研究多集中于情感分析、有害内容检测等领域，但缺乏对模因含义和幽默进行细粒度解释（即证据检测）的研究，尤其是在低资源语言（如孟加拉语）中。需要更深层的上下文理解来检测模因中的有害内容、网络欺凌等问题。
AI.method: 提出了MemeEvidenceDetect混合任务；构建了BanglaMemeEvidence数据集（含OCR文本、上下文、证据句及相关性评分）；设计了BengaliMemeEvidenceNet混合多模态框架，融合文本与视觉特征进行模因表征。
AI.result: BengaliMemeEvidenceNet在证据检测任务上取得了0.74的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个针对孟加拉语模因证据检测的研究，为低资源语言模因分析迈出了重要一步，证明多模态融合方法在模因上下文理解中的有效性。

title: Functional Bilevel Optimization for Predictive Fairness
summary: When sensitive attributes are continuous and high-dimensional $-$ demographic score vectors, posteriors over attributes, age or income profiles $-$ enforcing full statistical independence is often too restrictive, and existing relaxations rely on indirect dependence penalties or adversarial schemes that do not directly target the fairness-accuracy trade-off. We instead consider mean demographic parity through DPVar, the variance of the conditional-mean prediction given the sensitive attribute, and show that optimizing it yields a functional bilevel problem. We propose two algorithms for this problem: FBO, which uses a closed-form adjoint we derive for the squared-loss case to obtain an exact hypergradient, and ITD, which differentiates through unrolled inner steps and extends beyond squared loss. On synthetic data and a new semi-synthetic benchmark built from 60 tabular regression datasets, both methods achieve the lowest or near-lowest aggregate fairness-accuracy regret, and consistently match or outperform strong HSIC, adversarial, linear-dependence, and generalized-DP baselines.

AI.tldr: 论文提出DPVar（条件均值预测的方差）作为连续高维敏感属性的平均人口均等性度量，并通过两种算法（FBO和ITD）优化这一功能双层问题，在公平性-准确率权衡上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当敏感属性是连续且高维的（如人口统计得分向量、年龄或收入分布），强制完全统计独立性过于严格，而现有松弛方法依赖间接惩罚或对抗性方案，无法直接优化公平性-准确率的权衡。
AI.method: 提出DPVar作为公平性度量，将优化问题建模为功能双层问题；提出FBO算法（利用平方损失下的闭形式伴随矩阵精确计算超梯度）和ITD算法（通过展开内步微分，适用于平方损失以外的场景）。
AI.result: 在合成数据和基于60个表格回归数据集构建的半合成基准上，两种方法实现了最低或接近最低的公平性-准确率综合遗憾值，一致优于或匹敌HSIC、对抗性、线性依赖和广义DP等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DPVar及其优化算法在连续高维敏感属性下有效实现了公平性-准确率的权衡，优于现有松弛方法。

title: ACPO: Adaptive Credit Policy Optimization via Fine-Grained Surrogate Entropy
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has substantially improved the reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs), but sparse outcome rewards still make token-level credit assignment difficult. Existing scalable RL methods typically assign trajectory-level rewards uniformly across tokens, while recent entropy-aware approaches either rely on coarse detached heuristics or directly optimize true entropy, which can introduce non-local gradient components misaligned with sampled-token policy updates. We propose Adaptive Credit Policy Optimization (ACPO), a token-level credit assignment framework based on a mode-local surrogate entropy. ACPO asymmetrically modulates policy updates by emphasizing uncertain decisions in successful rollouts and overconfident tokens in failed rollouts. We show that the surrogate admits deterministic entropy bounds and, under modal alignment and proximal updates, preserves the policy-gradient direction to leading order. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and coding benchmarks, including AIME 2025 and HumanEvalPro, show that ACPO consistently improves over strong RL baselines such as DAPO, GTPO, and SAPO.

AI.tldr: 提出ACPO框架，通过模式局部代理熵实现令牌级信用分配，在数学推理和代码生成任务上超越DAPO、GTPO等基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有RL方法在提升LLM推理能力时，稀疏结果奖励难以进行令牌级信用分配；均匀分配或熵感知方法存在梯度偏差问题。
AI.method: 提出ACPO框架，基于模式局部代理熵进行非对称令牌级信用分配：成功轨迹中强调不确定决策，失败轨迹中强调过度自信令牌，并保证确定性熵界和策略梯度方向一致性。
AI.result: 在AIME 2025和HumanEvalPro等数学推理和代码基准上，ACPO一致优于DAPO、GTPO、SAPO等强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ACPO通过令牌级自适应信用分配有效提升LLM推理能力，且理论保证了梯度方向正确性。

title: Unsupervised Features Mining via Activation Geometry
summary: Interpretability methods aim to reveal the features represented inside large language models (LLMs). Many existing methods begin with labeled examples of a human-defined concept that may reflect human biases, and then identify how that concept is represented within the model, for example in its activation space or through other decomposition methods. We introduce \emph{Mining via Activation Geometry} (MAG), a simple unsupervised framework for extracting reasoning features from model activations by prepending the same natural-language instruction $Q$ to every input $p$, where $Q$ defines the reasoning feature of interest, such as ``Can this object be found in the desert?'' or ``Is this prompt malicious?'' We measure how the instruction changes the model's internal representation using $m(Q \mid p) - m(p)$ at a single readout point. We explore eight different MAGs. The extracted reasoning features predict the models' own world understanding and judgment, can be approximated into a single activation direction, we found that some features are more linearly represented and some less, this linear representation, which is vector steering, can change the LLMs' decisions through activation steering by injecting reasoning features. Finally, we use the same method to select the best training datasets for prompt-injection classifier probes: while similarity between ordinary activations is almost unrelated to downstream performance, RFD-based similarity achieves $94.7\%$ Top-1 and $100\%$ Top-2 accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAG（基于激活几何的挖掘）方法，一种无监督框架，通过向输入前添加相同自然语言指令Q来提取LLM的推理特征，并分析这些特征如何预测模型自身判断、可通过激活引导改变决策，以及用于最优训练数据选择（RFD相似度达94.7% Top-1准确率）。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性方法依赖于人工标注的概念示例，可能引入人类偏见。作者希望提出一种无监督方法，无需人工标注，直接从模型激活中提取推理特征，更客观地揭示LLM内部表示。
AI.method: MAG方法：对每个输入p，在其前面添加相同的自然语言指令Q（如"这个物体能在沙漠中找到吗？"），通过计算添加指令前后的激活差异 m(Q|p) - m(p) 来提取推理特征。在单点读出位置衡量指令如何改变模型内部表示。探索了8种不同的MAG。
AI.result: 提取的推理特征能预测模型自身的世界理解和判断；可近似为单一激活方向（部分特征线性表示程度不同）；通过激活引导可改变LLM决策；在提示注入分类器探针的训练数据选择中，RFD相似度达到94.7% Top-1和100% Top-2准确率，远超普通激活相似度。
AI.conclusion: MAG是一种有效的无监督推理特征提取方法，特征具有可解释性、可操纵性和实用价值。不同推理特征的线性表示程度不同，在数据选择等下游任务中展现出优异性能。

title: Candidate-Constrained Retrieval-Augmented Generation for LongEval-RAG: System Design and Empirical Analysis
summary: We present a candidate-constrained retrieval-augmented generation system for LongEval-RAG, where each query is associated with an organizer-provided candidate set and all retrieved evidence and final citations must remain within that set. The system combines deterministic provenance tracking with passage-based retrieval, deterministic query expansion, pseudo-relevance feedback (PRF), reciprocal rank fusion (RRF), lightweight evidence reranking, citation-aware evidence aggregation, and optional MiniLM sentence reranking. We evaluate ten pipeline variants using a primary organizer evaluation and a supplementary self-generated diagnostic protocol. The primary evaluation shows that the strongest balanced variant is rule-minilm: a rule-based chunking pipeline with query expansion, PRF, RRF, reranking, citation prior, and late MiniLM sentence selection. This variant obtains the highest BERTScore, retrieval precision, nugget coverage, and average grade among our submissions. The result suggests that the main gain does not come from more complex semantic or topic-shift chunking, but from pairing stable rule-based evidence units with sentence-level neural selection before generation. The supplementary LLM-judge evaluation remains useful for early diagnosis and additional analysis, but it emphasizes different systems than the primary gold-answer and nugget-based evaluation, highlighting the need for multi-metric RAG evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于LongEval-RAG的候选约束检索增强生成系统，该系统强制所有证据和引用来自预定义候选集。通过组合确定性溯源追踪、段落检索、确定性查询扩展、伪相关反馈、倒数排序融合、轻量级证据重排序、引文感知证据聚合以及可选的MiniLM句子重排序，构建了十个流水线变体。评估表明，规则分块结合MiniLM句子选择的变体（rule-minilm）表现最佳，在BERTScore、检索精度、nugget覆盖率和平均等级上均取得最高分。研究发现，性能提升主要来自稳定的规则分块与句子级神经选择的结合，而非更复杂的语义或主题转移分块。此外，LLM裁判评估与基于金标准和nugget的评估存在差异，表明RAG评估需要多指标综合。
AI.motivation: 解决LongEval-RAG任务中候选集约束下的检索增强生成问题，即所有检索证据和最终引用必须严格限制在组织者提供的候选文档集内，同时探索不同流水线组件的组合效果以提升生成质量和检索精度。
AI.method: 提出候选约束RAG系统，核心组件包括：确定性溯源追踪、段落级检索、确定性查询扩展、伪相关反馈(PRF)、倒数排序融合(RRF)、轻量级证据重排序、引文感知证据聚合、MiniLM句子重排序。构建十个流水线变体，通过主要组织者评估和补充的LLM裁判诊断协议进行评价。
AI.result: rule-minilm变体（规则分块+查询扩展+PRF+RRF+重排序+引文先验+后期MiniLM句子选择）表现最佳，取得最高BERTScore、检索精度、nugget覆盖率和平均等级。主要性能提升来自规则分块与句子级神经选择的组合，而非复杂语义分块。
AI.conclusion: 稳定的规则分块证据单元与句子级神经选择相结合是提升RAG性能的关键；LLM裁判评估与标准金标准评估存在差异，强调RAG评价需要多指标综合分析。

title: TREK: Distill to Explore, Reinforce to Refine
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is effective when the current policy already samples useful reasoning trajectories, but it stalls on hard prompts whose correct solution modes lie outside the student's on-policy support. We propose TREK (Teacher-Routed Exploration via Forward KL), a simple staged procedure that uses distillation not for imitation but for exploration support expansion. A key advantage of TREK is its generality: because it only consumes verified output trajectories, it can use an external black-box teacher, a white-box teacher, or the same model given additional inference-time context, and it can efficiently identify which hard-prompt samples are most worth consolidating even when teacher internals are unavailable. TREK first identifies prompts where the unaided student has very low pass rate, queries a proposal source to produce verified candidate solutions, keeps the top-$r$ proposals ranked by current student likelihood, applies a short forward-KL phase to pull those verified modes into the student's support, and then returns to standard on-policy GRPO refinement. On mathematical reasoning, TREK with DeepSeek-V4 proposals improves Qwen3 models across all tested scales on AIME 2024 and AIME 2025; for Qwen3-8B, it improves AIME 2025 from 36.9 to 40.3 and AIME 2024 from 47.9 to 51.1 (avg@16), while the self-context variant reaches 38.5 and 49.6 without an external teacher. On agentic tasks, TREK raises ALFWorld success rate from 75.8 to 82.8 and ScienceWorld success rate from 12.5 to 26.7; notably, on the hardest task types, TREK achieves high success rates early in training while unaided GRPO requires substantially more optimization steps to reach comparable levels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TREK方法，通过前向KL散度蒸馏教师模型（外部黑盒/白盒或自身）的已验证轨迹，扩大学生策略的探索支持范围，解决GRPO在困难提示上因正确解模式分布超出当前策略支持而停滞的问题。在数学推理（AIME）和智能体任务（ALFWorld, ScienceWorld）上均取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: GRPO在困难提示上因正确解模式位于当前策略支持范围之外而停滞，需要一种通用方法扩大策略的探索支持范围。
AI.method: TREK分阶段执行：1) 识别学生模型通过率极低的困难提示；2) 从提案源（外部教师、白盒教师或自身加推理上下文）获取已验证的解候选；3) 按学生当前似然保留top-r候选；4) 短阶段前向KL散度将这些已验证模式拉入学生支持范围；5) 回归标准on-policy GRPO精炼。
AI.result: 数学推理：Qwen3-8B在AIME 2025从36.9提升至40.3，AIME 2024从47.9提升至51.1；自上下文变体达38.5和49.6。智能体任务：ALFWorld成功率从75.8提升至82.8，ScienceWorld从12.5提升至26.7。
AI.conclusion: TREK通过前向KL蒸馏教师已验证轨迹来扩展学生探索支持，是一种通用、有效的方法，在数学推理和智能体任务上均显著优于标准GRPO，尤其对困难任务加速效果明显。

title: Anticipatory Reinforcement Learning for Trajectory Tracking
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) in industrial control often suffers from lag and overshoot due to purely reactive control based on the current tracking error. To achieve anticipatory control without high computational overhead, we introduce a predictive formulation that augments the DRL state space with target velocities and future reference horizons. Evaluating eight configurations using proximal policy optimization (PPO) on a 1-degree-of-freedom (1-DoF) helicopter testbed, simulation results showed a 9-fold error reduction, lowering the mean absolute deviation from 2.73° to 0.31°. However, zero-shot transfer to physical hardware revealed a sim-to-real gap. Interestingly, a simpler configuration using a single, further look-ahead horizon matched the real-world top performance of the most complex model (1.11°). Overall, evaluating various combinations of prediction horizons and target velocities demonstrated that highly granular predictive data is not necessarily required for physical transfer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强DRL状态空间的预测方法，在仿真中误差降低9倍（从2.73°降至0.31°），但物理硬件存在sim-to-real差距；令人关注的是，一个更简单的单步远视距配置在真实世界达到了与最复杂模型相当的顶级性能（1.11°），表明高粒度的预测数据并非物理迁移所必需。
AI.motivation: 工业控制中深度强化学习存在滞后和超调问题，源于仅基于当前跟踪误差的纯反应式控制。需要在不增加高计算开销的前提下实现预测性控制。
AI.method: 在DRL状态空间中增强目标速度和未来参考视距，采用PPO算法在1-DoF直升机平台评估8种配置。
AI.result: 仿真中MAD从2.73°降至0.31°（9倍误差降低）；零样本迁移到物理硬件时存在sim-to-real差距，但简单的单步远视距配置在物理环境中达到最复杂模型的最佳性能（1.11°）。
AI.conclusion: 高粒度的预测数据并非物理迁移所必需，更简单的预测配置在现实世界中同样有效，这为实际部署提供了更经济的方案。

title: Biological Motifs for Agentic Control
summary:
The transition of Large Language Models (LLMs) from passive generators to autonomous agents has introduced significant challenges in reliability, security, and state management. Current agentic architectures are often constructed ad-hoc, prone to hallucination cascades, infinite loops, and prompt injection attacks. This paper argues that many of these failure modes can be analyzed using control motifs long studied in systems biology, provided the comparison is made at the level of typed interfaces and coordination structure rather than literal biological mechanism.
  We develop a typed interface correspondence between Gene Regulatory Networks and agentic software systems using polynomial functors and wiring diagrams. Five biological motifs are mapped to composable software design patterns: Coherent Feed-Forward Loops for noise suppression, Adaptive Immunity for layered security, Mitochondrial Signaling for resource governance, Endosymbiosis for neuro-symbolic integration, and Morphogen Diffusion for spatially varying coordination. An epistemic topology layer derives Kripke-style knowledge operators from the wiring diagram's observation structure and proves four predictive theorems for multi-agent scaling.
  The core contributions are: (1) the Agentic Operad, a typed syntax for agent composition with provable error suppression bounds for feed-forward topologies; (2) an epistemic topology with four theorems (error amplification, sequential penalty, parallel acceleration, and tool density scaling) whose qualitative predictions are consistent with published multi-agent benchmarks; and (3) a six-layer progression from structure through development, grounded in autonomous learning frameworks and convergence proxies from the empirical literature. A reference implementation with 1,813 tests and 116 examples illustrates practical feasibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过类型化接口对应关系，将基因调控网络中的五种生物控制基序映射为智能体软件设计模式，构建了Agentic Operad（一种带类型的智能体组合语法）和认知拓扑层，在1,813个测试与116个示例中验证了其实用可行性。
AI.motivation: LLM从被动生成器转向自主智能体时面临可靠性、安全性和状态管理方面的重大挑战，现有架构往往是ad-hoc构建的，容易产生幻觉级联、无限循环和提示注入攻击。作者认为这些失败模式可以用系统生物学中研究已久的控制基序来分析。
AI.method: 利用多项式函子和接线图建立基因调控网络与智能体系统之间的类型化接口对应关系，将五种生物基序映射为可组合的软件设计模式；构建Agentic Operad（带类型的智能体组合语法）和认知拓扑层，从中推导出Kripke风格的知识算子，并证明了四个关于多智能体扩展的预测定理。
AI.result: 核心贡献包括：(1) Agentic Operad，带有前馈拓扑的可证明错误抑制界限；(2) 认知拓扑及四个定理（错误放大、顺序惩罚、并行加速、工具密度缩放），其定性预测与已发表的多智能体基准测试一致；(3) 从结构到发展的六层递进体系；参考实现包含1,813个测试和116个示例。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统生物学启发的方法论，为构建更可靠、安全且可组合的LLM智能体系统提供了形式化框架，并在实际实现中验证了可行性。

title: Separating Representation from Reconstruction Enables Scalable Text Encoders
summary: While decoders have rapidly scaled, encoders have remained largely unchanged since BERT. We revisit this disparity by frozen backbone evaluation via probing. Under this lens, the representations of BERT encoders become increasingly $\textit{unexploitable}$ by frozen probes, despite improved perplexity. The misalignment originates in BERT's flat design, which couples representation learning to the token reconstruction loss. We propose $\textbf{CrossBERT}$, a two-part architecture that separates the learning of high-quality encoded representations from the rigid grounding of token reconstruction. This design further enables high masking ratios ($\ge 50\%$) and gradient collection over all tokens via a $\textit{Complementary Masking Strategy}$, respectively increasing throughput by $1.5$ to $2\times$ and sample efficiency by $2\times$. Overall, CrossBERT demonstrates monotonic scaling and superior performance on MTEB(eng, v2) and frozen GLUE benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CrossBERT架构，通过解耦编码器表示学习与token重建任务，解决了BERT编码器表示随规模增大而变得不可利用的问题，同时实现了更高的掩码率、吞吐量和样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有编码器（如BERT）架构设计停滞不前，其扁平化设计将表示学习与token重建损失耦合，导致随着模型规模扩大，表示变得难以被冻结探针利用（unexploitable），即表示质量与下游任务可用性之间存在错位。
AI.method: 提出CrossBERT两阶段架构：(1) 解耦表示学习与token重建；(2) 采用互补掩码策略（Complementary Masking Strategy），支持高掩码率（≥50%）并对所有token进行梯度收集。
AI.result: 吞吐量提升1.5-2倍，样本效率提升2倍；在MTEB (eng, v2)和frozen GLUE基准上表现优异，且展现出单调扩展特性。
AI.conclusion: CrossBERT证明了解耦编码器表示学习与重建任务的有效性，为编码器架构的扩展提供了新方向，弥合了编码器与解码器之间的扩展差距。

title: What Does a Discrete Diffusion Model Learn?
summary: What does a discrete diffusion model learn: a denoiser, a score ratio, or a bridge plug-in predictor? At the level of jump rates, these are one object in different coordinates, and reading a neural network in the wrong coordinate changes the process being trained and sampled. Starting with a rigorous derivation of the continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC) ELBO for any noising process, boundary terms included, we prove the \emph{Oracle Distance} theorem: the negative ELBO is exactly equal to the data entropy plus the path KL from the oracle reverse process to the learned one, not merely a bound. Its unique optimizer is therefore the conditional expectation of the true reverse jump rate given the current noisy state, and its irreducible cost is the rate at which the forward process $Z_t$ destroys information about the clean data $Z_0$, $-\tfrac{d}{dt}I(Z_0; Z_t)$, so every noising process shares the same best achievable negative ELBO: the data entropy. For sequences with token-factorizing noise, the oracle projection yields three exact coordinates for the optimizer: denoiser, cavity (bridge plug-in), and score, with closed-form conversions among them. This framework identifies which law each loss in the literature actually optimizes, recovering MDM, UDM, SEDD, and GIDD as special cases; explains why denoiser and cavity coincide for masked diffusion but not for uniform diffusion; proves that a denoiser parameterization makes the uniform ELBO diverge at initialization while the bridge plug-in stays finite; and calibrates ELBO implementations exactly at initialization. Every identity is verified numerically, without approximation, on an exactly solvable model.

AI.tldr: 本文从连续时间马尔可夫链视角严格推导了离散扩散模型的ELBO，证明其最优解是真实反向跳跃率的条件期望，并揭示了去噪器、桥接预测器和分数比三种参数化方法之间的精确等价关系与坐标转换公式。
AI.motivation: 离散扩散模型中不同的参数化方式（去噪器、分数比、桥接预测器）看似不同，实际上在跳跃率层面是同一对象在不同坐标下的表示。错误地解读神经网络输出会导致训练和采样过程不一致，因此需要统一的理论框架来澄清每种损失函数实际优化的目标。
AI.method: 严格推导了连续时间马尔可夫链（CTMC）的ELBO（含边界项），证明了Oracle Distance定理：负ELBO精确等于数据熵加上学习过程与oracle反向过程之间的路径KL散度（而非仅是下界）。对于token因子化噪声，推导出优化器的三种精确坐标形式：去噪器、腔（桥接）预测器和分数比，并给出封闭的转换公式。
AI.result: 1) 证明每种噪声过程的最佳可达负ELBO都等于数据熵；2) 恢复MDM、UDM、SEDD、GIDD为特例；3) 解释为何掩码扩散中去噪器与桥接预测器等价而均匀扩散中不等价；4) 证明去噪器参数化在初始化时均匀ELBO发散而桥接预测器保持有限；5) ELBO实现可在初始化时精确校准。
AI.conclusion: 离散扩散模型的不同参数化在理论上是等价的，但实际数值行为差异显著，理解其坐标关系对正确训练和采样至关重要。

title: Sample-Efficient Pareto Front Modeling for Energy-Aware Reinforcement Learning Using Bayesian Optimization
summary: Industrial automation increasingly demands control strategies that balance operational performance with strict energy efficiency requirements. A common approach to solving this multi-objective problem, particularly within the framework of reinforcement learning (RL), is to formulate a single, scalar reward function that linearly combines the competing objectives. However, the manual weighting of these different objectives is heavily reliant on domain intuition, incredibly time-consuming, prone to human bias, and frequently fails to uncover optimal trade-off solutions. This work addresses the critical challenge of automating the weight selection process to systematically and efficiently discover the Pareto front of optimal trade-off policies. We formulate the weight selection process as a multi-objective Bayesian optimization (MOBO) problem and evaluate its sample efficiency against a standard uniform grid search baseline. Using a physical Quanser Aero 2 testbed configured for 1-DoF pitch control, our results demonstrate that the MOBO approach, utilizing the expected hypervolume improvement (qEHVI) acquisition function, consistently outperforms uniform grid sampling. MOBO achieves superior hypervolume and maximum spread, successfully identifying high-quality, diverse trade-off policies with a reduced evaluation budget, thereby enabling highly efficient energy-aware control in complex mechatronic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用多目标贝叶斯优化（MOBO）自动搜索强化学习中的权重参数，以高效发现帕累托最优折中策略，并在Quanser Aero 2平台上验证了其优于均匀网格搜索的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 工业自动化中，使用强化学习解决多目标优化问题时，传统的人工权重调整依赖领域直觉、耗时且易引入偏差，且常无法找到最优折中解，因此需要自动化权重选择方法。
AI.method: 将权重选择过程建模为多目标贝叶斯优化（MOBO）问题，使用期望超体积改进（qEHVI）采集函数，在1-DoF俯仰控制的物理Quanser Aero 2平台上进行实验。
AI.result: MOBO方法在超体积和最大展宽指标上一致优于均匀网格搜索，能以更少的评估预算识别出高质量、多样化的折中策略。
AI.conclusion: MOBO能高效自动发现帕累托前沿，实现复杂机电系统中的节能控制，显著提升样本效率。

title: Progress- and Reliability-Oriented Group Policy Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Group-based reinforcement learning (RL) has become an effective paradigm for improving large language model agents on long-horizon interactive tasks. To obtain finer-grained policy updates than trajectory-level optimization, recent work has moved toward step-level group-based RL, where intermediate steps are grouped and compared within a rollout batch. However, step-level advantage estimation is sensitive to how groups are formed: grouping by broad state keys improves coverage but may compare actions taken under different histories, while enforcing historical consistency yields fairer comparisons at the cost of fragmented groups and missing peer-comparison signal.
