In this paper, we propose ProGPO (Progress- and Reliability-Oriented Group Policy Optimization), a learned-critic-free method for context-consistent step-level learning. ProGPO keeps exact-prefix action comparison, and complements sparse peer comparisons with transition credit derived from rollout-based state potentials. To estimate these potentials reliably, ProGPO combines semantic expansion with inverse-variance fusion across history depths. We evaluate ProGPO on two challenging agentic tasks, ALFWorld and WebShop, with Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct. Results show that ProGPO improves over matched agentic RL baselines under comparable computational overhead, and additional Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct experiments further test the scalability of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 针对组级强化学习中步级优势估计对分组方式敏感的问题，本文提出ProGPO方法，通过精确前缀动作比较与基于展开的状态势能结合，实现上下文一致的步级学习，在ALFWorld和WebShop任务上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有步级组级RL方法中，优势估计对分组方式敏感：按状态键分组覆盖面广但可能比较不同历史下的动作；保持历史一致性则导致组碎片化、缺失对比信号。需要一种无偏且鲁棒的步级学习方法。
AI.method: ProGPO采用精确前缀动作比较（保持历史一致性），并利用基于展开的状态势能（rollout-based state potentials）补充稀疏的同伴比较信号；为可靠估计势能，结合语义扩展与跨历史深度的逆方差融合。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和WebShop两个具有挑战性的智能体任务上，基于Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct的评估显示，ProGPO在相当计算开销下优于匹配的智能体RL基线；Qwen2.5-3B实验进一步验证了方法的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: ProGPO提供了一种无需学习critic的上下文一致步级组RL方法，有效解决了分组敏感性问题，并具有良好的可扩展性。

title: CrossHallu: Do Hallucination Signals Generalize Across Languages and Domains in Large Language Model's Internals?
summary: Recent hallucination detection techniques in large language models (LLMs) focus on directly extracting features from a model's internal representations and training a classifier on these features to detect hallucinations, demonstrating promising results. Notwithstanding this advancement, most internal-state hallucination detection techniques have been explored predominantly in English, raising the question of whether such internal signals generalize across different languages and domains. To address this gap, we present CrossHallu, the first study to evaluate the cross-lingual and cross-domain generalization of hallucination detection using internal representations from six LLMs on the generative question-answering task. We conduct a systematic Arabic <-> English evaluation using TruthfulQA, an Arabic translated version of TruthfulQA, and HalluScore. This evaluation encompasses monolingual training and testing, cross-lingual transfer, cross-domain transfer, and combined cross-lingual and cross-domain transfer. The results reveal that internal-state hallucination signals in LLMs transfer across languages and domains for most models, with cross-lingual performance highly dependent on both class separability and language alignment in the feature space, whereas cross-domain transfer within Arabic varies depending on the training and testing datasets used for the hallucination detector. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/aishaalansari57/CrossHal.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统评估了基于LLM内部表示的幻觉检测在跨语言（阿拉伯语↔英语）和跨领域（QA任务）的泛化能力，发现内部信号在多数模型中可迁移，但跨语言检测效果依赖特征空间的类别可分性和语言对齐程度。
AI.motivation: 现有内部状态幻觉检测技术主要针对英语，缺乏对跨语言和跨领域泛化能力的评估，因此作者提出CrossHallu研究填补这一空白。
AI.method: 使用6个LLM在生成式问答任务上，通过TruthfulQA、阿拉伯语翻译版TruthfulQA和HalluScore进行系统评估，涵盖单语训练测试、跨语言迁移、跨领域迁移以及两者结合的迁移实验。
AI.result: 多数模型的内部状态幻觉信号可跨语言和跨领域迁移；跨语言性能高度依赖特征空间中的类别可分性和语言对齐程度；阿拉伯语内的跨领域迁移效果则取决于训练和测试数据集的选择。
AI.conclusion: 内部状态信号在跨语言和跨领域场景下具有泛化潜力，但跨语言迁移质量受限于特征空间的对齐与可分性，且领域迁移存在数据依赖性。

title: Shortcut Learning in Legal Judgment Prediction: Empirical Evidence from the UK Employment Tribunal
summary: Current Legal Judgment Prediction (LJP) is constrained by its reliance on post-hoc judicial materials, increasing the likelihood that models perform retrospective classification rather than true forecasting. This paper empirically investigates shortcut learning in this context by studying claim-level outcome prediction in UK Employment Tribunal (UKET) decisions. Using a corpus of 33,158 individual claims, we predict outcomes from claim texts and LLM-extracted case summaries, evaluating models ranging from interpretable TF-IDF-based classifiers to black-box LLMs. While headline predictive performance figures appear strong, we demonstrate that such performance in LJP systems trained on post-hoc judicial text can be driven by the retrospective nature of the source material. Stratifying the test data by human judgments of leakage reveals that performance increases where outcome-revealing cues are embedded in the narrative. Moreover, a model trained on just the 4% of features identified as leakage achieves high performance, outperforming human experts. These findings substantiate concerns that LJP performance may be exaggerated by linguistic artefacts. Yet this vulnerability is not fatal to the research agenda. Instead, post-hoc judgments might be treated as potentially contaminated texts, requiring active auditing. Retraining models after masking leakage features results in only a negligible reduction in Macro-F1. Hence, while models will opportunistically exploit shortcuts when available, they remain capable of extracting useful predictive signals when these artefacts are removed.

AI.tldr: 本文实证研究法律判决预测（LJP）中的捷径学习问题，发现模型在UK就业裁判所数据上的高表现源于判决文本中的事后泄密线索，而非真正的预测能力。但移除这些线索后模型性能下降极小，说明LJP研究仍具价值。
AI.motivation: 现有LJP依赖事后司法材料，模型可能进行回顾性分类而非真正预测。作者希望实证检验这种"捷径学习"现象是否普遍存在及其严重程度。
AI.method: 使用33,158条UK就业裁判所索赔数据，从索赔文本和LLM提取的摘要中预测结果。通过人工标注泄密层次对测试数据分层，并训练仅使用4%泄密特征的模型进行对比分析。
AI.result: 表面预测性能很强，但性能提升主要由叙事中的泄密线索驱动；仅用4%泄密特征的模型性能超过人类专家；但移除泄密特征后重新训练，Macro-F1仅轻微下降。
AI.conclusion: LJP性能确实可能被语言伪影夸大，但这一问题并非致命。事后判决应被视为潜在污染文本，需主动审计。模型在移除捷径后仍能提取有效预测信号，LJP研究仍有价值。

title: Rethinking Neural Nonlinearity as Gating
summary: Activation functions are considered an essential primitive for neural nonlinearity, i.e., they enable neural networks to serve as universal approximators. In this paper, we show that this nonlinearity can also be achieved by input-conditioned threshold gating through branches as a universal primitive. We demonstrate that standard activations -- whether piecewise-linear (ReLU, PReLU, Hardtanh) or smooth (SiLU, Sigmoid, Tanh, GELU) -- are in fact instances of a single Threshold Gating (TG) primitive. For softmax, we show that it admits an exact TG conversion via its equivalent per-element Sigmoid form. We then validate these equivalences by converting pretrained networks across CNNs, transformer-based models, and recurrent architectures, preserving model performance without requiring retraining. Threshold Gating also enables training from scratch that goes beyond replacing existing activations, enabling gains in model compression, performance, and shorter training. We also propose a 'Minimal Branch Theorem' which relates the minimum number of required branches in our primitive to the trainability of general deep neural networks. In terms of hardware implementation, TG maps to a unified implementation in the case of analog in-memory systems, addressing the bottleneck of analog-to-digital and digital-to-analog converters (ADC/DAC) that is known to significantly impact power consumption and on-chip area.

AI.tldr: 本文提出阈值门控（Threshold Gating, TG）作为一种统一的非线性原语，证明标准激活函数（ReLU、SiLU等）和Softmax均可等价转换为TG形式，并在不重训练的情况下替换预训练网络中的激活函数。TG还支持从零训练、提升模型压缩与性能，并提出了最小分支定理，在硬件上可统一实现于模拟内存系统，减少ADC/DAC瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 证明输入条件化的分支门控（Threshold Gating）可以作为神经网络的通用非线性原语，统一现有的各类激活函数，并解决模拟内存系统中的ADC/DAC硬件瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出Threshold Gating（TG）原语，证明多种标准激活函数（ReLU、PReLU、Hardtanh、SiLU、Sigmoid、Tanh、GELU）均是TG的特例；Softmax通过逐元素Sigmoid形式精确转换。在不重训练的情况下将预训练CNN、Transformer、RNN中的激活函数替换为TG，并验证性能保持。提出最小分支定理，关联所需分支数与深度网络的可训练性。
AI.result: 预训练网络中的激活函数可被TG精确替换且无需重训练；从零训练时TG可带来模型压缩、性能提升和训练加速；TG在模拟内存系统中实现统一硬件实现，缓解ADC/DAC瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 阈值门控是一种通用的非线性原语，能够统一现有激活函数，在软件和硬件层面均有优势，可提升模型压缩与训练效率，并为模拟计算提供更高效的实现路径。

title: Agentic SABRE: An Uncertainty-Aware Neuro-Symbolic Multi-Agent Framework for Adaptive Ransomware Detection
summary: Ransomware has evolved into a complex, adaptive, and fast-moving adversary category in which static signatures and monolithic classifiers fail to generalise under concept drift, evasion, and behavioural polymorphism. In this paper, we present Agentic SABRE (Semantic-Behavioural Arbitration for Ransomware Evaluation), an uncertainty-aware, neuro-symbolic, multi-agent framework for adaptive ransomware detection. SABRE fuses semantic, representation-based evidence with behavioural, time-window forensic telemetry and employs Monte Carlo Dropout inference to quantify epistemic uncertainty for each agent. We introduce a decision-layer orchestrator that performs risk- and uncertainty-aware triage using two interpretable thresholds: a risk score and an uncertainty budget. High-confidence, high-risk samples are automatically contained, while uncertain or borderline cases are escalated to human analysts, establishing a flexible computational contract between autonomous response and analyst oversight. To support auditability and trust, SABRE integrates post-hoc explainability mechanisms, including gradient saliency, permutation importance, and counterfactual analysis, enabling both local and global interpretation of agent decisions. Extensive evaluation on RDset and RanSMAP demonstrates that Agentic SABRE preserves perfect discrimination on saturated semantic datasets, with AUC equal to 1.0, while improving robustness under weak behavioural signals. It achieves up to a 4.9 percent relative reduction in false escalations at equal recall while maintaining calibrated predictive uncertainty. Counterfactual analysis further shows that semantic and behavioural decisions can be reversed with bounded perturbation cost, indicating stable and interpretable decision boundaries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic SABRE，一个融合语义与行为证据、具备不确定性感知能力的神经符号多智能体框架，用于自适应勒索软件检测，并在多个数据集上取得了优异性能。
AI.motivation: 勒索软件已演变为复杂、自适应且快速变化的对手类型，静态签名和单一分类器在概念漂移、逃避攻击和行为多态性下难以泛化，亟需更鲁棒的自适应检测方法。
AI.method: 提出Agentic SABRE框架：融合基于语义的表示证据与基于行为的时间窗口取证遥测；采用Monte Carlo Dropout量化每个智能体的认知不确定性；设计决策层编排器，使用风险分数和不确定性预算两个可解释阈值进行风险与不确定性感知分类；集成梯度显著性、置换重要性和反事实分析等事后可解释机制。
AI.result: 在RDset和RanSMAP数据集上，语义饱和数据集AUC达1.0；在弱行为信号下鲁棒性提升；等召回率下误报率相对降低4.9%；反事实分析表明决策边界稳定可解释。
AI.conclusion: Agentic SABRE通过神经符号多智能体协同与不确定性感知机制，在高检测性能与可解释性之间取得了有效平衡，并建立了自主响应与分析师监督之间的灵活计算契约。

title: Speaker-Disentangled Chunk-Wise Regression for Syllabic Tokenization
comment: Accepted by IEEE Open Journal of Signal Processing (OJSP), 10 pages, 4 figures
summary: Unsupervised syllabic tokenization aims to learn discrete syllabic tokens that capture latent linguistic content-related structure from raw speech. Recent syllabic tokenization methods employ teacher-student distillation of the pretrained HuBERT to organize latent speech frame representations into syllabic segments. However, when trained with an utterance-level cross-entropy objective, the model predicts speaker identity rather than linguistic content, thereby compromising the purity of syllabic tokens. To address this problem, we propose a speaker-disentangled syllabic tokenizer that regresses speaker-perturbed student representations toward clean teacher targets within fixed-length chunks. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance in syllable boundary detection and syllabic segment clustering. Moreover, a speech language model trained on our syllabic tokens achieves a 7% relative improvement in syntactic and semantic understanding over the phone-level SpiRit-LM.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种说话人解耦的音节分词器，通过回归说话人扰动的学生表征到干净教师目标，实现音节边界检测和聚类SOTA，并在语音语言模型上取得7%的语义理解提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的无监督音节分词方法在训练时会预测说话人身份而非语言内容，损害了音节token的纯度。
AI.method: 提出说话人解耦的音节分词器，将受到说话人扰动的学生表征回归到固定长度块内的干净教师目标上。
AI.result: 在音节边界检测和音节段聚类上达到SOTA；基于该方法训练的语音语言模型在句法和语义理解上比phone-level SpiRit-LM提升7%。
AI.conclusion: 说话人解耦策略有效改善了音节token的语言内容纯度，提升了下游语音理解性能。

title: Decentralised Federated Learning over Temporal Networks: The Role of Heterogeneities
summary: Decentralised federated learning, based on peer-to-peer communication, is increasingly proposed for on-device training of machine learning models, promising a privacy-preserving, communication-efficient training process with no risk of single-point failure. However, the role of structural and temporal inhomogeneities in such fully decentralised settings remains poorly understood. Here, we investigate their effects when model parameters are locally averaged during aggregation. We show that the decentralised federated learning process is governed, both in the early phase and the late, stationary limit, by the same dynamics as a lazy random-walk diffusion process on temporal networks. Based on this mapping, we demonstrate that the typical experimental scenario used in decentralised federated learning leads to unrealistically rapid convergence because of ignoring the temporal and structural inhomogeneities inherent in the communication network. We analyse real-world temporal networks and find that inhomogeneities most often dramatically slow down diffusion, hence the convergence process.

AI.tldr: 本文通过将去中心化联邦学习映射为时间网络上的惰性随机游走扩散过程，揭示了结构和时间不均匀性会显著减慢模型收敛速度，并指出典型实验设置因忽略这些不均匀性而得出不切实际的快速收敛结果。
AI.motivation: 去中心化联邦学习（peer-to-peer通信）被广泛认为具有隐私保护、通信高效和无单点故障等优势，但其中结构和时间不均匀性对训练过程的影响尚未被充分理解。
AI.method: 将去中心化联邦学习（局部参数平均聚合）建模为时间网络上的惰性随机游走扩散过程，分析早期和稳态极限下的动力学行为，并使用真实世界的时间网络数据进行验证。
AI.result: 发现去中心化联邦学习的收敛动力学与时间网络上的惰性随机游走扩散过程等价；典型实验设置忽略了通信网络固有的时间和结构不均匀性，导致不切实际的快速收敛；真实时间网络中不均匀性通常会显著减慢扩散速度和收敛过程。
AI.conclusion: 去中心化联邦学习的收敛速度严重受通信网络的结构和时间不均匀性影响，实际部署时必须考虑这些因素，否则会高估训练效率。

title: HAS-Bench: Evaluating LLM-Based Human-Agent Systems under Configurable Human Participation
summary: Large language models increasingly operate in settings where humans are active collaborators rather than passive task providers. We introduce HAS-Framework, a graph-based framework that represents humans and LLM-powered agents as first-class participants with explicit roles, permissions, communication paths, and action authority. Building on this framework, HAS-Bench evaluates Human-Agent Systems under configurable human participation across agency levels, interaction channels, and persona policies. The benchmark measures both task outcomes and process-level collaboration behavior, including clarification quality, feedback utilization, control calibration, safety, initiative, and interaction cost. Experiments across six domains show that human participation can substantially improve task completion and failure recovery, but the gains depend on when, how, and by whom human input is exercised.

AI.tldr: 提出了HAS-Framework图框架统一建模人类与LLM智能体的协作关系，并构建HAS-Bench基准测试，从任务结果和过程行为两个维度评估人类参与对Agent系统的影响。实验表明人类参与能提升任务完成率和故障恢复能力，但效果取决于参与的时机、方式和角色。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM系统多将人类视为被动任务提供者，忽视了在现实场景中人类是主动协作者。缺乏统一框架来建模人类与智能体之间的角色、权限、通信路径和行动授权等关系。
AI.method: 基于图的HAS-Framework，将人类和LLM智能体都作为一等参与者；构建HAS-Bench评估基准，在可配置的人类参与条件下（代理级别、交互通道、人格策略）进行多维度评估。
AI.result: 人类参与能显著提升任务完成率和故障恢复；但效果依赖参与的时机、方式和具体角色。
AI.conclusion: 人机协作是提升LLM系统性能的有效途径，但需要精细设计人类参与的机制，而非简单引入人类介入。

title: Beyond Multilingual Averages: MTEB-PT, a Benchmark for Portuguese Sentence Encoders
comment: Accepted at BRACIS 2026 - 36th Brazilian Conference on Intelligent Systems
summary: Portuguese remains underrepresented in text embedding evaluation, despite being one of the most widely spoken languages in the world. As a result, embedding models are often selected based on English or multilingual metrics, while their effectiveness in Portuguese remains unclear. We present MTEB-PT, a Portuguese benchmark constructed from a subset of MMTEB, comprising 14 existing datasets across Semantic Textual Similarity (STS), classification, retrieval, and reranking. We use this benchmark to evaluate 17 open- and closed-source embedding models under a unified protocol. Our results show that Portuguese performance is strongly task-dependent: multilingual rankings do not reliably predict Portuguese-specific performance across task families, no single model dominates all settings, and models with stronger long-context capacity are particularly advantageous on longer-input tasks such as retrieval and reranking. The benchmark also shows that language-specific fine-tuning still improves model performance in Portuguese, especially on task types that match the adaptation data most closely. To examine this effect, we fine-tune three representative backbone models with Portuguese contrastive supervision and Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL). These benchmark-informed baselines yield their strongest gains on STS, consistent with the predominantly symmetric supervision used during training, while also improving retrieval and remaining competitive under dimensional truncation. We release the MTEB-PT benchmark, the fine-tuned models, and the training and evaluation code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MTEB-PT，一个葡萄牙语文本嵌入评估基准，涵盖STS、分类、检索和重排序任务，评估17个模型后发现：多语言排名不能可靠预测葡萄牙语性能，长上下文能力对检索/重排序有利，语言特定微调（结合对比学习和MRL）能带来显著提升。
AI.motivation: 葡萄牙语虽是全球使用最广泛的语言之一，但在文本嵌入评估中代表性不足，现有模型常基于英语或多语言指标选择，其在葡萄牙语上的实际效果不明。
AI.method: 从MMTEB中筛选14个现有数据集构建MTEB-PT基准，涵盖STS、分类、检索、重排序四类任务；统一协议下评估17个开源/闭源嵌入模型；对三个骨干模型进行葡萄牙语对比监督+Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL)微调。
AI.result: 葡萄牙语性能强任务依赖；多语言排名不能可靠预测葡萄牙语性能；无单一模型在所有设置中占优；长上下文模型在检索/重排序上更优；语言特定微调在STS上提升最大，在检索上也有改进，且在维度截断下保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 需要针对葡萄牙语的专门评估基准，语言特定微调仍有效，但效果与训练数据最匹配的任务类型高度相关；发布了MTEB-PT基准、微调模型及代码。

title: Understanding electricity consumption behaviour through Inverse Reinforcement Learning
summary: Understanding how households consume electricity in response to socioeconomic and climatic drivers is important for decision-makers designing energy policies in a changing climate and under geopolitical tensions. Consumers respond differently to thermal stress depending on income, consumption habits and the surrounding built environment, a nonlinear behaviour that most approaches oversimplify. In this study, households are treated as agents interacting with complex environments, and Inverse Reinforcement Learning is used to represent their consumption behaviour as model implied reward functions. Specifically, we observe how these reward functions change when households undergo socioeconomic and climatic shocks. The framework is tested on different clusters of electricity consumption profiles in Italy. Clusters' reward functions are retrieved and used to understand how cooling behaviour changes from summer 2021 to summer 2022 and 2023, before, during and after the energy crisis and a heatwave. We find that these shocks reshaped cooling behaviour heterogeneously across consumer groups, in directions conditioned by their prior habits and built environment. Across the 2021 to 2023 summers, we identify a spectrum of responses: transient adjustments that receded as the shocks eased, durable shifts persisting into 2023, and consumers exhibiting negligible change. At the intradaily scale, groups comparable in socioeconomic and environmental context but differing in their daily timing of consumption responded distinctly, identifying time of use as a separate dimension of behavioural heterogeneity. Energy policies and demand-response schemes should therefore account not only for who consumers are and where they live, but for when they consume and whether their response to a shock persists.

AI.tldr: 本文使用逆强化学习将家庭用电行为建模为奖励函数，分析意大利不同消费者群体在2021-2023年夏季（能源危机和热浪冲击下）的制冷行为变化，发现消费习惯、建筑环境和使用时间导致异质性响应，部分变化是暂时的，部分则是持久的。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度简化了家庭应对热应力时因收入、消费习惯和建筑环境不同而产生的非线性和异质性用电行为，决策者需要更精细的理解来设计气候变化和地缘政治紧张背景下的能源政策。
AI.method: 将家庭视为与复杂环境交互的智能体，使用逆强化学习从消费数据中推断隐含的奖励函数，并观察在经济社会和气候冲击下奖励函数如何变化；在意大利不同用电消费聚类上测试。
AI.result: 发现冲击对不同消费者群体的制冷行为产生异质性重塑：有的表现为暂时性调整（冲击缓解后消退），有的转变为持久性变化（持续至2023年），有的几乎没有变化；在日内尺度上，即使社会经济和环境背景相似，但消费时间不同的群体响应也截然不同。
AI.conclusion: 能源政策和需求响应方案不仅应考虑消费者是谁、住在哪里，还应当考虑他们何时用电以及其应对冲击的响应是否具有持久性。

title: Do GUI Agents Believe Their Eyes? Diagnosing State-Belief Reliance on Pixels versus Structure
summary: Multimodal GUI agents read an interface through two redundant channels: the rendered pixels of a screenshot and a serialized structure such as a DOM or accessibility tree. Before acting, an agent forms a belief about the current interface state, but existing benchmarks score task success, element grounding, or attack resistance and do not ask whether that belief is drawn from the pixels. We formalize visual state reliance, the attribution of a state belief to pixels, structure, or priors, and measure it with paired single-channel interventions over 310 real web, mobile, and desktop probes. Every probe is scored by deterministic forced choice, with no model-generated item and no model judge. Our central metric is the Perception-Fusion Gap, the fraction of probes a model perceives correctly yet resolves toward structure under conflict. Across five models from three vendors, textual state beliefs defer to structure while image-only accuracy stays near ceiling, and Perception-Fusion Gap is positive for every model; non-text identity, by contrast, stays largely pixel-bound. The substitution is specific to the serialized-text and indexed-action channel, and coordinate-action agents are largely immune. For textual conflicts, a white-box ablation traces the effect to a single copied structural value, and in two live environments the conflict drives wrong actions and real task failure. Visual state reliance therefore gives a measurable diagnostic of whether agent state beliefs are visually grounded, and the errors it exposes propagate to actions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“视觉状态依赖”概念，通过单通道干预方法测量GUI代理的状态信念是来自像素、结构还是先验，并引入核心指标“感知-融合差距”（PFG）。实验表明，文本代理倾向于依赖结构而非像素，导致冲突时出错，而坐标代理则更依赖像素。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI代理基准只评估任务成功率、元素定位或抗攻击能力，不检查代理的状态信念是否真正来自视觉像素。作者希望形式化并量化代理对视觉信息的依赖程度。
AI.method: 通过310个真实Web、移动和桌面探针，进行配对单通道干预，采用确定性强制选择评分，无模型生成项或模型裁判。核心指标为感知-融合差距（PFG），即模型正确感知但在冲突时倾向于结构的比例。
AI.result: 五个模型均呈现正PFG，文本代理倾向于结构，图像准确率接近上限；非文本身份代理则大多依赖像素。白盒消融显示错误源于单个复制的结构值，冲突导致实际任务失败。
AI.conclusion: 视觉状态依赖可作为衡量GUI代理状态信念是否基于视觉的可测量诊断指标，且其暴露的错误会传播到具体行动中。

title: Semantic Integration and Lexical Expectation Shape N400 and P600 Dynamics During Naturalistic Reading
summary: Word surprisal is a well-established computational predictor of human neural responses during language comprehension, but it remains less clear whether local semantic fit explains neural response variation beyond lexical expectation during naturalistic reading. Using the Dublin EEG-based Reading Experiment Corpus (DERCo), this study examined whether contextual semantic relevance predicts word-locked EEG activity in the N400 and P600 windows. Contextual semantic relevance was computed as an attention-aware measure of how strongly a target word is semantically connected to its recent discourse context, and it was compared with GPT-based word surprisal. Across 22 participants and 32 EEG channels, we tested both predictors using regression-based ERP analyses and generalized additive mixed models while controlling for lexical variables and repeated observations. Both predictors were reliably associated with EEG responses, but they showed partly different temporal and scalp-level patterns. Surprisal captured expectancy-related variation, whereas contextual semantic relevance showed robust effects across N400- and P600-window mean voltages, with particularly strong explanatory support in the P600 window. Model comparisons indicated that contextual semantic relevance contributed explanatory value beyond lexical controls and surprisal. These findings suggest that naturalistic reading depends on both lexical expectation and local semantic integration, and that contextual semantic relevance offers an interpretable computational link between discourse semantic fit and ERP dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用DERCo数据集，对比了基于GPT的词元惊讶度（word surprisal）与上下文语义相关性（contextual semantic relevance）对EEG信号（N400和P600窗口）的预测能力。结果发现，两种预测因子都能解释EEG变异，但模式不同：词元惊讶度主要反映预期相关变异，而上下文语义相关性在N400和P600窗口均有稳健效应，尤其在P600窗口解释力更强。模型比较表明，语义相关性超越了词汇控制和惊讶度的解释力，说明自然阅读既依赖词汇预期也依赖局部语义整合。
AI.motivation: 探索在自然阅读过程中，除了词汇层面的期望（词元惊讶度）之外，局部的语义匹配度是否能够额外解释大脑的神经响应变异，从而更全面地理解语言理解的计算机制。
AI.method: 使用DERCo数据集（22名参与者，32个EEG通道），计算GPT-based词元惊讶度和基于注意力的上下文语义相关性作为预测因子；采用回归式ERP分析和广义加性混合模型（GAMM），控制词汇变量和重复观测，对比两个预测因子对N400和P600窗口EEG活动的预测能力。
AI.result: 1）两种预测因子均与EEG响应显著相关，但时空模式不同。2）词元惊讶度主要捕获与预期相关的变异。3）上下文语义相关性在N400和P600窗口均有稳健效应，P600窗口尤为突出。4）模型比较显示，上下文语义相关性在词汇控制和惊讶度之外提供了额外的解释力。
AI.conclusion: 自然阅读过程同时依赖词汇层面的预期（惊讶度）和局部语义整合（语义相关性）；上下文语义相关性作为话语语义匹配与ERP动态之间的可解释计算桥梁，具有重要价值。

title: Regime-Conditional Stabilisation of LLM-Augmented Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a natural interface for translating human objectives into reward signals for cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), yet the training-time dynamics of this integration remain poorly understood. We show that dynamically updating LLM-generated reward weights during off-policy MARL violates the stationarity assumption of Potential-Based Reward Shaping (PBRS) and contaminates the experience replay buffer, whose stored transitions carry reward labels computed under stale shaping weights. We characterise the result as a regime-dependent failure whose severity depends on how competent the unshaped baseline already is. To control it we propose two stabilisation strategies: a Phase-Based Freeze Schedule that enforces strict stationarity within training phases, and Exponential Moving Average (EMA) smoothing that bounds per-episode weight drift. We evaluate across three cooperative environments and five random seeds with QMIX, complemented by an exploratory VDN extension, yielding a three-regime taxonomy. In the augmentative regime (Simple Spread), where the baseline is functional (74.4 %), EMA significantly improves success to 86.7 % ($+12.3$ pp, $p<0.01$) while naive dynamic updates collapse it to 15.2 %. In the essential regime (Level-Based Foraging), where the baseline is broken (0.1 %), any shaping unlocks the task (95.9 % under EMA). In the supplementary regime (SMAC 3m), where the baseline is near-saturated (98.8 %), stabilised shaping preserves performance (99.9 %) while unstabilised shaping adds variance without gain. These findings establish reward-signal stationarity as a necessary design constraint and indicate that regime placement is a practical predictor of whether dynamic LLM shaping helps or harms.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了动态更新LLM生成奖励权重会破坏MARL中的平稳性假设，提出两种稳定策略（阶段冻结调度和指数移动平均平滑），并在三种合作环境中验证了不同基线能力下的三阶段分类法。
AI.motivation: LLM能够将人类目标转化为多智能体强化学习的奖励信号，但这种集成在训练时的动态机制尚未被理解。
AI.method: 分析动态更新LLM奖励权重对PBRS平稳性假设的破坏及经验回放缓冲区的污染问题；提出Phase-Based Freeze Schedule和EMA平滑两种稳定策略；在三种环境（Simple Spread、Level-Based Foraging、SMAC 3m）中基于QMIX及VDN进行实验。
AI.result: 提出三阶段分类：增强阶段（基线74.4%，EMA提升至86.7%，动态更新崩至15.2%）、关键阶段（基线0.1%，任何塑形均有效，EMA达95.9%）、补充阶段（基线98.8%，稳定塑形保持99.9%，非稳定增加方差）。
AI.conclusion: 奖励信号平稳性是必要设计约束，阶段定位是预测动态LLM塑形有效性的实用指标。

title: A Bayesian Framework for Evaluating Scenario Compatibility in Generative Population Synthesis
comment: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC)
summary: Scenario-based transportation analysis specifies future assumptions through aggregate population targets, whereas generative population synthesis models produce detailed individual-level realizations. When scenario targets are imposed on generative models, current practice relies on deterministic marginal calibration, implicitly assuming that the targets are compatible with the model's learned structural support. However, whether scenario-level constraints lie within the generative support--and how strongly they distort structural uncertainty--remains largely unexamined. We propose an ensemble-based Bayesian updating framework to quantify scenario compatibility in conditional population synthesis. A population-aware conditional variational autoencoder is developed to learn a distribution over plausible population structures while preserving aggregate fidelity. An ensemble of realizations sampled from the learned prior provides an empirical approximation of structural uncertainty. Scenario targets are treated as probabilistic evidence over aggregate statistics, and posterior weights are obtained through Bayesian updating across the ensemble. Scenario compatibility is quantified using effective sample size (ESS), which measures posterior concentration and the compression of structural uncertainty induced by conditioning. Experiments demonstrate that scenario impact depends not only on target magnitude but also on alignment with the learned joint structure, and reveal structural failure modes when targets fall outside prior ensemble support. The proposed framework provides a probabilistic diagnostic model for evaluating scenario feasibility and structural consistency before downstream projection and transportation planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于集成的贝叶斯更新框架，通过有效样本量量化情景目标与生成式人口合成模型的结构兼容性，识别目标超出模型支撑域时的结构性失效模式。
AI.motivation: 当前基于情景的交通分析使用聚合目标，而生成式模型产生个体级实现，但情景约束是否与模型的结构支撑兼容、会如何扭曲结构不确定性，这些问题尚未被系统检验。
AI.method: 开发人口感知的条件变分自编码器学习人口结构分布；从先验分布采样集成实现近似结构不确定性；将情景目标作为聚合统计量的概率证据，通过贝叶斯更新获得后验权重；使用有效样本量度量后验集中度和结构不确定性压缩程度。
AI.result: 实验表明，情景影响不仅取决于目标大小，还取决于与学习到的联合结构的对齐程度；当目标超出先验集成支撑域时，会出现结构性失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为下游预测和交通规划前评估情景可行性与结构一致性提供了概率诊断工具。

title: Server-side Anti-cheat in FPS games for Aimbot detection using Deep learning and Machine learning
summary: Modern video games are becoming more complex day by day. Most of these modern games are multiplayer first-person shooter (FPS) games. The rising popularity of FPS games emphasizes the need to combat cheating for fair and enjoyable gaming. As the number of players using cheating techniques like aimbots, wallhacks, and speed hacks is also increasing, we need a way to detect players who are using cheating tools to gain an unfair advantage over regular players. In this system, we focus exclusively on detecting aimbot cheats. Players who use aimbot cheats generally do not prioritize other aspects of the game. To distinguish between regular and cheating players, we identify specific features encompassing time-series data such as aim velocity, number of shots, distance to target, and more, along with behavioral data such as utility usage, player movement, and other gameplay patterns. Utilizing these features, we construct a server-side aimbot detection classifier named 'YAACS'. YAACS comprises a parser, a deep learning model, and intermediary connection utilities designed for integration with the game server. The proposed system achieves a classification accuracy of 88.6% with a false positive rate of 0.97% using a Stacked LSTM with Dense layers trained on sequences of 128 ticks (Tick Delta Negative=56, Tick Delta Positive=24), outperforming the Decision Tree baseline which achieves a higher accuracy of 96.2% but at a false positive rate of 2.68%, 2.76x worse than the best LSTM configuration. These results demonstrate that incorporating temporal context through sequence modelling is critical for minimising false accusations in FPS cheat detection.

AI.tldr: 提出YAACS服务器端瞄准作弊检测系统，使用Stacked LSTM模型分析时间序列和玩家行为特征，在保持较低误报率（0.97%）的前提下达到88.6%的检测准确率。
AI.motivation: 现代FPS游戏中作弊行为日益严重，尤其是瞄准作弊（aimbot）破坏了游戏公平性，需要一种能准确检测作弊玩家且误报率低的解决方案。
AI.method: 提取时间序列特征（瞄准速度、射击次数、目标距离等）和行为特征（道具使用、玩家移动等），构建Stacked LSTM与Dense层结合的深度学习模型，在128帧序列上训练分类器YAACS，并与决策树基线进行对比。
AI.result: Stacked LSTM模型准确率88.6%，误报率0.97%；决策树基线准确率96.2%，但误报率高达2.68%（是LSTM的2.76倍）。
AI.conclusion: 引入时间序列建模对于降低FPS作弊检测中的误报率至关重要，尽管LSTM准确率略低于决策树，但其误报率显著更低，在实际游戏场景中更具实用价值。

title: Detecting Hallucinations in Retrieval-Augmented Generation through Grounding-Aware Sensitivity by Perturbation (GASP)
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) reduces but does not eliminate hallucination, and existing detectors return a single answer-level score that does not indicate which sentence is unsupported, or why. To close this gap, we introduce Grounding-Aware Sensitivity by Perturbation (GASP), a span-level detector that scores each answer sentence by how strongly its likelihood depends on the retrieved evidence, a quantity we term grounding sensitivity. GASP holds the answer fixed and re-scores it under the full context, under no context, and with each chunk removed, then measures the log-likelihood drops and Jensen-Shannon divergences (JSD). The likelihood of a grounded sentence collapses once its supporting passage is removed, whereas a hallucinated sentence is almost unaffected, a contrast we interpret by casting decoding as a random nonlinear iterated function system (RNIFS). We evaluate GASP on three benchmarks (RAGTruth, TofuEval, RAGBench) with three instruction-tuned scorers from two model families (Qwen2.5-0.5B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, and SmolLM2-1.7B) under a leakage-clean protocol. On RAGTruth it reaches a response-level area under the ROC curve (AUC) of about 0.73 and a span-level AUC of about 0.67, improving significantly over perplexity and by clear margins over length, whole-context natural language inference (NLI), and self-consistency baselines. The only baseline competitive at the span level is a well-configured chunk-level entailment verifier, which requires a separate model, whereas a training-free threshold on the grounding features matches the trained classifier without labeled data and serves as the default detector. Beyond RAGTruth, the signal transfers to TofuEval but not to short-answer question answering in RAGBench, showing GASP is best suited to outputs constructed from the retrieved context rather than answers recoverable from parametric knowledge.

AI.tldr: GASP是一种基于扰动感知的跨度级幻觉检测器，通过衡量每个回答句子对检索证据的依赖程度（称为"接地敏感性"）来检测RAG系统中哪些句子未被证据支持。在RAGTruth上达到约0.73的响应级AUC和约0.67的跨度级AUC，优于困惑度、NLI和自一致性等基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统仍会产生幻觉，且已有检测器只能返回一个整体分数，无法指出具体哪句话缺乏证据支持及其原因。
AI.method: GASP通过三种上下文配置（完整上下文、无上下文、逐块移除）重新评分固定答案，测量对数似然下降和Jensen-Shannon散度，利用"接地敏感性"（支持段落移除后接地句子似然骤降，而幻觉句子几乎不受影响）来检测幻觉。该方法还通过随机非线性迭代函数系统（RNIFS）进行理论解释。
AI.result: 在RAGTruth上响应级AUC约0.73，跨度级AUC约0.67；显著优于困惑度、长度、全上下文NLI和自一致性基线；与配置良好的块级蕴涵验证器（需独立模型）相当；无训练阈值匹配有监督分类器；信号可迁移至TofuEval但无法迁移至RAGBench短答案问答。
AI.conclusion: GASP最适合用于从检索上下文构建的输出，而非可从参数知识恢复的短答案；无训练、无需额外模型的特性使其成为实用的默认检测器。

title: Two Black Boxes, One Solver: Encoder Probing and Decoder Attribution for Neural Multi-Attribute VRP under Hard-Mask and Recourse Decoders
comment: Accepted at the IJCAI-ECAI 2026 Workshop on Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI), Bremen, Germany. 8 pages
summary: Neural autoregressive solvers for the Multi-Attribute Vehicle Routing Problem (MAVRP) reach competitive cost but offer no per-step justification, a problem when dispatchers must validate, accept, or compare them. We open two complementary black boxes in one protocol. On the encoder side, linear probes, spontaneous-organization metrics, rank-based richness measures, and discovered-direction analyses with intervention validation characterize how the latent represents constraint families at the graph, node, and edge level. On the decoder side, three attribution methods (gradient, integrated gradients, DeepLIFT) feed three reading angles: abductive, contrastive against the best feasible alternative, and counterfactual (smallest input change that switches the action or restores feasibility). Explanations are scored on fidelity, concentration, stability, sanity, and actionability. Across six variants combining three encoders (Attention baseline, Unimp, UnimpMoe) with two decoders (Hard-Mask, Recourse), we find that graph inductive bias improves both representational predictability and decoder sanity, that the Mixture-of-Experts encoder represents constraints in a distributed rather than axis-aligned way, and that the Recourse training regime, not merely its softer mask, produces policies that represent infeasibility usefully, exposing make-feasible counterfactuals that Hard-Mask policies fail to produce even when fed infeasible alternatives externally.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对多属性车辆路径问题（MAVRP）神经求解器的可解释性协议，从编码器和解码器两个维度打开黑箱，通过探针、归因方法和多种评估指标，揭示了不同编码器-解码器组合在约束表征、决策归因和反事实解释上的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 神经自回归求解器虽能高效求解MAVRP，但缺乏逐步骤的决策解释，导致调度员无法验证、接受或比较其输出，因此需要打开其黑箱以提升可解释性和信任度。
AI.method: 编码器端使用线性探针、自组织度量、基于秩的丰富度度量和干预验证的发现方向分析；解码器端使用梯度、积分梯度和DeepLIFT三种归因方法，从溯因、对比反事实和最小输入变化反事实三个角度解释，并用保真度、集中度、稳定性、理智性和可操作性评分。
AI.result: 图归纳偏置提升编码器的可预测性和解码器的理智性；MoE编码器以分布式而非轴对齐方式表示约束；Recourse训练范式（而非仅软掩码）能产生有用的不可行性表征，生成恢复可行的反事实解释，而Hard-Mask策略即使外部注入不可行备选方案也无法产生。
AI.conclusion: 图归纳偏置和Recourse训练范式是提升MAVRP神经求解器可解释性的关键设计选择，不同组件对可解释性有显著且可分的影响。

title: Reduced-Order Models: The Mother of World Models
summary: World models -- compressed latent representations of an environment that support action-conditioned prediction and planning -- are typically presented as a product of modern self-supervised learning. This paper argues that the functional anatomy of a world model was independently developed, deployed, and formally analyzed decades earlier in the model-order-reduction (MOR) and control literature, under different names and for a different purpose: the real-time operation of physical systems. We trace the anatomy across three communities. Low-dimensional models of turbulence built on proper orthogonal decomposition (POD) supplied latent dynamics learned from data of a chaotic environment; eigenface methods in early computer vision supplied the encoder-decoder half, including a primitive runtime validity check; and measurement-based POD frameworks for facility thermal control assembled the complete loop -- POD coefficients as latent state, parametric dependence on actuator setpoints as action conditioning, modal reconstruction as decoding, and, critically, a priori analytical error bounds as a verification layer that certified when the model's predictions could be trusted in closed loop. We then examine what each tradition possesses that the other lacks: MOR contributes verification, physical grounding, and extreme data efficiency; learned world models contribute nonlinear representation, transferability, and horizon. We argue that the outstanding obstacle to deploying world models in systems that cannot fail -- power, thermal, process control -- is not predictive fidelity but verifiability, and we outline a research agenda for physics-grounded, verifiable world models that unifies the two lineages.

AI.tldr: 本文追踪了世界模型的功能解剖学在模型降阶(MOR)和控制文献中的独立发展历程，指出其在湍流建模、特征脸方法和基于测量的POD框架中早有体现。MOR贡献了可验证性、物理基础和极高数据效率，而学习型世界模型贡献了非线性表示、可迁移性和长时域。作者认为部署世界模型于关键系统的障碍不是预测保真度，而是可验证性。
AI.motivation: 揭示世界模型的核心思想并非现代自监督学习的独特产物，而是早在模型降阶和控制领域就已独立发展，并指出当前学习型世界模型缺失的关键要素——可验证性。
AI.method: 通过跨三个社区（湍流POD建模、计算机视觉特征脸、设施热控测量POD框架）追溯世界模型的功能解剖学，并对比MOR与学习型世界模型的优缺点。
AI.result: 识别出MOR具备可验证性、物理基础和数据效率，而学习型世界模型具备非线性表示、可迁移性和长时域预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 部署世界模型于高可靠性系统的主要障碍是可验证性而非预测保真度，提出了融合两条技术路线的物理基础可验证世界模型研究议程。

title: Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B: Compressing Hybrid MoE LLMs
summary: We present Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B, a compressed variant of Nemotron-3-Super optimized for interactive deployment. We designed the model to maximize server throughput under high user throughput constraints. In interactive serving workloads on a single 8xB200 node, Puzzle-75B-A9B achieves approximately 2x higher server throughput than Nemotron-3-Super at matched user throughput constraints. In ultra-long-context deployment on a single H100 GPU, the compressed model increases 1M-token concurrency from 1 request to 8 requests. Puzzle-75B-A9B is constructed using a multi-stage pipeline that combines the Iterative Puzzle compression framework with knowledge distillation, reinforcement learning, quantization, and a Multi-Token Prediction head. The compression process jointly optimizes heterogeneous MoE pruning, active parameter budget, and Mamba pruning to improve inference efficiency while preserving model quality. We evaluate Puzzle-75B-A9B on a broad suite of reasoning, coding, multilingual, long-context, and agentic benchmarks. Despite substantial compression, the model retains strong downstream accuracy relative to the parent model across a wide range of tasks. These results demonstrate that large hybrid MoE models can be substantially optimized for deployment efficiency while maintaining strong downstream capability.

AI.tldr: Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B 是一个通过多阶段压缩流水线（包括迭代Puzzle压缩、知识蒸馏、强化学习、量化和多Token预测头）从Nemotron-3-Super压缩而来的模型。在8xB200节点上实现了约2倍的服务器吞吐量提升，在单H100 GPU上将1M-token并发从1提升到8，同时在推理、编码、多语言等任务上保持了较好的下游精度。
AI.motivation: 为了在保持模型质量的前提下大幅提升大型混合MoE模型的交互式部署效率，满足高用户吞吐量约束下的服务器吞吐量需求。
AI.method: 采用多阶段流水线：Iterative Puzzle压缩框架 + 知识蒸馏 + 强化学习 + 量化 + 多Token预测头。联合优化异构MoE剪枝、活跃参数预算和Mamba剪枝以提升推理效率。
AI.result: 在8xB200节点上，与Nemotron-3-Super相比，在匹配用户吞吐量约束下实现约2倍服务器吞吐量；在单个H100 GPU上，1M-token并发从1提升到8个请求。
AI.conclusion: 大型混合MoE模型可以在大幅优化部署效率的同时保持较强的下游能力，压缩模型在广泛任务中保留了与父模型相当的下游精度。

title: Spinning Straw into Gold: Relabeling LLM Agent Trajectories in Hindsight for Successful Demonstrations
summary: Large language model agents operate in partially observable, long-horizon settings where obtaining supervision remains a major bottleneck. We address this by utilizing a source of supervision overlooked in existing post-training methods: unintended yet successful goals embedded within agent rollouts. Specifically, we introduce Hindsight Supervised Learning (HSL), where an auxiliary LLM reviews each completed trajectory and relabels it with all of the natural-language goals the agent actually achieved. HSL then pairs the trajectory with its relabeled goals and uses these pairs for additional fine-tuning. To mitigate suboptimality in the relabeled data, we propose two learning techniques for HSL, irrelevant-action masking and sample reweighting. Our experiments show that HSL is flexible and compatible with existing post-training pipelines. It improves both SFT and DPO, with larger gains on long-horizon tasks with more diverse goal spaces. Moreover, HSL is sample-efficient: on ALFWorld, it surpasses baselines trained on the full dataset while using only one quarter of the ground-truth demonstrations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hindsight Supervised Learning (HSL)方法，通过利用智能体轨迹中无意实现的目标（而不是仅依赖预设目标）进行后训练。HSL用LLM重新标注轨迹中实际达成的所有自然语言目标，然后结合轨迹-目标对进行微调，并引入无关动作掩码和样本重加权来缓解次优数据问题。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型智能体在部分可观测、长时域任务中运作，获取有效监督信号是主要瓶颈。已有后训练方法忽略了智能体轨迹中隐藏的、无意达成的成功目标这一监督来源。
AI.method: HSL包含三个关键组件：1) 辅助LLM对已完成轨迹回顾并重新标注所有实际达成的自然语言目标；2) 将轨迹与重新标注的目标配对进行额外微调；3) 提出两个学习技术——无关动作掩码（忽略不相关动作）和样本重加权（缓解次优数据问题）。
AI.result: HSL能灵活兼容现有后训练流程，在SFT和DPO上均有提升，在更长时域、更多样化目标空间的任务上收益更大。在ALFWorld上，HSL仅使用四分之一的地面真值演示就能超越使用完整数据集训练的基线。
AI.conclusion: HSL是一种样本高效的后训练方法，通过挖掘轨迹中无意实现的目标来扩展监督信号，特别适合复杂长时域任务场景。

title: Decentralized Aggregation of LLM Predictions via Wagering Mechanisms
summary: It is increasingly common to aggregate predictions from multiple LLMs, each with domain expertise or access to private tools and data, to improve collective prediction performance. In decentralized settings, aggregation weights need to be determined without access to models' private information and should remain robust to strategic reporting. We propose a family of advantage-aligned wagering mechanisms for LLM aggregation (WALLA), in which each model reports a prediction and a learned wager, and predictions are aggregated using wagers as weights. WALLA introduces a leave-one-out baseline into the net payout function, yielding three desirable properties: (1) dominant-strategy incentive compatibility of prediction under arbitrary belief structure, (2) advantage--wager alignment, where the optimal wager is proportional to the model's expected score advantage, and (3) prediction-agnostic wager optimization, enabling decentralized learning of wager policies without requiring optimal predictions. We further instantiate two mechanism variants that trade off normality and no-arbitrage while maintaining a bounded worst-case deficit for the mechanism. Experiments on question-answering and forecasting benchmarks across heterogeneous models and private-information settings show that WALLA matches centralized aggregation methods in predictive performance, while simultaneously achieving decentralized learning, advantage-aligned aggregation weights, uncertainty awareness, and incentive-compatible prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为WALLA的激励机制，用于在去中心化环境下聚合多个LLM的预测，通过让每个模型报告预测和赌注，利用赌注作为权重进行聚合，实现了激励兼容性、优势-赌注对齐和去中心化学习。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM聚合方法在去中心化场景下无法获取模型的私有信息，且难以应对策略性报告行为，需要一种既能保护隐私又能激励诚实报告的聚合机制。
AI.method: 提出优势对齐的赌博机制（WALLA），每个模型报告预测和可学习的赌注，引入留一法基线到净支付函数中，实现了预测的占优策略激励兼容性、最优赌注与期望分数优势成正比、以及预测无关的赌注优化。
AI.result: 在问答和预测基准上的实验表明，WALLA在预测性能上与集中式聚合方法相当，同时实现了去中心化学习、优势对齐的聚合权重、不确定性感知和激励兼容的预测。
AI.conclusion: WALLA机制在去中心化LLM聚合中兼顾了激励兼容、隐私保护和预测性能，为多模型协作提供了一种理论上有保障的实用方案。

title: Risk-Constrained Freshness-Aware Semantic Caching for Open-Web Retrieval-Augmented LLMs
summary: Semantic caching reduces the latency and cost of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) by serving cached answers to semantically similar queries, but most existing methods do not model the time-varying freshness of open-web evidence. We present FreshCache, a three-tier semantic cache that treats cache reuse as a risk-constrained temporal inference problem: before approving a cache hit, FreshCache estimates the probability that the cached result is stale using a fitted exponential decay model enhanced by a learned MLP, and approves reuse only when that probability falls below a per-tier error budget across answers (epsilon = 0.10), URL lists (epsilon = 0.20), and page content (epsilon = 0.35). This allows the system to degrade gracefully as entries age rather than forcing a binary choice between a stale hit and a full pipeline execution. We introduce FreshCache-Bench, a benchmark of 8,072 base queries across five freshness classes with ground truth staleness labels drawn from real web snapshots at 1, 12, 24 hours, and 7 days after a baseline crawl, expanded to 31,201 queries via paraphrase generation. At the 24-hour evaluation window, FreshCache_MLP achieves 97% search API savings at 0.1% hash-based stale error, and an LLM-judge evaluation on 396 confirmed change pairs shows that only 34.3% of detected content changes actually affect answer correctness, placing true answer-affecting stale error at approximately 0.034%. The rule-based FreshCache achieves 98% search savings at 3.3% stale error under a temporal holdout calibration, outperforming SemanticTTL (14.9% stale, 72% saved), vCache (7.2% stale, 47% saved), and SCALM (5.2% stale, 96% saved). Ablations show the temporal risk gate accounts for an 11.6 point reduction in stale error over similarity-only reuse, and the learned MLP reduces stale error a further 3.2 points over the rule-based model.

AI.tldr: FreshCache是一个三层语义缓存系统，通过指数衰减模型和MLP估计缓存结果过时概率，仅在概率低于分层错误预算时批准缓存命中，在24小时窗口内实现97%搜索API节省和仅0.034%的真实答案影响错误率。
AI.motivation: 现有语义缓存方法没有建模开放网络证据随时间变化的 freshness（新鲜度），导致缓存结果可能过时，用户面临过时命中或完整执行管线的二选一困境。
AI.method: 提出三层语义缓存架构（答案、URL列表、页面内容），将缓存重用建模为风险约束的时间推断问题：使用指数衰减模型+学习型MLP估计缓存过时概率，仅在概率低于各层错误预算（ε=0.10/0.20/0.35）时批准重用，实现随条目老化优雅降级。
AI.result: 在24小时窗口：FreshCache_MLP达97%搜索API节省、0.1%哈希级过时错误；真实答案影响错误率约0.034%。规则版FreshCache达98%搜索节省、3.3%过时错误，优于SemanticTTL(14.9%过时,72%节省)、vCache(7.2%,47%)、SCALM(5.2%,96%)。消融实验显示时间风险门控降低11.6点过时错误，MLP额外降低3.2点。
AI.conclusion: FreshCache通过时间感知的风险控制机制，在保持高缓存命中率的同时显著降低过时错误，证明了将时间维度显式纳入语义缓存设计的有效性。

title: Transition Information Density: Morphological Trajectories, Synesthetic Perception, and Structured Interpolation in Neural Training (or: The Synesthetic AI)
comment: 38 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables. Empirical results from structured interpolation training across four representational mediums. Pipeline scripts, experimental data, and the Synesthesia Grid algorithm available upon reasonable request
summary: Standard machine learning training presents data as discrete endpoint pairs, omitting the structure of the space between them. This paper introduces Transition Information Density (TID) -- the information content recoverable from structured intermediate states between categorically distinct training endpoints -- and Positional Identity, the defined location of an intermediate state on the A-to-B continuum. Both constructs are grounded in three empirical contexts: grapheme-color synesthesia, the Synesthesia Grid (a boundary-contour morphing algorithm instantiating TID in visual morphological space), and a four-condition training experiment across four representational mediums. Probes trained on structured interpolation at defined Positional Identities (C3) exhibit substantially lower intrinsic dimensionality than volume-matched controls (C2) in Phonetic/Linguistic (C3: 3.33 vs. C2: 10.81) and Semantic Description (C3: 4.59 vs. C2: 8.67) mediums. Visual and cross-modal mediums do not show this effect, establishing a modality boundary condition. A fixed-N=50 comparison confirms that Positional Identity structure, not sample count, drives the effect. Resolution N scales monotonically with representational richness. Pooled TwoNN analysis reveals globally collapsed representations in visual space (0.075) and globally consistent representations in phonetic space (0.977). The paper contributes a formal definition of TID and Positional Identity, a nine-metric shape characterization framework, and a four-condition experimental design isolating trajectory structure, data volume, and Positional Identity as distinct factors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出过渡信息密度（TID）和位置身份两个新概念，通过结构化插值训练实验证明，在音位/语言和语义描述等模态中，具有明确位置身份的结构化中间状态能显著降低表示的内在维度，揭示了不同模态间的边界条件。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习训练将数据视为离散端点对，忽略了端点之间空间的潜在结构信息。作者希望捕捉和利用中间状态的丰富信息结构。
AI.method: 定义TID（从结构化中间状态中可恢复的信息量）和Positional Identity（中间状态在A到B连续统上的位置）。在三种经验背景下进行验证：字素-颜色联觉、Synesthesia Grid算法、跨四种表征媒介的四条件训练实验。
AI.result: 结构化插值训练（C3）比等量控制组（C2）显著降低内在维度：音位/语言（3.33 vs 10.81）、语义描述（4.59 vs 8.67）。视觉和跨模态无此效应。固定N=50验证是Positional Identity结构而非样本量驱动效果。分辨率N与表征丰富度单调相关。
AI.conclusion: 正式定义了TID和Positional Identity，提出了九指标形状表征框架和四条件实验设计，揭示了模态特异性边界条件，为利用中间状态结构改进表示学习提供了新方向。

title: MechMath Agent Team: LLM Driven Agents for Mathematical Research
summary: AI reasoning has become a central focus in contemporary artificial intelligence, largely driven by the success of large language models. However, mathematical research, which is characterized by non-linear derivation paths, rigorous logical requirements, and protracted exploration cycles, poses severe challenges for existing reasoning systems. To overcome these limitations, we present the MechMath Agent Team (MMAT), which is a large language model driven agent designed to serve as a co-pilot throughout the full cycle of mathematical research. We design a tripartite Harness Architecture that decouples system responsibilities into Control, Execution, and Augmentation planes, thereby reconciling rigorous logical control with the agility demanded by open-ended research. Building upon this framework, we instantiate three specialized agents: a Knowledge Base Manager, a Natural Language Prover, and a Formal Language Prover, all operating in a closed loop to produce formally certified mathematical proofs. We evaluate MMAT on open problems in Number Theory, Algebraic Complexity Theory, Differential Algebra, Operator Algebra, and Inequalities. Across a two-month deployment, 11 problems have been solved, demonstrating its capacity to act as a co-pilot throughout the entire research cycle. The contributions are threefold: a general decoupled Harness Architecture for multi-agent mathematical reasoning, its concrete instantiation in the MMAT system, and empirical validation on a diverse suite of open problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MechMath Agent Team (MMAT)，一种基于大语言模型的多智能体系统，采用三平面解耦架构（控制、执行、增强），通过知识库管理器、自然语言证明器和形式语言证明器三个智能体的闭环协作，在数论、代数复杂性理论等多个数学领域成功解决了11个开放问题，可作为数学研究的全程副驾驶。
AI.motivation: 现有AI推理系统难以应对数学研究中的非线性推导路径、严格逻辑要求和漫长探索周期等挑战，需要一种能够覆盖数学研究全周期的推理系统。
AI.method: 提出三平面Harness架构，将系统职责解耦为控制平面（Control）、执行平面（Execution）和增强平面（Augmentation），并基于此框架实例化三个专门智能体：知识库管理器、自然语言证明器和形式语言证明器，三者闭环协作生成形式化验证的数学证明。
AI.result: 在数论、代数复杂性理论、微分代数、算子代数和不等式等领域的开放问题上部署两个月，成功解决了11个问题。
AI.conclusion: MMAT系统能够在数学研究全周期中充当有效的副驾驶，贡献包括：通用的解耦Harness架构、MMAT系统具体实现、以及在多个开放问题上的实证验证。

title: Joint distribution of upstream runoff governs downstream river-discharge prediction uncertainty in distributed ML models
summary: Uncertainty quantification of hydrological predictions is necessary to inform operational decisions. Recent generative machine-learning methods have advanced probabilistic streamflow prediction, but have remained confined to lumped models that predict a basin outlet directly. At the same time, deterministic LSTM runoff models are increasingly applied at grid or catchment scale and routed through river networks to produce spatially continuous, physically consistent discharge fields. This technical note argues that moving probabilistic prediction from lumped to distributed models introduces a specific new requirement: the joint distribution of upstream runoff generation must be sampled jointly. In lumped inference, the model predicts the outlet distribution directly and can modulate spread from basin attributes. In distributed inference, downstream discharge is obtained by routing many upstream runoff predictions, so independent local sampling averages uncertainty away. Using Japan as a case study, we train two probabilistic basin-scale runoff LSTMs and route their runoff through a Hayami routing scheme. Randomly matching upstream ensemble members produces severely under-dispersed downstream ensembles, whereas a simple quantile matching strategy restores much of the spread of the direct basin-scale reference. The shift from lumped to distributed probabilistic hydrology therefore requires explicit attention to the spatial joint structure of runoff uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了从集总式概率水文预测转向分布式模型时，必须对上游产流的联合分布进行联合采样，否则独立采样会导致下游集合严重欠分散。通过日本案例研究，采用分位数匹配策略可恢复大部分分散度。
AI.motivation: 将概率预测从集总式模型扩展到分布式模型时，现有方法在空间上独立采样上游产流，导致路由后下游集合的变异性被平均化，无法反映真实的不确定性。
AI.method: 以日本为案例，训练两个概率性流域尺度LSTM产流模型，通过Hayami路由方案汇流。对比随机匹配上游集合成员与分位数匹配策略对下游集合分散度的影响。
AI.result: 随机匹配上游集合成员会产生严重欠分散的下游集合，而分位数匹配策略能恢复大部分与直接集总式模型参考相当的分散度。
AI.conclusion: 从集总式到分布式概率水文预测的转变，必须明确关注产流不确定性的空间联合结构。

title: LLM-as-a-Tutor: Policy-Aware Prompt Adaptation for Non-Verifiable RL
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) for non-verifiable instruction following increasingly relies on LLM judges with prompt-specific rubrics as reward signals. While recent methods adapt these rubrics to the evolving policy during training, the training prompts themselves remain static, drawn from fixed corpora. This static approach often results in a critical misalignment between prompt difficulty and policy capability, leaving the judge unable to recover a discriminative reward signal when prompts fail to elicit quality variance among rollouts. To address this misalignment, we introduce LLM-as-a-Tutor, a framework that extends the LLM's role from judge to tutor: a single model serves as an examiner that pairwise-compares policy rollouts to detect non-challenging prompts, and as a generator that appends atomic constraints to them. This append-only design monotonically raises difficulty in step with the policy's capability, producing a self-calibrating training signal without external difficulty schedules. On three complex instruction-following benchmarks, our method consistently outperforms both policy-unaware baselines and prior policy-adaptive methods that adapt rubrics or rewrite prompts, suggesting prompt adaptation as a missing axis of policy-awareness in non-verifiable RL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM-as-a-Tutor框架，将LLM从评判者扩展为导师角色，通过动态生成原子约束来调整提示难度，使之与策略能力对齐，从而在不可验证的强化学习指令遵循任务中提供自校准的训练信号。实验表明该方法优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有RL方法在不可验证指令遵循任务中，训练提示静态不变，导致提示难度与策略能力失调，评判器无法获得有区分度的奖励信号。
AI.method: 提出LLM-as-a-Tutor框架：同一模型既作为考官（成对比较策略输出以检测非挑战性提示），又作为生成器（为这些提示追加原子约束），通过仅追加的设计单调提升难度，实现自校准训练信号。
AI.result: 在三个复杂指令遵循基准上，该方法一致优于策略无关基线和先前的策略自适应方法，包括适配rubric或重写提示的方法。
AI.conclusion: 提示自适应是策略感知强化学习中一个被忽视的关键维度，本文方法有效弥补了这一缺失。

title: Legible-by-Construction: Attention and End-to-End Transformers
summary: A companion paper showed that a transformer's feed-forward layer can be rebuilt from explicit fuzzy set operations - intersection, set-difference, and a self-forgetting sequence quantifier - so its hidden units read as named logical operators at no cost to language-model quality. That left the other half of the transformer opaque. Here we carry the same idea into attention and join the two into one model. The mechanism is minimal: a head's value is passed through a sigmoid, so each value channel becomes a readable detector of whether a feature holds at a token. This adds no parameters and leaves the standard head otherwise untouched. A Boolean variant goes further, restructuring the value into an explicit within-token intersection and negation-capable set-difference. In both designs the output projection is left free, not tied to the vocabulary, which is the load-bearing decision: bounding what a head detects while leaving what it writes unconstrained yields selective detectors, whereas constraining the write does not. A bounded value is shaped into a readable detector by two selectivity pressures - one for sparse firing, one for decisive firing at the rails - and which a design wants is not universal. Across five specialized-attention designs at 125M parameters, 44 to 62 percent of value channels become crisp, contextually selective detectors, and their legibility rises with depth rather than crystallizing only on punctuation. Language-model quality is at parity with a conventional baseline. Finally, we couple the Boolean attention to the legible feed-forward layer and train an end-to-end legible-by-construction language model at benchmark parity: its feed-forward units are named set and quantifier operations throughout, and we can take a token it generates and read the named units that compose to produce it.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将注意力层中的值向量通过sigmoid函数转化为可读的逻辑检测器，并进一步提出布尔注意力变体，与可解释的前馈层结合，构建了端到端可解释的语言模型，在保持模型质量的同时实现了内部机制的可读性。
AI.motivation: 此前工作已将Transformer的前馈层重构为显式的模糊集运算（交、差、自遗忘序列量词），但注意力层仍然不透明。本文的目标是将同样的可解释思想引入注意力机制，并最终将两者结合，构建完全可解释的Transformer。
AI.method: 核心机制：注意力头的值向量经过sigmoid激活，使每个值通道成为某特征是否在token上成立的检测器，不增加参数量。进一步提出布尔变体，将值结构重构为显式的token内交集和可求补的集差。输出投影保持自由（不绑定到词汇表），通过稀疏激活和"轨上"决定性激活两种选择性压力塑造可读检测器。
AI.result: 在125M参数的五个专用注意力设计上，44%-62%的值通道成为清晰的、上下文选择的检测器。可读性随深度增加而非仅在标点符号上结晶。语言模型质量与传统基线持平。最终将布尔注意力与可读前馈层耦合，训练出端到端可解释的语言模型，其前馈单元全称为命名集合和量词操作。
AI.conclusion: 通过约束注意力头检测的内容而非写入的内容，结合选择性压力，可以在不损失模型质量的前提下使注意力机制变得可解释。最终构建的端到端可解释语言模型能够生成可追溯至命名单元的token。

title: PhenoNEST: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Ontology-Aware Multimodal Plant Phenotyping and Trait Discovery
summary: High-throughput plant phenotyping generates valuable data that often remains trapped in unstructured text and isolated RGB images. To bridge this semantic gap, we propose a framework for constructing a multimodal granular Knowledge Graph (KG) to monitor genotype-phenotype interactions across time and experiments. In this work, we focus on wheat Triticum aestivum as a representative target crop to validate our methodology across complex canopy environments. Our pipeline first distills noisy field notes to extract entities and relations, dynamically constructing the KG by converting unique instances into hierarchical class entities via RDF-typing. These graph nodes are then aligned with standardized ontologies (PO, RO, WTO) using PlantDeBERTa. To visually ground the constructed graph, a Vision-Language Model paired with a wheat-segmentation ViT generates attention-based softmaps, linking specific KG entities directly to image pixels. We introduce a central observation node Plant_Obs_Id to connect these multimodal subgraphs temporally. Evaluated on 500 curated WisWheat samples using Pointing Game accuracy, Visual Word Sense Disambiguation (VWSD), and rank-based metrics, our neuro-symbolic approach successfully maps complex field observations to a structured graph. This enables automated field note auditing, temporal stress monitoring, and precise spatial trait localization for wheat breeders.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种构建多模态颗粒度知识图谱的框架，用于监测小麦基因型-表型随时间及实验的交互作用，结合自然语言处理、视觉-语言模型和本体对齐技术，实现了从非结构化田间笔记到结构化图谱的自动映射。
AI.motivation: 高通量植物表型数据常被困于非结构化文本和孤立RGB图像中，缺乏语义关联，难以有效监测基因型-表型交互作用。
AI.method: 通过噪声田间笔记提取实体关系构建知识图谱，利用RDF-typing将实例转化为层次化类实体；使用PlantDeBERTa对齐标准本体（PO, RO, WTO）；利用视觉-语言模型和小麦分割ViT生成注意力软图，将KG实体链接到图像像素；引入Plant_Obs_Id节点实现多模态子图的时间关联。
AI.result: 在500个WisWheat样本上使用Pointing Game准确率、VWSD及排序指标评估，神经符号方法成功将复杂田间观测映射到结构化图谱。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可实现自动化田间笔记审计、时间维度胁迫监测及小麦育种中精准空间性状定位。

title: Agent Step Value: State-Transition Measurement with State-Grounded LLM Evaluators
summary: Most agent evaluations collapse a multi-step trace into a final answer, a success flag, or a trajectory-level score. These aggregates obscure the diagnostic question developers need most: which action changed the state in a useful direction? We introduce Agent Step Value (ASV), a state-transition measurement framework that scores each observed action by the change it induces in a state-grounded evaluator's distribution over fixed candidate outcomes. ASV renders redacted before/after state projections, uses a stateless LLM evaluator to assign candidate log scores, and reports both gold-free belief diagnostics and offline oracle validation metrics. A label-free rationale pass separates evaluator deliberation from one-token option scoring, preserving candidate likelihoods while exposing leakage and floor-score events. On 100 reviewed open-QA evidence-seeking tasks with live PubMed retrieval, a partially live DeepSeek actor, and DeepSeek log-probability scoring, ASV evaluates 1,100 steps and 2,200 states. Under the fixed-layout rationale-conditioned protocol, mean gold-margin gain is -2.335 (trajectory-bootstrap 95\% CI [-3.395, -1.272]), entropy movement is 0.000, and mean Bayesian surprise is 2.693. ASV therefore localizes constructive and destructive belief pivots that final-answer scores and entropy-only step metrics miss. We release the standalone ASV Eval toolkit.

AI.tldr: 提出Agent Step Value (ASV)框架，通过状态转换评估每个动作对候选结果的信念分布变化，比传统最终答案评分更能定位有用/有害的信念转折点。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体评估将多步轨迹压缩为最终答案或成功标志，掩盖了"哪个动作改变了状态"这一关键诊断问题。
AI.method: ASV通过状态投影（脱敏前后状态）、无状态LLM评估器分配候选对数分数、信念诊断与离线验证指标，以及无标签理由传递机制来分离评估推理与选项评分。
AI.result: 在100个开放QA任务、1100步和2200状态的评估中，平均黄金边际增益为-2.335，熵移动为0.000，平均贝叶斯惊奇度为2.693，能定位被最终答案分数和纯熵指标遗漏的信念转折点。
AI.conclusion: ASV能有效定位建设性和破坏性的信念转折点，弥补了传统最终答案评分和仅熵步指标不足，并开源了评估工具包。

title: WPG-MoE: Weak-Prior-Guided Dense Mixture-of-Experts for User-Level Social Media Depression Detection
summary: Online social media posts provide scalable signals for early depression screening, and recent studies mainly improve pre-classification evidence through risk-post selection, symptom grounding, and clinically informed feature construction. However, these screening-stage designs often leave final decisions to a single detector, overlooking how users heterogeneously express depressive risk after screening. A monolithic classifier must average across heterogeneous users, which may dilute localized evidence and cause misclassification, especially for non-self-disclosing users. To address this issue, we propose WPG-MoE, a weak-prior-guided dense mixture-of-experts framework built on a shared large language model (LLM) backbone. WPG-MoE derives user-level weak semantic priors to softly route users to experts matched to different evidence layouts. We formulate this process as learning using privileged information (LUPI): rich LLM-extracted structured evidence guides training-time routing, while inference retains only Patient Health Questionnaire-9 (PHQ-9) template screening and the deployable backbone. Experiments on Chinese and English datasets show that WPG-MoE outperforms strong baselines with interpretable routing behavior.

AI.tldr: 针对抑郁症筛查后单一分类器难以处理用户异质性表达的问题，提出基于弱先验引导的稠密混合专家框架WPG-MoE，利用LLM提取的结构化证据作为特权信息指导训练时路由，在中文和英文数据集上取得优于强基线方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有抑郁症筛查研究主要关注筛查阶段的风险帖子选择、症状锚定和临床特征构建，但最终决策仍由单一检测器完成，忽略了用户异质性表达（尤其是非自我披露用户），导致局部证据被稀释、分类错误。
AI.method: 提出WPG-MoE框架：1) 利用共享LLM主干提取用户级弱语义先验，将用户软路由到匹配不同证据布局的专家；2) 形式化为利用特权信息学习（LUPI），LLM提取的丰富结构化证据指导训练时路由，推理时仅保留PHQ-9模板筛查和可部署主干。
AI.result: 在中文和英文数据集上，WPG-MoE优于强基线方法，且路由行为具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过混合专家架构和特权信息学习，有效解决了抑郁症筛查中用户异质性导致的分类困难问题，为社交媒体心理健康筛查提供了新范式。

title: Unbiased Alignment for Large Language Models with Noisy Preferences
summary: The alignment of large language models with human preferences is commonly achieved through Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback or Direct Preference Optimization. However, these methods are vulnerable to the significant noise prevalent in real-world preference datasets. To address this critical issue, we present a theoretical framework for unbiased alignment, introducing the Unbiased Reward Model (URM) loss and the Unbiased Direct Preference Optimization (UDPO) loss. By mathematically correcting the distortion induced by preference noise, our novel objectives enable unbiased model training directly from noisy datasets, without requiring clean ground-truth supervision. We provide rigorous theoretical analyses demonstrating that our methods are noise-tolerant, parameter downward compatible, and classification-calibrated. Comprehensive experiments across diverse datasets demonstrate that our approaches outperform state-of-the-art baselines. Code available at: https://github.com/cswjl/unbiased-alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种理论上无偏的偏好对齐框架（URM和UDPO），通过数学修正偏好噪声，实现对噪声数据集中模型的无偏训练，无需干净标注数据。
AI.motivation: 现有RLHF和DPO方法在面对真实世界偏好数据中普遍存在的噪声时表现脆弱，亟需一种能容忍噪声且无需干净监督的无偏对齐方法。
AI.method: 提出了Unbiased Reward Model (URM)损失和Unbiased Direct Preference Optimization (UDPO)损失，通过数学上修正偏好噪声导致的扭曲，实现从噪声数据集中直接进行无偏模型训练。
AI.result: 理论分析证明了方法的噪声容忍性、参数向下兼容性和分类校准性；实验表明该方法在多个数据集上优于现有SOTA基线。
AI.conclusion: 本文为噪声环境下的偏好对齐提供了理论保障和实用方法，是无偏对齐领域的重要进展。

title: ResearchStudio-Idea: An Evidence-Grounded Research-Ideation Skill Suite from ML Conference Outcomes
summary: Large language models have made research ideation increasingly accessible, yet effective idea development requires more than generating candidate directions. Researchers must ground a problem in current literature, identify meaningful bottlenecks, differentiate from existing solutions, and evaluate risks before committing to implementation. We present ResearchStudio-Idea as a reusable skill suite for this first mile of research ideation. The suite includes Paper-Search, a standalone multi-source literature search skill; Scoop-Check, a standalone prior-art collision checker for novelty claims; and IdeaSpark, the end-to-end skill that composes evidence grounding, pattern-guided generation, collision retrieval, audit, and idea-card rendering into one workflow. IdeaSpark is constructed from a corpus of 1,947 machine learning conference papers collected from ICLR, ICML, and NeurIPS between 2021 and 2025, including Oral papers, a separately tracked high-citation subset, and rejected submissions. Analysis of these outcomes reveals 31 recurring ideation sub-patterns, consolidated into 15 reusable ideation patterns. Each pattern is operationalized as a structured card containing research contexts, bottleneck types, differentiation strategies, supporting precedents, and common failure modes. Given a research problem and an evidence bundle, IdeaSpark evaluates evidence readiness, reconstructs the surrounding research context, identifies unresolved bottlenecks, selects relevant patterns, instantiates one candidate direction, retrieves potentially conflicting prior work, and performs outcome-informed auditing. This workflow transforms reusable ideation patterns into traceable research proposals. Blind automated-judge evaluations show that IdeaSpark consistently produces stronger research proposals than no-skill and generic-skill baselines while maintaining competitive novelty.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ResearchStudio-Idea，一个可复用的技能套件，用于科研构思的"第一英里"，包含文献搜索、新颖性检查和端到端的IdeaSpark工作流，能从1,947篇ML会议论文中提炼出15种可复用的构思模式，并生成可追溯的研究提案。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型虽然使科研构思变得触手可及，但有效的科研想法开发需要将问题扎根于现有文献、识别有意义的瓶颈、与已有方案区分并评估风险，而现有方法缺乏系统化的支持。
AI.method: 从ICLR、ICML、NeurIPS（2021-2025）收集1,947篇论文，分析出31个构思子模式并整合为15个可复用模式；构建Paper-Search（多源文献搜索）、Scoop-Check（新颖性冲突检测）和IdeaSpark（端到端构思工作流）三个技能组件。
AI.result: 盲审自动评估表明，IdeaSpark生成的科研提案在质量上持续优于无技能和通用技能基线，同时保持具有竞争力的新颖性。
AI.conclusion: 将可复用的构思模式转化为可追溯的研究提案是可行的，系统化的构思套件能够有效提升科研想法的质量与可落地性。

title: Memory-Orchestrated Semantic System (MOSS): An Auditable Agentic Memory Architecture
summary: Long-term memory remains a structural weakness of AI agents. The dominant approach, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), relies on embedding-based similarity search, which is opaque by construction, difficult to audit, and bounded by the theoretical limits of vector representations. We present the Memory-Orchestrated Semantic System (MOSS), an agentic memory architecture in which the agent drives retrieval over a structured relational database. MOSS is model-agnostic, storage-agnostic, and API-agnostic: it runs on any relational engine, connects to any LLM provider (or to deterministic non-LLM processes), and deploys on any infrastructure, local or cloud. Its retrieval execution is symbolic and reproducible (once a query is formulated, no LLM participates in the retrieval loop) and every step of the system, from indexing to answer formulation, is logged and inspectable, making MOSS auditable by construction. Rather than imposing an external ontology, MOSS derives its conceptual vocabulary from the corpus itself. We report on a longitudinal deployment unique in the agentic-memory literature: a year of continuous production over an individual scholar's working corpus--a conversational corpus reaching back to October 2024 (some 44 million tokens, retroactively indexed) comprising 110,183 segments, alongside 163,494 catalogued documents, 569 inductively derived concepts, 322,662 concept annotations, and eleven metadata graphs totaling approximately five million relations--across four successive infrastructure generations. While the present case is that of a single researcher, the architecture is in no way specific to one person: it serves a team, an institution, or any entity that accumulates knowledge over time. We argue that auditable, sovereign, structurally unbounded memory is a precondition for AI agents intended to accompany a person or an organization over years rather than sessions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOSS（记忆编排语义系统），一种基于结构化关系数据库的智能体记忆架构，通过符号化检索替代RAG的嵌入相似度搜索，实现了可审计、可复现、无结构性上限的记忆管理。系统经过一年的生产环境部署验证，涵盖44M tokens、11万+片段、16万+文档、569个归纳概念和约500万关系图。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG方法存在三大缺陷：基于嵌入的相似度搜索不透明、难以审计、受限于向量表征的理论极限。长期记忆是AI智能体的结构性弱点，亟需一种可审计、主权可控、结构无界的新范式。
AI.method: MOSS采用智能体驱动的检索架构：1）模型无关（任何LLM或非LLM确定性过程）、存储无关（任何关系引擎）、API无关（任何云/本地部署）；2）检索执行符号化且可复现（查询一旦形成，LLM不再参与检索循环）；3）从索引到答案生成的每一步均可审计；4）不预设外部本体，概念词汇从语料中归纳衍生。
AI.result: 在一年连续生产部署中，系统处理了44M tokens、110,183个片段、163,494个编目文档、569个归纳概念、322,662个概念标注、11个元数据图（约500万关系），跨越四代基础设施。
AI.conclusion: 可审计、主权可控、结构无界的记忆是AI智能体在会话级之外长期陪伴用户的关键前提。MOSS架构适用于个人、团队或任何随时间积累知识的实体，为长时记忆提供了一种可落地的替代范式。

title: From Global to Local: Efficient Regional Weather Downscaling with Global Weather Foundation Model
summary: Accurate regional weather prediction requires resolving fine-scale structure while remaining consistent with global dynamics. Traditional limited area models rely on computationally expensive simulations, while many learning-based approaches frame the problem as super-resolution, overlooking statistical and physical mismatches across scales. We propose a foundation-model-driven downscaling framework that learns regional refinements of global forecasts by augmenting a pretrained weather model backbone with lightweight, multi-scale prediction heads operating directly in its latent space. Despite being trained on substantially coarser inputs, the pretrained backbone supports regional adaptation at resolutions corresponding to a two-order-of-magnitude increase in grid-cell resolution, without the need for retraining. The proposed approach uses regional numerical simulations as training targets and is evaluated not only against gridded datasets but also against ground-based weather station observations, enabling analysis of systematic biases between global reanalysis, regional simulations, and in-situ weather station observations. Our experiments show improved accuracy in comparison to NWP on most of the metrics at the fraction of computational cost. Moreover, we observe that building on a latent space of globally pre-trained weather foundation model offers better downscaling capabilities than the standard image-based super-resolution approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预训练全球天气基础模型的降尺度框架，通过在模型隐空间中添加轻量级多尺度预测头，实现对全球预报的区域精细化，无需重新训练即可显著提升分辨率，并在计算成本远低于NWP的情况下取得更好的预测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统区域天气模型计算成本高，而现有基于学习的超分辨率方法忽略了跨尺度的统计和物理不一致性，无法有效利用全球预测信息进行区域精细化。
AI.method: 在预训练的全球天气基础模型骨干网络上，添加轻量级多尺度预测头，直接在隐空间中进行区域细化，利用区域数值模拟作为训练目标。
AI.result: 在大多数指标上优于传统数值天气预报（NWP），且计算成本极低；基于全球预训练模型的隐空间降尺度效果优于标准图像超分辨率方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用全球预训练天气基础模型的隐空间能力，可以在不重新训练的情况下高效实现高分辨率区域天气预测，是一种有前景的降尺度范式。

title: Why Pure Reasoning is Not Enough: Nature as the Source of Mathematical Innovation
summary:
We advance the hypothesis that human mathematical reasoning, constrained by both the undecidability and the computational intractability of even modest logical fragments, relies fundamentally on pattern matching from domains external to pure deduction. The most prolific reservoir of such patterns is the natural world, whose physical laws and biological systems have undergone billions of years of ``pre-computation'' and already exhibit surprisingly innovative solutions. To ground this claim, we trace the history of the Fourier transform and relevant mathematics, from the vibrating string controversy to the hear equation and subsequent formalisms prevalent in mathematics. At each critical juncture, a physics problem forced the acceptance or creation of a mathematical tool that pure formal reasoning failed to anticipate or, worse, human reasoning had resisted.
  We further survey the landscape of logical complexity, from NP-hard propositional satisfiability to the non-elementary decision-procedures for monadic second-order theories, to demonstrate that even when a logic is decidable, the resources required for worst-case deduction are astronomically prohibitive. We argue that these barriers make physics-inspired pattern matching not just a historical accident but a cognitive necessity. Finally, we draw the consequence for artificial intelligence: if pure reasoning is constitutively insufficient, then any system aiming at human-level mathematical creativity must embed a vast store of cross-domain patterns rather than rely on deduction alone. This furnishes a principled justification for the enormous scale of contemporary large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出假设：人类数学推理本质上依赖从自然世界等外部领域进行的模式匹配，而非纯演绎推理，并以此为大语言模型的巨大规模提供了理论依据。
AI.motivation: 作者试图揭示人类数学推理的本质机制，并解释为何纯形式化推理在面对数学创造时存在根本性局限，进而为AI系统应具备大规模跨领域模式匹配能力提供理论支撑。
AI.method: 通过历史案例追踪（以傅里叶变换为线索，从弦振动问题到热方程），结合逻辑复杂性理论分析（从NP完全到非初等决策过程），论证纯演绎推理的不可行性，并提出自然世界作为"预计算"模式库的观点。
AI.result: 发现数学史上多个关键突破均由物理问题驱动，而非纯形式推理；逻辑复杂性的理论壁垒使得纯演绎推理在认知上不可行；自然世界经过数十亿年演化提供了丰富的"预计算"模式。
AI.conclusion: 人类数学创造性依赖于来自数学领域之外的跨领域模式匹配，任何追求人类级数学创造力的AI系统都必须嵌入大规模跨领域模式库，而非仅依赖演绎推理——这为大语言模型的海量规模提供了原则性辩护。

title: AI Wizards at EXIST 2026: Hierarchical Soft-Label Learning for Multimodal Sexism Identification in Memes
summary: We present the AI Wizards submission to EXIST 2026 for multimodal sexism identification in memes. The task is composed of three, increasingly harder subtasks. We model them hierarchically as conditional soft-label prediction over empirical annotator distributions. Our system maps fixed Gemini Embedding 2 vision-language representations through a lightweight Gated MLP trained with KL divergence and homoscedastic uncertainty weighting. Our submissions ranked first on Task 2.3 and fourth on Tasks 2.1 and 2.2 on the official Soft-Soft leaderboards. The code is available at https://github.com/NLP-AI-Wizards/EXIST-2026

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Gemini Embedding 2视觉语言表征与轻量级门控MLP的分层条件软标签预测方法，用于多模态性别歧视识别，在EXIST 2026竞赛Task 2.3取得第一名，Task 2.1和2.2取得第四名。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中的性别歧视常以多模态形式（如图文结合的模因）出现，传统方法难以有效识别其细微且主观的表达。现有标注往往包含高度分歧，需要建模软标签分布而非单一硬标签。
AI.method: 采用分层条件式软标签预测框架，利用固定Gemini Embedding 2视觉语言表征作为输入，通过轻量级Gated MLP进行预测，训练时使用KL散度损失与异方差不确定性加权（homoscedastic uncertainty weighting）来联合优化多个子任务。
AI.result: 在EXIST 2026竞赛官方Soft-Soft排行榜上，Task 2.3排名第一，Task 2.1和Task 2.2排名第四。
AI.conclusion: 该工作验证了预训练视觉语言模型结合轻量化门控网络与软标签学习策略在多模态性别歧视识别任务上的有效性，代码已开源。

title: Compressing the Validation Bottleneck: An Agentic Self-Driving Lab for Scientific Discovery
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 AI for Science Workshop ; AI Scientist Competition
summary: Agentic AI-for-Science can automate ideation, planning, and analysis, but final validation still depends on real experiments. A self-driving lab (SDL) can execute those experiments, yet the loop still has bottlenecks: the agent may spend too many rounds on low-value experiments, or each round may require a high-cost experiment. We target these two physical bottlenecks with one agent. First, a prior-aware agentic DOE loop uses domain knowledge and past results to propose feasible and informative next experiments, reducing trials-to-target. Second, a cost-aware surrogate agent predicts high-cost, high-resolution measurements from low-cost, low-resolution measurements. It chooses between a high- and a low-cost measurement based on the predicted uncertainty. We examine these directions in the biology and materials domains, respectively. Together, under a single agent, these components aim to accelerate the SDL loop by reducing both the number of loops and the cost per experiment.

AI.tldr: 提出一个双重优化智能体，通过先验感知的实验设计（减少实验轮次）和成本感知的替代模型（降低单次实验成本），加速自驱动实验室的物理瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 自驱动实验室（SDL）中，智能体可能花费过多轮次在低价值实验上，或每轮实验成本高昂，这两个物理瓶颈限制了AI-for-Science的闭环效率。
AI.method: 1) 先验感知的代理DOE循环：利用领域知识和历史结果提出可行且信息量大的下一步实验，减少达到目标所需的试验次数。2) 成本感知的替代智能体：从低成本低分辨率测量预测高成本高分辨率测量，根据预测不确定性在高低成本测量之间进行选择。
AI.result: 在生物学领域验证了先验感知DOE减少试验轮次的效果；在材料科学领域验证了成本感知替代模型降低单次实验成本的效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过单一智能体同时减少循环次数和单次实验成本，加速自驱动实验室的整体运行效率。

title: UI-MOPD: Multi-Platform On-Policy Distillation for Continual GUI Agent Learning
summary:
Recent advances in multimodal foundation models and agent systems have driven GUI agents from single-platform task execution toward cross-platform interaction. However, building multi-platform GUI agents remains challenging. On one hand, high-quality and executable cross-platform interaction trajectories are still scarce, and existing data often suffer from limited platform coverage. On the other hand, different platforms exhibit distinct interaction conventions, making joint or continual training prone to behavioral pattern mixing, platform-specific capability degradation, and catastrophic forgetting. To address these challenges, we construct Uni-GUI, a high-quality cross-platform GUI interaction dataset, and propose UI-MOPD, the first method that incorporates multi-teacher on-policy distillation into continual learning for GUI agents. UI-MOPD dynamically selects a platform-specific teacher according to the current environment and transfers platform-specific behavioral priors to a shared policy through platform-conditioned distillation, enabling adaptation to new platforms while preserving capabilities on existing ones. Experiments on OSWorld and MobileWorld show that UI-MOPD achieves task success rates of 38.2% and 12.0%, respectively, demonstrating its effectiveness in balancing cross-platform capability retention and new-platform adaptation.
  Project page: https://elispectre.github.io/UI-MOPD/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出跨平台GUI代理数据集Uni-GUI和持续学习方法UI-MOPD，通过多教师在线蒸馏实现新平台适应与旧平台能力保持，在OSWorld和MobileWorld上分别达到38.2%和12.0%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI代理数据跨平台覆盖有限，且不同平台交互惯例差异导致联合训练或持续训练时出现行为模式混淆、平台特定能力退化及灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 构建高质量跨平台GUI交互数据集Uni-GUI；提出UI-MOPD方法，利用多教师在线蒸馏——根据当前环境动态选择平台特定教师，通过平台条件化蒸馏将行为先验迁移到共享策略中，实现持续学习。
AI.result: 在OSWorld上任务成功率达38.2%，在MobileWorld上达12.0%，验证了跨平台能力保持与新平台适应的平衡有效性。
AI.conclusion: UI-MOPD通过多教师在线蒸馏有效解决了跨平台GUI代理的灾难性遗忘和能力退化问题，为多平台GUI代理的持续学习提供了可行方案。

title: Statistically Meaningful Geometry (SMG) Beyond the Euclidean Paradigm, with Application to Generative AI
summary: Conventional uniform convergence bounds and empirical risk minimization break down in massive over-parameterized models, such as large language transformers and biological sequence networks.
