Validation shows that this architecture eliminates semantic context drift, prevents database compilation crashes, and improves factual adherence to backend clinical repositories. These results support Medi-Gemma as a safer pattern for LLM-based clinical decision support where structured data fidelity, retrieval grounding, and deterministic safeguards are essential.

AI.tldr: Medi-Gemma 提出了一种解耦的临床决策支持系统架构，通过分离感知与数据编排、引入确定性安全模块和真实注入机制，解决了LLM在临床场景中的幻觉、推理弱和检索遗漏问题。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在临床部署中存在结构幻觉、对表格数据的确定性推理能力弱、以及向量检索中的遗漏问题，现有系统缺乏可靠的安全保障。
AI.method: 提出解耦框架（Medi-Gemma），包含ClinicalOrchestrator协调的多阶段流水线：DataManager处理非结构化EMR数据、IntentRouter进行层次化意图路由、Ground Truth Injection Module注入真实临床状态快照、ProtocolManager和SafetyVerifier提供确定性安全合规与输出过滤。
AI.result: 该系统消除了语义上下文漂移，防止了数据库编译崩溃，提高了对后端临床知识库的事实遵循度。
AI.conclusion: Medi-Gemma为基于LLM的临床决策支持提供了一种更安全的架构模式，尤其适用于需要结构化数据保真度、检索接地和确定性安全保障的场景。

title: Aligning Language Models with Selective Prediction
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026 Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond Workshop, Project Page: https://sun-umn.github.io/RLSR
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as critical decision-making components in high-stakes real-world AI systems, rendering LLM reliability a foremost practical concern. In this paper, we focus on enhancing LLM reliability through selective prediction (SP), a strategy that allows an LLM to only predict for inputs where it is likely to be correct (i.e., coverage) and hence reduce the error rate (i.e., risk) on that portion of inputs -- flagging the remaining inputs for future human discretion. In other words, SP improves LLM reliability by balancing the risk-coverage trade-off and enabling seamless human-AI collaboration. To integrate SP into LLMs, we focus on the LLM post-training alignment stage and propose to align LLMs with SP performance metrics, in contrast with existing LLM alignment methods that focus primarily on correctness or calibration metrics. Specifically, we propose a novel alignment framework, Reinforcement Learning for Selection Reward (RLSR), which targets the area under the risk-coverage curve (AURC) -- a popular SP performance metric -- as its alignment objective. RLSR achieves substantially better risk-coverage trade-off compared to multiple alignment baselines on both in-domain and out-of-domain tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RLSR框架，通过在LLM后训练对齐阶段优化风险-覆盖曲线下面积（AURC）指标，实现选择性预测（SP）以提升LLM可靠性，在领域内和外任务上均优于现有对齐方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在高风险AI系统中作为关键决策组件，其可靠性至关重要。现有对齐方法主要关注正确性或校准指标，忽视了通过选择性预测平衡风险-覆盖权衡来提升可靠性的潜力。
AI.method: 提出强化学习选择奖励（RLSR）框架，在LLM后训练对齐阶段将以风险-覆盖曲线下面积（AURC）为优化目标，通过选择性预测机制允许模型仅对高置信度输入做出预测，将不确定输入交由人工处理。
AI.result: RLSR在领域内和领域外任务上均取得了显著优于多种对齐基线的风险-覆盖权衡表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过将对齐目标从正确性/校准指标转向选择性预测性能指标，可以有效提升LLM在高风险场景下的可靠性，实现更优的人机协作。

title: STAPO: Selective Trajectory-Aware Policy Optimization for LLM Agent Training
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) is the dominant paradigm for training Large Language Model (LLM) agents on long-horizon tasks. However, sparse and delayed rewards often lead to trajectory neglect, in which agents lose focus on the task goal and interaction history at intermediate steps. Prior work has explored step-level supervision using Shannon-entropy-based uncertainty signals, which conflate inherent state complexity with agent confidence and therefore provide unreliable estimates of decision reliability. To address this issue, we propose normalized entropy, which measures confidence deviations relative to an agent's average behavior under a given state, thereby strengthening the association between low-quality actions and trajectory neglect. Building on this insight, we introduce Selective Trajectory-Aware Policy Optimization (STAPO), a hierarchical group-based RL framework. STAPO leverages normalized entropy to locate outlier steps associated with trajectory neglect and optimizes them via a joint mechanism of trajectory-aware reward and trajectory-independent penalty, enhancing trajectory awareness while preserving training stability. Extensive experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Search-Augmented QA demonstrate that STAPO achieves state-of-the-art performance while substantially alleviating trajectory neglect, validating its effectiveness and robustness for agentic tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出归一化熵和STAPO框架，通过检测并优化轨迹忽视步骤，在ALFWorld等任务上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RL训练LLM agent时存在轨迹忽视问题，而基于Shannon熵的不确定性信号无法可靠估计决策可靠性，因为其混淆了状态固有能力与模型置信度。
AI.method: 提出归一化熵（相对于平均行为的置信度偏差）来定位异常步骤，并设计STAPO框架：基于层次分组的RL方法，联合使用轨迹感知奖励和轨迹无关惩罚来优化被识别出的异常步骤。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和Search-Augmented QA上达到SOTA性能，显著缓解了轨迹忽视问题。
AI.conclusion: STAPO有效验证了归一化熵和层次分组优化在提升agent长序列任务中的轨迹感知能力与鲁棒性方面的价值。

title: MTEB-PT: A Text Embedding Benchmark for Brazilian Portuguese
comment: 18 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables. Code (Apache-2.0): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21087217 . Results dataset (CC-BY-4.0): https://doi.org/10.57967/hf/9377 . Leaderboard: https://huggingface.co/spaces/mteb-pt/leaderboard
summary: Text embeddings for Portuguese have no dedicated benchmark: evaluation rests on translated corpora such as English MS MARCO or on thin multilingual coverage, with native tasks scattered and unconsolidated. We introduce MTEB-PT, a benchmark of 22 native Brazilian-Portuguese tasks across seven categories (classification, multilabel classification, pair classification, semantic textual similarity, clustering, retrieval, and reranking), admitting only data created or found in Portuguese and excluding translations by construction. We evaluate 93 models spanning 23M to 27B parameters: 73 open-weight and 20 closed commercial APIs. Alongside the leaderboard we report a statistical layer for every headline comparison: per-task bootstrap confidence intervals, paired-bootstrap significance, a task- and instance-level discrimination analysis (how sharply each task separates models) adapted from Item Response Theory, and a cross-leaderboard correlation. Three findings stand out. The benchmark cleanly separates about a dozen tiers of models, though the top six are statistically too close to order. An openly licensed, self-hostable model reaches that leading tier, so strong Portuguese embedding quality does not require a commercial API. And a model's rank on the global multilingual leaderboard predicts its Portuguese rank only moderately (Spearman rho = 0.75 over 55 shared models; one model ranks 3rd there and 49th here), so a native benchmark measures something the multilingual boards do not. We release every task, our code, and a public leaderboard, so practitioners can choose Portuguese embedding models on native evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MTEB-PT，一个包含22项原生巴西葡萄牙语任务的嵌入模型评测基准，排除了翻译语料。评测了93个模型（73个开源+20个商业API），发现：模型可被清晰划分为十几个层级，但前六名无显著差异；开源模型可达顶级水平；多语言排行榜对葡萄牙语排名的预测能力中等（Spearman rho=0.75）。
AI.motivation: 葡萄牙语文本嵌入缺乏专用基准，现有评估依赖翻译语料（如英文MS MARCO）或零散的多语言覆盖、原生任务分散且未整合，因此需要构建一个专门面向巴西葡萄牙语的、仅包含原生数据的评测基准。
AI.method: 构建MTEB-PT基准，包含22项原生巴西葡萄牙语任务，覆盖7个类别（分类、多标签分类、配对分类、语义文本相似度、聚类、检索、重排序），排除翻译语料。评估93个模型（73个开源、20个商业API），并引入统计层：每任务bootstrap置信区间、配对bootstrap显著性检验、基于项目反应理论的任务区分度分析，以及跨排行榜相关性分析。
AI.result: 1) 基准可清晰区分约12个模型层级，但前六名统计上无显著差异；2) 开源自托管模型可达到顶级水平，无需依赖商业API；3) 多语言排行榜排名预测葡萄牙语排名的能力中等（Spearman rho=0.75），存在一个模型在那排名第3、在此排名第49的极端案例。
AI.conclusion: MTEB-PT提供了基于原生证据的葡萄牙语嵌入模型选择依据，证明了原生基准能够测量多语言排行榜无法衡量的信息，并公开了所有任务、代码和排行榜供实践者使用。

title: WeightCLIP: Aligning Datasets and Models for Weight Space Learning
summary: Weight space learning aims to learn representations of neural network (NN) weights, enabling different downstream tasks. Existing approaches show promising performance, but lacking a way to shape these weight-space representations using information about the datasets the models were trained on, thus limiting downstream applications. We propose WeightCLIP, a method for learning a dataset-aligned latent space for neural networks, where datasets information is induced during training. The NNs are encoded as latent representations using an autoencoder, while dataset samples are encoded using a dataset encoder. The two representations are aligned using a contrastive objective, effectively reshaping the weight-space representations according to the datasets. We demonstrate that such representations can be used for different downstream tasks, including mapping dataset information to a weight-space representation that decode to strong models. In addition, we introduce a latent refinement process for generating models that outperforms standard fine-tuning. Overall, our results demonstrate that explicitly incorporating dataset information improves what can be achieved with weight-space representations across retrieval, generation, and refinement. Code will be available at https://github.com/HSG-AIML/WeightCLIP.

AI.tldr: WeightCLIP提出了一种将神经网络权重表示与数据集信息对齐的对比学习方法，通过自编码器编码网络权重、数据集编码器编码数据样本，利用对比目标对齐两者表征，从而在下游任务（检索、生成、微调）中取得更优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有权重空间学习方法未能利用训练数据集的信息来塑造权重表征，限制了下游应用的可能性。
AI.method: 使用自编码器编码神经网络权重，同时使用数据集编码器编码数据集样本，通过对比学习目标对齐两种表征，使权重空间表征融入数据集信息。
AI.result: 在检索、生成和微调等下游任务中，显式引入数据集信息提升了权重空间表征的性能；引入潜在精炼过程可生成优于标准微调的模型。
AI.conclusion: 显式融入数据集信息能够显著改善权重空间表征在多种下游任务中的表现，包括检索、生成和模型精炼。

title: Quantum-Inspired Harmonic Decision Models: A Computational Framework for Music Generation
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures. Preprint. Code and evaluation data available at GitHub
summary:
This paper introduces a quantum-inspired computational framework for harmonic decision-making in music. The proposed approach formulates harmonization as an optimization problem within a structured combinatorial space, where multiple candidate chord sequences are evaluated under interacting musical constraints. The model combines an interference-based harmonization stage with a classical optimization procedure grounded in tonal harmony. The quantum-inspired component enables the parallel consideration of multiple harmonic alternatives, while the classical stage refines the resulting sequences to ensure structural coherence and stylistic plausibility.
  The framework is evaluated on selected musical examples, including Autumn Leaves and It's a Long Way to Tipperary. Quantitative analysis shows that the optimization stage significantly reduces chord density, increases harmonic stability, and improves functional organization. At the same time, expert evaluation highlights the importance of stylistic context, demonstrating that increased harmonic complexity is not always perceived as more natural. The results suggest that harmonic generation can be interpreted as a structured decision-making process in a constrained search space. The proposed approach provides a computational model that integrates domain-specific knowledge with an interference-based search mechanism.
  Although preliminary, this work indicates that quantum-inspired methods may offer a useful framework for modeling complex decision processes in creative domains such as music. The proposed framework contributes to ongoing research on quantum-inspired models of cognition and decision-making in complex biological and creative systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于量子启发式计算框架的音乐和声决策方法，将和声编排建模为约束组合空间中的优化问题，结合干扰搜索与经典优化，实验表明该方法能有效降低和弦密度、提升和声稳定性，但专家评估指出并非越复杂越自然。
AI.motivation: 将音乐和声生成形式化为一种结构化的决策过程，在约束组合空间中寻求最优和弦序列，并通过量子启发式方法并行考虑多种和声可能性，以克服传统方法在处理复杂音乐约束时的局限性。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：第一阶段基于量子启发式干扰机制并行搜索多种候选和弦序列；第二阶段通过融合调性和声知识的经典优化过程对序列进行精炼，确保结构连贯性与风格合理性。
AI.result: 在《Autumn Leaves》等示例上，量化分析显示优化阶段显著降低了和弦密度、提升了和声稳定性与功能组织性；专家评估则发现，和声复杂性增加并不总能提升自然度，风格上下文至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 量子启发式方法有望为音乐等创意领域的复杂决策过程提供有用建模框架，但仍属初步探索，需进一步研究其在认知与复杂生物系统中的应用。

title: Wrong Before Right: Late Rescue and Interface Failure in Aligned Language Models
comment: 16 pages, 10 figures. Code to be released
summary: We study how correctness is assembled inside aligned language models, not only whether the final answer is right. Using layer-wise difference-in-differences (DiD) trajectories over polarity-controlled minimal pairs, we identify the wrong-dip: in mid layers (25-90% depth), internal preference transiently commits to the incorrect answer and is rescued only by late-layer correction. We verify this causally with patchscope-style activation transplantation across 17 models, three families, and 64x scale (0.5B-32B). Four findings follow. (1) Alignment amplification of the causal wrong-dip is recipe-specific and emergent: it emerges at 3B in Qwen2.5, remains high, and peaks at 32B (paired t up to 9.7), reverses in Llama-3-8B (t=-2.31), and sits between for Mistral-7B. (2) The dip predicts real compression failures: high-dip items are 3-7x more likely to flip under late-layer low-rank compression, block dropping, or structured pruning, while quantization flips are dip-blind, a double dissociation confirmed by late-layer ablation. (3) The dip is trainable: a LoRA fine-tune with a mid-layer wrong-margin penalty matches output-only SFT accuracy while cutting the causal dip by 67-70% and improving compression robustness; output-only SFT worsens the causal dip by up to 2.8x at perfect surface accuracy. (4) With controlled readouts, the phenomenon survives natural-language I/O: dip stratification of structural-damage failures is significant on naturalistic vignettes, and free-form fragility separates into a dip-auditable late-rescue layer and a dip-blind interface layer. Together, output-level correctness can hide a late-rescue process that governs compression risk, post-training quality, and evaluation distortion.

AI.tldr: 本文发现对齐语言模型在中间层（25-90%深度）会暂时性地偏向错误答案，直到后期才修正，这种现象称为"wrong-dip"。该现象具有因果性，能预测压缩失败，可通过训练缓解，且在自然语言输入下依然存在。
AI.motivation: 以往研究只关注最终答案是否正确，忽略了模型内部正确性是如何逐步构建的。本文希望揭示对齐语言模型内部的"正确性组装"过程。
AI.method: 采用逐层差分中的差分（DiD）轨迹分析极性控制的最小对，结合patchscope激活移植进行因果验证。在17个模型、3个系列、0.5B-32B规模上进行实验。
AI.result: (1) wrong-dip的因果性随模型规模和对齐方法变化；(2) wrong-dip可预测压缩失败（低秩压缩、丢弃块、结构化剪枝下的翻转风险高3-7倍），但与量化无关；(3) LoRA微调可减少67-70%的因果dip并提升压缩鲁棒性；(4) wrong-dip在自然语言输入下依然存在。
AI.conclusion: 输出层面的正确性可能掩盖了内部的"晚期修正"过程，该过程决定了压缩风险、后训练质量和评估偏差。仅仅关注最终答案的正确性是不够的。

title: Teacher Supervision over Representation Equivalence Classes
summary: Knowledge distillation is usually framed as a choice of what to match in the teacher - its logits, hidden features, or sample relations - which presupposes that the teacher's representation has absolute coordinates to match. It does not: a pretrained representation is identifiable only up to an orthogonal-and-isotropic-scaling equivalence class, so a student should learn the teacher's equivalence class, not its features. The organizing fact is that capability is the teacher's output function, a class invariant that factors through the quotient by the class action, so an objective recovers capability exactly when it is defined there. This makes absolute feature matching ill-posed, and admissible supervision a matter of targeting class invariants (Gram structure, CKA, principal subspaces) or aligning coordinates first, unifying feature matching, relational distillation, alignment, and grafting in one geometric account. We validate our framework on Qwen2.5 and Llama-3.1. A restoration study recovers a corrupted model's representation (CKA ~ 0.99) but not its capability, and an ablation isolates the cause: output-function (logit) matching drives capability, while matching hidden representations aligns geometry without restoring function. Recovery is confined to the corpus-covered region, and a graft study confirms that boundary overlap predicts transplant success but is necessary, not sufficient.

AI.tldr: 本文指出教师模型表示仅具有正交等距缩放等价类意义，知识蒸馏应匹配输出的类不变量（如Gram结构、CKA、主子空间），而非绝对特征；通过Qwen2.5和Llama-3.1实验证明：仅匹配logit恢复能力，匹配隐藏表示仅对齐几何却不恢复功能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法假设教师表示有绝对坐标，但实际上预训练表示只具有正交等距缩放等价类意义，因此绝对特征匹配是病态的。
AI.method: 提出几何统一框架：将蒸馏目标定义为匹配输出函数（类不变量），包括Gram结构、CKA、主子空间等，或先坐标对齐再匹配。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5和Llama-3.1上，恢复被损坏模型表示（CKA~0.99）但能力未恢复；消融实验证明仅有logit匹配能恢复能力，隐藏表示匹配仅对齐几何。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏应关注输出函数（类不变量）而非绝对特征匹配，能力恢复局限于语料覆盖区域，边界重叠是移植成功的必要非充分条件。

title: Toward Trustworthy Large Language Model Agents in Healthcare
summary: Healthcare appointment scheduling remains a persistent operational bottleneck, driven by manual coordination, fragmented legacy systems, and high administrative overhead. These inefficiencies constrain provider availability and degrade patient access to care. This paper presents CareConnect, a safety-first conversational agent for healthcare logistics automation that leverages large language model (LLM) function calling, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and layered deterministic safety guardrails. The system orchestrates eight domain-specific tools to support appointment booking, modification, cancellation, and facility information retrieval, while enforcing strict scope constraints that prohibit medical advice or diagnosis. Safety-critical situations are handled through deterministic short-circuit mechanisms for emergency detection and medical intent refusal. We evaluate CareConnect on a comprehensive benchmark of 680 task-oriented scenarios spanning end-to-end workflows, multi-turn interactions, and edge cases. Experimental results demonstrate a 91.8% task completion rate with a median per-request latency of 2.2 seconds, 96.0% safety compliance on the dedicated safety-critical evaluation subset, and an average operational cost of $0.0324 per appointment, yielding a significant cost reduction compared to manual human scheduling. These findings show that carefully scoped and rigorously safeguarded LLM-based agents can reliably automate complex healthcare operational workflows while maintaining safety guarantees and achieving substantial cost efficiency. The source code and system implementation are publicly available at https://github.com/Hadi-Hsn/CareConnect.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 CareConnect，一个基于大语言模型的安全优先医疗对话代理，用于自动化预约调度，在680个任务场景的评估中实现了91.8%的任务完成率和96.0%的安全合规率，每次预约成本仅0.0324美元。
AI.motivation: 医疗预约调度长期存在手动协调、遗留系统碎片化和管理开销高等运营瓶颈，导致医疗服务可及性下降。现有方法缺乏安全可靠的自动化方案。
AI.method: CareConnect 结合了 LLM 函数调用、检索增强生成（RAG）和分层确定性安全护栏。系统编排8个领域专用工具支持预约全流程操作，并通过严格的 scope 约束禁止医疗建议和诊断，采用确定性短路机制处理紧急检测和医疗意图拒绝等安全关键场景。
AI.result: 在680个面向任务的场景中，任务完成率91.8%，中位数延迟2.2秒，安全合规率96.0%，每次预约平均成本0.0324美元，相比人工调度大幅降低。
AI.conclusion: 精心划定范围并严格安全防护的 LLM 智能体能够在维持安全保证和实现显著成本效益的前提下，可靠地自动化复杂的医疗运营工作流程。

title: Retroactive Chain-of-Thought (RetroCoT): Forensic Reconstruction Prompts as a Safety Diagnostic Across Model Generations
summary: Safety alignment in large language models is typically evaluated against direct, imperative harmful requests. We show that this alignment is highly conditioned on pragmatic register: models that refuse a direct request frequently comply when the same underlying objective is expressed through a different communicative stance. This suggests that current alignment policies are not invariant to semantic equivalence, but remain sensitive to how a request is pragmatically framed. We introduce Retroactive Chain-of-Thought (RetroCoT), a single-turn attack that reframes harmful requests as forensic reconstruction tasks. Rather than requesting harmful instructions directly, RetroCoT presupposes that the harmful outcome has already occurred and asks the model, acting as a forensic analyst, to reconstruct in reverse the causal chain that produced it. On AdvBench (n=50), RetroCoT achieves attach success rate of 58% on gpt-4o and 52% on gpt-4o-mini, compared with direct-request baselines of 0% and 4%, respectively. We further identify a pronounced generation gap: GPT-5-family models refuse RetroCoT entirely, explicitly identifying the reconstruction premise in their refusal rationales, consistent with explicit coverage of this reconstruction register. However, this robustness does not generalize across pragmatic forms. A single adversarial feedback turn presenting an existing forensic reconstruction response alongside evaluator critique raises ASR from 0% to 48% on GPT-5.4-mini and from 58% to 94% on GPT-4o; a control condition omitting the fabricated low score achieves 85% on GPT-5.4-mini, indicating that the operative element is pragmatic continuation within the established forensic frame rather than score manipulation. These results suggest that frontier-model alignment remains conditioned on pragmatic framing rather than semantic intent, and that new pragmatic registers can continue to expose a...

AI.tldr: 本文发现大语言模型的安全对齐高度依赖于语用框架（pragmatic register），而非语义等价性。作者提出RetroCoT攻击方法，通过将有害请求重构为法医逆向重建任务，显著提升了攻击成功率。进一步发现即使最先进的GPT-5系列模型虽能防御RetroCoT，但通过单轮对抗反馈可再次突破，说明前沿模型的对齐仍受语用框架条件化。
AI.motivation: 现有安全对齐评估多采用直接、命令式的有害请求，忽视了语用框架（pragmatic register）对模型行为的影响。作者旨在揭示：模型的安全对齐并非语义不变（semantic invariance），而是高度依赖于请求的语用表达方式。
AI.method: 提出Retroactive Chain-of-Thought (RetroCoT) 攻击，一种单轮攻击方法。将有害请求重构为法医逆向重建任务：预设有害结果已发生，要求模型以法医分析师身份逆向重构导致该结果的因果链。此外，还引入单轮对抗反馈（adversarial feedback）方法，在已建立的法医框架内提供伪造的助手回答与评估者批评。
AI.result: 在AdvBench（n=50）上，RetroCoT对gpt-4o攻击成功率为58%，gpt-4o-mini为52%（直接请求基线分别为0%和4%）。GPT-5系列模型直接拒绝RetroCoT，但单轮对抗反馈将GPT-5.4-mini的ASR从0%提升至48%，GPT-4o从58%提升至94%。控制实验（移除伪造低分）仍达85%，表明起效因素是语用延续而非分数操纵。
AI.conclusion: 前沿模型的安全对齐仍然受语用框架条件化，而非基于语义意图。新的语用框架可以持续暴露对齐漏洞，当前的对齐策略需要超越直接请求范式，考虑更广泛的语用变体。

title: Differentiate the Evaluator, Not the Program: An Efficient Runtime Representation for Neuro-Symbolic Learning
summary:
AI systems increasingly propose executable scientific models whose value depends on both their symbolic structure and their fitted continuous parameters. This makes parameter calibration the bottleneck of program-and-parameter co-search: an outer loop can generate thousands of candidate programs, but each needs an inner gradient-based optimization before it can be assessed. Staging each candidate into its own differentiable graph makes individual models fast but sacrifices the program-as-data property that keeps search fluid; interpreter-based approaches preserve programs as runtime data but pay interpreter overhead that dominates the numerical work.
  We present the Native Differentiable Virtual Machine (NDVM), a runtime representation that differentiates executable programs without compiling each candidate into a separate graph. NDVM separates symbolic structure from differentiable numeric state: tags, symbols, environments, and control remain native runtime data, while numeric payloads live in dense batched buffers with exact reverse-mode gradients recorded along the realized execution trace, so one evaluator walk is amortized across large populations of parameter vectors. A locked cost model of a real differentiable self-hosted Scheme interpreter motivates the design. We realize NDVM as a native runtime with forward and gradient equivalence to the reference backend, about 60x per-lane batch amortization, near-linear multicore scaling, and two independent front ends. In fixed-budget co-search over LLM-proposed programs, NDVM reaches high-quality solutions about 24x sooner in wall-clock time, suggesting runtime differentiation as a practical systems foundation for scientific discovery workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出原生可微分虚拟机(NDVM)，一种支持程序与参数协同搜索的高效运行时系统。NDVM将符号结构与可微分数值状态分离，无需为每个候选程序构建独立计算图即可自动微分，通过批量化参数向量实现约60倍的单通道批处理加速，在固定预算协同搜索中达到24倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有的程序与参数协同搜索面临两难境地：若将每个候选程序构建为独立可微图，单个模型快但牺牲了"程序即数据"的灵活性；若采用解释器方式保留程序运行时数据，解释器开销又主导了计算负担。需要一种既能保持程序可操作性又能高效支持可微参数优化的运行时表示。
AI.method: NDVM通过将符号结构（标签、符号、环境、控制流）与可微分数值状态分离来实现：符号部分保持原生运行时数据，数值负载存放在密集批处理缓冲区中，沿实际执行轨迹记录精确的反向模式梯度。这样一次求值器遍历就能摊销到大量参数向量的种群上。
AI.result: NDVM在单通道批处理加速上达到约60倍，支持近线性多核扩展，提供两个独立前端。在固定预算的LLM生成程序协同搜索中，NDVM相较传统方法在墙上时间上提前约24倍达到高质量解。
AI.conclusion: 运行时微分技术可以作为科学发现工作流的实用系统基础，NDVM表明通过合理的系统设计可以在不牺牲灵活性的前提下实现高效的可微程序自动微分。

title: Diffusion-Guided Uncertainty-Aware Delayed Policy Optimization
summary: Reinforcement learning in real world environments often suffers from severe performance degradation due to delayed feedback. Existing approaches typically mitigate performance degradation caused by observation delays by constructing augmented states or predicting the true states. However, these methods often overlook the inherent discrepancy between delayed state and true states induced by stochastic MDP. We theoretically prove the existence of such a discrepancy and show that it leads to the degradation of the optimal policy. To address this challenge, we propose Diffusion Guided Uncertainty Aware Delayed Policy Optimization (DUPO). Our method explicitly models the relationship between delayed state message and the current state using a diffusion model, and leverages the resulting discrepancy estimates to weight delayed policies. Extensive experiments on continuous robotic control tasks with multiple stochastic delays demonstrate that DUPO consistently outperforms existing methods and remains effective even under long and random delay scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DUPO方法，利用扩散模型建模延迟状态与当前状态的关系，通过不确定性感知加权来缓解强化学习中观测延迟导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过构建增强状态或预测真实状态来缓解观测延迟，但忽略了随机MDP中延迟状态与真实状态之间的固有差异，该差异会导致最优策略性能下降。论文从理论上证明了这种差异的存在及其负面影响。
AI.method: 提出DUPO（扩散引导的不确定性感知延迟策略优化）：1）利用扩散模型显式建模延迟状态信息与当前状态之间的关系；2）利用扩散模型得到的差异估计来加权延迟策略。
AI.result: 在多个随机延迟的连续机器人控制任务上，DUPO一致优于现有方法，即使在长延迟和随机延迟场景下仍能保持有效性。
AI.conclusion: 从理论上证明了延迟状态与真实状态间差异的存在及对最优策略的损害，并验证了DUPO方法在应对随机MDP中观测延迟问题上的优越性和鲁棒性。

title: FormalRx: Rectify and eXamine Semantic Failures in Autoformalization
comment: 44 pages, 5 figures. Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: The veracious semantic alignment in autoformalization is significant for formal mathematical reasoning. However, existing evaluations provide only opaque binary verdicts or scalar scores, offering no interpretable insight into where or why translations fail. This opacity severely limits both human understanding and automated system improvement. To bridge this gap, we introduce FormalRx, a comprehensive diagnostic evaluation framework that transforms autoformalization assessment from black-box judgments into actionable feedback. At its core is SCI Error Taxonomy, a hierarchical classification scheme decomposing autoformalization errors into 28 distinct categories with strict priority ordering. Building on this taxonomy, FormalRx provides four critical diagnostic capabilities: alignment verdicts, error categorization, error localization, and correction. We instantiate the framework with a diagnostic model FormalRx-8B, trained on 56,287 NL-FL pairs with fine-grained diagnostic annotations, and release FormalRx-Test as the first fine-grained diagnostic benchmark. FormalRx-8B achieves F1-scores of 0.88 (verdict) and 0.71 (categorization), along with accuracies of 0.75 (localization) and 0.73 (correction), substantially outperforming both general-purpose LLMs and specialized baselines. By connecting evaluation with actionable insights, FormalRx enables systematic diagnosis and improvement of autoformalization systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FormalRx框架，将自动形式化评估从黑盒判断转变为可操作反馈，核心是包含28类错误分层的SCI Error Taxonomy，并提供对齐判定、错误分类、定位和修正四种诊断能力。训练的FormalRx-8B模型在多个任务上显著优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有自动形式化评估仅提供不透明的二元判定或标量分数，无法提供可解释的翻译失败位置和原因，严重限制了人类理解和系统改进。
AI.method: 提出FormalRx诊断评估框架，核心是SCI Error Taxonomy（28类分层错误分类体系，严格优先级排序）；提供四种诊断能力（对齐判定、错误分类、定位、修正）；训练FormalRx-8B诊断模型（基于56,287个NL-FL对及细粒度标注）。
AI.result: FormalRx-8B在判定F1=0.88、分类F1=0.71、定位准确率0.75、修正准确率0.73，全面超越通用LLM和专用基线。
AI.conclusion: FormalRx通过将评估与可操作洞察连接，实现了自动形式化系统的系统诊断与改进。

title: When Geometry Aligns: Dihedral Hidden-State Transformations in UNet, ViT, and DiT Architectures
comment: Accepted at the Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs), 2026
summary: Diffusion architectures now encompass convolutional UNets as well as transformer-based designs such as Diffusion Transformers (DiTs), inspired by Vision Transformers (ViTs), yet the effects of structured geometric perturbations within these architectures remain poorly understood. We study this question through a unified framework that applies reflection-based elements of the dihedral group to intermediate hidden states as controlled internal interventions, contrasting geometrically consistent and inconsistent variants. Using activation-level diagnostics, including Self-Consistency Shift (SCS), Activation Mass Scatter (AMS), and Drift, we analyze feature stability and geometric drift. We find that consistent transformations improve stability, while inconsistent ones induce predictable, architecture-specific failures. In the main Stable Diffusion 2.1 U-Net study, we evaluate seven intervention modes over three seeds and complement the internal diagnostics with image-level FID, KID, CLIP score, and LPIPS diversity. Taken together with supporting ViT and controlled DiT analyses, these results establish geometric consistency as a key principle for stable hidden-state interventions in spatially structured vision and diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了扩散架构（包括卷积UNet和基于Transformer的DiT）中隐藏状态的几何变换干预，发现几何一致性变换能提升特征稳定性，而不一致性则导致可预测的架构特定故障。
AI.motivation: 扩散架构（UNet、DiT）中结构化几何扰动的影响尚不明确，现有研究缺乏对隐藏状态层面几何变换干预的系统理解。
AI.method: 通过统一框架，对中间隐藏状态施加基于二面体群反射元素的受控内部干预，使用SCS、AMS、Drift等激活级诊断指标分析特征稳定性，并在Stable Diffusion 2.1 UNet中结合FID、KID、CLIP score、LPIPS等图像级指标进行评估。
AI.result: 几何一致变换提升稳定性，不一致变换导致可预测的架构特定故障；在UNet、ViT、DiT中均验证了这一原则。
AI.conclusion: 几何一致性是空间结构化视觉和扩散模型中隐藏状态稳定干预的关键原则。

title: ASSEMCAD: Production-Ready CAD Assembly Generation from Natural Language
summary: Recent advances in large language models and programmatic CAD have significantly improved Text-to-CAD generation for individual parts. However, production-ready mechanical assembly generation remains largely unsolved. Unlike single-part modeling, assemblies require coordinated reasoning over multiple components, functional interfaces, assembly relations, engineering principles, and physical consistency. Consequently, directly generating executable CAD code is insufficient for constructing mechanically valid and reusable assemblies. We present AssemCAD, an axiom-grounded framework for production-ready CAD assembly generation from natural language. Instead of representing an assembly as monolithic CAD code, AssemCAD first constructs an axiomatic Assembly Specification consisting of typed parts, geometry-backed ports, executable mates, and engineering axioms. Each assembly relation is explicitly grounded in one or more engineering principles, making the resulting specification interpretable, reusable, and verifiable. To realize this specification, AssemCAD introduces a port- and mate-based CAD assembly library that executes symbolic assembly relations through deterministic mate transformations and validates declared interfaces using concrete B-Rep geometric evidence. Built on this representation and library, AssemCAD further supports on-demand synthesis of reusable parametric component factories for both standard and open-world geometries. Experiments on AssemBench show that AssemCAD substantially improves assembly preservation and physical validity over code-centric CAD generation baselines, while generalizing across different foundation-model backbones. By combining axiom-grounded assembly reasoning with deterministic geometric execution, AssemCAD extends Text-to-CAD from isolated part generation toward production-ready mechanical assembly design.

AI.tldr: AssemCAD是一个基于公理框架的文本生成机械装配系统，通过将装配表示为包含类型化零件、几何端口、可执行配合和工程公理的规范，显著提升了装配的物理有效性和可重用性。
AI.motivation: 现有Text-to-CAD方法主要针对单个零件生成，无法处理生产级机械装配所需的组件协调、功能接口、装配关系和物理一致性等复杂约束，直接生成CAD代码不足以构建机械有效且可复用的装配体。
AI.method: 提出AssemCAD框架：(1) 构建公理性的Assembly Specification，包含类型化零件、几何端口、可执行配合和工程公理；(2) 开发基于端口和配合的CAD装配库，通过确定性配合变换和B-Rep几何证据验证实现符号装配关系；(3) 支持按需合成可复用的参数化组件工厂。
AI.result: 在AssemBench基准上，AssemCAD在装配保留率和物理有效性方面显著优于以代码为中心的CAD生成基线，并能泛化到不同的基础模型骨干。
AI.conclusion: 通过将公理引导的装配推理与确定性几何执行相结合，AssemCAD将Text-to-CAD从孤立零件生成扩展到生产级机械装配设计。

title: ToolFailBench: Diagnosing Tool-Use Failures in LLM Agents
comment: 18 pages, 3 figures. Published at the Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) and the Workshop on Failure Modes of Agentic AI (FAGEN) at ICML 2026
summary: Tool calling is central to modern language model agents, but aggregate benchmark scores often hide where tool use fails. A model that never calls a needed tool and a model that calls the tool but ignores the result can look similar under final task accuracy. We introduce ToolFailBench, a diagnostic benchmark for measuring tool-use failures across 1,000 tasks in finance, medicine, law, cybersecurity, and real estate. Tool-required tasks return values the model wouldn't guess, forcing it to trust the tool while control tasks attach the same tools but should be answered directly. We label each trace with Tool-Skip, Result-Ignore, Output-Fabrication, and Unnecessary-Tool-Use, using a rule classifier and two LLM judges aggregated by majority vote. Across 19 headline models, the best reaches 86.33% Clean Tool-Use Rate, showing that faithful tool use is not saturated. More importantly, models with similar aggregate scores fail in different ways: most stay disciplined on no-tool controls, while Llama-3.1 models show an Always-Call pattern, and at the same parameter scale Llama-3.1-70B and Qwen2.5-72B differ by 89 percentage points on control-task accuracy. Tool-use evaluation should measure not only whether agents call tools, but whether they use tool outputs correctly and avoid tools when none is needed.

AI.tldr: 提出了ToolFailBench基准，用于诊断工具使用失败模式（跳过工具、忽略结果、编造输出、不必要调用），发现19个主流模型中最好的洁净工具使用率仅86.33%，且相似总分的模型失败模式截然不同。
AI.motivation: 现有基准的聚合分数掩盖了工具使用失败的具体模式——调用工具但忽略结果与根本不调用工具在最终任务准确率上表现相似，无法区分不同失败类型。
AI.method: 构建1,000个任务（金融、医学、法律、网络安全、房地产），包含工具必需任务（模型无法猜测返回值）和控制任务（应直接回答）。使用规则分类器+两个LLM法官通过多数投票标注Tool-Skip、Result-Ignore、Output-Fabrication、Unnecessary-Tool-Use四种失败类型。
AI.result: 最佳模型（19个主流模型中）洁净工具使用率仅86.33%；Llama-3.1模型表现出"始终调用"模式；同参数量下Llama-3.1-70B与Qwen2.5-72B在控制任务准确率上差89个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 工具使用评估不仅应衡量是否调用工具，还应衡量是否正确使用工具输出以及在不需工具时避免调用，因为相似总分的模型失败模式截然不同。

title: Modular Foundation Models for Time-Series Perception in Digital Twins
summary: Engineering Digital Twins and Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) systems rely on robust perception modules to extract actionable information from heterogeneous and non-stationary time-series data. However, most existing approaches remain task-specific, data-hungry, and difficult to integrate into scalable monitoring and decision-making pipelines. Moreover, purely data-driven models often lack robustness and transferability across varying operating conditions. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a modular foundation model for time-series perception based on a collection of pretrained representation encoders. The framework leverages self-supervised learning on heterogeneous datasets to learn transferable and task-agnostic representations, which can be reused across multiple PHM tasks. A gating mechanism is introduced to dynamically select relevant encoders for a given target dataset, enabling conditional computation and adaptive model composition. The selected representations are projected into a shared latent space and aggregated using a Transformer-based self-attention module that explicitly models cross-encoder interactions. The resulting architecture supports multiple downstream tasks, including imputation, long-term forecasting, and few-shot learning, through lightweight task-specific heads, while keeping pretrained encoders frozen during adaptation. Extensive ablation studies demonstrate the complementary roles of self-supervised pretraining, encoder selection, representation alignment, and adaptive aggregation. Experimental results on the ETT benchmark show competitive performance across tasks, while a real-world industrial case study on virtual sensing for hydro-generator rotor temperature highlights the practical relevance of the approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化的基础模型，用于时间序列感知，该模型基于预训练表示编码器集合，通过自监督学习、门控机制和Transformer自注意力模块实现跨任务、跨工况的迁移学习，在PHM任务中表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列感知方法多为任务特定、数据需求大，且纯数据驱动模型在不同工况下鲁棒性和迁移性差，难以集成到可扩展的监测与决策管线中。
AI.method: 提出模块化基础模型，包含：(1) 多个预训练表示编码器集合，通过自监督学习获得任务无关表示；(2) 门控机制动态选择相关编码器；(3) 将选定表示投影到共享潜在空间，并用Transformer自注意力模块建模跨编码器交互；(4) 通过轻量任务头支持插补、长期预测、少样本学习等下游任务。
AI.result: 消融实验验证了自监督预训练、编码器选择、表示对齐和自适应聚合的互补作用；在ETT基准上展现竞争性能；工业案例（水轮发电机转子温度虚拟传感）验证了实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 该模块化基础模型通过可复用的预训练编码器和自适应组合机制，有效提升了时间序列感知的通用性、鲁棒性和迁移能力，为PHM系统提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: TacReasoner: A Dynamic Tactile-Language Framework for Interactive Reasoning in Real-World Scenarios
summary: Among the five primary human senses, tactile is arguably the most fundamental to survival, as it enables the perception of physical contact and interaction in real-world environments. In this paper, we explore two key challenges of integrating tactile sensing into intelligent systems for multimodal reasoning: (i) insufficient modeling of dynamic tactile signals, which restricts reasoning over temporally evolving properties, and (ii) hallucination in tactile foundation models caused by the absence of explicit reasoning mechanisms, leading to unstable real-world inference. To address these challenges, we propose TacReasoner, a dynamic tactile-language framework for interactive reasoning in real-world scenarios. First, TacReasoner incorporates a Dynamic-aware Tactile Encoder to enhance the perception and representation of dynamic tactile signals. More importantly, we introduce TouchCoT-10k, the first tactile chain-of-thought dataset for structured reasoning over tactile inputs. Upon it, we establish DynTac-Bench to systematically evaluate dynamic tactile perception and real-world commonsense reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that TacReasoner achieves competitive performance against state-of-the-art models across multiple datasets. Notably, despite using only 7B parameters, TacReasoner outperforms the 14B VTV-LLM model on most subtasks, highlighting its effectiveness and efficiency in tactile commonsense reasoning.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出TacReasoner框架，通过动态触觉编码器和首个触觉思维链数据集TouchCoT-10k，解决动态触觉信号建模不足和触觉基础模型幻觉问题，在7B参数下超越14B模型。
AI.motivation: 触觉是生存最基础的感官，但现有研究存在两大挑战：(i) 动态触觉信号建模不足，限制了对时变属性的推理能力；(ii) 触觉基础模型缺乏显式推理机制，导致幻觉问题，影响真实世界的稳定推理。
AI.method: 提出TacReasoner框架，包含：(1) 动态感知触觉编码器（Dynamic-aware Tactile Encoder）增强动态信号感知；(2) 首个触觉思维链数据集TouchCoT-10k，支持结构化推理；(3) DynTac-Bench基准用于系统评估动态触觉感知和常识推理。
AI.result: TacReasoner在多个数据集上达到与最先进模型相竞争的性能。尤其值得注意的是，仅用7B参数就在大多数子任务上超越了14B的VTV-LLM模型，展示了其在触觉常识推理中的高效性。
AI.conclusion: TacReasoner通过动态触觉编码和思维链推理机制，有效解决了动态触觉信号建模和推理幻觉问题，为多模态触觉智能系统提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案。

title: PAST-TIDE: Prototype-Anchored Statement Tuning with Topic-Invariant Normalization for Stance Detection
comment: Published in The Fifteenth Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC 2026)
summary: We introduce PAST-TIDE, our stance detection system addressing both subtasks of the StanceNakba Shared Task at NakbaNLP@LREC-COLING 2026. The main idea is statement tuning. We redefine stance as cloze-style masked language modeling (MLM), letting a verbalizer map label words to stance categories through the pre-trained MLM head rather than appending a randomly initialized classification head. We complement this with prototypical contrastive learning, which uses learnable class prototypes for batch-size independent contrastive training, and topic-conditional layer normalization for cross-topic Arabic stance detection. PAST-TIDE achieves macro-F1 scores of 0.75 for Subtask A and 0.74 for Subtask B on the official leaderboard, indicating that minimal architectural additions to a pre-trained model can remain competitive in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: PAST-TIDE 提出了一种基于语句微调（statement tuning）的立场检测方法，将立场检测重构为完形填空式掩码语言建模（MLM），并结合原型对比学习和主题条件层归一化，在 NakbaNLP 共享任务中取得了竞争性结果。
AI.motivation: 现有立场检测方法通常依赖随机初始化的分类头，在低资源场景下性能有限。作者希望利用预训练语言模型已有的 MLM 能力，减少额外参数，提升跨主题阿拉伯语立场检测的表现。
AI.method: 1) 语句微调（Statement Tuning）：将立场检测转为 MLM 任务，通过 verbalizer 将标签词映射为立场类别，使用预训练的 MLM 头而非随机分类头。2) 原型对比学习（Prototypical Contrastive Learning）：利用可学习的类原型进行与批大小无关的对比训练。3) 主题条件层归一化（Topic-conditional Layer Normalization）：增强跨主题阿拉伯语立场检测的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在官方排行榜上，Subtask A 的 macro-F1 为 0.75，Subtask B 为 0.74。
AI.conclusion: 对预训练模型进行最小化的架构修改（仅利用已有 MLM 头、加入原型对比学习和主题条件归一化）即可在低资源设定下取得有竞争力的立场检测性能。

title: Graph Classification via Network Usable Information: From Representation Evaluation to Structure Selection
summary:
We propose NetinfoGC, a framework for graph classification that extends the Network Usable Information (NUI) paradigm to graph-level learning. Unlike conventional graph neural network approaches that rely on end-to-end training of black-box embeddings, NetinfoGC constructs a family of permutation-invariant graph representations derived from propagation-based mechanisms and classical structural descriptors, including graph centrality measures.
  To evaluate representation quality, we introduce a training-free NUI estimation procedure based on clustering consistency with ground-truth labels, providing a proxy for task-relevant information without supervised learning. We further exploit the same representations using sparse-group LASSO regularization, enabling automatic selection of informative structural descriptors while suppressing redundant ones.
  Experiments on benchmark datasets show that classical centrality measures are highly competitive with learned propagation-based representations, and in several cases yield superior performance. Moreover, we observe a strong correlation between estimated NUI and downstream classification accuracy, validating NUI as an effective measure of representation utility.
  Overall, NetinfoGC provides a unified and interpretable framework for evaluating and exploiting graph representations without requiring end-to-end neural training.

AI.tldr: NetinfoGC 是一个图分类框架，通过传播机制和经典结构描述符（如图中心性）构建置换不变的图表示，并引入无需训练的信息量（NUI）估计方法和稀疏组 LASSO 进行特征选择，实验表明经典中心性指标竞争力强，且 NUI 与分类准确率高度相关。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络依赖端到端的黑盒嵌入训练，缺乏可解释性且计算成本高。作者希望构建一个统一的、可解释的图表示学习框架，无需端到端神经训练即可有效评估和利用图表示。
AI.method: 1) 基于传播机制和经典结构描述符（图中心性）构建置换不变的图表示集合；2) 提出无需训练的 NUI 估计方法（基于聚类一致性与标签的匹配度）来评估表示质量；3) 使用稀疏组 LASSO 正则化自动选择信息丰富且冗余低的结构描述符。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，经典中心性指标与基于传播的表示方法竞争力相当，甚至在某些情况下表现更优；NUI 估计值与下游分类准确率之间存在强相关性。
AI.conclusion: NetinfoGC 提供了一个统一、可解释的图表示评估与利用框架，无需端到端神经训练即可有效进行图分类，且 NUI 可作为表示效用的有效代理指标。

title: DSpark: Confidence-Scheduled Speculative Decoding with Semi-Autoregressive Generation
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates Large Language Model (LLM) inference by decoupling draft generation from target verification. While recent parallel drafters efficiently propose long token sequences in a single forward pass, they suffer from rapid acceptance decay due to a lack of inter-token dependencies. Furthermore, indiscriminately verifying these extended blocks wastes critical batch capacity on tokens with high rejection risks, severely degrading throughput in high-concurrency serving systems. We introduce DSpark, a speculative decoding framework that unifies high-throughput parallel generation with adaptive, load-aware verification. To maintain draft quality, DSpark utilizes a semi-autoregressive architecture, coupling a parallel backbone with a lightweight sequential module, to introduce intra-block dependency modeling and mitigate suffix decay. To optimize system efficiency, DSpark employs confidence-scheduled verification, dynamically tailoring the verification length for each request based on estimated prefix survival probabilities and engine-specific throughput profiles. On offline benchmarks across diverse domains, DSpark substantially improves the accepted length over state-of-the-art autoregressive and parallel drafters. When deployed within the DeepSeek-V4 serving system under live user traffic, DSpark successfully mitigates verification waste. Compared to the established production baseline (MTP-1), DSpark accelerates per-user generation speeds by 60 to 85 percent at matched throughput levels. More importantly, by preventing severe throughput degradation under strict interactivity constraints, it enables performance tiers that were previously unattainable, shifting the Pareto frontier of our serving system.

AI.tldr: DSpark 是一种推测解码框架，通过半自回归架构和自适应负载感知验证，在保持高吞吐量的同时提升接受长度，使 DeepSeek-V4 系统中用户生成速度提升 60-85%，并实现了此前不可达的性能边界。
AI.motivation: 现有并行草稿模型虽能高效生成长序列，但缺乏token间依赖导致接受率快速衰减；且不加区分地验证长块会浪费批次容量，严重降低高并发系统的吞吐量。
AI.method: DSpark 采用半自回归架构（并行骨干网络+轻量级顺序模块）引入块内依赖建模以缓解后缀衰减；同时利用置信度调度验证，根据前缀生存概率预估和引擎吞吐量特征动态调整每个请求的验证长度。
AI.result: 在离线基准上显著提升了接受长度；在 DeepSeek-V4 生产系统中，在相同吞吐量下将用户生成速度提升 60-85%，并防止了严格交互约束下的吞吐量退化，实现了此前不可达的性能层级。
AI.conclusion: DSpark 通过统一高吞吐并行生成与自适应负载感知验证，有效解决了推测解码中草稿质量与系统效率之间的权衡，将服务系统的帕累托前沿推向更优边界。

title: What You See Is What You Get: Observation-Aligned Supervision for Chart-to-Code Generation
summary: Chart-to-code generation is commonly trained with supervised fine-tuning on reference plotting scripts, implicitly treating the gold code as a fully observable target. We argue that this assumption is often invalid: many chart programs contain latent raw variables that cannot be uniquely recovered from the rendered image. For example, a boxplot exposes summary statistics rather than original samples, a pie chart reveals proportions rather than arbitrary raw values, and a histogram shows bin-level mass rather than individual observations. Supervising models to reproduce such non-identifiable quantities encourages hallucination and over-specified code generation. We introduce Observation-Aligned supervision, a rewriting framework that replaces latent raw-data targets with quantities constrained by the visual observation: box statistics for boxplots, wedge percentages for pie charts, and bin weights for histograms. Applying this framework to chart-to-code training data from two sources, we obtain the Observation-Aligned supervision target data. Experiments across multiple VLMs on ChartMimic and ChartX demonstrate consistent improvements in observable value recovery, including under both-executable evaluation. Our results suggest that improving chart-to-code models requires not only more data or advanced learning objectives or algorithms, but also supervision targets that respect what is identifiable from the chart image.

AI.tldr: 本文指出图表转代码任务中，使用原始数据作为监督目标会导致模型产生幻觉和过度指定的代码，因此提出了"观察对齐监督"框架，将不可识别的原始数据替换为视觉上可观察的统计量（如箱线图的统计摘要、饼图的百分比等），实验证明该方法能显著提升模型对可观察值的恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图表转代码模型在训练时，将参考绘图脚本中的原始数据视为完全可观测的目标，然而许多图表（如箱线图、饼图、直方图）只展示统计摘要而非原始样本，这些潜在变量无法从渲染图像中唯一恢复。监督模型去复现这些不可识别的量会导致幻觉和过度指定的代码生成。
AI.method: 提出Observation-Aligned supervision（观察对齐监督）框架，将训练数据中的潜在原始数据目标替换为视觉观察可约束的量：箱线图用箱统计量、饼图用扇形百分比、直方图用柱权重。将该框架应用于两个来源的图表转代码训练数据，得到对齐后的监督目标数据集。
AI.result: 在ChartMimic和ChartX基准上，对多种视觉语言模型进行实验，在可观测值恢复方面取得一致改进，包括在双执行评估设置下。
AI.conclusion: 提升图表转代码模型不仅需要更多数据或更高级的学习目标/算法，还需要尊重图表图像中可识别信息的监督目标。

title: Implicit Bias of SGD in Multivariate ReLU Networks: Effective Width Collapse
summary: We study the implicit bias of noisy stochastic gradient descent in training wide two-layer ReLU networks for multivariate regression. In a mean-field regime, the training dynamics are approximated by a Wasserstein gradient flow that converges to a unique stationary measure. We characterize the structure of this stationary measure and the predictor it represents. We show that, despite the network being infinitely overparameterized, the learned predictor admits an effectively finite representation: the input weights and biases align along finitely many directions, leading to an effective width collapse. In particular, the solution function is continuous piecewise affine, with affine regions determined by the cells of a finite hyperplane arrangement. The number of learned directions, and hence hyperplanes, is bounded above by $2\mathcal{P}-1$, where $\mathcal{P}$ denotes the number of linear dichotomies realizable on the training inputs. We further establish a non-redundancy property of the learned representation by proving that each learned direction induces a unique ternary activation pattern on the training data. Consequently, the complexity of the learned predictor is governed by the combinatorial geometry of the training data.

AI.tldr: 本文研究带噪声随机梯度下降训练宽两层ReLU网络进行多变量回归时的隐式偏差。在平均场机制下，训练动力学收敛到唯一平稳测度。尽管网络无限过参数化，学习到的预测器呈现有效有限表示：输入权重和偏置沿有限方向对齐，导致有效宽度坍缩。学习方向数不超过2P-1，其中P是训练输入上可实现线性二分类的数量。每个学习方向在训练数据上诱导唯一的ternary激活模式，从而预测器的复杂度由训练数据的组合几何决定。
AI.motivation: 理解过参数化神经网络在随机梯度下降训练下隐式偏差导致的表征结构坍缩现象，以及学习到的预测器如何受训练数据组合几何的约束。
AI.method: 采用平均场视角将训练动力学近似为Wasserstein梯度流，分析其收敛到的唯一平稳测度的结构特征，并利用超平面排列和组合几何工具刻画学习到的方向与激活模式。
AI.result: (1) 学习到的预测器呈现有效宽度坍缩，权重沿有限方向对齐；(2) 解函数为连续分段仿射函数，仿射区域由有限超平面排列的胞腔决定；(3) 学习方向数有上界2P-1；(4) 每个学习方向在训练数据上诱导唯一的ternary激活模式，具有非冗余性。
AI.conclusion: 过参数化神经网络的隐式偏差导致表征的简洁性：尽管模型容量无限，但学习到的表示本质上是有限且非冗余的，其复杂度由训练数据的组合几何结构决定。

title: The Changing Role of Symbolic Methods in Artificial Intelligence
summary:
Why do intelligent systems need to perform explicit symbolic reasoning? Computer science has traditionally regarded symbolic reasoning as a defining component of intelligence. Yet the remarkable success of modern foundation models raises a fundamental question: if increasingly capable AI systems can operate with little explicit symbolic reasoning, what role do symbolic methods actually play?
  This article argues that explicit symbolic reasoning is not a fundamental property of intelligence, but a computational consequence of operating on simplified models of reality. We propose the Compression Principle: every computational model is a simplified representation of reality, and explicit symbolic reasoning compensates for information omitted during model construction. From this principle, we derive the Modeling--Reasoning Trade-off: as computational models preserve richer representations of the world, the need for explicit symbolic reasoning correspondingly decreases. This perspective provides a unified explanation for both the historical success of symbolic methods and the remarkable effectiveness of modern foundation models.
  Paradoxically, the same development makes symbolic methods increasingly important for humans. As intelligent systems become more capable and more opaque, symbolic representations increasingly serve as interfaces through which humans specify requirements, verify behavior, regulate autonomous systems, and establish trust. We therefore argue that the future of symbolic methods lies not primarily as the computational engine of intelligent systems, but as the symbolic interface between increasingly capable AI systems and the humans who build, govern, and depend upon them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"压缩原则"解释显式符号推理与基础模型的关系：符号推理并非智能的本质属性，而是对现实简化建模的计算补偿。论文提出"建模-推理权衡"：模型保留的信息越丰富，对显式符号推理的需求越低。但悖论的是，随着AI系统变得更强大且不透明，符号方法对人类反而更重要——作为人类与AI系统之间的接口，用于需求指定、行为验证、监管和信任建立。
AI.motivation: 回答一个根本性困惑：如果越来越强大的AI系统（如基础模型）可以在几乎没有显式符号推理的情况下运作，符号方法究竟还扮演什么角色？传统上符号推理被认为是智能的核心组成部分，但现代深度学习方法的成功挑战了这一观点。
AI.method: 提出"压缩原则"（Compression Principle）作为理论基础，进而推导出"建模-推理权衡"（Modeling-Reasoning Trade-off），并用这一框架统一解释符号方法的歷史成功和现代基础模型的有效性。
AI.result: 得出一个悖论式的结论：符号方法对AI系统本身的必要性在降低，但对人类而言重要性却在上升。符号方法未来的角色应从"智能系统的计算引擎"转变为"人类与AI系统之间的符号接口"。
AI.conclusion: 显式符号推理的未来不在于驱动智能系统，而在于作为沟通人类与日益强大的AI系统之间的桥梁，服务于需求指定、行为验证、监管和信任建立等关键人机交互需求。

title: Turning Off-Policy Tokens On-Policy: A Plug-in Approach for Improving LLM Alignment
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training for large language models (LLMs) follows a efficient paradigm of "rollout then update", which inevitably results in off-policy training data. To resolve this, Importance sampling (IS) is proposed, while the token-level ratios compound over long sequences, causing severe variance exploded. A natural idea is "transferring" these off-policy token into on-policy token, so that the importance scores for correction are unnecessary. Following this idea, we propose Selective Importance Sampling (SIS), which is inspired by rejection sampling. Concretely, SIS implements by viewing off-policy model as proposal distribution, and implement a token-level rejection test: accepted tokens are viewed as on-policy, so that receive unit importance score, while rejected tokens retain the standard IS correction. Our proposed SIS is theoretically proved reducing the gap between token-level and sequence-level off-policy gradient estimators. The SIS acts as a plug-in that only modifies the importance ratio in the policy loss, adding negligible wall-clock overhead, and can be combine with a vast vary of RL post-training algorithms. Experiments on dense and MoE LLMs across math and agent benchmarks show that SIS consistently improves all objectives, while providing substantially stronger robustness under off-policy data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出选择性重要性采样（SIS）方法，通过拒绝采样将离策略token转化为在策略token，有效缓解了长序列强化学习后训练中重要性采样比率爆炸的问题，理论证明其能缩小token级与序列级梯度估计器的差距，实验表明SIS在各种RL后训练算法和基准测试中均能稳定提升性能并提供更强的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: LLM的RL后训练采用"先rollout再更新"范式导致数据离策略，传统重要性采样（IS）在长序列中token级比率累积造成方差爆炸，亟需一种能减少方差且不引入过多计算开销的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出选择性重要性采样（SIS），灵感来源于拒绝采样：将离策略模型视为提议分布，在token级别进行拒绝检验——接受的token被视为在策略（权重为1），拒绝的token保留标准IS修正。SIS作为即插即用模块，仅修改策略损失中的重要性比率，可结合多种RL后训练算法。
AI.result: 在稠密和MoE大语言模型上，针对数学和agent基准测试的实验表明，SIS持续提升所有优化目标，并在离策略数据下提供显著更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SIS理论上能缩小token级与序列级离策略梯度估计器的差距，实践中几乎不增加计算开销，为LLM的RL后训练提供了一种高效、鲁棒的离策略修正方案。

title: AgentGym2: Benchmarking Large Language Model Agents in De-Idealized Real-World Environments
comment: Accepted as a main conference paper at ACL 2026
summary: Language agents, i.e., LLM agents, progress rapidly and are increasingly deployed in production environments. This trend underscores the urgent need for rigorous and realistic evaluations. However, most existing benchmarks evaluate agents in simplified, idealized settings. They typically rely on pre-packaged tool interfaces, overlook critical steps, and assume inputs are clean and fully specified. Consequently, they understate the difficulty of real deployments, where uncertainty and noise are ubiquitous and agents must proactively explore the environment to uncover new tools. To bridge this gap, we present AgentGym2, a new evaluation framework with task instances grounded in real-world end-to-end working demands. Beyond reasoning and planning, it measures agents' ability to execute end-to-end procedures, discover tools via exploration, compose tools for unseen tasks, and remain robust to noisy and underspecified information. Experiments on 15 proprietary and open-source models show that even SOTA systems like Gemini and GPT-5 struggle on AgentGym2, revealing a substantial gap between the capability of current agents and the demands of real-world applications.

AI.tldr: AgentGym2是一个新的评估框架，用于在真实世界端到端工作需求下测试语言智能体，涵盖探索、工具组合、噪声鲁棒性等能力。实验表明，即使是GPT-5、Gemini等最先进系统表现也不佳，揭示当前智能体能力与现实应用需求之间存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试在简化、理想化的环境中评估智能体，忽略了真实部署中的不确定性、噪声和工具探索需求，因此低估了实际难度。需要更贴近真实场景的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出AgentGym2评估框架，基于真实世界端到端工作需求构建任务实例，评估智能体在端到端流程执行、工具探索发现、工具组合、以及对噪声和不完整信息的鲁棒性等方面的能力。
AI.result: 在15个专有和开源模型上的实验表明，即使是Gemini和GPT-5等最先进系统在AgentGym2上表现挣扎，当前智能体能力与现实应用需求之间存在显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 现有LLM智能体在真实世界部署所需的关键能力（如主动探索、工具发现、鲁棒性）上仍远未达标，AgentGym2为这一差距提供了更真实的评估视角。

title: LP-SFT: Local-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning via Multimodal Entropy Structure
comment: 21 pages, 3 figures. Code is available at https://github.com/Wakaka161/LP-SFT
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is the standard approach for adapting pretrained language models to downstream domains, yet it often improves target-domain behavior at the cost of degrading pre-existing capabilities. Standard cross-entropy fine-tuning promotes only the observed label token and leaves unconstrained how probability mass is redistributed over other plausible alternatives, potentially distorting the rich local preference structure learned during pretraining. We first analyze next-token predictions using Shannon and Renyi entropies, revealing that pretrained models exhibit a regular multimodal entropy structure. These entropy peaks correspond to varying numbers of plausible alternatives, indicating that the base model intrinsically encodes rich distributional knowledge beyond the single supervised token. Motivated by this observation, we propose LP-SFT, a Local-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning objective designed to explicitly protect this inherent entropy structure. At each step, LP-SFT constructs an adaptive support of alternative tokens and applies a locally normalized preservation loss to maintain the base model's relative structure among them, while standard cross-entropy independently optimizes the supervised token. Across mixed-domain and single-domain fine-tuning experiments, LP-SFT improves overall performance over vanilla SFT and recent SFT-enhancement baselines, achieving the best balance between pass@1 accuracy and pass@k performance. These results suggest that local preservation helps mitigate capability degradation without collapsing sampling-accessible diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 LP-SFT，一种局部保留的监督微调方法，在微调过程中显式保护预训练模型固有的熵结构（即多模态分布），从而在提升目标任务性能的同时，减少对预训练能力的退化。实验表明 LP-SFT 在 pass@1 准确率和 pass@k 多样性之间取得最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 标准交叉熵微调只优化监督标签 token，不约束其他候选 token 的概率分布，导致预训练阶段学到的丰富局部偏好结构被扭曲。作者通过 Shannon 和 Renyi 熵分析发现预训练模型具有规律的多模态熵结构，因此希望保护该结构以缓解能力退化。
AI.method: LP-SFT 在每一步构建自适应替代 token 集合，并引入局部归一化保留损失，维持基座模型在替代 token 上的相对分布结构，同时继续用交叉熵优化监督 token。
AI.result: 在混合域和单域微调实验中，LP-SFT 在 pass@1 和 pass@k 指标上均优于标准 SFT 和近期 SFT 增强基线，实现了最佳的性能-多样性平衡。
AI.conclusion: 局部保留策略能有效缓解微调过程中的能力退化，且不会牺牲采样可达的多样性。

title: CP-WSP: A Declarative CP-SAT Framework for Configurable Multi-Constraint Workforce Scheduling
summary: Workforce scheduling is an NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem requiring simultaneous satisfaction of labor regulations, coverage requirements, employee preferences and operational objectives. Existing CP formulations typically model simplified instances with 6-12 constraints at shift-level granularity and critically lack explicit support for: mandatory break scheduling with midpoint placement control; acuity weighted workload equity; sub-shift temporal granularity enabling demand-driven staffing; inter-week schedule stability; and cross-midnight shift patterns common in 24-hour operations. This paper presents CP-WSP: a declarative CP-SAT framework enforcing 14 hard constraints as mathematically inviolable requirements (zero regulatory violations by construction) while optimizing 15 soft objectives through a unified weighted penalty function -- all configurable via a JSON specification with no code changes required. Key contributions include: a shift-window variable decomposition enabling mandatory break scheduling with centrality control; acuity-weighted workload equity; multi-granularity temporal resolution from 30 minutes to 2 hours; inter-week schedule stability; a grid-offset preprocessing technique for cross-midnight shifts; and a reproducible 36-configuration benchmark suite for community comparison. Evaluated on INRC-II benchmarks at both hourly and shift-level granularity and on 36 synthetic configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CP-WSP框架，通过CP-SAT求解器处理包含14个硬约束和15个软目标的人员排班问题，支持多种实际需求（如休息安排、工作量公平性等），并通过JSON配置实现零代码修改的灵活调度。
AI.motivation: 现有约束规划（CP）排班方法仅处理6-12个约束，缺乏对强制休息安排、加权工作负荷公平性、子班次粒度、跨周稳定性及跨午夜班次等关键实际需求的支持。
AI.method: 提出CP-WSP框架：采用CP-SAT求解器，定义14个硬约束（零违规）和15个软目标（统一加权惩罚函数）；创新包括shift-window变量分解（实现休息居中控制）、 acuity加权工作负荷均衡、多粒度时间分辨率（30分钟至2小时）、跨周稳定性、grid-offset预处理技术处理跨午夜班次，所有配置通过JSON实现无需代码修改。
AI.result: 在INRC-II基准（小时级和班次级粒度）以及36个合成配置上进行了评估，并提供了可复现的36配置基准测试套件供社区比较。
AI.conclusion: CP-WSP框架有效填补了现有CP排班方法在多种实际约束上的空白，通过声明式配置和统一优化目标实现了灵活、可扩展且零违规的人员排班方案。

title: Evaluating the Effect of Linguistic Relatedness on Cross-Lingual Transfer in Large Multilingual Automatic Speech Recognition
summary: Extending automatic speech recognition (ASR) to low-resource African languages is constrained by the prohibitive demands of data collection at scale. A promising direction is to leverage linguistic relatedness to enhance cross-lingual transfer from a related auxiliary language to the low-resource target by sequentially adapting on both. Although this strategy has shown meaningful improvements in small ASR models, its effectiveness in large ASR remains unclear. We extend this framework to large multilingual ASR through a systematic controlled experimental design spanning six factors, two Africa-centric corpora, and four large ASR models, isolating whether linguistic relatedness reliably predicts cross-lingual transfer gains in this setting. Across all conditions, pre-adaptation on related auxiliary languages yields no practically meaningful transfer improvements given minimal target-language data, suggesting that linguistic relatedness alone may not reliably predict cross-lingual transfer gains in large multilingual ASR, or constitute an effective strategy for extending such models to low-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 通过系统实验发现，在大型多语言ASR模型中，基于语言亲缘关系的跨语言迁移策略无法带来实际意义的性能提升，表明该策略对低资源语言扩展效果有限。
AI.motivation: 将自动语音识别扩展到低资源非洲语言面临数据收集成本高昂的挑战，利用语言亲缘关系进行跨语言迁移是一种有前景的方向，但该策略在大规模ASR模型中的有效性尚不明确。
AI.method: 采用系统控制实验设计，涵盖六个因素、两个非洲语言语料库和四个大型ASR模型，通过对比预适应相关辅助语言与直接训练的效果，评估语言亲缘关系对跨语言迁移的预测能力。
AI.result: 在所有实验条件下，预适应相关辅助语言未能在仅有少量目标语言数据时带来实际意义的迁移改进。
AI.conclusion: 语言亲缘关系本身可能无法可靠预测大型多语言ASR中的跨语言迁移增益，也不构成扩展此类模型到低资源语言的有效策略。

title: Phase-Preserving Trimodal Transformer for Tropical Forest Biomass Estimation Using Optical and PolInSAR Data
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, one of which is a TikZ
summary: The accurate estimation of Above-Ground Biomass (AGB) in mature tropical forests remains a critical challenge in remote sensing, primarily due to the saturation of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) signals in high-density areas and persistent cloud cover affecting optical imagery. To overcome these physical limitations, we propose the Trimodal Coherent Co-attention Transformer (TCCT), a physics-informed deep learning architecture. The TCCT natively fuses optical surface reflectance (Landsat-5) with complex-valued Polarimetric SAR Interferometry (PolInSAR) data from both P and L bands. Unlike traditional fusion methods, our architecture employs complex-valued encoders to preserve spatial phase coherence, coupled with a dynamic co-attention mechanism that acts as an adaptive gating module, reducing the weight of cloud-corrupted optical pixels and shifting reliance to microwave phase data. We also derived a localized spatial allometric calibration model via Levenberg-Marquardt optimization, tailored to the specific wood density of the Paracou region in the Amazon basin. Evaluated using a two-stage protocol, the TCCT first underwent a rigorous 5-fold cross-validation to establish robust global weights (achieving a global RMSE of 4.19 m). Subsequently, following a localized spatial fine-tuning phase over 200 epochs, the model attained an absolute RMSE of 3.78 m and an $R^2$ of 0.33 for Canopy Height Models (CHM), outperforming standard Random Forest, CNN, and Vision Transformer baselines. Our ablation study confirms that preserving phase coherence mitigates deep-canopy signal saturation. When converted to AGB, the fine-tuned TCCT map yielded a Relative RMSE (rRMSE) of 4.51% in dense forest areas above 50 Mg/ha. By meeting the European Space Agency (ESA) BIOMASS mission requirement of less than 20% error, the TCCT provides a robust framework for continuous carbon stock mapping in tropical biomes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TCCT的物理信息深度学习架构，通过融合光学与极化干涉SAR数据来准确估算热带成熟林的地上生物量，在ESA BIOMASS任务误差要求内实现了优异的估算精度。
AI.motivation: 热带成熟林的地上生物量(AGB)估算在遥感中面临关键挑战：SAR信号在高密度区域饱和，光学影像受持续云层覆盖影响。现有方法难以克服这些物理限制，亟需更有效的融合架构。
AI.method: 提出Trimodal Coherent Co-attention Transformer (TCCT)，融合Landsat-5光学数据与P/L波段PolInSAR数据。采用复数值编码器保留空间相位相干性，动态协同注意力机制自适应降低云污染像素权重。额外引入Levenberg-Marquardt优化的局部空间异速校准模型。
AI.result: 5折交叉验证全局RMSE为4.19m；局部微调后CHM的RMSE达3.78m，R²为0.33；AGB相对RMSE为4.51%，优于随机森林、CNN和Vision Transformer基线。
AI.conclusion: TCCT框架满足ESA BIOMASS任务低于20%误差的要求，为热带生物群落碳储量连续制图提供了鲁棒方案，证实保留相位相干性可缓解深冠层信号饱和问题。

title: Rethinking On-Policy Self-Distillation for Thinking Models
summary: Self-distillation is a promising recipe for self-improvement in language models. In this setting, a model can serve as its own teacher when given privileged information, such as a solution to a math problem. This seems especially appealing for thinking models, which can use test-time reasoning to absorb the privileged information. Surprisingly, we show that privileged self-distillation degrades thinking models on long reasoning traces: across five Qwen3 and OLMo thinking models evaluated on AIME24, AIME25, and HMMT25, privileged-context distillation causes a relative drop of up to 17% in avg@16 accuracy. The degradation scales with the amount of privileged context withheld from the student and is most pronounced at long rollout budgets, where thinking models otherwise obtain their largest gains. This failure mode is not specific to self-distillation: on-policy distillation (OPD) improves thinking models, but privileged OPD reverses these gains. Our diagnostics link this failure mode to how privileged teacher context reshapes learning at high-entropy forking positions, where multiple continuations remain plausible and may lead to different reasoning paths. Privileged context lowers fork rates in thinking-model rollouts but not in instruction-model rollouts. This leads to an interesting dichotomy, where privileged context can help instruction-tuned models but hurts stronger thinking models. The effect is visible when the student begins a self-correction branch, where privileged OPD penalizes sampled reconsideration tokens that vanilla OPD supports. Thinking models trained with a privileged teacher produce fewer verification, backtracking, and hedging markers, even after length normalization. These findings indicate that self-distillation for strong thinking models requires attention to token-level signal, especially around correction and reasoning steps.

AI.tldr: 特权知识蒸馏会损害思考模型的推理能力，尤其在长推理链上表现明显，准确率下降高达17%。该问题源于特权教师上下文在高熵分支位置重塑学习信号，减少模型的验证、回溯和纠错行为。
AI.motivation: 探索自蒸馏（self-distillation）是否能通过特权信息（如问题答案）来提升思考型语言模型（thinking models）的推理能力，因为这类模型本就擅长利用测试时推理吸收特权信息。
AI.method: 在Qwen3和OLMo两大类思考模型上，对比特权上下文蒸馏与非特权蒸馏的效果，在AIME24、AIME25、HMMT25基准上评估avg@16准确率。通过分析token级信号、分支率（fork rate）、纠错标记等指标诊断退化机制。
AI.result: 特权上下文蒸馏导致avg@16准确率相对下降最高达17%。退化程度与特权信息保留量正相关，在长推理预算下最明显。特权蒸馏降低分支率、减少验证/回溯/对冲标记，而针对指令模型却有正向效果。
AI.conclusion: 强思考模型的自我蒸馏需要关注token级信号，尤其是在纠错和推理步骤上。简单的特权信息传递会损害模型内在的验证和回溯能力，不能直接套用指令模型的蒸馏策略。

title: Semantic Homogenization in Italian Popular Music: A Diachronic Analysis
summary: In recent years, studies have revealed a decline in semantic variety across popular music lyrics, particularly in English-language songs on streaming platforms like Spotify. This research examines whether a similar trend can be observed in a different linguistic and cultural context: the lyrics of all finalist songs from the 75 editions of the Sanremo Music Festival, Italy's most renowned music competition. What sets this work apart is the development of a flexible and efficient methodology for tracking changes in semantic similarity over time, which can be applied to different datasets to study similar phenomena. Drawing on a combination of full-text, segment-based, topic-based, and word-level analyses, the approach leverages both embedding techniques and large language models. When applied to the Sanremo corpus, this framework reveals a gradual move toward increasing semantic uniformity, echoing the global patterns identified in previous studies. These findings underscore the value of natural language processing tools in uncovering long-term shifts in musical language and cultural expression.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析75届意大利圣雷莫音乐节决赛歌曲歌词，发现与英语流行音乐类似的语义多样性下降趋势，并提出了一种基于嵌入技术和大型语言模型的灵活方法论框架。
AI.motivation: 以往研究主要关注英语流行歌词的语义多样性下降，但缺乏对其他语言和文化背景的验证。本文旨在探究意大利语歌曲是否也存在类似趋势。
AI.method: 开发了一种结合全文、片段、主题和词汇层面分析的综合方法论，利用嵌入技术和大语言模型，对圣雷莫音乐节75届决赛歌曲歌词进行历时语义相似度分析。
AI.result: 应用该方法于圣雷莫歌词语料库，发现歌词语义逐渐趋向统一，与全球英语流行歌词的研究发现一致。
AI.conclusion: 研究证实了自然语言处理工具在揭示音乐语言和文化表达的长期变迁方面具有重要价值，且语义同质化趋势可能是一种跨语言的普遍现象。

title: ClassicLogic: A Knowledge-Driven Benchmark of Classic Puzzle Games for Evaluating Compositional Generalization
summary: Compositional generalization, the ability to understand and produce novel combinations of known components, remains a fundamental challenge for modern artificial intelligence. While few benchmarks exist, many focus on linguistic tasks and lack complex, explicit compositional structures. We introduce ClassicLogic, a new benchmark suite designed to evaluate an agent's ability to learn and compose problem-solving strategies. The benchmark consists of four classic logic puzzles: Sudoku, KenKen, Kakuro, and Futoshiki. Its core innovation is a hierarchical, explicit knowledge base for each game, where complex solving strategies are formally defined as compositions of simpler, foundational strategies. This structure allows for fine-grained evaluation of an agent's reasoning capabilities, from learning basic rules to applying multi-step compositional strategies to solve puzzles of increasing, mathematically validated difficulty. The open-source benchmark provides a challenging new testbed for advancing neuro-symbolic and other advanced AI reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了ClassicLogic基准套件，通过四个经典逻辑谜题（数独、KenKen、数墙、不等式）的层级化知识库来评估AI的组合泛化能力，核心创新在于将复杂求解策略形式化定义为简单策略的组合。
AI.motivation: 现有组合泛化基准多聚焦于语言任务，缺乏复杂、显式的组合结构，难以深入评估智能体的组合推理能力。
AI.method: 基于四个经典逻辑谜题构建层级化、显式的知识库，将复杂求解策略正式定义为简单基础策略的组合，并通过数学验证确保难度递增。
AI.result: 开源基准套件，可对智能体从基础规则学习到多步组合策略应用进行细粒度评估。
AI.conclusion: ClassicLogic为推进神经符号系统及其他高级AI推理系统提供了具有挑战性的新测试平台。

title: Evaluating Large Language Models for Antisemitic Incident Classification
comment: Accepted to Digital Hate Review 2026 Issue 1
summary: Addressing hate and violence in society requires timely detection of hateful events from public reporting, but automated identification of hateful events remains underexplored. We introduce the task of hateful event detection and investigate the ability of AI systems, specifically large language models (LLMs), to discover and classify reports of antisemitic events with fine-grained labels. We evaluate OpenAI's GPT-4o and Meta's Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct on multiple expert-annotated datasets containing antisemitic event descriptions from news articles, civil society reports, and official records. We show that LLMs, particularly GPT-4o, have potential for this task, but substantial improvement is needed. Providing clear term definitions and in-context examples in prompts can improve performance: definitions are most helpful for rhetoric-oriented events (e.g. classical antisemitic tropes), while examples help label action-oriented events (e.g. physical assault). A case study of college newspapers demonstrates that LLMs can help surface relevant real-world events, supporting early monitoring and intervention. Overall, our findings highlight both opportunities and critical gaps in AI's ability to recognize complex harms and underscore the need for collaborative efforts among AI developers, policymakers, and civil society to design models, implement robust evaluation, and develop policy frameworks for defining and combating hate efficiently and effectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"仇恨事件检测"任务，评估GPT-4o和Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct等大语言模型在识别和分类反犹太主义事件方面的能力。实验发现GPT-4o表现较好但仍需改进，提供定义和上下文示例能提升性能，定义对修辞型事件帮助更大，示例对行动型事件更有效。
AI.motivation: 社会中仇恨与暴力事件频发，需要从公开报道中及时检测仇恨事件，但自动化识别仇恨事件的研究尚不充分。
AI.method: 定义仇恨事件检测任务，使用多个专家标注的反犹太主义事件数据集（涵盖新闻文章、民间社会报告和官方记录），评估GPT-4o和Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct的表现，并探索提供术语定义和上下文示例对性能的影响。
AI.result: 大语言模型（尤其是GPT-4o）在仇恨事件检测上具有一定潜力但仍有较大改进空间；提供清晰术语定义对修辞导向事件（如古典反犹太主义陈规定型）帮助更大，而提供上下文示例对行动导向事件（如人身攻击）更有效；大学报纸案例研究表明LLM能辅助发现现实世界中的相关事件。
AI.conclusion: AI在识别复杂危害方面既有机遇也有关键缺陷，需要AI开发者、政策制定者和民间社会协同努力，设计模型、建立稳健评估框架并制定政策来有效打击仇恨。

title: Validation-Induced Shapley Shifts: How Validation Structure Distorts Data Valuation
summary: Shapley values are widely used to attribute value to training data based on their marginal contribution to performance on a validation set. Existing practice often assumes these values are stable once the training data and model are fixed. In this work, we uncover a systematic vulnerability: even modest changes to the validation set, such as introducing noises, cause directional shifts in Shapley distributions. As noises are added, Shapley values of training samples compress toward zero. We trace this to a noise-induced neighborhood reshuffling effect: perturbations alter the local rank order between validation and training samples, flattening the valuation landscape. Using the KNN-Shapley framework, we show through synthetic and real data that these shifts are consistent and reproducible. Our findings challenge the assumption of Shapley stability and reveal a new axis of fragility in data valuation. We propose normalization and boundary-aware validation strategies to mitigate these distortions and enable more robust, interpretable valuation in machine learning marketplaces.

AI.tldr: 本文发现Shapley值对验证集噪声高度敏感：即使微小扰动也会导致估值向零压缩，源于噪声引发的邻域重排效应。提出归一化和边界感知策略以增强鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究假设Shapley值在训练数据和模型固定后是稳定的，本文旨在揭示这一假设的脆弱性，验证集噪声会导致系统性估值偏移。
AI.method: 基于KNN-Shapley框架，通过合成数据和真实数据实验，分析噪声对Shapley分布的影响机制（邻域重排效应），并提出归一化与边界感知验证策略。
AI.result: 验证集噪声会引起Shapley值向零压缩的定向偏移，该现象在多种数据上一致且可复现；提出的缓解策略能有效降低失真。
AI.conclusion: 挑战了Shapley值稳定性的传统假设，揭示了数据估值中的新脆弱性维度，为机器学习市场中的鲁棒估值提供了改进方向。

title: Reason, Reward, Refine: Step-Level Errors Corrections with Structured Feedback for Physics Reasoning in Small Language Models
summary: Physics reasoning fails structurally in small language models: an error at any step propagates forward, corrupting every inference that follows. Limited domain knowledge, hallucination under multi-step derivation, and distributional sensitivity compound this failure. We propose a step-level reward framework that identifies the first reasoning error, generates targeted structured feedback, and trains the model to revise its solution via policy gradient with KL regularization, without exposing it to ground truth solutions as generation targets. Unlike annotation-dependent step-level methods, no preference data construction is required and the external verifier operates exclusively at training time. Across five physics benchmarks, our framework delivers accuracy gains of 17-20% over CoT prompting and 10-16% over the strongest baseline, reduces calculation errors from 56.9% to 23.5%, and reduces miscomprehension errors from 22.3% to 12.0% in the best observed cases. Conceptual errors reduce from 89.7% to 68.7%, yet persist as the hardest failure mode across all conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种步骤级奖励框架，在不暴露真实解的情况下，通过识别首个推理错误、生成结构化反馈、结合策略梯度与KL正则化训练模型修正答案，在五个物理基准上将准确率提升17-20%，显著减少计算和理解错误，但概念性错误仍是最难解决的问题。
AI.motivation: 小语言模型在物理推理中，因错误传播、领域知识有限、多步推导下的幻觉和分布敏感性，导致推理完全失败，亟需一种无需人工标注偏好数据、能定位首个错误并提供结构化反馈的修正方法。
AI.method: 构建步骤级奖励框架：识别第一个推理错误，生成针对性结构化反馈；通过带KL正则化的策略梯度训练模型自行修正答案；外部验证器仅在训练阶段使用，无需构建偏好数据，不暴露真实解作为生成目标。
AI.result: 在五个物理基准上，准确率相比CoT提示提升17-20%，相比最强基线提升10-16%；计算错误从56.9%降至23.5%，理解错误从22.3%降至12.0%；概念错误从89.7%降至68.7%，但仍是最难解决的错误类型。
AI.conclusion: 该步骤级奖励框架有效缓解了小语言模型在物理推理中的错误传播问题，大幅降低计算和理解错误，但概念性错误在所有条件下持续存在，是未来需要重点攻克的方向。

title: Ossetic-COT: Designing a morphologically annotated corpus and morphological analyzer for Ossetic
summary: In this work we present the first morphologically annotated corpus for Iron Ossetic that conforms to the Universal Dependencies schema. The corpus includes 5454 manually annotated sentences from the Iron Ossetic Corpus of Oral Texts, containing 74032 tokens. We use this corpus to train a BERT-based morphological analyzer. The analyzer achieves tag accuracy of 95.60%.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了第一个符合通用依赖架构的奥塞梯语形态标注语料库，包含5454句手动标注句子（74032个词元），并基于此训练了一个BERT形态分析器，实现了95.60%的标签准确率。
AI.motivation: 缺乏符合通用依赖（UD）标准的奥塞梯语形态标注语料库，阻碍了该语言的自然语言处理研究。
AI.method: 构建了第一个符合UD架构的Iron Ossetic语料库（5454句，74032词元），并在此基础上训练了基于BERT的形态分析器。
AI.result: BERT形态分析器在形态标签预测上达到了95.60%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 所构建的语料库和BERT分析器为奥塞梯语的形态分析提供了有效基础，证明了深度学习在低资源语言上的可行性。

title: Rethinking AI-Generated Text Detection: A Strong Baseline and the Distribution-Shift Problem That Remains
summary: Recent AI-generated text detection work often introduces a new benchmark together with a specialized detector tailored to it. We revisit this practice from a baseline-first perspective. Across several benchmarks, we show that a plain, fully fine-tuned RoBERTa matches or exceeds the specialized detectors those benchmarks are built around. This suggests that much of the recent architectural complexity is not what drives strong in-distribution detection. The remaining challenge is the distribution shift. The same strong baseline degrades sharply when the topic domain or generating model changes at test time, and simply adding more source data does not close the gap. We identify a key failure mode: under distribution shift, the detector can assign high-confidence machine labels to human-written text from unseen domains. We then study two lightweight domain adaptation methods to address this problem: $K$-shot adaptation with first-order MAML over LoRA adapters, and a per-sample confidence-weighted ensemble built on top of the adapted detector. Overall, our results suggest that progress in AI-generated text detection should be measured not only by in-distribution performance, but also by robustness under distribution shift.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验证明，简单的全参数微调RoBERTa模型在多个AI生成文本检测基准上不逊于甚至优于专用检测器，表明模型架构复杂性并非关键。真正的挑战在于分布偏移（主题域或生成模型变化），简单增加数据无法解决。作者发现分布偏移下检测器会误将人工文本判为机器生成，并提出了两种轻量级域适应方法（基于LoRA的MAML小样本适应和置信度加权集成）来缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 当前AI生成文本检测领域存在"为每个新基准设计专属检测器"的倾向，作者质疑这种做法的必要性，希望从"基线优先"的角度重新审视这一问题，并揭示真正的研究挑战所在。
AI.method: 1) 使用全参数微调的RoBERTa作为基线模型，在多个基准上与专用检测器对比；2) 通过控制主题域和生成模型的变化，系统性评估分布偏移下的性能退化；3) 提出两种轻量级域适应方法：基于LoRA的MAML（一阶）K-shot适应方法，以及在适应检测器基础上构建的每样本置信度加权集成。
AI.result: 1) 简单RoBERTa基线在多个基准的分布内检测上匹配甚至超越专用检测器；2) 在分布偏移下（主题域或生成模型变化），基线模型性能严重下降；3) 单纯增加训练数据无法缓解分布偏移问题；4) 分布偏移下检测器会高置信度地将未见领域的人工文本误判为机器生成。
AI.conclusion: AI生成文本检测的进步不应仅以分布内性能衡量，更应关注分布偏移下的鲁棒性。简单的架构在分布内已足够强大，真正的挑战和未来方向在于如何提升检测器对领域变化的泛化能力。

title: EvoAgentBench: Benchmarking Agent Self-Evolution via Ability Transfer
summary: Agent self-evolution in long-horizon LLM systems is largely procedural: useful experience is not merely stored information, but reusable procedures for searching, debugging, and verification. Yet current evaluations do not isolate this form of transfer. Agent benchmarks test single-episode task solving; memory benchmarks target information retention rather than procedural reuse. We introduce EvoAgentBench, a benchmark for agent self-evolution via Ability-guided transfer across four agentic domains: web research, algorithmic reasoning, software engineering, and knowledge work. EvoAgentBench extracts trace-grounded Abilities from agent executions, canonicalizes them into operational units, and builds domain-specific Ability Graphs linking tasks that share procedural overlap. By design, every test task is backed by verified training-side Ability support. Across a 528/267 train/test split, two scaffolds, and three backbones, curated Ability content transfers reliably across model families, but no current automatic method sustains positive gain in all settings. EvoAgentBench shifts self-evolution evaluation from aggregate accuracy comparison to fine-grained diagnosis of experience encoding, routing, and uptake. The benchmark is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/EverMind-AI/EvoAgentBench.

AI.tldr: EvoAgentBench是一个评估LLM智能体在长程任务中通过能力导向的程序性经验迁移实现自我进化的基准，包含4个领域528/267训练/测试任务，研究发现能力内容可跨模型迁移，但现有方法无法在所有设置中持续获得正向收益。
AI.motivation: 现有基准只测试单轮任务解决或信息记忆，无法评估智能体将经验提炼为可重用程序（如搜索、调试、验证流程）并在新任务中迁移的能力，因此需要专门针对程序性经验迁移的评估框架。
AI.method: 从智能体执行轨迹中提取能力（Abilities），规范化后构建领域特定的能力图（Ability Graphs），连接具有程序重叠的任务；设计528/267训练/测试划分，确保每个测试任务都有训练侧能力支持。
AI.result: 能力内容可跨模型族可靠迁移，但现有自动方法无法在所有设置中持续获得正向收益，揭示当前方法在经验编码、路由和吸收方面存在不足。
AI.conclusion: EvoAgentBench将自我进化评估从聚合精度比较转向细粒度的经验编码、路由和吸收诊断，为未来研究提供了新的评估范式。

title: DuplexChat: Constructing Speaker-Separated Full-Duplex Dialogue Speech at Scale for Spoken Dialogue Language Modeling
comment: 4 pages, 1 figures, submitted to SLT demo track
summary: Full-duplex spoken dialogue models are trained on conversational speech in which each speaker is represented as a separate stream, but existing large-scale public speech corpora are mostly monaural, making them unsuited for SDLM training. We present DuplexChat, an open-source corpus for full-duplex spoken dialogue models, and DuplexChat-Pipe, a pipeline for constructing speaker-separated full-duplex dialogue speech from public podcast feeds. DuplexChat-Pipe filters language-specific podcast feeds, retrieves and cleans episode audio, extracts diarization-guided two-speaker dialogue clips, and applies speech separation and restoration to produce one channel per speaker.
