The central claim is the two-factor account; the endpoint and anatomy results are diagnostic constraints. All code, manifests, and per-seed logs are released for exact reproduction.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在有限因子化世界上穷举训练约6K-10K参数的Transformer，研究信息到达方式（符号token、清洁oracle编码、纠缠感知向量）如何影响模型将信息组合绑定的能力。发现：(1) 所有信息路径在零样本组合上均失败（至多随机水平）；(2) 少样本绑定的样本效率由输入路径的参数共享和编码可读性双因素解释；(3) 早期训练中分布式编码出现短暂超随机阶段，而少样本效率跟踪路径共享；(4) 解构失败模式：符号路径在读出层丢失答案，索引路径错绑，纠缠路径继承输入可读性。
AI.motivation: 探究信息表示形式（符号化、清洁编码、感知向量）对Transformer组合性绑定能力的影响，以揭示其归纳偏置的本质。
AI.method: 在有限因子化世界上穷举训练约6K-10K参数的Transformer，使用信息匹配的设置（精确贝叶斯上限1.0，零采样方差），系统比较不同信息路由下的绑定表现。
AI.result: (1) 零样本组合下所有路径均失败；(2) 少样本效率由参数共享和编码可读性双因素决定；(3) 早期训练中分布式编码短暂超随机；(4) 不同路径失败模式不同。
AI.conclusion: Transformer的组合绑定能力受信息表示形式和参数共享双重因素制约，核心主张是双因素解释，端点不变性和失败解剖作为诊断约束。

title: Lightweight ML-Based Automatic Sleep Staging Framework with Constrained CNN and Mamba for Small-Sample EEG Datasets
summary: Automatic sleep staging is a key technology for precise diagnosis and treatment of sleep disorders as well as long-term home sleep monitoring. Portable electroencephalogram (EEG) devices have become the focus of research due to their convenience in data collection. However, current methods still face three major challenges: large parameter sizes that easily lead to overfitting on small datasets, low accuracy in classifying difficult stages such as N1 and REM, unclear optimal training dataset size, and difficulty in deployment. This paper proposes GamSleepNet, a lightweight and low-latency automatic sleep staging framework for single-channel EEG. The framework features the FEB module, which combines improved Gabor kernels with learnable filters for feature extraction, uses the Mamba architecture to build a temporal classification network, introduces a novel contrastive loss and a two-stage training strategy, and experimentally validates the optimal dataset size for single-channel EEG sleep staging models. On the Sleepedf dataset, this model achieves an overall accuracy of 87.86 percent with only 30.86 thousand parameters, with all metrics reaching SOTA levels and significantly improving the identification accuracy of challenging sleep stages.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GamSleepNet，一种轻量级单通道EEG自动睡眠分期框架，仅用30.86K参数在Sleepedf数据集上达到87.86%准确率，通过FEB模块、Mamba时序网络、对比损失和两阶段训练策略，显著提升N1和REM等困难分期的识别精度。
AI.motivation: 现有自动睡眠分期方法面临三大挑战：参数过大致小数据集过拟合、N1和REM等困难分期分类精度低、最优训练集大小不明确且难以部署。本文旨在设计轻量低延迟的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出GamSleepNet框架，包含：1) FEB模块，融合改进Gabor核与可学习滤波器进行特征提取；2) 基于Mamba架构的时序分类网络；3) 新颖的对比损失函数；4) 两阶段训练策略；5) 实验确定单通道EEG睡眠分期模型的最优数据集大小。
AI.result: 在Sleepedf数据集上，模型仅用30.86K参数达到87.86%整体准确率，所有指标均达SOTA水平，特别是显著提升了N1和REM等困难睡眠分期的识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: GamSleepNet以超轻量参数实现了优异的睡眠分期性能，有效解决了过拟合和困难分期精度问题，为便携式EEG设备上的实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: Sensitivity Sampling with Predictions for k-Means Clustering
summary:
We study the problem of k-means clustering on large datasets. The state-of-the-art for the problem is given by coresets-based approaches, which build small weighted summaries of the input and derive approximate solutions with rigorous quality guarantees from them. One of the most popular and advanced approaches to derive coresets for k-means is sensitivity sampling. However, sensitivity sampling requires to compute the importance of each input point with respect to the whole dataset over all possible choices of centers. Since the exact computation of such quantities is unfeasible, current approaches work by approximating the sensitivity values. Nevertheless, the runtime of such approaches is still impractical for large datasets.
  In this work, we propose to reduce the runtime of sensitivity-based approaches for k-means by leveraging predictions to approximate the importance of input points. We first formally prove that current theoretical results on coresets construction via sensitivity sampling hold for coarser approximations of sensitivities compared to the one required by existing approaches. This implies that even fairly noisy predictors can be leveraged for sensitivity-sampling approaches. We then propose a natural predictor, which applies to the common scenario where clustering is performed (over time) on a sequence of datasets from the same problem. We prove that when the datasets in the sequence come from the same (unknown) distribution, centers resulting in a low error on one dataset can be used as predictions for sensitivity sampling in subsequent datasets, with guarantees on their quality. We perform an extensive experimental evaluation showing that our approach significantly improves, in terms of clustering cost vs runtime, over uniform sampling and state-of-the-art sensitivity sampling approaches when applied to sequences of datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用预测来近似敏感度采样中的重要性估计，从而加速大规模数据集上的k-means聚类。作者理论上证明了敏感度采样对近似质量的要求比现有方法更宽松，并提出了一种自然的预测器——利用同一分布下先前数据集聚类得到的中心点来指导后续数据集的敏感度估计。实验表明该方法在聚类质量与运行时间之间取得了更好的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于敏感度采样的coresets方法虽然能提供有质量保证的近似解，但计算每个数据点相对于所有可能中心选择的重要性（敏感度）在计算上不可行，即使采用近似方法，其运行时间对于大规模数据集仍然不切实际。因此，需要更高效的方法来加速敏感度计算。
AI.method: 1) 理论证明：证明了敏感度采样构建coresets时，对敏感度近似质量的要求可以比现有方法更宽松，即可以使用更粗糙的近似。2) 预测器设计：针对同一问题上的数据序列场景（随时间变化），提出使用前一个数据集上得到的最优聚类中心作为当前数据集敏感度采样的预测。3) 理论保证：证明当数据序列来自同一（未知）分布时，这种预测方法具有质量保证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在数据序列场景下，所提方法在聚类代价与运行时间的权衡上显著优于均匀采样和现有的敏感度采样方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过利用预测降低了敏感度采样的计算开销，同时保持了理论上的质量保证，为大规模k-means聚类提供了一种更实用的解决方案。

title: Qantara: Bridge-Flow Training for Multi-Paradigm JEPA Control
comment: 16 pages, 3 figures, 6 tables. Project page: https://corl-team.github.io/qantara
summary: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) underpin a growing family of latent world models for control from raw pixels, but every existing JEPA world model commits at training time to a single inference paradigm: either trajectory optimisation in a learned dynamics model, or direct behaviour cloning. A single checkpoint that serves both would defer this choice to inference, when deployment constraints (rollout cost, observation accessibility) determine which path wins. We present Qantara, an end-to-end JEPA whose joint training objective pairs a Brownian-bridge interpolant between consecutive clean latents on the state axis with noise-to-data flow matching on the action axis. The same checkpoint serves three inference paradigms without retraining: latent planning, behaviour-cloning action sampling, and inverse dynamics, which we query through a video-inverse composition that first predicts the next latent without action conditioning, then extracts the action. Training concentrates mass on the edges of the (action-time, state-time) noise square, where inference queries the predictor: replacing it with uniform interior sampling drops Push-T planning from 90.1 to 53.3 SR at matched compute. On the LeWM control suite, Qantara reaches a 91.2 SR three-train-seed average and sets new SOTA on OGBench-Cube (+7.7 SR over DINO-WM, +19.7 over LeWM). From the same weights, the behaviour-cloning and video-inverse paths reach 82-83 SR on Push-T and 71-73 SR on Cube. These results move JEPA world models from single-paradigm planners to multi-paradigm controllers.

AI.tldr: Qantara 是一种端到端联合嵌入预测架构（JEPA），通过布朗桥插值与流匹配的联合训练目标，使同一套权重能够在推理时支持潜在规划、行为克隆和逆动力学三种范式，无需重新训练，在LeWM控制套件上达到91.2 SR并刷新OGBench-Cube SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有JEPA世界模型在训练时只能承诺单一推理范式（轨迹优化或行为克隆），无法在推理时根据部署约束灵活切换。作者希望用一个统一检查点同时支持多种推理范式，将选择权推迟到推理阶段。
AI.method: 提出Qantara，基于JEPA架构，联合训练目标包含两个部分：1) 状态轴上的布朗桥插值（Brownian-bridge interpolant），用于连接连续的干净潜在表示；2) 动作轴上的噪声到数据流匹配（noise-to-data flow matching）。推理时支持三种范式：潜在规划、行为克隆动作采样、以及通过"视频-逆组合"实现的逆动力学（先无动作条件预测下一个潜在，再提取动作）。训练将质量集中在(动作-时间, 状态-时间)噪声正方形的边缘，对应推理时查询预测器的位置。
AI.result: Qantara在LeWM控制套件上达到91.2 SR（三训练种子平均），在OGBench-Cube上超越DINO-WM 7.7 SR、超越LeWM 19.7 SR。同一权重下，行为克隆和视频-逆路径在Push-T上达到82-83 SR，在Cube上达到71-73 SR。将训练从边缘替换为均匀内部采样会导致Push-T规划从90.1下降到53.3 SR。
AI.conclusion: Qantara将JEPA世界模型从单范式规划器推进到多范式控制器，同一检查点无需重新训练即可支持多种推理范式，且在不同范式下均取得有竞争力的性能。

title: Data-Driven Soft Labeling Scales DNA Read Classification to Whole-Body Cell-Type Deconvolution
summary: Cell-type deconvolution, the task of estimating the proportions of constituent cell types in a heterogeneous biological sample, is a core problem in computational biology. Methods that rely on epigenetic marks such as DNA methylation typically operate on aggregated methylation estimates, discarding the pattern-level information carried by individual DNA reads. Existing read-level approaches that exploit this information are scarce, and all remain restricted to few-class settings; scaling them further is an open problem because, at scale, non-discriminative reads dominate and hard labels conflict with the many-to-many mapping between methylation patterns and cell types, preventing classifier convergence. To overcome this, we propose data-driven soft labels that estimate the conditional cell-type distribution for each read, and integrate this scheme into Syto, a new modular framework for read-level classification-based deconvolution. On a whole-body atlas of 39 human cell types, Syto reduces MSE by 2.56$\times$ over SoTA, with gains transferring to an out-of-distribution dataset spanning 16 tissues. Syto lays the foundation for modeling increasingly large cell-type panels, with improved applications in biology and healthcare. The proposed soft-labeling scheme is further translatable to any setting with a many-to-many signal-to-label mapping.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Syto框架，通过数据驱动的软标签方法解决基于DNA甲基化读取的细胞类型反卷积问题，在39种细胞类型上MSE降低2.56倍，并适用于多对多的信号-标签映射场景。
AI.motivation: 现有细胞类型反卷积方法多依赖聚合甲基化估计，丢失了单读取的模式信息；而读取级方法受限于少数类别，难以扩展至大规模细胞类型面板，因为非判别性读取占主导且硬标签无法处理读取与细胞类型之间的多对多映射，导致分类器无法收敛。
AI.method: 提出数据驱动的软标签方案，为每条DNA读取估计条件细胞类型分布，并将该机制集成到Syto模块化框架中，实现基于读取级分类的反卷积。
AI.result: 在包含39种人类细胞类型的全身图谱上，Syto将MSE降低2.56倍（相比当前最优方法），且性能可迁移至涵盖16个组织的分布外数据集。
AI.conclusion: Syto为建模大规模细胞类型面板奠定了基础，可改进生物学和医疗应用；所提出的软标签方案可推广至任何具有多对多信号-标签映射的场景。

title: Non-Convex Sparse Reinforcement Learning via Non-Monotone Inclusions
summary:
This work delivers two key contributions: one to efficient feature selection in reinforcement learning
  (RL), the other to the theory of non-monotone inclusions. On the RL side, the estimation bias inherent
  in conventional regularization schemes is addressed by augmenting classical least-squares
  temporal-difference (LSTD) policy evaluation with the sparsity-inducing, non-convex projected minimax
  concave (PMC) penalty. Because the PMC penalty is weakly convex, the resulting fixed-point problem is
  no longer monotone; instead, it falls under a broader class of non-monotone inclusions involving the
  sum of a monotone Lipschitz operator and a hypomonotone operator. On the theory side, novel convergence
  conditions are developed for the forward-reflected-backward splitting (FRBS) method applied to this
  broader class of non-monotone inclusion problems. Under mild conditions, Lyapunov stability and the
  existence of a limit point of the sequence of FRBS iterates are established; alternatively, under the
  weak Minty variational inequality assumption, exact convergence is guaranteed. Numerical tests on
  benchmark datasets show that the proposed FRBS iterates, applied to the non-convexly regularized LSTD
  problem, substantially outperform state-of-the-art feature-selection methods, especially when many
  noisy features are present.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了基于投影极小极大凹（PMC）惩罚的非凸正则化最小二乘时序差分（LSTD）策略评估方法，并针对由此产生的非单调包含问题，发展了前向-反射-后向分裂（FRBS）方法的收敛理论。实验表明该方法在噪声特征较多的场景中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统正则化方法在强化学习的特征选择中存在估计偏差问题，且由于PMC惩罚的弱凸性，对应的不动点问题不再是单调的，需要新的理论工具来保证算法的收敛性。
AI.method: ① 在LSTD策略评估中引入非凸的PMC惩罚以诱导稀疏性；② 将问题建模为单调Lipschitz算子与次单调算子之和的非单调包含问题；③ 应用前向-反射-后向分裂（FRBS）方法求解，并发展新的收敛条件。
AI.result: ① 在温和条件下建立了FRBS迭代的Lyapunov稳定性和极限点存在性；② 在弱Minty变分不等式假设下证明了精确收敛；③ 在基准数据集上的数值实验表明，该方法在含大量噪声特征时显著优于最先进的特征选择方法。
AI.conclusion: 本研究不仅在强化学习中提供了一种高效的特征选择方法，还扩展了非单调包含问题的收敛理论，为更广泛的非凸优化问题提供了分析框架。

title: The Map Behind the Flow: Finite-Step Gradient Descent as a Dynamical System
summary:
Many phenomena of deep learning are dynamical: they concern not only which minima exist, but how gradient descent reaches, avoids, or selects among them. Edge-of-stability behavior, sharpness oscillations, catapult phases, balancing, and movement toward flatter representations are effects of the training map itself, and are poorly captured by the small-step gradient-flow limit.
  This paper studies fixed-step gradient descent as a discrete dynamical system in a hierarchy of exactly solvable models retaining basic structures of deep learning: depth, factorization, width, data coupling, activation, and stochasticity. The starting point is the balanced scalar reduction of a deep linear chain, giving a quartic loss and a cubic gradient map whose post-edge behavior is explicit. Under the natural large-depth scaling, this dynamics converges to a universal Ricker-type map. The edge of stability is therefore not a breakdown of optimization, but the first bifurcation of the training map.
  Embedding the scalar dynamics back into factored models turns these regimes into learning phenomena. Finite steps break conservation laws of gradient flow and contract factorization imbalance; residual oscillations move parameters toward flatter, more balanced representations. Wider linear networks produce a ladder of spectral edges, so the optimal learning rate can lie beyond the first edge. Data coupling, nonlinear activations, and stochastic targets preserve the same organizing principle: finite-step oscillations drive alignment, balancing, and representation selection. Thus the learning rate is not merely a numerical stability parameter. It is a structural parameter of the training dynamics, determining its attractors and shaping the representations gradient descent selects.

AI.tldr: 本文研究固定步长梯度下降作为离散动力系统的行为，通过一系列可精确求解的模型揭示深度学习中边缘稳定性、振荡、平衡等现象的动力学机制，指出学习率不仅是数值稳定性参数，更是训练动力学的结构参数。
AI.motivation: 深度学习的许多现象是动力学的（如边缘稳定性、尖锐度振荡、弹射相、平衡等），但传统的小步长梯度流极限无法很好地捕捉这些由训练映射本身产生的效应。本文旨在建立可精确求解的模型来理解这些动力学现象。
AI.method: 将固定步长梯度下降作为离散动力系统研究，构建包含深度、因子化、宽度、数据耦合、激活函数和随机性等基本结构的可精确求解模型层次。从深度线性链的标量约化出发，得到四次损失和三次梯度映射，在大深度缩放下收敛到通用Ricker型映射。
AI.result: 1) 边缘稳定性不是优化的崩溃，而是训练映射的第一次分岔；2) 有限步长破坏了梯度流的守恒律，残差振荡使参数向更平坦、更平衡的表征移动；3) 更宽的线性网络产生谱边缘阶梯，最优学习率可超过第一个边缘；4) 数据耦合、非线性激活和随机目标都保持相同的组织原则：有限步振荡驱动对齐、平衡和表征选择。
AI.conclusion: 学习率不仅仅是数值稳定性参数，而是训练动力学的结构参数，决定了训练映射的吸引子并塑造了梯度下降所选择的表征。

title: ImputeECG: Deep Learning Reconstruction of Complete 12-Lead Electrocardiograms from Incomplete Recordings for Cardiac Assessment
summary: Complete digital 12-lead electrocardiograms (ECGs) are essential for AI-enabled cardiovascular assessment, yet many clinical ECG records, particularly those digitized from ECG images, remain incomplete because of short display formats, incomplete waveform digitization, lead loss, or signal corruption. We developed ImputeECG, a mask-conditioned one-dimensional Transformer autoencoder that completes 12-lead, 10-s ECGs while retaining all observed samples. The model was trained on PTB-XL and evaluated on PTB-XL and CPSC2018 under simulated incomplete settings, with additional real-world validation in a 43,633-record Kailuan clinical cohort after ECG image digitization. Metrics were computed over originally missing regions, with analyses of morphology and downstream diagnostic utility. On PTB-XL, ImputeECG reduced missing-region MAE by 41.7-51.0% and MSE by 54.0-63.7% versus the strongest baseline, with lower errors in R-peak timing, RR interval, QRS duration, QT interval, and P-wave, QRS-complex, and T-wave reconstruction. On CPSC2018, ImputeECG reduced MAE by 49.7-51.9%, supporting external generalization. In downstream multi-label classification, ImputeECG restored performance to 92.28% AUROC and 33.88% AUPRC in the most incomplete PTB-XL setting, approaching complete-ECG performance. On CPSC2018, completed ECGs achieved 94.75-95.89% AUROC and 78.83-81.86% AUPRC across settings. In Kailuan, ECG completion improved zero-shot sex prediction AUROC from 82.6% to 85.8% and reduced age prediction MAE from 10.72 to 9.87 years after image-based ECG digitization. These findings support ECG completion as a practical strategy for converting incomplete ECG records into AI-ready 12-lead, 10-s digital signals and extending the usable scope of ECG archives for digital cardiac assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ImputeECG，一种基于掩码条件的一维Transformer自编码器，用于补全不完整的12导联心电图（ECG）信号。在PTB-XL、CPSC2018和Kailuan临床队列上验证，该方法在波形重建和下游诊断任务上显著优于基线，能将不完整ECG转化为AI可用的完整数字信号。
AI.motivation: 临床ECG记录常因显示格式短、波形数字化不完整、导联丢失或信号损坏而缺失，限制了AI心血管评估的应用。亟需一种方法将不完整ECG补全为完整的12导联10秒数字信号。
AI.method: 提出ImputeECG，采用掩码条件的一维Transformer自编码器架构，在保留所有观测样本的同时补全缺失的12导联10秒ECG信号。在PTB-XL上训练，在PTB-XL、CPSC2018及Kailuan临床队列（43,633条记录）上验证。
AI.result: PTB-XL上缺失区域MAE降低41.7-51.0%，MSE降低54.0-63.7%；CPSC2018上MAE降低49.7-51.9%。下游分类任务中，最不完整设置下AUROC达92.28%，AUPRC达33.88%，接近完整ECG性能。Kailuan队列中，零样本性别预测AUROC从82.6%提升至85.8%，年龄预测MAE从10.72降至9.87年。
AI.conclusion: ECG补全是将不完整ECG记录转化为AI就绪的12导联10秒数字信号的有效策略，可扩展ECG档案在数字心脏评估中的可用范围。

title: Hyperparameter Transfer in Graph Neural Networks
summary: The performance of deep learning models crucially depends on the settings of hyperparameters like learning rate, initialization scale, and weight decay. Hyperparameter transfer aims to make near-optimal hyperparameter settings consistent across model scale, so that large models can be optimized by proxy tuning their smaller, cheaper-to-optimize counterparts. While transfer principles are well-studied in the context of dense neural networks in language and vision tasks, they remain comparatively under-explored for graph neural networks (GNNs). We develop and validate a transfer parameterization for GNNs trained with SGD, Adam, and AdamW. Through theoretical scaling analyses and controlled experiments, we show that the proposed parameterization yields stable feature updates, learning rate transfer, and improved performance as width and depth increase. For SGD, we identify graph-dependent first-layer correction factors and show that their use can accelerate early training in graphs with sparse bag-of-words inputs. For Adam, we explore how different message passing normalizations affect early- and late-training transfer behavior, illustrating the importance of message passing normalization and advocating for an associated hyperparameter. For AdamW, we adapt a parameterization that allows for the joint transfer of weight decay and learning rate. Together, these results provide a practical recipe for scaling GNNs across a variety of learning tasks and training scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文针对图神经网络（GNN）提出了可用于超参数迁移的参数化方法，分别针对SGD、Adam和AdamW优化器进行理论分析和实验验证，实现了学习率、权重衰减等超参数在不同模型宽度和深度下的稳定迁移，提升了大规模GNN的训练效率。
AI.motivation: 虽然超参数迁移在密集神经网络的语言和视觉任务中已有深入研究，但在图神经网络中尚缺乏系统性探索，因此需要为GNN开发专门的迁移参数化方案。
AI.method: 通过理论缩放分析，针对SGD提出图相关的第一层修正因子以加速稀疏图输入的早期训练；针对Adam研究不同消息传递归一化对迁移行为的影响并提出相关超参数；针对AdamW设计了可联合迁移权重衰减与学习率的参数化方案。
AI.result: 所提参数化方案在不同宽度和深度下实现了稳定的特征更新、学习率迁移以及性能提升，有效支撑了GNN的规模扩展。
AI.conclusion: 本文为GNN在各种学习任务和训练场景下的缩放提供了一套实用的训练方案。

title: Beyond Modality Fusion: Deep Ensembles for Multimodal Classification
summary:
In multimodal classification, late-fusion approaches classify concatenated modality-specific features extracted by unimodal neural networks.
  When modality imbalance is pronounced, various regularization techniques have been proposed to balance the learning process and overcome the inferior performance of late-fusion networks.
  In contrast, this work demonstrates that multimodal data can be effectively classified without any explicit modality fusion, using deep ensembles of unimodal networks.
  We systematically compare deep ensembles to late-fusion networks at equal parameter count and show that ensembles consistently outperform state-of-the-art late-fusion methods designed to address modality imbalance.
  This advantage also holds over intermediate-fusion techniques we evaluated and over hybrid methods that combine unimodal and multimodal predictions.
  We propose and empirically validate a method for selecting the number of models per modality in an ensemble, avoiding computationally expensive exhaustive search.
  Under extreme modality imbalance and small ensemble sizes, the heuristic indicates that ensembles of unimodal models trained solely on the stronger modality are preferable; as the ensemble scales up, incorporating models from the weaker modality becomes beneficial.
  Both predictions align with our empirical findings.
  To systematically explore the challenges of optimizing multimodal models, we propose a synthetic multimodal framework that allows control over both the number of modalities and their predictive strength; our findings are consistent across synthetic and real-world datasets.
  Finally, by fitting scaling laws to bimodal datasets, we estimate the asymptotic performance of ensembles.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，在多模态分类中，无需显式融合，仅通过深度集成单模态网络就能有效分类，且性能优于各类显式融合方法。文章还提出了模态选择的启发式方法和合成多模态框架。
AI.motivation: 针对多模态分类中模态不平衡导致late-fusion方法性能不佳的问题，探索是否可以不依赖显式模态融合，仅用单模态网络的集成来实现有效分类。
AI.method: 1) 系统对比深度集成（deep ensembles）与late-fusion网络，在相同参数量下进行性能比较；2) 提出启发式方法，用于选择集成中各模态的最佳模型数量，避免穷举搜索；3) 提出合成多模态框架，可控地生成不同模态数量和预测强度，用于系统研究多模态优化挑战；4) 对双模态数据集拟合标度律（scaling laws），估算集成的渐近性能。
AI.result: 1) 深度集成始终优于各类state-of-the-art late-fusion及intermediate-fusion方法；2) 在极端模态不平衡且集成规模小时，仅用强模态模型更好；集成规模增大后，加入弱模态模型才有增益；3) 启发式方法的预测与实验结果一致；4) 合成和真实数据集上的发现一致。
AI.conclusion: 多模态分类不需要显式融合，深度集成单模态网络是一种更简单有效的范式，尤其是在模态不平衡场景下。文章提出的启发式方法和合成框架为多模态学习提供了新的研究工具和设计准则。

title: Uncertainty-aware damage identification in short-span bridges via physics-informed variational autoencoder
summary: Vibration-based damage identification in civil infrastructure is a challenging, ill-posed inverse problem due to measurement noise, sparse sensor arrays, and environmental variability. While deep learning is powerful for system identification, deterministic approaches lack reliable uncertainty quantification and can yield physically inconsistent results. This work proposes a robust probabilistic Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) framework: a physics-informed Gaussian copula variational autoencoder (PI-GCVAE) for structural health monitoring (SHM). First, we eliminate the need for data-driven surrogates by embedding a differentiable numerical eigenvalue solver directly into the VAE architecture. This ensures that latent space samples satisfy the governing equations of structural dynamics, reducing the trainable parameter space and improving generalization. Second, we replace the conventional independence assumption of latent variables with a Gaussian copula. This model captures complex, physics-dependent spatial cross-correlations between adjacent structural elements, defining feasible solutions while accounting for inherent system variability and measurement errors. Third, compared with alternatives such as Gaussian mixtures, our copula-based VAE provides an efficient distributional model for high-dimensional, strongly correlated latent spaces. We validate the approach using a synthetic dataset of a simply supported bridge subjected to various damage scenarios and corrupted with stochastic Gaussian noise. Synthetic data enables exhaustive validation against ground-truth stiffness values unavailable in practice. Results demonstrate that the PI-GCVAE accurately recovers the true posterior distribution, achieving 77.2% coverage. The proposed framework provides a reliable, scalable tool for early-stage damage diagnosis in operating bridges.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理信息高斯Copula变分自编码器（PI-GCVAE），通过将可微特征值求解器嵌入VAE并引入高斯Copula捕获空间相关性，实现了在噪声环境下对桥梁损伤的鲁棒概率识别，覆盖率达到77.2%。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法用于结构损伤识别时缺乏可靠的不确定性量化且可能产生物理不一致结果，因此需要一种既能保证物理约束又能提供概率化不确定性评估的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 提出PI-GCVAE框架：(1)在VAE中嵌入可微数值特征值求解器，直接满足结构动力学控制方程；(2)用高斯Copula替代传统独立潜变量假设，建模相邻结构元素间的空间交叉相关性；(3)提供高效的高维强相关潜空间分布模型。
AI.result: 在简支桥梁合成数据集上验证，PI-GCVAE能准确恢复真实后验分布，覆盖率达到77.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为运营中的桥梁早期损伤诊断提供了可靠、可扩展的概率化工具，优于高斯混合等替代方案。

title: CollabEval: Statistically Efficient Collaborative Model Evaluation via Matrix Completion
summary: Evaluating generative AI models is a routine, but resource-intensive, process that is conducted over and over again during the course of model development. In this work, we propose Collaborative Evaluation (CollabEval), a simple, effective, and principled method for exploiting dependencies between historical runs of different models on the same tasks to improve statistical efficiency. Specifically, our approach treats model evaluation as a matrix completion problem over an $M \times N$ matrix of evaluation scores, where $M$ is the total number of models and $N$ is the total number of evaluation prompts. We assume that a subset of these $M$ models are targeted for evaluation. For these target models only a small fraction, $p$, of prompts has been annotated with evaluation scores. Leveraging recent results in prediction-powered inference, we build a low-rank approximation of the score matrix, and use the reconstructed values as control variates in a manner that guarantees unbiased estimates of the true evaluation metric mean, in addition to statistically valid confidence intervals. Empirically, across a wide range of datasets, models, and sparsity levels $p$, we find that CollabEval substantially reduces the mean confidence interval size, and the mean squared error of the point estimate, compared to baseline methods at the same annotation budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CollabEval，一种利用历史模型运行依赖关系来提高生成式AI评估统计效率的方法，通过矩阵补全和预测驱动推断实现无偏估计和有效置信区间。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI模型的评估需要反复进行，成本高昂。现有评估方法在标注预算有限时统计效率低，亟需一种能利用历史数据提升效率的方法。
AI.method: 将模型评估视为一个M×N评分矩阵的补全问题（M个模型，N个评估提示）。对于目标模型，仅标注p%的提示分数。利用预测驱动推断构建低秩近似矩阵，将重建值作为控制变量，从而保证无偏估计和统计有效的置信区间。
AI.result: 在多种数据集、模型和稀疏度p下，相比基线方法，CollabEval在相同标注预算下显著降低了平均置信区间大小和点估计的均方误差。
AI.conclusion: CollabEval提供了一种简单、有效且原理严谨的方法来利用历史评估数据，在节省标注资源的同时提高评估的统计效率。

title: KVpop -- Key-Value Cache Compression with Predictive Online Pruning
summary: Key-value (KV) cache growth is a major bottleneck in autoregressive decoding, as memory and bandwidth scale linearly with context length. Existing KV eviction methods often rely on static heuristics or proxy scores, which poorly track future token utility and cause brittle eviction as relevance shifts. To address this, we introduce KVpop, which learns a fixed-budget KV eviction policy by directly supervising the keep-or-drop decision. The scorer is trained against a novel future-attention target, computed efficiently without materializing dense attention maps. We further introduce a delayed memory-based scorer that, uniquely among learned eviction methods, defers scoring for a fixed number of steps to exploit near-future context. On AIME and HMMT mathematical reasoning, KVpop retains 98% of full-attention performance on Qwen3-4B at 75% KV cache compression and 97% at 88% compression, consistently outperforming established eviction baselines. Qwen3-8B shows even stronger results, reaching near-full teacher performance. These results show that supervising eviction with future-attention signals cuts memory costs while maintaining quality.

AI.tldr: KVpop是一个通过学习未来注意力信号来指导KV缓存驱逐策略的方法，在75%和88%压缩率下分别保留98%和97%的全注意力性能，显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: KV缓存增长是自回归解码的主要瓶颈，现有驱逐策略依赖静态启发式或代理分数，难以准确预测未来token的效用，导致驱逐决策不稳定。
AI.method: 提出KVpop，通过直接监督keep-or-drop决策学习固定预算的KV驱逐策略。使用未来注意力目标训练评分器（无需密集注意力图），并引入延迟记忆评分器，推迟评分以利用近未来上下文信息。
AI.result: 在AIME和HMMT数学推理任务上，Qwen3-4B在75%压缩率下保留98%性能，88%压缩率下保留97%性能。Qwen3-8B表现更强，接近完整教师模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 利用未来注意力信号监督驱逐策略，可以在大幅降低内存开销的同时保持生成质量。

title: Computing Monetary Risk Measures in Linear Time
summary: Monetary risk measures have gained popularity for expressing decision-makers' risk aversion. Value-at-Risk (VaR) and Conditional-Value-at-Risk (CVaR), in particular, are used commonly for this purpose. This paper proposes new efficient algorithms to compute these risk measures for a discrete random variable in expected linear time with respect to the size of its domain. First, we propose a QuickVaR algorithm that computes the VaR of a discrete random variable. Then, we leverage QuickVaR to propose QuickDivergence, an algorithm for computing a class of $\varphi$-divergence risk measures, including the popular CVaR risk measure. The QuickVaR algorithm adapts the well-known Quickselect algorithm, while QuickDivergence builds on polymatroid optimization algorithms. Numerical results show that our new algorithms offer an order-of-magnitude speedup for large domains, and a library implementation of the algorithms is available at https://github.com/RiskAverseRL/RiskMeasures.jl.

AI.tldr: 本文提出QuickVaR和QuickDivergence两种算法，用于在期望线性时间内计算离散随机变量的VaR和一类φ-散度风险度量（包括CVaR），在大规模问题上实现数量级的加速。
AI.motivation: 货币风险度量（如VaR和CVaR）在表达决策者风险厌恶中广泛应用，但现有算法在大规模离散随机变量上的计算效率有待提升。
AI.method: QuickVaR算法改编自Quickselect算法；QuickDivergence算法基于多拟阵优化算法，并利用QuickVaR作为子程序。
AI.result: 新算法在大规模域上实现数量级的加速，并提供Julia库实现。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法在计算效率上显著优于现有方法，适用于大规模风险度量计算场景。

title: FAST: A Holistic Framework for Optimizing Memory-I/O, Computation, and Sampling in Temporal GNN Training
summary: Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNNs) are widely used for learning from dynamic graphs in applications such as recommendation, social network analysis, and traffic forecasting. However, scaling TGNN training to large dynamic graphs remains challenging due to three intertwined bottlenecks: memory I/O, irregular computation, and temporal neighbor sampling. Existing systems often optimize these stages in isolation, leaving substantial performance headroom on the table. We present FAST, a holistic framework that accelerates end-to-end TGNN training by jointly optimizing sampling, memory I/O, and computation. FAST introduces SlimCache, which exploits within-batch compression and cross-batch caching to reduce host-device data movement under limited GPU memory budgets. It further designs thread-efficient graph operators tailored to sparse temporal subgraphs, improving GPU cache locality and reducing the latency of aggregation and edge softmax. In addition, FAST employs a topology-aware sampling strategy that improves CPU cache locality and accelerates temporal neighbor sampling. Extensive experiments on real-world large dynamic graphs show that FAST achieves an average of 2.1x (up to 4.7x) speedup over state-of-the-art systems without sacrificing model accuracy.

AI.tldr: FAST是一个用于加速时序图神经网络(TGNN)端到端训练的 holistic 框架，通过联合优化采样、内存I/O和计算，实现平均2.1倍（最高4.7倍）的加速而不损失模型精度。
AI.motivation: 现有TGNN训练系统因内存I/O、不规则计算和时序邻居采样三个瓶颈相互交织，且常孤立优化各阶段，导致性能提升有限。
AI.method: 提出FAST框架：(1) SlimCache：利用批内压缩和跨批缓存减少GPU显存限制下的主机-设备数据传输；(2) 面向稀疏时序子图的线程高效图算子，提升GPU缓存局部性；(3) 拓扑感知采样策略，提升CPU缓存局部性并加速时序邻居采样。
AI.result: 在真实大规模动态图上，FAST相比最先进系统实现平均2.1倍（最高4.7倍）加速，且不损失模型精度。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化采样、内存I/O和计算三个环节可以显著提升TGNN训练效率，且方法有效。

title: Counterfactual Methods for Detecting Unfairness in Anti-Money Laundering Algorithms
summary: The application of machine learning-based predictive algorithms to Anti-Money Laundering (AML) has grown rapidly, driven by the vast volume of financial transaction data available to banks. These algorithms are typically trained not only on transactional data but also on sensitive client information, which may raise fairness concerns. Despite this, AML detection systems remain largely underexplored from a fairness perspective, even though deeper analytical methods based on counterfactuals are now available. Such techniques enable the decomposition of the direct and indirect effects of potentially sensitive features on model predictions, thereby supporting the evaluation of whether their influence is acceptable from a fairness perspective. Closing this gap, we consider the synthetic IBM AMLSim transaction dataset and construct additional features of the country of an account and its average behaviour. This improves the predictive performance of diverse machine learning models, ranging from baseline decision trees to state-of-the-art graph neural networks. We assess the potential unfairness associated with these features through a counterfactual, path-specific effect analysis. This reveals that fairness violations tend to be more pronounced for models whose predictive performance benefits the most from the extended features. Such a finding highlights a concrete instance of the trade-off between predictive accuracy and fairness in AML applications, thus underscoring the urgency of a systematic fairness analysis in such critical domains.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了反洗钱（AML）系统中基于机器学习的预测算法的公平性问题。通过在合成数据集上引入国家特征和账户平均行为特征，提升了模型性能，但通过反事实路径分析发现，性能提升越大的模型，其公平性 violations 越严重，揭示了准确性与公平性之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 反洗钱系统中广泛使用机器学习算法，但这些算法通常使用包含敏感客户信息的交易数据训练，可能引发公平性问题。然而，AML检测系统在公平性方面尚未得到充分探索，因此本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 使用合成IBM AMLSim交易数据集，构建账户所在国家和平均行为等额外特征，训练从决策树到图神经网络等多种机器学习模型，并通过反事实路径特定效应分析（counterfactual, path-specific effect analysis）来评估潜在的不公平性。
AI.result: 扩展特征提升了多种模型的预测性能。公平性 violations 在性能提升最大的模型中更为明显，即预测准确性与公平性之间存在明显的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 在AML应用中，追求预测性能可能会加剧公平性问题，因此在该关键领域进行系统性的公平性分析非常紧迫。

title: Choosing a parallel heterogeneous ensemble method for tabular classification
summary:
Parallel ensemble methods were compared on $56$ small-to-medium tabular classification tasks drawn from OpenML CC18. A set of ``best practice'' recommendations on the use of ensemble methods was derived from these observations. It was later validated on 28 additional tasks using TabArena's precomputed data, where the recommendation set significantly outperformed Single Best and matched or exceeded individual ensemble methods.
  Two key observations were made. First, Blending and Stacking are inconsistent, but their inconsistencies are independent and happen on different tasks. Second, while Hard Voting's probabilistic classification is rather weak, a consequence of using vote proportions as posterior estimates, Robust Soft Voting's probabilistic classification is particularly successful, especially in the multiclass case.

AI.tldr: 基于56个分类任务对比发现：Blending和Stacking不稳定性相互独立；Hard Voting概率估计弱，而Robust Soft Voting在多分类任务中表现优异。据此提出集成方法最佳实践建议，并在28个额外任务中验证其效果优于单模型。
AI.motivation: 现有集成方法缺乏系统性的最佳实践指导，且对不同集成策略的不稳定性和概率分类性能缺乏深入理解。
AI.method: 在56个OpenML CC18小到中型表格分类任务上比较并行集成方法，提取最佳实践建议，并在28个TabArena任务上验证。
AI.result: Blending和Stacking的不稳定性相互独立；Hard Voting概率分类弱，Robust Soft Voting在多分类中表现优秀；最佳实践建议显著优于单一最佳模型，与单个集成方法相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: 提出了验证有效的集成方法最佳实践建议，揭示了不同集成策略的互补特性和概率分类性能差异。

title: Grokking Is Conditional and Fragile: A Fully-Tractable, Multi-Seed Study at 12K Parameters
summary: Grokking -- the delayed onset of generalization long after a network has fit its training set - -is usually studied in models too large to read completely and reported from single training runs. We instead study a publicly released ~11,856-parameter Llama-style transformer (Glimmer-1-Base) on modular arithmetic, small enough to enumerate its weights, attention, and full input-output map, and we measure grokking as a multi-seed rate rather than a single outcome. In this fully-tractable regime grokking is a conditional, fragile phase transition. It is gated by training-set coverage, whose threshold tracks output cardinality (the modulus) more than task structure, an ordering that holds above the transition and across a ten-fold change in domain size. Weight decay reproduces the Omnigrok inverted-U at 12K parameters, a positive control on the rate measurement. Grokking also sits on a numerical knife-edge: two perturbations of the floating-point environment -- CPU thread count (reduction order) and CPU-versus-GPU execution -- each flip a minority of same-seed outcomes without a detectable shift in the aggregate rate. Decomposition into sub-task specialists helps chiefly by making coverage cheap rather than by adding supervision. Methodologically, multi-seed control under a fixed numerical environment overturns three dramatic single-run narratives in our own data, each a seed confound. The unit of evidence for grokking must therefore be a multi-seed rate under a pinned numerical environment, checked where possible against a direct reading of the model.

AI.tldr: 本文通过仅1.2万参数的缩小版Transformer（Glimmer-1-Base）研究模算术上的"grokking"现象，发现它是条件性、脆弱相变，受训练集覆盖率门控，且对浮点计算环境敏感。方法论上强调：grokking的证据必须是多种子随机种子、固定数值环境下的统计率，而非单次运行结果。
AI.motivation: 现有grokking研究通常在大模型上基于单次训练运行进行报告，结果难以复现和解读。作者希望通过一个可完整读出权重、注意力和完整输入-输出映射的小型Transformer，以多种子统计率的方式，系统性地理解grokking的条件与脆弱性。
AI.method: 使用一个约11,856参数的Llama风格Transformer（Glimmer-1-Base），可完整枚举其权重、注意力和输入-输出映射。采用多随机种子（multi-seed）的率测量而非单次结果，并控制数值环境（CPU线程数、CPU vs GPU）。通过训练集覆盖率、权重衰减、子任务分解等实验分析grokking条件。
AI.result: （1）Grokking是条件性、脆弱的相变，由训练集覆盖率门控，阈值主要取决于输出基数（模数）而非任务结构；（2）权重衰减在1.2万参数上复现了Omnigrok的倒U形曲线；（3）浮点环境扰动（CPU线程数、CPU vs GPU）可翻转少数种子结果而不改变聚合率；（4）子任务分解主要降低覆盖成本而非添加监督；（5）多种子控制可推翻单次运行叙事（seed confound）。
AI.conclusion: Grokking的证据单位必须是多随机种子、固定数值环境下的统计率，并尽可能结合对模型的直接解读。单次运行结果不可靠，容易受种子和数值环境混淆。

title: PDEFlow: Autonomous Agentic PDE Pipelines for Neural Operator Learning and Solver-Free Inference
summary: We present PDEFlow, an autonomous agentic framework that turns user-level ODE and PDE descriptions into solver-backed neural-operator pipelines. The workflow links problem specification, data generation, operator training, and checkpoint-based inference. A stateful input graph converts multi-turn natural-language input and user edits into validated problem specifications. The data-generation module then samples parameters, solves the configured governing-equation with FEniCSx finite-element backend, and stores the solutions as operator-ready tensors. The training and inference stages use a registry-based interface, allowing different neural operators to be trained and deployed without changing the surrounding pipeline. In the current implementation, we instantiate this interface with a multi-branch Bayesian DeepONet. Experiments on benchmark ODE and PDE tasks show that PDEFlow can construct valid specifications, generate solver-backed datasets, train neural operators across steady and transient problem classes, and provide solver-free predictions from saved checkpoints. The framework is designed for repeatable scientific and engineering workflows where many related physics configurations must be specified, simulated, learned, and queried with minimal manual intervention.

AI.tldr: PDEFlow是一个自动化智能框架，能将用户对ODE/PDE的自然语言描述转化为完整的神经算子求解管道，涵盖问题规范、数据生成、模型训练和推理。
AI.motivation: 减少在科学计算和工程中重复进行物理问题建模、仿真、训练和查询的人工干预，实现工作流自动化。
AI.method: 1. 状态输入图将多轮自然语言转换为验证后的问题规范；2. 数据生成模块用FEniCSx有限元求解器采样参数并生成算子张量；3. 基于注册机制的接口支持不同神经算子训练与部署，当前实例为多分支贝叶斯DeepONet。
AI.result: 在基准ODE/PDE任务上，PDEFlow能构建有效规范、生成求解器数据集、训练稳态与瞬态问题的神经算子，并通过检查点提供无求解器的预测。
AI.conclusion: 该框架适用于需要重复指定、模拟、学习和查询多种物理配置的科学与工程工作流，显著降低人工干预需求。

title: Physiological Noise Augmentation Improves Non-Invasive Brain-to-Speech
summary: Non-invasive brain-to-speech decoding aims to restore communication to patients suffering from neurodegenerative disease, without the risks of neurosurgery. Existing MEG- and EEG-based methods, while scalable, continue to suffer from high word error rates driven by relatively low signal-to-noise ratios compared to invasive recordings. We propose physiological noise augmentation (PNA), a data augmentation method that explicitly trains decoders to become invariant to task-agnostic artifacts (e.g. ocular and cardiac activity). PNA draws inspiration from automatic speech recognition systems, where environmental noise (e.g. dogs barking, city traffic) is added to clean speech to improve robustness. Analogously, we decompose brain recordings into clean data and noise artifacts using independent component analysis (ICA), before scaling and remixing to generate biophysically realistic, label-preserving training examples. We show that PNA approximates anisotropic regularization, penalizing decoder sensitivity along artifact-dominated directions. On MegNIST, a 12k-trial imagined-digit MEG dataset, PNA with 10-trial averaging improves EEGNet decoding accuracy by 4.7 percentage points (absolute) over training on real data alone. Our results suggest that artifact-aware augmentation and trial averaging are complementary tools for improving robustness in non-invasive speech BCIs.

AI.tldr: 提出生理噪声增强(PNA)方法，通过ICA分解脑记录为干净数据和噪声伪迹，再缩放混合生成训练样本，提升非侵入式脑-语音解码的鲁棒性，在MegNIST数据集上将EEGNet解码准确率提升4.7个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有MEG/EEG非侵入式脑-语音解码方法由于信噪比低导致词错误率高，亟需提升解码器对任务无关伪迹的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 借鉴自动语音识别中的环境噪声增强思想，利用ICA分解脑记录为干净信号和噪声成分，通过缩放再混合生成生物物理真实、保留标签的训练样本，实现各向异性正则化。
AI.result: 在MegNIST数据集上，结合10次试次平均，PNA使EEGNet解码准确率绝对提升4.7个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 伪迹感知增强与试次平均是非侵入式语音BCI中互补的鲁棒性提升工具。

title: MeGA-MP: Metric Graph Advection Message Passing -- A Physics-Informed Message Passing Operator for Advection-Dominated Metric Graphs
summary: Many real-world systems are organized as networks where spatio-temporal dynamics unfold along connections and not discretely between nodes. Examples include utility networks such as water distribution systems or gas networks, electrical grids, and traffic flow networks. Such systems are naturally modeled as metric graphs, where edges correspond to one-dimensional Euclidean subspaces connected at vertices. Metric graphs are independent of an underlying global Euclidean space, limiting direct application of typical PINNs and operator-learning methods. Especially transport dynamics like advection require a methodology able to capture antisymmetric and long-range dependencies on graphs, which is itself a challenge. We propose a novel physics-informed message passing operator that encodes linear advection on metric graphs as an inductive bias. In the purely advective setting, the operator provably recovers the exact dynamics up to a theoretically derived discretization error without any training. Combined with trainable components like MLPs, our message passing operator extends to realistic advection-reaction dynamics in water distribution systems, where we achieve superior performance compared to baselines and zero-shot generalization across different graph topologies.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种物理信息消息传递算子，将度量图上的线性平流编码为归纳偏置，在纯平流场景下无需训练即可精确恢复动力学，并在水分配系统的平流-反应动力学中优于基线方法，且能零样本泛化到不同图拓扑。
AI.motivation: 许多真实系统（如供水网络、电网、交通流网络）是度量图结构，其上的时空动力学沿边（一维欧氏子空间）而非节点间离散展开。传统PINN和算子学习方法依赖全局欧氏空间，无法直接应用；且平流等输运动力学需要捕捉图上的反对称和长程依赖关系，这本身具有挑战性。
AI.method: 提出一种物理信息消息传递算子，将线性平流在度量图上的动力学作为归纳偏置编码到消息传递过程中。纯平流场景下，该算子理论上可恢复精确动力学（仅含离散化误差），无需训练。结合可训练组件（如MLP）后，可扩展至实际的水分配系统中的平流-反应动力学。
AI.result: 在纯平流设置下，算子无需训练即可理论保证恢复精确动力学。在现实水分配系统的平流-反应动力学任务中，该方法优于基线方法，并实现了跨不同图拓扑的零样本泛化。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的物理信息消息传递算子在度量图上的输运动力学建模中有效，兼具理论保证和实际泛化能力，为图神经网络与物理信息融合提供了新思路。

title: Platonic Projection Structures: Operator-Induced Observability in Representation Learning
summary: We characterize observability in representation learning through Platonic Projection Structures (PPS), an operator-theoretic framework for analyzing representation accessibility under partial observation. Rather than treating observable outputs as direct reflections of latent representations, PPS models observation through a self-adjoint positive semidefinite operator acting on a latent representation space. A system is represented as a triple $(H, Π, O)$, where $H$ is a latent representation space, $Π\succeq 0$ is an observation operator, and $O(v)=\langle v,Πv\rangle$ defines an induced scalar observable. Observability is characterized by the quotient geometry $H/\ker(Π)$, representing equivalence classes of latent states indistinguishable under observation. We show that quantum measurement and representation inference under linear observation models share this operator-theoretic structure while differing in the algebraic properties of their observation operators; the correspondence is structural rather than physical. Representation transfer and knowledge distillation can likewise be interpreted as approximate preservation of observable geometry through $ΦΠ_T \approx Π_S Φ$. PPS also reveals a structural limitation of output-based interpretability: latent components in $\ker(Π)$ are inaccessible from induced observables, imposing intrinsic constraints on attribution and explanation methods. Controlled empirical validations demonstrate kernel-invariant observability, projection-induced attribution gaps, and rank-controlled observable geometry in latent representation spaces. PPS thus provides an explicit characterization of observability through operator-induced quotient geometry and a unified perspective on representation accessibility, interpretability, and projection-mediated inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出柏拉图投影结构（PPS），一个基于算子理论的框架，用于刻画表征学习中的可观性。通过自伴半正定观测算子作用于潜在空间，利用商几何 $H/\ker(Π)$ 描述不可区分状态等价类，统一了量子测量、表征推理、知识蒸馏等任务的结构解释，并揭示了基于输出的可解释性在核空间中的固有限制。
AI.motivation: 现有表征学习缺乏对可观性（哪些潜在信息可通过观测访问）的形式化刻画，尤其缺少跨越不同任务（如表征推理、知识蒸馏、可解释性）的统一理论视角。
AI.method: 定义三元组 $(H, Π, O)$，其中 $Π\succeq 0$ 为自伴半正定观测算子，$O(v)=\langle v,Πv\rangle$ 为诱导标量可观测量；可观性由 $H/\ker(Π)$ 商几何表征；通过 $ΦΠ_T \approx Π_S Φ$ 解释表征迁移与知识蒸馏。
AI.result: 量子测量与线性观测模型下的表征推理共享相同算子结构（差异仅在代数性质）；基于输出的可解释方法受限于 $\ker(Π)$ 中不可访问成分；实验验证了核不变可观性、投影诱导归因间隙及秩可控可观几何。
AI.conclusion: PPS 提供了可观性的显式算子-商几何刻画，统一了表征可访问性、可解释性与投影中介推理的理论视角，揭示了结构性的认知边界。

title: Relational Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Dynamic Pricing in High-Speed Railway Markets
summary: In liberalised railway systems, operators must set prices dynamically in an environment with partial observability, as they retain private information about their objectives and performance, where regulatory constraints prohibit communication or direct information exchange between competitors to prevent explicit collusion. Consequently, agents must learn to infer strategic interactions only from observable market data which presents a significant challenge for multi-agent reinforcement learning, where standard approaches typically treat observations as unstructured vectors, ignoring the underlying market topology that governs strategic interactions. To address this, an entity graph modelling approach is proposed, which represents the environment as a graph of operational units, rather than decision-making agents or static infrastructure, encoding competition, coordination, and connectivity relations between entities. Then, an extension of the multi-agent twin delayed deep deterministic policy gradient algorithm with graph-based representation learning processes the features of the entities through a multi-layer relational graph convolutional network and aggregates them via a learnt attention mechanism. Experimental results in a rail pricing reinforcement learning environment show that this novel framework achieves higher revenue and stability in two different settings of increasing market complexity compared to a representative selection of relational and non-relational baselines. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/Kinrre/RelationalRailPricing-RL

AI.tldr: 针对铁路系统中运营商在部分可观测环境下的动态定价问题，提出了一种基于实体图建模的多智能体强化学习框架，通过图卷积网络和注意力机制处理市场拓扑结构，实验表明该方法在复杂市场中比基线方法获得了更高收益和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 在放松管制的铁路系统中，运营商需要在部分可观测环境下动态定价，且监管禁止竞争者之间直接沟通或信息交换以防止合谋。标准多智能体强化学习方法将观测视为非结构化向量，忽略了市场拓扑结构，因此需要一种能捕获实体间竞争、协调和连接关系的方法。
AI.method: 提出实体图建模方法，将环境表示为运营单元（而非决策智能体或静态基础设施）构成的图，编码竞争、协调和连接关系。在此基础上扩展多智能体TD3算法，使用多层关系图卷积网络（R-GCN）处理实体特征，并通过学习到的注意力机制进行聚合。
AI.result: 在铁路定价强化学习环境中，该框架在两种不同市场复杂度的设置下，相较于代表性关系型和非关系型基线方法，均实现了更高的收益和更好的稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 图建模和图神经网络能够有效捕捉市场拓扑结构中的战略交互信息，从而提升多智能体强化学习在铁路动态定价问题中的性能。

title: SMART: A Machine Learning and Monte Carlo Framework for Rapid Analysis of Stochastic Transistor Aging and Process Variation in Digital Circuits
comment: Submitted to Engineering Reports, Under Review
summary: As CMOS technology scales into the deep nanometer regime, digital circuit reliability is increasingly threatened by the combined stochastic effects of Bias Temperature Instability (BTI) and Process Variation (PV). Traditional reliability analysis methods, which rely on computationally intensive simulations or extensive lookup tables, fail to scale efficiently for large designs, creating a critical bottleneck in design space exploration. To address this, we propose SMART, a novel framework that integrates Machine Learning (ML) with Monte Carlo simulation to enable rapid, high-fidelity reliability analysis. SMART employs Random Forest regression to predict gate delay distributions directly, bypassing time-consuming atomic model parameter extractions. Crucially, the model utilizes Bayesian Optimization for automated hyperparameter tuning, ensuring maximum predictive robustness across diverse libraries. Experimental validation on ISCAS85 benchmark circuits demonstrates that SMART achieves a 94.54% reduction in analysis time compared to state-of-the-art methods, while maintaining a remarkable average accuracy error of just 1.63%. By shifting computational complexity to an offline training phase, the proposed framework offers a scalable, accurate solution for designing resilient, reliability-aware digital systems.

AI.tldr: 提出SMART框架，融合机器学习（随机森林回归）与贝叶斯超参数优化的蒙特卡洛模拟，以极低误差（1.63%）和94.54%的时间缩减高效分析深纳米工艺下数字电路的BTI与工艺变异性可靠性问题。
AI.motivation: 随着CMOS进入深纳米时代，BTI和工艺变异的随机效应严重威胁数字电路可靠性，传统基于密集仿真或查找表的方法在大规模设计中存在效率瓶颈，亟需可扩展的高效可靠性分析方案。
AI.method: 将机器学习与蒙特卡洛模拟集成：采用随机森林回归直接预测门延迟分布，避免原子模型参数提取；同时使用贝叶斯优化自动调参，提升模型鲁棒性。将计算复杂度转移到离线训练阶段。
AI.result: 在ISCAS85基准电路上，相比现有最优方法，分析时间减少94.54%，平均精度误差仅为1.63%。
AI.conclusion: SMART通过离线训练转移计算负载，为大规模数字系统的可靠性感知设计提供了一种可扩展且高精度的解决方案。

title: Latent Programming Horizons in Coding Agents
summary: A coding agent solving a software-engineering task spends dozens of steps reasoning, editing code, and running tests, yet little is known about what the underlying language model internally represents about the program it is working on. We show that the residual streams of language models under coding agents linearly encode properties of the evolving program: a logistic-regression probe on hidden states is able to decode whether the current code parses, passes its test suite, reduces the number of failing tests, and introduces regressions, reaching AUC up to 0.83 for correctness across two models and two benchmarks. Our second finding is more surprising: these representations run ahead of the agent's own edits. Probes trained to predict the outcome of future edits (before they are materialized and written on disk) achieve performance above chance up to roughly 25 steps in advance. We call this the agent's latent programming horizon. As a proof of external validity, we show that the probes transfer across benchmarks without retraining. Our positive results open calls for more research in mechanistic interpretability of coding agents.

AI.tldr: 语言模型在编码智能体执行软件工程任务时，其残差流能线性编码程序属性（如语法正确性、测试通过率、回归错误），且这些表征能提前预测编辑结果（最多25步），表现出"潜在编程视界"现象。
AI.motivation: 尽管编码智能体在执行软件工程任务时需多步推理、编辑和测试，但语言模型内部对正在处理的程序究竟表示了什么信息，目前尚不清楚。
AI.method: 在两种模型和两种基准上，使用逻辑回归探针从隐藏状态中解码程序属性（如是否解析成功、是否通过测试、失败测试数减少、引入回归）；并训练探针预测未来编辑的结果（在编辑实际写入磁盘之前）。
AI.result: 探针在正确性预测上AUC最高达0.83；能提前最多25步预测未来编辑结果（超过随机水平）；探针无需重新训练即可跨基准迁移。
AI.conclusion: 编码智能体语言模型内部存在对程序状态的前瞻性表征（潜在编程视界），这为编码智能体的机制可解释性研究开辟了新方向。

title: FlatManifold: Robust Continual Learning under Severe Label Noise and Domain Shifts via Intrinsic Manifold Flattening
summary:
In non-stationary streaming environments, simultaneously adapting to complex, non-linear domain shifts via continual learning while mitigating the catastrophic effects of severe, uncalibrated label noise poses a fundamental mathematical challenge. In this paper, we propose \FlatManifold{}, a novel, streamlined robust continual learning framework that utilizes a Nyström manifold flattening map based on the kernel trick and projection onto an orthogonalized Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS).
  Unlike traditional methods that rely on complex, error-prone sample-filtering pipelines, the proposed approach exploits the intrinsic mathematical robustness of the flattened space itself. By mapping feature distributions onto a fixed orthogonal target topology with a ridge regularizer, the framework naturally smoothes and counteracts the influence of extreme label noise during the optimization process. Concurrently, catastrophic forgetting is prevented via a continual topology brake term that leverages the covariance matrix of past experiences.
  Extensive evaluation on real-world multi-session robotics datasets demonstrates that even under severe conditions featuring 40\% symmetric label noise, \FlatManifold{} successfully mitigates gradient corruption. Under extreme cross-session domain shifts spanning various seasons and lighting conditions, the proposed framework establishes high generalization capabilities, significantly outperforming standard sequential optimization baselines and proving that structural linearization itself serves as a powerful mathematical barrier against distributed label corruption.

AI.tldr: FlatManifold提出了一种基于Nyström核技巧和正交化RKHS投影的流形展平方法，在非平稳流式环境下同时应对持续学习中的灾难性遗忘和严重标签噪声问题，无需复杂样本过滤流程。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理非平稳流式环境中的复杂非线性域偏移和严重标签噪声时，依赖复杂且易出错的样本过滤流程，缺乏内在的数学鲁棒性。
AI.method: 利用Nyström核技巧构建流形展平映射，将特征分布投影到带有岭正则化的固定正交目标拓扑上，并通过基于历史协方差矩阵的持续拓扑制动项防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在包含40%对称标签噪声和跨季节、光照条件极端域偏移的真实多会话机器人数据集上，FlatManifold有效缓解了梯度破坏，并显著优于标准序贯优化基线。
AI.conclusion: 结构线性化本身可作为对抗分布式标签污染的强有力数学屏障，证明了流形展平策略在鲁棒持续学习中的有效性。

title: Video-based detection of cessation of breathing in pre-term infants using machine learning
comment: Paper submitted to Computer Methods and Programs in Biomedicine (CMPB)
summary:
Pre-term infants are susceptible to potentially harmful apnoea-related cessations of breathing due to immature respiratory control. However, reliable respiratory monitoring in the neonatal intensive care unit (NICU) remains challenging because motion artefacts, sensor displacement, and skin fragility can compromise contact-based measurements. Non-contact video monitoring offers a complementary approach that does not depend on adhesive sensors while providing additional respiratory information.
  We investigated whether camera-based signals can detect apnoea-related cessation of breathing (COBE) and provide complementary information to routinely acquired physiological signals. Using video and clinical recordings from 30 pre-term infants, respiratory motion was extracted from dynamically tracked torso regions to generate camera-derived time-series signals. Camera-only models were trained using residual network (ResNet) architectures, while hybrid models combined video-derived signals with impedance pneumography (IP), ECG-derived respiration (EDR), and the PPG-derived respiratory envelope.
  Camera-only models achieved a balanced accuracy of 76.9%, demonstrating the feasibility of non-contact COBE detection. Combining video-derived features with IP improved balanced accuracy to 90.6%, outperforming either modality alone and indicating that video provides respiratory information beyond standard physiological signals.
  These findings show that video-derived signals contain clinically relevant respiratory features and enhance COBE detection when combined with conventional physiological signals. This supports non-contact video as a complementary modality for automated COBE detection and highlights its potential to improve the robustness of neonatal respiratory monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于视频的非接触式呼吸监测方法，用于检测早产儿呼吸暂停事件。通过30名早产儿的视频和临床数据，结合残差网络(ResNet)和混合模型，发现仅用摄像头检测的平衡准确率为76.9%，而将视频信号与阻抗呼吸描记法(IP)结合后准确率提升至90.6%，表明视频信号能提供传统生理信号之外的补充呼吸信息。
AI.motivation: 早产儿因呼吸控制未成熟而易发生呼吸暂停，但新生儿重症监护室(NICU)中的接触式呼吸监测容易受到运动伪影、传感器位移和皮肤脆弱性等问题的干扰。因此需要探索非接触式视频监测作为补充方案，验证其能否检测呼吸暂停相关事件并提供传统信号之外的补充信息。
AI.method: 收集30名早产儿的视频和临床记录，从动态跟踪的躯干区域提取呼吸运动生成视频时域信号。采用两种建模方式：(1)仅使用摄像头信号的ResNet模型；(2)将视频信号与阻抗呼吸描记法(IP)、心电图衍生呼吸信号(EDR)、光电容积脉搏波衍生呼吸包络(PPG)相结合的混合模型。
AI.result: 仅用摄像头模型检测呼吸暂停的平衡准确率为76.9%；将视频特征与IP结合后，平衡准确率提升至90.6%，优于单独使用任一模态。
AI.conclusion: 视频衍生信号包含临床相关的呼吸特征，能够增强与传统生理信号结合时的呼吸暂停检测能力。非接触式视频可作为自动呼吸暂停检测的补充模态，有潜力提高新生儿呼吸监测的鲁棒性。

title: CanniUplift: A Holistic Framework for Mitigating Seller and Incentive Cannibalization in E-commerce Uplift Modeling
summary: Personalized incentive allocation is vital for e-commerce, where uplift modeling is the standard for estimating Individual Treatment Effects (ITE). However, traditional models often fail in complex multi-seller environments with violations of the Stable Unit Treatment Value Assumption (SUTVA). We identify two critical challenges: Seller-level Cannibalization, where incentives shift expenditure between shops without growing the platform, and Incentive-level Cannibalization, where organic conversions or alternative rewards introduce significant noise into incrementality estimation. In this paper, we propose CanniUplift, a unified framework to mitigate these dual-source cannibalization effects. Specifically, we design Platform-level Global Alignment (PGA) to capture cross-shop substitution through global GMV consistency constraints. To tackle incentive-driven noise, we introduce Redemption-based Decomposition Denoising (RDD), which uses redemption behavior to decompose treated outcomes and reduce attribution noise within an entire-space framework. Furthermore, a Treat-Attention mechanism is designed to model intricate interactions between users' historical behaviors and current treatment options. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and large-scale industrial datasets demonstrate that CanniUplift significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Ablation studies confirm that the integration of PGA and RDD consistently improves wAUUC and wQINI. Successfully deployed online, our framework achieved a 4.08% relative increase in platform-wide incremental GMV (Delta GMV) over the production baseline and improved ROI in online A/B tests, proving effective in driving global platform growth.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CanniUplift框架，通过平台级全局对齐（PGA）和基于赎回的分解去噪（RDD）机制，解决电商多卖家环境中由卖家层面和激励层面双重蚕食效应导致的个体处理效应（ITE）估计偏差问题。实验和在线部署表明该方法显著优于基线，平台增量GMV提升4.08%。
AI.motivation: 传统提升建模（Uplift Modeling）在复杂多卖家电商环境中失效，原因在于稳定单位处理值假设（SUTVA）被违反：卖家层面存在"蚕食效应"（激励导致支出在不同店铺间转移而非平台增长），激励层面存在"蚕食效应"（自然转化或替代奖励干扰增量估计）。亟需一个统一框架来同时缓解这两种噪声。
AI.method: 提出CanniUplift统一框架，包含三个核心组件：1）平台级全局对齐（PGA），通过全局GMV一致性约束捕获跨店替代效应；2）基于赎回的分解去噪（RDD），利用赎回行为分解处理结果，在全空间框架下降低归因噪声；3）Treat-Attention机制，建模用户历史行为与当前处理选项之间的复杂交互。
AI.result: 在合成数据和工业大规模数据集上，CanniUplift显著优于当前最优基线。消融实验证实PGA和RDD的集成一致提升wAUUC和wQINI。在线A/B测试中，相比生产基线，平台增量GMV相对提升4.08%，ROI也得到改善。
AI.conclusion: CanniUplift有效解决了多卖家环境下双重蚕食效应对增量建模的干扰，并在实际电商平台上验证了其推动全局增长的有效性，为个性化激励分配提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: FUSE: FK-Steered Multi-Modal Flow Matching for Efficient Simulation-Based Posterior Estimation
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). 22 pages, 5 figures
summary: Simulation-Based Inference (SBI) is critical for scientific discovery, with generative models offering a promising path toward efficient inference. However, existing methods struggle with effective multimodal modeling. They often rely on brute-force fusion strategies that ignore the structural disparities between parameters and observations, thus limiting estimation fidelity. In this work, we introduce FUSE (Feynman-Kac steered mUlti-modal flow matching for efficient Simulation-based posterior Estimation). Unlike prior work, FUSE employs a dual-track architecture that preserves the distinct features of multimodal inputs while facilitating dynamic interaction. Additionally, we propose an FK-steered sampling strategy that leverages intermediate observation likelihoods to guide the generative trajectories, effectively improving the sample quality during inference. Our approach outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on standard SBI benchmarks, producing posteriors that closely match ground-truth MCMC. Furthermore, in a real-world exoplanet orbital estimation task, FUSE successfully resolves complex parameter degeneracies that challenge existing methods, highlighting its potential to accelerate complex scientific discoveries in astrophysics and beyond.

AI.tldr: 提出FUSE框架，通过双轨架构和FK引导采样策略，在模拟推演推断中实现高效多模态后验估计，超越现有方法并在真实天体物理任务中成功解决参数简并问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SBI方法在多模态建模中依赖暴力融合策略，忽视了参数与观测之间的结构差异，导致估计精度受限。
AI.method: 1) 双轨架构（dual-track architecture），保留多模态输入的独特特征并促进动态交互；2) FK-steered采样策略，利用中间观测似然引导生成轨迹，提升推理阶段样本质量。
AI.result: 在标准SBI基准上超越SOTA，生成的后验与真实MCMC高度吻合；在真实系外行星轨道估计任务中，成功解决了现有方法难以处理的复杂参数简并问题。
AI.conclusion: FUSE有效提升了多模态后验估计的保真度，有望加速天体物理学等领域的科学发现。

title: GeoFlow: Geo-Aware Modeling of Inter-Area Relationships in Origin-Destination Flow Prediction and Generation
summary: Origin-destination (OD) flow modeling underpins urban planning and mobility analysis, but prevailing graph-based methods often neglect salient geographic attributes, limiting their ability to model long-range and multi-area dependencies. In this paper, we introduce GeoFlow, a novel framework that (i) augments area representations with geospatial attributes, including relative positions, k-hop and geodesic distances, (ii) employs a specialized geometric-intrinsic fusion encoder design that combines graph attention for intrinsic area signals with coordinate-aware encoders for global structure, and (iii) adopts an axial-global attention decoder to capture OD-specific competitive dependencies. For OD flow generation, GeoFlow is paired with flow matching models to produce more authentic and diverse mobility samples. Empirically, GeoFlow achieves superior performance in predictive accuracy, while substantially improving generative fidelity and diversity. Ablation and analytical studies confirm the contribution of each component. Code is available at https://github.com/ZheruiHuang/GeoFlow.

AI.tldr: GeoFlow是一个融合地理空间属性的OD流建模框架，通过几何-内在融合编码器和轴向-全局注意力解码器，结合流匹配模型，在预测精度和生成质量上均取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图的OD流建模方法忽视了重要的地理空间属性，导致难以建模长距离和多区域依赖关系。
AI.method: (1) 用相对位置、k跳距离和测地距离增强区域表示；(2) 几何-内在融合编码器：图注意力处理内在信号 + 坐标感知编码器处理全局结构；(3) 轴向-全局注意力解码器捕获OD特定竞争依赖；(4) 与流匹配模型结合生成多样化样本。
AI.result: 预测精度达到最优，生成保真度和多样性显著提升，消融实验验证各组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: GeoFlow通过融合地理空间信息与创新的编码器-解码器设计，有效解决了传统方法忽视地理属性的问题，为OD流预测与生成提供了更准确的方案。

title: Target-Guided Selective Reweighting for Physics-Informed Neural Network Inverse Problems: A Transfer Learning Approach
summary: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) encounter ill-posed optimization, loss competition, and parameter compensation in partial differential equation (PDE) inverse problems. Transfer learning can reuse representations from source tasks, but direct fine-tuning may introduce negative transfer when dominant physical mechanisms, governing parameters, or observation noise differ between source and target domains: the model achieves low field error yet recovers incorrect target physical parameters. To mitigate, we propose Target-Guided Selective Reweighting PINN (TGSR-PINN), a target-evidence-driven representation correction method for PINN inverse transfer learning. TGSR-PINN transfers only the weights and biases from the source PINN, while target physical parameters are independently initialized; after a short target-adaptation phase, the method computes neuron target scores using first-order Taylor sensitivity and pre-activation variance on fixed scoring batches, and converts evidence associated with low-scoring neurons into continuous weak-adaptation signals via a Gaussian mixture model (GMM) with rank fallback. TGSR-PINN then applies selective soft decay to input weight rows and biases of low-scoring neurons instead of hard pruning or random resetting. In experiments, TGSR-PINN improves target parameter recovery while maintaining comparable field accuracy in the high-Péclet 2D advection-diffusion task and in the Allen--Cahn to Burgers cross-PDE-family transfer task; a 5%-noise reaction--diffusion case provides supplementary evidence under milder source-target mismatch. Ablation studies suggest that neuron target scoring, weak-adaptation signal estimation, layer protection, and selective soft decay jointly contribute to the benefits.

AI.tldr: 提出TGSR-PINN方法，通过神经元目标评分（一阶泰勒敏感度+预激活方差）和GMM弱适应信号估计，对迁移学习中的低分神经元权重进行选择性软衰减，解决了PINN逆问题迁移学习中的负迁移问题，在保持场精度的同时改善了目标参数恢复。
AI.motivation: PINN逆问题存在不适定优化、损失竞争和参数补偿问题；迁移学习中的直接微调在源域与目标域的物理机制、控制参数或观测噪声不同时，会导致负迁移——模型场误差低但恢复的目标物理参数错误。
AI.method: 1) 仅迁移源PINN的权重和偏置，目标物理参数独立初始化；2) 经过短期目标适应后，利用一阶泰勒敏感度和预激活方差计算神经元目标分数；3) 通过GMM（带排名回退）将低分神经元的证据转化为连续弱适应信号；4) 对低分神经元的输入权重行和偏置进行选择性软衰减（而非硬剪枝或随机重置）。
AI.result: 在高Péclet数二维平流扩散任务、Allen-Cahn到Burgers的跨PDE族迁移任务中，TGSR-PINN在保持相当场精度的同时改善了目标参数恢复；5%噪声的反应扩散实验在更温和的源-目标失配下提供了补充证据。消融研究表明神经元目标评分、弱适应信号估计、层保护和选择性软衰减共同贡献了性能提升。
AI.conclusion: TGSR-PINN通过目标证据驱动的表示修正，有效缓解了PINN逆问题迁移学习中的负迁移，在跨物理机制和跨PDE族场景下均能恢复正确的目标物理参数。

title: Adaptive Inference Batching using Policy Gradients
summary:
Inference serving systems must balance throughput and latency under bursty, heterogeneous workloads, yet the industry standard remains static batching policies that require manual tuning and cannot adapt to shifting traffic. We investigate whether reinforcement learning (RL) can learn adaptive batching and routing policies that outperform these heuristics, training REINFORCE and PPO agents on a discrete-event simulator validated against queuing theory and production traces (Azure Functions, BurstGPT). We formulate the problem as an MDP over queue state, request type and GPU availability, evaluating across standard Poisson traffic, extreme bursts, real-world traces and heterogeneous multi-GPU routing.
  Our central finding is a clear boundary condition for RL's value in systems problems. In single-GPU settings, a well-tuned static batching policy is already near-optimal under Poisson-like arrivals and RL offers only marginal gains (+0.1% to +1.0%). In multi-GPU heterogeneous routing, however, where fast and slow requests compete for shared resources, the agent discovers a workload-segregation policy that eliminates Head-of-Line blocking, yielding a 3.5x (348%) improvement over Round-Robin and a 48% improvement over the strongest heuristic baseline (Shortest-Queue), with 60% higher throughput and 25% lower latency while respecting SLA constraints. The policy generalizes to unseen bursty and real-world traffic despite training only on synthetic Poisson arrivals and an attention-augmented policy network converges roughly 20% faster than an MLP baseline.
  These results suggest RL's advantage over engineered heuristics concentrates in combinatorial, multi-resource decisions rather than single-resource temporal scheduling, a practical distinction for deciding where learned policies justify their engineering cost in production inference infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 本文研究强化学习(RL)在推理服务系统的自适应批处理与路由策略中的应用，发现在单GPU场景下RL优于静态策略有限(+1%)，但在多GPU异构路由中RL通过学习工作负载隔离策略，相比轮询提升3.5倍吞吐量且降低25%延迟，表明RL的优势集中在组合性多资源决策而非单资源调度。
AI.motivation: 当前推理服务系统依赖静态批处理策略，需要手动调优且无法适应突发、异构的工作负载变化，缺乏自适应能力。
AI.method: 将问题建模为MDP（马尔可夫决策过程），使用REINFORCE和PPO算法在离散事件模拟器上训练，策略网络使用注意力机制增强，在单GPU和多GPU异构路由场景下进行评估。
AI.result: 单GPU场景中RL仅提升0.1%-1.0%；多GPU异构路由中RL发现工作负载隔离策略，相比轮询提升348%性能，相比最短队列提升48%，吞吐量提升60%，延迟降低25%，且注意力机制使收敛速度提升约20%。
AI.conclusion: RL在系统问题中的价值存在明确边界：优势集中在组合性、多资源决策问题（如异构路由），而非单资源时间调度问题（如单GPU批处理），为生产环境中是否使用学习策略提供了实用指导。

title: Advances in Neural Controlled Differential Equations
comment: DPhil thesis, University of Oxford, 188 pages, 17 figures
summary:
Many real-world systems evolve continuously, yet most machine learning models interpret time series as discrete sequences. Continuous-time approaches instead treat time series as samples from an underlying input path, a formulation that naturally accommodates irregularly sampled or oversampled data. Among these, Neural Controlled Differential Equations (NCDEs) are a maximally expressive class of models that parametrise a vector field using a neural network and evolve their hidden state by solving a dynamical system driven by the input path. NCDEs typically use a non-linear vector field, so their expressive power and continuous-time flexibility come at the cost of a forward pass that is both computationally expensive and inherently sequential, limiting their scalability and practical applicability.
  This thesis advances the training and scalability of NCDEs through three complementary contributions. First, building on neural rough differential equations, Log-NCDEs apply the Log-ODE method to efficiently approximate an NCDE's solution during training, improving both computational speed and empirical performance. Second, Linear NCDEs replace the non-linear vector field with a linear one, enabling closed-form solutions and parallel-in-time computation without sacrificing theoretical expressivity. Third, Structured Linear NCDEs use structured linear vector fields to further enhance efficiency while maintaining theoretical expressiveness and empirical performance.
  Collectively, these methods reduce the time per training step for an NCDE by up to three orders of magnitude while achieving state-of-the-art performance across diverse time series benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对神经控制微分方程（NCDE）计算昂贵且难以扩展的问题，提出了三种改进方法：Log-NCDE（基于对数ODE方法加速训练）、Linear NCDE（线性向量场实现闭式解和并行计算）、Structured Linear NCDE（结构化线性向量场进一步提升效率），在保持表达能力的同时将训练速度提升三个数量级，并在多个时间序列基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: NCDE虽然具有最大表达能力和处理非均匀采样数据的优势，但其非线性向量场导致前向传播计算昂贵且本质上是顺序的，限制了可扩展性和实际应用。现有方法难以兼顾表达能力和计算效率。
AI.method: 1) Log-NCDE：应用Log-ODE方法近似NCDE的解，加速训练过程；2) Linear NCDE：用线性向量场替代非线性向量场，实现闭式解和时间并行计算；3) Structured Linear NCDE：使用结构化线性向量场进一步提升效率，同时保持理论表达能力和经验性能。
AI.result: 三种方法共同将NCDE每步训练时间减少最多三个数量级，并在多种时间序列基准上达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过线性化和结构化设计，可以在不牺牲理论表达能力的前提下大幅提升NCDE的计算效率和可扩展性，使其更适用于实际应用。

title: Air Quality Downscaling with Station-Guided Pseudo-Supervision
summary: Super-resolving coarse atmospheric fields to local PM$_{2.5}$ variations is uniquely challenged by a mismatch in spatial support: while pixels represent regional averages, ground-truth observations are discrete, unaligned samples of a continuous spatial signal. To bridge this gap, we present a station-guided framework for high-resolution PM$_{2.5}$ downscaling over Europe. Taking coarse CAMS atmospheric composition fields alongside heterogeneous side information (i.e., human activity, land cover, elevation, satellite aerosol observations, and wind fields) our framework jointly super-resolves ($\times 40$, $\approx$ 1 km) and bias-corrects CAMS rasters, without relying on temporal sequence modelling. To address the challenge of densely supervising our multi-scale transformer network with sparse in-situ data, we introduce a time-agnostic propagation strategy that utilises spatial Gaussian blending of interpolated OpenAQ observations. Extensive qualitative and station-level evaluations across Europe demonstrate that our model recovers fine-grained spatial structures and effectively mitigates localised CAMS biases.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于站点引导的框架，利用多尺度Transformer网络和空间高斯混合策略，将欧洲粗分辨率CAMS大气场下采样至约1公里，同时校正偏差，无需时序建模。
AI.motivation: 粗分辨率大气场（如CAMS）与地面PM2.5观测之间存在空间支撑不匹配问题：像素代表区域平均，而观测是离散、未对齐的连续空间信号采样点，亟需一种能弥合这一差距的高分辨率下采样方法。
AI.method: 1) 多尺度Transformer网络实现×40超分辨率（~1km）；2) 融合人类活动、土地覆盖、高程、卫星气溶胶观测和风场等多源辅助信息；3) 时间无关的传播策略，利用空间高斯混合对稀疏OpenAQ观测进行插值，以提供密集监督信号。
AI.result: 在欧洲范围内的定性和站点级评估表明，模型能够恢复细粒度空间结构，并有效缓解CAMS的局部偏差。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架成功实现了粗到细的PM2.5下采样与偏差校正，在不依赖时间序列建模的前提下提升了空间分辨率与准确性。

title: Learning Only What Valid Adapters Can Express: Subspace-Constrained Adaptation Against Fine-Tuning Poisoning
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables. Code and data: https://github.com/infinition/z-manifold
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning still leaves a broad space of behavior-changing updates reachable, so a poisoned objective can be represented and optimized. We study an alternative: adaptation constrained to the subspace estimated from a trusted pool of existing task adapters. On flan-t5-large with 196 public LoRA adapters, we show that (1) the functionally relevant content of an adapter lies in a low-dimensional shared subspace, 30 to 38 percent of its weight norm being redundant under the evaluated task distributions; (2) gradient adaptation restricted to 128 coordinates on this subspace matches full LoRA fine-tuning on clean classification data, while under targeted label inversion LoRA collapses to 3-26 percent exact match and the constrained learner keeps 62-96 percent on the tasks the pool covers; (3) the constrained learner cannot fit corrupted data, its adaptation loss separating clean from garbage by two orders of magnitude (120x), an out-of-distribution signal without an extra detector; and (4) against an adaptive backdoor attacker who optimizes within the subspace, the attack is blocked (8 percent success versus 100 for LoRA) on the task where its target behavior is unlike anything in the pool, and only partially blocked (85 percent) when the target coincides with a common pool behavior. On these two tasks the outcome is consistent with how close the target is to the pool's directions, which suggests but does not establish a pool-relative boundary. The mechanism trades peak plasticity for these properties: on tasks the pool covers poorly, unconstrained fine-tuning wins, and the protection assumes the pool itself is trusted. Code and data are public.

AI.tldr: 通过在可信任务适配器池估计的低维子空间内限制微调，该方法在保持与全LoRA微调相当性能的同时，能有效防御后门攻击（在不相容任务上成功率从100%降至8%），但对与池中行为一致的目标攻击防御力较弱（85%成功率）。
AI.motivation: 参数高效微调（如LoRA）仍存在大量可被利用的行为更新空间，恶意目标（如后门攻击）可以被表示和优化。作者希望找到一种更安全的替代方案。
AI.method: 利用196个公开LoRA适配器构建可信池，估计一个低维共享子空间，将微调限制在该子空间内（128个坐标），而不是像LoRA那样在完整参数空间中更新。
AI.result: (1) 适配器中30%-38%的权重范数在给定任务分布下是冗余的；(2) 受限学习在清洁分类数据上匹配全LoRA，但在标签反转攻击下LoRA降至3-26%准确率，受限学习保持62-96%；(3) 受限学习无法拟合损坏数据，损失与清洁数据相差120倍；(4) 对自适应后门攻击，不相容任务上成功率仅8%（LoRA为100%），相容任务上为85%。
AI.conclusion: 限制在可信子空间内的微调能提供有效的安全防护（尤其在目标行为与池中行为不一致时），但代价是当池覆盖不佳时性能受限，且安全性依赖于池本身的可信度。

title: Biologically Informed Deep Neural Networks for Multi-Omic Integration, Pathway Activity Inference and Risk Stratification in Cancer
summary: Integrating complex, multi-omics data presents significant challenges. Existing approaches often face a trade-off between model interpretability and representational capacity, with most either relying on post-hoc interpretation or use linear models that may overlook complex interactions. We report Pathway Activity Autoencoders for the multi-omics setting, which embed prior knowledge via pathway-informed architectural constraints, fostering interpretability, while preserving representational power. Our multi-omic framework is applied in the context of breast cancer and is evaluated in survival prediction and subtype classification with results indicating a positive effect of integration. We conduct analysis of individual omics layer impact on end-task performance, revealing that gene, protein, and microRNA expression layers provide the strongest contribution. Repeatability studies indicate that, while dropout improves model robustness and consistency, excessive regularisation can reduce predictive performance. Finally, visualizations of the learned feature space illustrate the framework's intrinsic transparency and clinical relevance. The results underscore the value of multi-omic integration and delineate the impact of individual omics layers, establishing practical guidelines for integration within our framework. Overall, our pathway activity autoencoder frameworks yield superior latent representations that are biologically meaningful and are directly translatable into clinically relevant insights.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多组学数据整合的通路活性自编码器框架，通过通路先验知识约束网络结构，在保持高表征能力的同时实现模型可解释性。在乳腺癌生存预测和亚型分类任务上验证了多组学整合的积极效果，发现基因、蛋白质和microRNA表达层贡献最大，并探讨了正则化与性能的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在整合复杂多组学数据时面临可解释性与表征能力之间的权衡：大多数方法要么依赖事后解释，要么使用线性模型而忽略了复杂的非线性交互。作者旨在构建一个既能保持高表征能力、又天然具有可解释性的整合框架。
AI.method: 提出Pathway Activity Autoencoders（通路活性自编码器），通过将通路先验知识嵌入为网络架构约束（而非事后解释），实现在多组学设置下的端到端学习。应用于乳腺癌多组学数据的生存预测和亚型分类任务。
AI.result: 多组学整合对预测性能有积极影响；基因、蛋白质和microRNA表达层贡献最大；适当的dropout可提升鲁棒性和一致性，但过度正则化会降低预测性能；可视化显示所学特征空间具有内在透明性和临床相关性。
AI.conclusion: 该通路活性自编码器框架能够生成具有生物学意义的优越潜在表征，并可直接转化为临床相关见解。研究结果为多组学整合中的单个组学层影响提供了量化分析，并建立了实用的整合指南。

title: How Far is Too Far? Defining the Distance Threshold for Verification Siamese Networks
summary: Siamese verification networks are widely used to compare items such as faces, cars, or signatures. In these scenarios, the network is trained to learn an embedding space in which similar objects are mapped closer together, while dissimilar objects are mapped further apart. Two objects are considered to belong to the same class (e.g., the same person in two different images) when the distance between their embeddings falls below a predefined threshold. Defining this threshold, however, is a non-trivial task and typically requires labeled data. In this work, we assume that the distribution of distances produced by a siamese verification network can be approximated by a bimodal function. Based on this assumption, we propose an unsupervised method to determine the verification threshold by identifying the minimum point between the two modes. The proposed approach does not require annotated samples, enabling the verification threshold to be updated directly in the deployment environment without the cost of manual labeling. We evaluate our method on four datasets: MNIST, CIFAR-10, LFW, and PKLot. The results indicate that the proposed approach achieves an average verification accuracy of 94%, comparable to the Equal Error Rate method, while eliminating the need for labeled data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督方法，利用双峰分布假设自动确定孪生验证网络的阈值，无需标注数据即可达到与有监督方法相当的验证准确率（平均94%）。
AI.motivation: 孪生验证网络需要设置阈值来判断两个对象是否属于同一类别，但阈值设定通常依赖标注数据，手动标注成本高且难以在部署环境中动态更新。
AI.method: 假设孪生验证网络产生的距离分布近似为双峰函数，通过找到两个峰值之间的最小值点来自动确定验证阈值，实现无监督阈值选择。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10、LFW和PKLot四个数据集上平均验证准确率达94%，与需要标注数据的等错误率方法性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无监督阈值确定方法有效消除了对标注数据的依赖，在保持高验证精度的同时降低了部署成本，具有实际应用价值。

title: CompactionRL: Reinforcement Learning with Context Compaction for Long-Horizon Agents
summary: Long-horizon agentic LLMs are increasingly limited by finite context windows, as extended interaction trajectories can exceed the maximum context length before a task is completed. Context compaction offers a natural solution by summarizing previous interaction states and continuing the rollout under a compressed context, but incorporating compaction into reinforcement learning remains underexplored. We propose CompactionRL, a reinforcement learning strategy to train long-horizon agentic LLMs with context compaction. Our approach jointly optimizes task execution and summary generation with token-level loss normalization and cross-trajectory generalized advantage estimation. This design enables the LLM agents to learn from compacted long-horizon trajectories. We train CompactionRL on top of open models and observe consistent performance gains on agentic coding tasks. CompactionRL enables the open GLM-4.5-Air model (106B-A30B) to achieve Pass@1 scores of 66.8% on SWE-bench Verified and 24.5% on Terminal-Bench 2.0, with absolute gains of 7.0 and 3.1 points, respectively. Built upon GLM-4.7-Flash (30B-A3B), CompactionRL improves Pass@1 by 5.5 and 6.8 points, reaching 56.0% on SWE-bench Verified and 20.2% on Terminal-Bench 2.0, respectively. CompactionRL is thus deployed in the RL pipeline for training the open GLM-5.2 model (750B-A40B).

AI.tldr: 本文提出CompactionRL，一种结合上下文压缩的强化学习策略，用于训练长程智能体LLM。该方法联合优化任务执行和摘要生成，通过token级损失归一化和跨轨迹广义优势估计，使LLM能从压缩后的长程轨迹中学习。在SWE-bench Verified和Terminal-Bench 2.0等编程任务上取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 长程智能体LLM受限于有限上下文窗口，交互轨迹可能在任务完成前就超过最大上下文长度。上下文压缩虽能通过总结历史状态来缓解此问题，但将压缩融入强化学习训练尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: CompactionRL采用强化学习策略，联合优化任务执行和摘要生成。关键技术包括：token级损失归一化（Token-level Loss Normalization）和跨轨迹广义优势估计（Cross-trajectory Generalized Advantage Estimation），使模型能从压缩后的长程轨迹中有效学习。
AI.result: 在GLM-4.5-Air（106B-A30B）上，SWE-bench Verified Pass@1达66.8%（+7.0），Terminal-Bench 2.0达24.5%（+3.1）。在GLM-4.7-Flash（30B-A3B）上，分别提升5.5和6.8个百分点。该方法已部署于GLM-5.2（750B-A40B）的RL训练流程中。
AI.conclusion: CompactionRL有效解决了长程LLM智能体的上下文窗口限制问题，通过强化学习联合优化压缩与任务执行，在编程类智能体任务上取得了显著且一致的性能提升，并已成功应用于更大规模模型的实际训练中。

title: TabPack: Efficient Hyperparameter Ensembles for Tabular Deep Learning
summary: In deep learning for tabular data, efficient ensembles of multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) have recently emerged as effective and practical architectures. Existing methods of this kind use the same hyperparameters for all underlying MLPs, which requires hyperparameter tuning for achieving the best performance. In this work, we introduce TabPack, an efficient MLP ensemble with strong out-of-the-box performance and reduced reliance on traditional tuning. In a single run, TabPack samples and trains many MLPs with different hyperparameters efficiently in parallel and selects ensemble members on the fly during training. Thus, TabPack only requires specifying ranges from which to sample MLP hyperparameter rather than exact hyperparameter values, which naturally demands less precision for good performance. In experiments on medium-to-large public datasets, TabPack with default settings performs on par with extensively tuned prior methods, thus substantially reducing effort and compute resources needed to achieve competitive results on tabular tasks. Notably, running the default TabPack configuration on a modern MacBook took less time than tuning some baselines on an industry-grade GPU.

AI.tldr: TabPack是一个高效的多层感知机集成方法，通过并行采样和训练不同超参数的MLP，并在训练过程中动态选择集成成员，从而在表格数据任务中实现开箱即用的强性能，大幅降低超参数调优所需的计算资源和时间成本。
AI.motivation: 现有的高效MLP集成方法为所有底层MLP使用相同的超参数，需要大量超参数调优才能达到最佳性能，计算成本高昂。本文旨在降低这种调优依赖。
AI.method: 在单次运行中并行采样并训练多个具有不同超参数的MLP，在训练过程中动态选择集成成员，用户只需指定超参数采样范围而非精确值。
AI.result: 在中大型公开数据集上，使用默认设置的TabPack与经过大量调优的先前方法性能相当。默认配置在MacBook上的运行时间甚至比某些基线方法在工业级GPU上的调优时间更短。
AI.conclusion: TabPack显著减少了在表格数据任务上取得有竞争力结果所需的调优工作和计算资源，实现了高效且易用的MLP集成方法。
